english:
Part or part set ID defining the internal parts that pressure will be applied to.
This internal structure acts as a valve to control the external vent hole area.
Pressure will be applied only after switch to UP (uniform pressure) using TSW.
zh:
定义将施加压力的内部部件或部件集合 ID。
该内部结构作为阀门，用于控制外部排气孔面积。
只有在使用 TSW 切换到 UP（均匀压力）之后才施加压力。
无附加说明。

english:
Heat convection coefficient used to calculate heat loss from the airbag external surface to ambient (W/K/m2).
See *AIRBAG_HYBRID developments (Resp. P.O. Marklund).
LT.0:	|HCONV | is a load curve ID defines heat convection coefficient as a function of time.
When STYPEH is greater than 1, HCONV is an integer of *DEFINE_CPM_NPDATA ID.
zh:
用于计算气囊外表面向环境散热的热对流系数（W/K/m2）。
参见 *AIRBAG_HYBRID 相关开发（负责人：P. O. Marklund）。
LT.0：|HCONV| 为载荷曲线 ID，用于定义热对流系数随时间的变化。
当 STYPEH 大于 1 时，HCONV 为 *DEFINE_CPM_NPDATA 的整数 ID。

english:
Initial gas inside bag considered:
EQ.0:	No
EQ.1:	Yes, using control volume method.
EQ.-1:	Yes, using control volume method. In this case ambient air enters the bag when PATM is greater than bag pressure.
EQ.2:	Yes, using the particle method.
EQ.4:	Yes, using the particle method.  Initial air particles are used for the gas front tracking algorithm,
but they do not apply forces when they collide with a segment.
Instead, a uniform pressure is applied to the airbag based on the ratio of air and inflator particles.
In this case NPRLX must be negative so that forces are not applied by the initial air.
zh:
考虑气囊内初始气体：
EQ.0：否。
EQ.1：是，使用控制体积方法。
EQ.-1：是，使用控制体积方法。在这种情况下，当环境压力高于气囊压力时，环境空气进入气囊。
EQ.2：是，使用粒子方法。
EQ.4：是，使用粒子方法。初始空气粒子用于气体前沿跟踪算法，但当它们与段碰撞时不施加力。
而是根据空气粒子与充气气体粒子的比例，对气囊施加均匀压力。
在这种情况下，NPRLX 必须为负值，以便初始空气不施加力。

english:
Part ID of an internal part that is coupled to the external vent definition.
The minimum area of this part or the vent hole will be used for actual venting area.
zh:
与外部排气定义耦合的内部部件 ID。
该部件的最小面积或排气孔面积将用于实际排气面积。

english:
Particles occupy OCCUP percent of the airbag’s volume.  The default value of OCCUP is 10%.
This field can be used to balance computational cost and signal quality.  OCCUP ranges from 0.001 to 0.1..
zh:
粒子占据气囊体积的 OCCUP 百分比。OCCUP 的默认值为 10%。
该字段可用于平衡计算成本和信号质量。OCCUP 的取值范围为 0.001 到 0.1。

english:
If the option is ON, all energy stored from damping will be evenly distributed as vibrational energy to all particles.
This improves the pressure calculation in certain applications.
EQ.0:	Off (Default)
EQ.1:	On.
zh:
如果该选项开启，阻尼储存的所有能量将作为振动能量均匀分配给所有粒子。
这会在某些应用中改善压力计算。
EQ.0：关闭（默认）。
EQ.1：开启。

english:
To avoid sudden jumps in the pressure signal during switching,
the front tracking is tapered during a transition period.
The default time of 1.0 millisecond will be applied if this value is set to zero
zh:
为避免切换过程中压力信号突然跳变，前沿跟踪会在过渡时间段内逐渐衰减。
如果该值设为零，将采用默认时间 1.0 毫秒。

english:
Mass flow rate curve for gas component i, unless the MOLEFRACTION option is used.
If the MOLEFRACTION option is used, then it is the time dependent molar fraction of the total flow for gas component i.
zh:
气体组分 i 的质量流率曲线，除非使用 MOLEFRACTION 选项。
如果使用 MOLEFRACTION 选项，则它表示气体组分 i 在总流量中的时变摩尔分数。

english:
Molar mass of gas initially inside bag.
LT.0:	-XMAIR references the ID of a *DEFINE_CPM_GAS_PROPERTIES keyword that defines the gas thermodynamic properties.
Note that AAIR, BAIR, and CAIR are ignored
zh:
气囊内初始气体的摩尔质量。
LT.0：-XMAIR 引用 *DEFINE_CPM_GAS_PROPERTIES 关键字的 ID，该关键字定义气体热力学属性。
注意 AAIR、BAIR 和 CAIR 将被忽略。

english:
Molar mass of gas component i.
LT.0:	the absolute value of XMi references the ID of a *DEFINE_‌CPM_‌GAS_‌PROPERTIES keyword that defines the gas thermodynamic properties.
Note that Ai, Bi, and Ci are ignored
zh:
气体组分 i 的摩尔质量。
LT.0：XMi 的绝对值引用 *DEFINE_CPM_GAS_PROPERTIES 关键字的 ID，该关键字定义气体热力学属性。
注意 Ai、Bi 和 Ci 将被忽略。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by
element nodes 1, 2, and 4, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES, and then rotated about the shell element normal by the angle BETA.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes about the element normal by an angle,
BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by	the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COOR_DINATE_VECTOR). Available with the R3 release of Version 971 and later.
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点 1、2 和 4 确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 相同，然后绕壳单元法向按角度 BETA 旋转。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过将材料轴绕单元法向旋转角度 BETA 来确定；BETA 从单元平面内由向量 v 与单元法向叉乘定义的直线开始计量。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID（*DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES、*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM 或 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 中的 CID）。适用于 971 版本 R3 及之后版本。

english: Part ID.
zh: 部件 ID。

english:
EQ.MECH: mechanics.
EQ.CESE: CE/SE compressible fluid flow solver.
EQ.ICFD: Incompressible fluid flow solver.
zh:
EQ.MECH：力学求解器。
EQ.CESE：CE/SE 可压缩流体流动求解器。
EQ.ICFD：不可压缩流体流动求解器。

english: R'
zh: 符号 R'。

english:
Node set ID containing tracked nodes, see *SET_NODE_OPTION.
EQ.0: all nodes are tracked with respects to the rigid wall.
zh:
包含被跟踪节点的节点集合 ID，参见 *SET_NODE_OPTION。
EQ.0：相对于刚性墙跟踪所有节点。

english: Set ID.
zh: 集合 ID。

english:
Static coefficient of friction in the local n orthotropic direction for the
SURFA (SA) or SURFB (SB) surface. The frictional coefficient is assumed
to be dependent on the relative velocity of the surfaces in contact,
where the direction and surface are left off for clarity
zh:
SURFA（SA）或 SURFB（SB）表面在局部 n 正交方向上的静摩擦系数。
假定摩擦系数依赖于接触表面的相对速度；为简明起见，此处省略方向和表面说明。

english:
The table ID of a two dimensional table, see *DEFINE_TABLE or
*DEFINE_TABLE_2D, giving the friction coefficient in the local n
direction as a function of the relative velocity and interface pressure.
In this case, each curve in the table definition defines the coefficient
of friction versus the interface pressure corresponding to a particular value of the relative velocity
zh:
二维表的表 ID，参见 *DEFINE_TABLE 或 *DEFINE_TABLE_2D；该表给出局部 n 方向摩擦系数随相对速度和界面压力的变化。
在这种情况下，表定义中的每条曲线都给出在特定相对速度值下摩擦系数随界面压力的变化。

english:
Material parameters for strain softening effect due to temperature.
TINI is the initial temperature. See A modified Johnson-Cook for
other parameters' definitions.
zh:
温度引起的应变软化效应材料参数。
TINI 为初始温度。其他参数定义参见修正 Johnson-Cook 模型。

english:
Active fiber model parameters. Note that ACT10 is an input for a time
dependent load curve that overrides some of the ACTx values. See section 2 below
zh: 主动纤维模型参数。注意 ACT10 是一条时变载荷曲线输入，会覆盖部分 ACTx 值。参见下方第 2 节。

仅适用于 OPTION = 7、±9、10、±11。剪切能量释放率（应力 × 长度），用于损伤计算；参见 Lemmen 和 Meijer [2001]。
对于 OPTION = -9 或 -11，该字段为载荷曲线 ID，给出剪切能量释放率随温度的变化；仅适用于 Mortar 选项。

english:
For OPTION = 2, setting PARAM = 1 causes the shell thickness offsets to be ignored.
For OPTION = 4, setting PARAM =1 causes SFLS to be a frictional stress limit.
For OPTION‌‌ = 6 or 8, PARAM is the critical distance, CCRIT, at which the interface failure is complete.
For OPTION = 7 or 10 PARAM is the friction angle in degrees.
For OPTION = 9 or 11, it is the exponent in the damage model. A positive value invokes the power law, while a negative one, the B-K model.
See MAT_138 for additional details. For OPTION = 13 or 14, it is the thickness of the tiebreak layer; a value greater than zero is recommended.
Default value is 1.0 for OPTIONs 9 and 11, but otherwise default value is 0.0
zh:
对于 OPTION = 2，设置 PARAM = 1 会忽略壳厚偏置。
对于 OPTION = 4，设置 PARAM = 1 会使 SFLS 成为摩擦应力限值。
对于 OPTION = 6 或 8，PARAM 为界面失效完成时的临界距离 CCRIT。
对于 OPTION = 7 或 10，PARAM 为摩擦角（单位：度）。
对于 OPTION = 9 或 11，PARAM 为损伤模型中的指数。正值调用幂律模型，负值调用 B-K 模型。
更多细节参见 MAT_138。对于 OPTION = 13 或 14，PARAM 为 tiebreak 层厚度，建议取大于零的值。
OPTION 9 和 11 的默认值为 1.0，其他情况下默认值为 0.0。

english:
The IDs of TIED contacts: 7 on the first card and 8 per additional
card for as many cards as necessary.
Any node which is a slave node in one of these interfaces, and is in
fact tied, will not be processed (as a slave node) in the Target interface.
Note that if a node is excluded from the Target by this mechanism,
contact forces may still be applied to the node due to any slave or
master nodes impacting the contact segments of which it is a part
(no contact SEGMENTS are deleted, only contact NODES).
If the Target contact is of type SURFACE_TO_SURFACE, any tied
slave nodes are deleted from both the slave side (for the normal
treatment) and the master side (for the symmetric treatment).
zh:
TIED 接触的 ID：第一张卡片上填写 7 个，后续每张卡片填写 8 个，可按需要增加卡片。
如果某节点是这些界面之一中的从节点，并且实际已被 tied，则不会在 Target 界面中作为从节点处理。
注意，如果某节点通过此机制从 Target 中排除，仍可能由于其所属接触段受到任何从节点或主节点的撞击而对该节点施加接触力。
不会删除接触段，只删除接触节点。
如果 Target 接触类型为 SURFACE_TO_SURFACE，所有 tied 从节点会同时从从侧（普通处理）和主侧（对称处理）删除。

english:
Material parameters for the rate-dependent Hosford-Coulomb
fracture initiation model, see Rate-dependent Hosford-Coulomb.
Ignored if LFRAC is defined.
zh:
率相关 Hosford-Coulomb 断裂起始模型的材料参数，参见 Rate-dependent Hosford-Coulomb。
如果定义了 LFRAC，则忽略该输入。

english:
Table ID of 3D table defining the i-th tabulated phase transformation
parameter as function of source phase and target phase (see
description of transformation models below to see which
parameters apply). The values in *DEFINE_TABLE_3D are the
phase numbers before transformation (source phase). The values in
the 2D tables referenced by *DEFINE_TABLE_3D are the phase
number after transformation. The curves referenced by the 2D
tables specify tabulated parameter (ordinate) versus either
temperature or temperature rate (abscissa).
zh:
3D 表的表 ID，用于定义第 i 个表格化相变参数随源相和目标相的变化（哪些参数适用见下方相变模型说明）。
*DEFINE_TABLE_3D 中的值为相变前的相编号（源相）。
*DEFINE_TABLE_3D 引用的 2D 表中的值为相变后的相编号。
2D 表引用的曲线指定表格化参数（纵坐标）随温度或温度率（横坐标）的变化。

english:
VISEL.EQ.1: Dissipating energy factors.(see Holzapfel)
VISEL.EQ.2: Gamma factors (see Simo).
zh:
VISEL.EQ.1：耗散能量因子（见 Holzapfel）。
VISEL.EQ.2：Gamma 因子（见 Simo）。

english:
Optional load curve that gives the coefficient of friction as a function
of the direction of relative motion, as measured in degrees from the
first orthotropic direction. If this load curve is specified, the other
parameters (FS, FD, DC, VC, LC) are ignored. This is currently only supported in the MPP version
zh:
可选载荷曲线，给出摩擦系数随相对运动方向的变化；该方向以相对于第一正交方向的角度（度）度量。
如果指定该载荷曲线，则其他参数（FS、FD、DC、VC、LC）将被忽略。当前仅 MPP 版本支持。

english: Part ID I.
zh: 部件 ID I。

english: Part ID J.
zh: 部件 ID J。

english:
Parameter S1, only considered if S0<0:
GT.0.0: Quadratic logarithmic model is applied
LT.0.0: Linear logarithmic model is applied.
zh:
参数 S1，仅当 S0 < 0 时考虑：
GT.0.0：采用二次对数模型。
LT.0.0：采用线性对数模型。

english:
Parameter T1, only considered if T0 < 0:
GT.0.0: Quadratic logarithmic model
LT.0.0: Linear logarithmic model.
zh:
参数 T1，仅当 T0 < 0 时考虑：
GT.0.0：二次对数模型。
LT.0.0：线性对数模型。

english:
Material parameters for the option XUE. The parameter k in the
original paper is assumed to be 1.0. For details, refer to Xue, L.,
Wierzbicki, T.'s 2009 paper "Numerical simulation of fracture mode
transition in ductile plates" in the International Journal of Solids and Structures.
zh: XUE 选项的材料参数。原论文中的参数 k 假定为 1.0。详情参见 Xue, L. 和 Wierzbicki, T. 于 2009 年在 International Journal of Solids and Structures 发表的论文“Numerical simulation of fracture mode transition in ductile plates”。

english:
Viscoplastic parameters.
VISPL.EQ.1: K1 and S1 are used.
VISPL.EQ.2: K1, S1, K2, S2, K3 and S3 are used.
VISPL.EQ.3: K1, S1 and K2 are used.
zh:
黏塑性参数。
VISPL.EQ.1：使用 K1 和 S1。
VISPL.EQ.2：使用 K1、S1、K2、S2、K3 和 S3。
VISPL.EQ.3：使用 K1、S1 和 K2。

english:
Coefficients for the bias-extension angle change-engineering stress
curve in Figure M293-3. G121 to G126 corresponds to the 6th order
to 1st order factors of the loading curve. See Remark 5.
zh: 图 M293-3 中偏置扩展角变化-工程应力曲线的系数。G121 到 G126 分别对应加载曲线的 6 阶到 1 阶系数。参见备注 5。

english:
Table ID defining the i-th scalar-valued phase transformation
parameter as function of source phase and target phase (see
description of transformation models below to see which
parameters apply). The values in *DEFINE_TABLE are the phase
numbers before transformation (source phase). The curves
referenced by the table specify scalar parameter (ordinate) versus
phase number after transformation (abscissa).
zh:
表 ID，用于定义第 i 个标量相变参数随源相和目标相的变化（哪些参数适用见下方相变模型说明）。
*DEFINE_TABLE 中的值为相变前的相编号（源相）。
该表引用的曲线指定标量参数（纵坐标）随相变后相编号（横坐标）的变化。

english:
Mullins parameters
MULL.EQ.1: M1-M5 are used
MULL.EQ.2: M1-M3 are used.
zh:
Mullins 参数。
MULL.EQ.1：使用 M1-M5。
MULL.EQ.2：使用 M1-M3。

english:
velocity vector of the solid wall:
LCID.EQ.0: it is defined by (Vx,Vy,Vz) itself.
LCID.NE.0: it will be defined by both of the load curve and (Vx,Vy,Vz).
zh:
固壁速度向量：
LCID.EQ.0：由 (Vx,Vy,Vz) 本身定义。
LCID.NE.0：由载荷曲线和 (Vx,Vy,Vz) 共同定义。

english: Part set ID
zh: 部件集合 ID。

english:
Coordinates of an orientation vector relative to node N1. In this
case, the orientation vector points to a virtual third node, so the
field N3 should be left undefined.
zh: 相对于节点 N1 的定向向量坐标。在这种情况下，定向向量指向一个虚拟第三节点，因此字段 N3 应留空。

english:
Plastic flow potential parameters, defined by Lankford parameters
in rolling (0 degree), diagonal (45 degree) and transverse (90 degree) directions,
respectively; see Non-associated flow rule.
zh: 塑性流动势参数，分别由轧制方向（0 度）、对角方向（45 度）和横向方向（90 度）的 Lankford 参数定义；参见非关联流动法则。

english:
Yield function parameters, defined by Lankford parameters in
rolling (0 degree), diagonal (45 degree) and transverse (90 degree) directions,
respectively; see Non-associated flow rule.
zh: 屈服函数参数，分别由轧制方向（0 度）、对角方向（45 度）和横向方向（90 度）的 Lankford 参数定义；参见非关联流动法则。

english: Node set ID
zh: 节点集合 ID。

english:
Iteration flag for speed:
ITER.EQ.0.0: fully iterative
ITER.EQ.1.0: fixed at three iterations
Generally, ITER=0 is recommended. However, ITER=1 is somewhat faster and may give acceptable results in most problems.
zh:
速度迭代标志：
ITER.EQ.0.0：完全迭代。
ITER.EQ.1.0：固定为三次迭代。
通常建议 ITER=0。不过，ITER=1 稍快，在大多数问题中也可能给出可接受的结果。

english: Psi
zh: 符号 Psi。

english: 1/psi-s
zh: 单位：1/psi-s。

english: 1/psi
zh: 单位：1/psi。

english: psi
zh: 单位：psi。

english:
Optional shear relaxation modulus for the ith term.
The Gi and BETAi terms are used only for solid elements when VISCO=1.
zh:
第 i 项的可选剪切松弛模量。
Gi 和 BETAi 项仅在 VISCO=1 时用于实体单元。

english:
Load curve, see *DEFINE_CURVE, defining the force versus actual
length during unloading. The unload curve should cover exactly
the same range as LC or the load curves of TBID and its end points
should have identical values, i.e., the combination of LC and
LCUNLD or the first curve of TBID and LCUNLD describes a
complete cycle of loading and unloading. See also material *MAT_	083.
zh:
卸载载荷曲线，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE，定义卸载过程中的力与实际长度关系。
卸载曲线应覆盖与 LC 或 TBID 载荷曲线完全相同的范围，并且其端点应具有相同值；也就是说，LC 与 LCUNLD 的组合，或 TBID 的第一条曲线与 LCUNLD 的组合，应描述一个完整的加载-卸载循环。另参见材料 *MAT_083。

english:
Shape factor for unloading. Active for nonzero values of the hysteretic unloading factor HU. Values less than one reduces the energy
dissipation and greater than one increases dissipation, see also material *MAT_083 and Figure M57-1.
zh: 卸载形状因子。当滞回卸载因子 HU 为非零值时有效。小于 1 的值会降低能量耗散，大于 1 的值会增加能量耗散；另见材料 *MAT_083 和图 M57-1。

english:
Type of viscoelasticity formulation. This appears only on the first line defining Gi, BETAi, and VFLAG.
If VFLAG=0, the standard viscoelasticity formulation is used (the default),
and if VFLAG=1, the viscoelasticity formulation using the instantaneous elastic stress is used
zh:
黏弹性公式类型。该字段只出现在定义 Gi、BETAi 和 VFLAG 的第一行。
如果 VFLAG=0，使用标准黏弹性公式（默认）；如果 VFLAG=1，使用基于瞬时弹性应力的黏弹性公式。

english:
GT.0.0: Energy release rate GIIC in Mode II
LE.0.0: Lower bound value of rate-dependent GIIC.
zh:
GT.0.0：Mode II 能量释放率 GIIC。
LE.0.0：率相关 GIIC 的下限值。

english:
GT.0.0: Yield stress in Mode II
LT.0.0: Rate-dependency is considered, Parameter S0.
zh:
GT.0.0：Mode II 屈服应力。
LT.0.0：考虑率相关性，参数 S0。

english:
GT.0.0: Yield stress in Mode I
LT.0.0: Rate-dependency is considered, Parameter T0.
zh:
GT.0.0：Mode I 屈服应力。
LT.0.0：考虑率相关性，参数 T0。

english:
Components of branch BRID:
GT.0: ID of a sub-branch
LT.0: ID of a part.
zh:
分支 BRID 的组成：
GT.0：子分支 ID。
LT.0：部件 ID。
与符号 & 相关的选项标记。

english:
GT.0:Initial yield stress.
LT.0: A yield curve or table is assigned by |SIGY|.
zh:
GT.0：初始屈服应力。
LT.0：由 |SIGY| 指定一条屈服曲线或表。

english: Mass density.
zh: 质量密度。

english: Material identification. A unique number has to be used.
zh: 材料 ID，须使用唯一编号。

english:
Optional load curve that gives a scale factor for the friction coefficient
as a function of interface pressure. This is only used if LCFS (or M) is defined
zh: 可选载荷曲线，给出摩擦系数比例因子随界面压力的变化。仅当定义了 LCFS（或 M）时使用。

english:
Optional load curve that gives a scale factor for the friction coefficient
as a function of interface pressure. This is only used if LCFSA (or SB) is defined
zh: 可选载荷曲线，给出摩擦系数比例因子随界面压力的变化。仅当定义了 LCFSA（或 SB）时使用。

english:
If the default value, 0, is active, the frictional forces acting on a node
sliding on a segment are based on the local directions of the segment.
If OACS is set to unity, 1, the frictional forces acting on a
node sliding on a segment are based on the local directions of the
sliding node. No matter what the setting for OACS, the _SA coefficients
are always used for SURFA nodes and the _SB coefficients for SURFB nodes.
zh:
如果默认值 0 有效，作用于在段上滑动节点的摩擦力基于该段的局部方向。
如果 OACS 设为 1，则作用于在段上滑动节点的摩擦力基于滑动节点的局部方向。
无论 OACS 如何设置，_SA 系数始终用于 SURFA 节点，_SB 系数始终用于 SURFB 节点。

english:
If the default value, 0, is active, the frictional forces acting on a node
sliding on a segment are based on the local directions of the segment.
If OACS is set to unity, 1, the frictional forces acting on a
node sliding on a segment are based on the local directions of the
sliding node. No matter what the setting for OACS, the _S coefficients
are always used for SURFA nodes and the _M coefficients for SURFB nodes.
zh:
如果默认值 0 有效，作用于在段上滑动节点的摩擦力基于该段的局部方向。
如果 OACS 设为 1，则作用于在段上滑动节点的摩擦力基于滑动节点的局部方向。
无论 OACS 如何设置，_S 系数始终用于 SURFA 节点，_M 系数始终用于 SURFB 节点。

english:
Constraint formulation:
for _TIED_EDGE_TO_EDGE option
EQ.0:mortar method.
EQ.1:point-to-point formulation.
zh:
约束公式：
用于 _TIED_EDGE_TO_EDGE 选项。
EQ.0：mortar 方法。
EQ.1：点到点公式。

english:
ID type of MSID:
EQ.0:Nurbs-Patch Element ID.
EQ.2:part set ID.
EQ.3:part ID,
EQ.4:node set ID for node to surface contact.
zh:
MSID 的 ID 类型：
EQ.0：Nurbs-Patch 单元 ID。
EQ.2：部件集合 ID。
EQ.3：部件 ID。
EQ.4：用于节点到面接触的节点集合 ID。

english:
ID type of SSID:
EQ.0:Nurbs-Patch Element ID.
EQ.2:part set ID.
EQ.3:part ID,
EQ.4:node set ID for node to surface contact.
zh:
SSID 的 ID 类型：
EQ.0：Nurbs-Patch 单元 ID。
EQ.2：部件集合 ID。
EQ.3：部件 ID。
EQ.4：用于节点到面接触的节点集合 ID。

english:
Optional load curve ID giving force versus penetration behavior
for RIGID_BODY_ONE_WAY contact. This option requires the
definition of the unloading stiffness, US.
zh: 可选载荷曲线 ID，给出 RIGID_BODY_ONE_WAY 接触中的力-穿透行为。该选项需要定义卸载刚度 US。

english:
If N1 and N2 are undefined, or zero, a third card is required to define the coordinates for N1 and N2.
The Z1 and Z2 coordinate values must be defined close to the part.
Based on the coordinate inputs, LS-DYNA will find the nearest nodes to define N1 and N2 from the model.
zh:
如果 N1 和 N2 未定义或为零，则需要第三张卡片定义 N1 和 N2 的坐标。
Z1 和 Z2 坐标值必须定义在部件附近。
根据坐标输入，LS-DYNA 将在模型中寻找最近节点来定义 N1 和 N2。

english:
The IDs of contacts that can mask the pressure loads. The specified contact definitions must all be of the same type. Furthermore, only
SURFACE_TO_SURFACE (two way) or AUTOMATIC_SURFACE_TO_SURFACE_TIEBREAK are supported.
For TIEBREAK contacts, pressure is masked until the tie fails. Once	the tie fails, the full pressure will be applied for the remainder of the
simulation. The values P1 and P2 are ignored. For other contact types, the contact forces, along with the nodal
contact surface areas, are used to compute the contact pressure at	each node to determine any masking effect.
zh:
可屏蔽压力载荷的接触 ID。指定的接触定义必须全部为同一类型。此外，仅支持 SURFACE_TO_SURFACE（双向）或 AUTOMATIC_SURFACE_TO_SURFACE_TIEBREAK。
对于 TIEBREAK 接触，在 tie 失效前压力会被屏蔽。一旦 tie 失效，剩余仿真过程中将施加完整压力。
P1 和 P2 的值被忽略。对于其他接触类型，将使用接触力以及节点接触表面积来计算每个节点处的接触压力，以确定任何屏蔽效应。

english:
Load curve defining uniaxial stress vs. uniaxial strain in the given direction
(XX is either 00, 45, 90). The exact definition is discussed in the Remarks
below. LCH00 must be defined, the other defaults to LCH00 if not defined.
zh: 载荷曲线，定义给定方向上的单轴应力与单轴应变关系（XX 为 00、45 或 90）。确切定义见下方备注。必须定义 LCH00；其他方向如果未定义，默认使用 LCH00。

english:
Load curve defining standard R-value vs. uniaxial strain in the given
direction (XX is either 00, 45, 90). The exact definition is discussed in the
Remarks below. Default is a constant R-value of 1.0, a negative input will
result in a constant R-value of –LCRXX.
zh: 载荷曲线，定义给定方向上的标准 R 值与单轴应变关系（XX 为 00、45 或 90）。确切定义见下方备注。必须定义 LCR00；其他方向如果未定义，默认使用 LCR00。

english:
Flag for rate independent unloading, see Remark 6.
EQ.0.0:	off,
EQ.1.0:	on.
zh:
率无关卸载标志，参见备注 6。
EQ.0.0：关闭。
EQ.1.0：开启。

english:
TABLE_3D ID's containing temperature and strain rate dependent stress-strain input curves for the 12
separate tests (LT: 3D Load Tables). LT4-6: Compression  1,2,3 directions.
zh: TABLE_3D ID，包含 12 种独立试验的温度和应变率相关应力-应变输入曲线（LT 表示 3D 载荷表）。LT4-LT6 为不同方向的压缩试验输入。

english:
Kinematic hardening rule flag:
EQ.0: Original Yoshida formulation,
EQ.1: Modified formulation. Define C1, C2 below.
zh:
运动硬化规则标志：
EQ.0：原始 Yoshida 公式。
EQ.1：修正公式；在下方定义 C1、C2。

english:
Material parameters for the option XUE. The parameter k in the
original paper is assumed to be 1.0. For details, refer to Xue, L.,
Wierzbicki, T.'s 2009 paper "Numerical simulation of fracture mode
transition in ductile plates" in the International Journal of Solids and Structures
zh: XUE 选项的材料参数。原论文中的参数 k 假定为 1.0。详情参见 Xue, L. 和 Wierzbicki, T. 于 2009 年在 International Journal of Solids and Structures 发表的论文“Numerical simulation of fracture mode transition in ductile plates”。

english: Component of vector a for AOPT = 2.
zh: AOPT = 2 时向量 a 的分量。

english: Component of vector v for AOPT = 3.
zh: AOPT = 3 时向量 v 的分量。

english: ith Sensor ID
zh: 第 i 个传感器 ID。

english:
Determines if the output file should be dumped.
EQ.0: No output file is generated.
EQ.1: The output file is generated.
zh:
确定是否输出文件。
EQ.0：不生成输出文件。
EQ.1：生成输出文件。

english:
ELFORM Element formulation options, see Remarks 1 and 3:
EQ.1: Hughes-Liu,
EQ.2: Belytschko-Tsay (default),
EQ.3: BCIZ triangular shell,
EQ.4: C0 triangular shell,
EQ.5: Belytschko-Tsay membrane,
EQ.6: S/R Hughes-Liu,
EQ.7: S/R co-rotational Hughes-Liu,
EQ.8: Belytschko-Leviathan shell,
EQ.9: Fully integrated Belytschko-Tsay membrane,
EQ.10: Belytschko-Wong-Chiang,
EQ.11: Fast (co-rotational) Hughes-Liu,
EQ.12: Plane stress (x-y plane),
EQ.13: Plane strain (x-y plane),
EQ.14: Axisymmetric solid (xy-plane, y-axis of symmetry) - area weighted (see Remark 11),
EQ.15: Axisymmetric solid (y-axis of symmetry) - volume weighted,
EQ.16: Fully integrated shell element (very fast),
EQ.-16: Fully integrated shell element modified for higher accuracy,
EQ.17 Fully integrated DKT, triangular shell element.  See Remark 10,
EQ.18: Fully Integrated linear DK qaudrilateral/triangular shell, See Remarks 2 and 3.
EQ.20: Fully integrated linear assumed strain C0 shell, See Remark 3.
EQ.21: Fully integrated linear strain C0 shell (5DOF)
EQ.22: Linear shear panel element (3 DOF per node), See Remark 4.
EQ.23: 8-node quadrilateral shell
EQ.24: 6-node quadratic triangular shell
EQ.25: Belytschko-Tsay shell with thickness stretch.
EQ.26: Fully integrated shell with thickness stretch.
EQ.27: C0 triangular shell with thickness stretch.
EQ.29: Cohesive shell element for edge-to-edge connection of shells.  See Remark 13.
EQ.-29:Cohesive shell element for edge-to-edge connection of shells (more suitable for pure shear).  See Remark 13.
EQ.30:	Fast fully integrated element with 2 in-plane integration points based on ELFORM 16
EQ.31: 1 point eulerian Navier-Stokes,
EQ.32: 8 point Eulerian Navier-Stokes,
EQ.33: CVFEM Eulerian Navier-Stokes.EQ.
EQ.41: Mesh-free (EFG) shell local approach. (more suitable for crashworthiness analysis)
EQ.42: Mesh-free (EFG) shell global approach. (more suitable for metal forming analysis)
EQ.43: Mesh-free (EFG) plane strain formulation (x-y plane).
EQ.44: Mesh-free (EFG) axisymmetric solid formulation (x-y plane, y-axis of symmetry).
46: Cohesive element for two-dimensional plane strain, plane stress, and area-weighted axisymmetric problems (type 14 shells).
EQ.47: Cohesive element for two-dimensional volume-weighted axisymmetric problems (use with type 15 shells).
EQ.52:	Plane strain (xy-plane) XFEM, base element type 13 with full integration. See Remark 9.EQ.54:	Shell XFEM, base element type defined by BASELM(default 2).See Remark 9.
EQ.55 : 8 - node singular plane strain(xy - plane) finite element.See Remark 12.
EQ.98 : Interpolation shell
EQ.99 : Simplified linear element for time - domain vibration studies.See Remark 5.
EQ.101 : User defined shell
EQ.102 : User defined shell
EQ.103 : User defined shell
EQ.104 : User defined shell
EQ.105 : User defined shell
EQ.201 : Isogeometric shells with NURBS.See * ELEMENT_SHELL_NURBS_PATCH.
GE.1000 : Generalized shell element formulation(user defined).See * DEFINE_ELEMENT_GENERALIZED_SHELL.
Note that the 2D and 3D element types must not be mixed,and different types of 2D elements must not be used together.For example,
two - dimensional axisymmetric calculations can use either element types 14 or 15, but these element types must not be mixed together.Likewise,
the plane strain element type must not be used with either the plane stress element or the axisymmetric element types.
In three dimensions, the different shell elements types, i.e., 1 - 11 and 16, can be freely mixed together.
zh:
ELFORM 单元公式选项，参见备注 1 和 3：
EQ.1：Hughes-Liu。
EQ.2：Belytschko-Tsay（默认）。
EQ.3：BCIZ 三角形壳。
EQ.4：C0 三角形壳。
EQ.5：Belytschko-Tsay 膜。
EQ.6：S/R Hughes-Liu。
EQ.7：Belytschko-Wong-Chiang。
EQ.8：Belytschko-Leviathan 壳。
更多选项参见 LS-DYNA 用户手册。

english:
Non-structural mass per unit area.  This is additional mass which comes from materials, such as carpeting.
This mass is not directly included in the time step calculation.
Another and often more convenient alternative for defining distributed mass is with *ELEMENT_MASS_PART,
which allows additional non-structural mass to be distributed by an area weighted distribution to all nodes of a given part ID.
zh:
单位面积非结构质量。这是来自地毯等材料的附加质量。
该质量不会直接包含在时间步长计算中。
另一种通常更方便的分布质量定义方法是使用 *ELEMENT_MASS_PART，它允许按面积加权分布方式将附加非结构质量分配给给定部件 ID 的所有节点。

english:
Radiation factor (f) between the slide surfaces. A radient-heat-transfer coefficient (h-rad) is calculated (see *BOUNDARY_RADIATION). If a gap exists between the slide surfaces, then the contact conductance is calculated by
h = h-cond + h-rad.
zh: 滑移表面之间的辐射因子 f。辐射换热系数 h-rad 将据此计算（参见 *BOUNDARY_RADIATION）。如果两个接触段之间存在间隙，则会考虑通过该间隙的辐射换热。

english: Component of vector d for AOPT = 2.
zh: AOPT = 2 时向量 d 的分量。

english:
Variable rank in the following list (see Remark 3):
EQ.1:	-stress for MMGFR
EQ.2:	-stress for MMGFR
EQ.3:	-stress for MMGFR
EQ.4:	-stress for MMGFR
EQ.5:	-stress for MMGFR
EQ.6:	-stress for MMGFR
EQ.7:	plastic strain for MMGFR
EQ.8:	internal energy for MMGFR
EQ.9:	bulk viscosity for MMGFR
EQ.10:	volume from previous cycle for MMGFR
GE.11 and LE.20:	other auxiliary variables for MMGFR
GE.21 and LE.40:	auxiliary variables for MMGTO (-stress, …)
EQ.41:	mass for MMGFR
EQ.42:	mass for MMGTO
EQ.43:	volume fraction for MMGFR
EQ.44:	volume fraction for MMGTO
EQ.45:	material volume for MMGFR
EQ.46:	material volume for MMGTO
EQ.47:	time step
EQ.48:	time
EQ.49:	cycle
GE.50 and LE.57:	-positions of the ALE nodes
GE.58 and LE.65:	-positions of the ALE nodes
GE.66 and LE.73:	-positions of the ALE nodes
GE.74 and LE.81:	-velocities of the ALE nodes
GE.82 and LE.89:	-velocities of the ALE nodes
GE.90 and LE.97:	-velocities of the ALE nodes
GE.98 and LE.105:	-accelerations of the ALE nodes
GE.106 and LE.113:	-accelerations of the ALE nodes
GE.114 and LE.121:	-accelerations of the ALE nodes
GE.122 and LE.129:	masses of the ALE nodes.
zh:
下列清单中的变量序号（参见备注 3）：
EQ.1 到 EQ.6：MMGFR 的各应力分量。
EQ.7：MMGFR 的压力。
EQ.8：MMGFR 的密度。
EQ.9：MMGFR 的体积分数。
EQ.10：MMGFR 的速度。
EQ.11：MMGFR 的内能。
EQ.12：MMGFR 的温度。

english:
Variable rank in the following list (See Remark 2):
EQ.0: See Remark 3
EQ.1: ....-stress for FR_MMG
EQ.2: ....-stress for FR_MMG
EQ.3: ....-stress for FR_MMG
EQ.4: ....-stress for FR_MMG
EQ.5: ....-stress for FR_MMG
EQ.6: ....-stress for FR_MMG
EQ.7: plastic strain for FR_MMG
EQ.8: internal energy for FR_MMG
EQ.9: bulk viscosity for FR_MMG
EQ.10: volume from previous cycle for FR_MMG
GE.11 and LE.20: other auxiliary variables for FR_MMG
GE.21 and LE.40: auxiliary variables for TO_MMG (xx-stress, ...)
EQ.41: mass for FR_MMG
EQ.42: mass for TO_MMG
EQ.43: volume fraction for FR_MMG
EQ.44: volume fraction for TO_MMG
EQ.45: material volume for FR_MMG
EQ.46: material volume for TO_MMG
EQ.47: time
EQ.48: cycle
EQ.49: x-position of the ALE element center
EQ.50: y-position of the ALE element center
EQ.51: z-position of the ALE element center
EQ.52: x-position of the segment center
EQ.53: y-position of the segment center
EQ.54: 𝑧-position of the segment center
EQ.55: x-component of the segment normal
EQ.56: y-component of the segment normal
EQ.57: z-component of the segment normal
GE.58 and LE.65: x-positions of the ALE nodes
GE.66 and LE.69: x-positions of the segment nodes
GE.70 and LE.77: y-positions of the ALE nodes
GE.79 and LE.81: y-positions of the segment nodes
GE.83 and LE.89: z-positions of the ALE nodes
GE.90 and LE.93: z-positions of the segment nodes
GE.94 and LE.101: x-velocities of the ALE nodes
GE.102 and LE.105: ..-velocities of the segment nodes
GE.106 and LE.113: ..-velocities of the ALE nodes
GE.114 and LE.117: ..-velocities of the segment nodes
GE.118 and LE.125: ..-velocities of the ALE nodes
GE.126 and LE.129: ..-velocities of the segment nodes
GE.130 and LE.137: x-accelerations of the ALE nodes
GE.138 and LE.141: x-accelerations of the segment nodes
GE.142 and LE.149: y-accelerations of the ALE nodes
GE.150 and LE.153: y-accelerations of the segment nodes
GE.154 and LE.161: z-accelerations of the ALE nodes
GE.162 and LE.165: z-accelerations of the segment nodes
GE.166 and LE.173: masses of the ALE nodes
GE.174 and LE.177: masses of the segment nodes
EQ.178: rank of the variable updated by the function (See Remark 4)
EQ.179: rank of the multi-material group in the set
EQ.180: time step.
zh:
下列清单中的变量序号（参见备注 2）：
EQ.0：参见备注 3。
EQ.1 起：FR_MMG 的应力、压力、密度、体积分数、速度、内能和温度等变量。

english:
Parameters defining flux geometry, depending on field IFORM.
See Remark 3 for details.
zh:
定义热流几何形状的参数，具体含义取决于字段 IFORM。
详情参见备注 3。

english:
Parameters defining the moving volume's geometry.
The meaning of each parameter depends on field IFORM.  See Remark 3 for details.
zh:
定义移动体积几何形状的参数。
每个参数的含义取决于字段 IFORM。详情参见备注 3。

english:
Flag for control volume airbag synchronization:
EQ.0:	No synchronization,
EQ.1 : Since airbag pressure will not change when all segments constituting the airbag belong to
the same rigid body, setting IBAG = 1 will skip calculation of control volume airbags of
which all the segments belong to the same nodal rigid body PID when PID is on.The airbag calculation will be resumed,
with time offset to related airbag time - dependent curves, when PID is turned off by* SENSOR_CONTROL.
zh:
控制体积气囊同步标志：
EQ.0：不同步。
EQ.1：当组成气囊的所有段都属于同一个节点刚体时，气囊压力不会变化；因此在 PID 开启时，IBAG=1 会跳过所有段都属于同一节点刚体 PID 的控制体积气囊计算。
当 PID 被 *SENSOR_CONTROL 关闭时，会恢复气囊计算，并对相关气囊时间相关曲线施加时间偏移。

english:
Flag for prescribed-motion synchronization:
EQ.0:	No synchronization,
EQ.1 : Prescribed boundary conditions,* BOUNDARY_PRESCRIBED_MOTION, for PID will be turned off
automatically when PID is turned off by* SENSOR_CONTROL.Prescribed boundary condition not for PIDand of
which or all related nodes belong to PID will be turned off when PID is active to avoid boundary
condition conflict.Those boundary conditions will be turned on, with time
offset to related time - dependent curves, when PID is turned off by* SENSOR_CONTROL.
EQ.2 : Same as IPSM = 1, however, without time offset when those boundary conditions not for PID are turned on..
zh:
规定运动同步标志：
EQ.0：不同步。
EQ.1：当 PID 被 *SENSOR_CONTROL 关闭时，PID 的规定边界条件 *BOUNDARY_PRESCRIBED_MOTION 会自动关闭。
非 PID 的规定边界条件，如果其部分或全部相关节点属于 PID，则会在 PID 激活时关闭，以避免边界条件冲突。
当 PID 被 *SENSOR_CONTROL 关闭时，这些边界条件会重新开启，并对相关时间相关曲线施加时间偏移。
EQ.2：与 IPSM=1 相同，但非 PID 边界条件重新开启时不施加时间偏移。

english:
Surfaces closer than CLOSE are tied. If CLOSE is left as 0.0, it is
defaulted to one percent of the mesh characteristic length scale.
Nodes that are above or below the surface will be tied if they are
close enough to the surface.
zh:
距离小于 CLOSE 的表面将被 tied。如果 CLOSE 保持为 0.0，默认取网格特征长度尺度的 1%。
位于表面上方或下方的节点，只要足够接近表面，也会被 tied。

english:
Thermal contact conductivity for a tied interface, in case of using the
option THERMAL in the contact.
zh: 使用接触中的 THERMAL 选项时，tied 界面的热接触导热系数。

english:
Self-contact indicators
= 0: no self - contact
= 1 : self - contact is defined for the corresponding part
zh:
自接触指示器：
= 0：无自接触。
= 1：为对应部件定义自接触。

english:
Part set ID to be distributed.. All parts in ID1 will be shared across all
processors. Then all parts in ID2 will be distributed, and so on
zh: 待分布的部件集合 ID。ID1 中的所有部件将在所有处理器之间共享，然后分布 ID2 中的所有部件，依此类推。

english:
Variable rank in the following list:
LT.0:	|VAR| : rank of the auxiliary variable to be replaced in d3plot (see remark 3)
EQ.1: xx-stress
EQ.2: yy-stress
EQ.3: zz-stress
EQ.4: xy-stress
EQ.5: yz-stress
EQ.6: zx-stress
EQ.7: plastic strain
EQ.8: internal energy
EQ.9: bulk viscosity
EQ.10: previous volume
EQ.11: pressure
EQ.12: mass
EQ.13: volume
EQ.14: density
EQ.15:	kinetic energy
EQ.16: The 6 stresses are added to the database.
EQ.17:	Impulse (pressure integrated over time)
If there is a blank column between 2 variable ranks, the list between these 2 ranks is selected.For example, if the card is as follows :
1, ,6
The 6 stresses are added to the database.
zh:
下列清单中的变量序号：
LT.0：|VAR| 为要在 d3plot 中替换的辅助变量序号（参见备注 3）。
EQ.1：xx 应力。
EQ.2：yy 应力。
EQ.3：zz 应力。
EQ.4：xy 应力。
EQ.5：yz 应力。
EQ.6：zx 应力。
EQ.7：塑性应变。
EQ.8：内能。
EQ.9：体积黏性。
EQ.10：前一体积。
EQ.11：压力。
EQ.12：质量。
EQ.13：体积。
EQ.14：密度。
EQ.15：动能。
EQ.16：将 6 个应力加入数据库。
EQ.17：冲量（压力对时间积分）。
如果两个变量序号之间有空列，则选取这两个序号之间的列表。例如卡片为 1, ,6 时，将 6 个应力加入数据库。

english:
Geometry type
EQ.1: box
EQ.2: sphere
EQ.3: cylinder
EQ.4: ellipsoid
EQ.5: hemisphere (see Remark 1).
zh:
几何类型：
EQ.1：盒体。
EQ.2：球体。
EQ.3：圆柱体。
EQ.4：椭球体。
EQ.5：半球体（参见备注 1）。

english:
EIDBEG, EIDEND > 0: Range of thick porous element IDs. These are solids in 3D and shells in 2D.
EIDBEG, EIDEND < 0: Range of thin porous element IDs.	These are shells in 3D and beams in 2D.
The ALE option does not support thin porous elements.
EIDBEG > 0, EIDEND = 0: EIDBEG is a set of thick porous
elements
EIDBEG > 0, EIDEND < 0: EIDBEG is a set of thin porous elements.
zh:
EIDBEG、EIDEND > 0：厚多孔单元 ID 范围。在 3D 中为实体，在 2D 中为壳。
EIDBEG、EIDEND < 0：薄多孔单元 ID 范围。在 3D 中为壳，在 2D 中为梁。
ALE 选项不支持薄多孔单元。
EIDBEG > 0、EIDEND = 0：EIDBEG 为厚多孔单元集合。
EIDBEG > 0、EIDEND < 0：EIDBEG 为薄多孔单元集合。

english:
*DEFINE_VECTOR IDs to define a specific coordinate system. VECID1
and VECID2 give the 𝑥- and 𝑦-direction respectively. The 𝑧-
vector is a cross product of VECID1 and VECID2. If this latter is not
orthogonal to VECID1, its direction will be corrected with a crossproduct
of 𝑧- and 𝑥-vectors. The vectors are stored as isoparametric
locations to update their directions if the element deforms or rotates.
zh:
用于定义特定坐标系的 *DEFINE_VECTOR ID。VECID1 和 VECID2 分别给出 x 和 y 方向。
z 向量为 VECID1 与 VECID2 的叉乘。如果后者不与 VECID1 正交，其方向将通过 z 向量与 x 向量的叉乘进行修正。
这些向量以等参位置存储，以便在单元变形或旋转时更新方向。

english:
Afterburn option EQ.0.0: No afterburn energy (Standard EOS_JWL)
EQ.1.0: Constant rate of afterburn energy added between times T1 and T2
EQ.2.0: Linearly-increasing rate of afterburn energy added between times T1 and T2
EQ.3.0: Miller's extension for afterburn energy.
zh:
后燃选项：
EQ.0.0：无后燃能量（标准 EOS_JWL）。
EQ.1.0：在 T1 到 T2 之间以恒定速率加入后燃能量。
EQ.2.0：在 T1 到 T2 之间以后燃能量线性增加速率加入。
EQ.3.0：Miller 后燃能量扩展。

english:
These must match COUPIDs from the *CONSTRAINED_LA-	GRANGE_IN_SOLID card from the previous runs. These IDs
specify which of the first run's couplings are propagated into this
run through pressure data read from the fsilnk file.
zh:
这些 ID 必须与前一次运行的 *CONSTRAINED_LAGRANGE_IN_SOLID 卡片中的 COUPID 匹配。
这些 ID 指定第一次运行中的哪些耦合会通过从 fsilnk 文件读取的压力数据传递到本次运行。

english:
Output set ID defining the domain over which variable output is
to be performed in this time sequence. Each DOMID refers to the
domain identified in an *LSO_DOMAIN keyword card.
zh: 输出集合 ID，用于定义此时间序列中执行变量输出的域。每个 DOMID 引用一个 *LSO_DOMAIN 关键字卡片中标识的域。

english: x-coordinate of point p for AOPT = 1.
zh: AOPT = 1 时点 p 的 x 坐标。

english: y-coordinate of point p for AOPT = 1.
zh: AOPT = 1 时点 p 的 y 坐标。

english: z-coordinate of point p for AOPT = 1.
zh: AOPT = 1 时点 p 的 z 坐标。
单位：1/s。

english:
GT.0.0:	E_a, Young’s modulus - longitudinal direction
LT.0.0:	Load Curve ID or Table ID = (-EA).See Remark 8.
Load Curve.When - EA is equal to a load curve ID, it is taken as defining the uniaxial elastic stress as a function of strain behavior in the longitudinal direction.Negative data
points correspond to compression and positive values to tension.
Tabular Data.When - EA is equal to a table ID, it defines for each strain rate value a load curve ID giving the uniaxial elastic stress as a function of strain behavior in the longitudinal direction.
Logarithmically Defined Tables.If the first uniaxial elastic stress as a function of strain curve in the table corresponds to a negative strain rate, LS - DYNA assumes that the natural logarithm of the strain rate value is used for all stress - strain curves.
zh:
GT.0.0：E_a，纵向 Young 模量。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID = (-EA)，参见备注 8。
载荷曲线：当 -EA 等于载荷曲线 ID 时，定义纵向单轴弹性应力随应变的关系；负数据点对应压缩，正值对应拉伸。
表格数据：当 -EA 等于表 ID 时，为每个应变率值定义一条载荷曲线，给出纵向单轴弹性应力随应变的关系。
对数定义表：如果表中的第一条单轴弹性应力-应变曲线对应负应变率，LS-DYNA 假定所有应力-应变曲线均使用应变率值的自然对数。

english:
Load-Curve ID, that defines orientation dependent failure strains.
The ordinate values in the load-curve define the various failure strains, in the following order:
1. EF_11T: tensile failure strain in longitudinal a-direction
2. EF_11C: compressive failure strain in longitudinal a-direction
3. EF_22T: tensile failure strain in transverse b-direction
4. EF_22C: compressive failure strain in transverse b-direction
5. EF_12: in-plane shear failure strain in ab-plane
6. EF_33T: tensile failure strain in transverse c-direction
7. EF_33C: compressive failure strain in transverse c-direction
8. EF_23: out-of plane shear failure strain in bc-plane
9. EF_31: out-of plane shear failure strain in ca-plane
Thus, the load-curve to define these values has to have either 5 (shells) or 9 (solids) entries in its definition.
A load-curve definition with 9 entries may be used for shells, ignoring the last 4 entries. The abscissa values are ignored.
zh:
定义方向相关失效应变的载荷曲线 ID。
载荷曲线的纵坐标值按以下顺序定义各失效应变：
1. EF_11T：纵向 a 方向拉伸失效应变。
2. EF_11C：纵向 a 方向压缩失效应变。
3. EF_22T：横向 b 方向拉伸失效应变。
4. EF_22C：横向 b 方向压缩失效应变。
5. EF_12：ab 平面内剪切失效应变。
6. EF_33T：横向 c 方向拉伸失效应变。
7. EF_33C：横向 c 方向压缩失效应变。
8. EF_23：bc 平面外剪切失效应变。
9. EF_31：ca 平面外剪切失效应变。
因此，用于定义这些值的载荷曲线必须包含 5 个（壳）或 9 个（实体）条目。
包含 9 个条目的载荷曲线可用于壳，此时忽略最后 4 个条目。横坐标值被忽略。

english:
Quality factor options. These quality factors reduce the clear wood tension, shear, and compression strengths as a function of grade.
EQ. 1: Grade 1, 1D, 2, 2D.
Predefined strength reduction factors are:
Pine: Qual_T=0.47 in tension/shear.
Qual_C=0.63 in compression.
Fir: Qual_T=0.040 in tension/shear.
Qual_C=0.73 in compression.
EQ.-1: DS-65 or SEl STR (pine and fir).
Predefined strength reduction factors are:
Qual_T=0.80 in tension/shear.
Qual_C=0.93 in compression.
EQ.-2: Clear wood.
No strength reduction factors are applied:
Qual_T=1.0.
Qual_C=1.0.
GT.0: User defined quality factor in tension. Values between 0 and 1 are expected. Values greater than one are allowed, but not be realistic.
zh:
质量因子选项。这些质量因子按等级降低净木材的拉伸、剪切和压缩强度。
EQ.1：等级 1、1D、2、2D。预定义强度折减因子为：松木 Qual_T=0.47（拉伸/剪切），Qual_C=0.63（压缩）；冷杉 Qual_T=0.040（拉伸/剪切），Qual_C=0.73（压缩）。
EQ.-1：DS-65 或 SEl STR（松木和冷杉）。预定义强度折减因子：Qual_T=0.80（拉伸/剪切），Qual_C=0.93（压缩）。
EQ.-2：净木材。不施加强度折减因子：Qual_T=1.0，Qual_C=1.0。
GT.0：用户定义的拉伸质量因子。期望值在 0 到 1 之间；允许大于 1 的值，但通常不现实。

english:
TABLE_3D ID's containing temperature and strain rate dependent stress-strain input curves for the 12
separate tests (LT: 3D Load Tables). LT1-3: Tension 1,2,3 directions.
zh: TABLE_3D ID，包含 12 种独立试验的温度和应变率相关应力-应变输入曲线（LT 表示 3D 载荷表）。LT1-LT3：1、2、3 方向拉伸。

english:
Material axes option for phase i, see Figure M2-1.
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by element nodes as shown in part (a) of Figure M2-1. The
a-direction is from node 1 to node 2 of the element. The b-direction is orthogonal to the a-direction and is in the
plane formed by nodes 1, 2, and 4. When this option is used in two-dimensional planar and axisymmetric analysis,
it is critical that the nodes in the element definition be numbered counterclockwise for this option to work correctly.
EQ.1.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by a
point in space and the global location of the element center; this is the a-direction. This option is for solid elements only.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes about the element normal by an angle,
BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.
The plane of a solid element is the midsurface between the inner surface and outer surface defined by the
first four nodes and the last four nodes of the connectivity of the element, respectively.
EQ.4.0: locally orthotropic in cylindrical coordinate system with
the material axes determined by a vector v, and an originating point, P, which define the centerline axis. This option is for solid elements only.
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR). Available in R3 version of 971 and later.
zh:
相 i 的材料轴选项，参见图 M2-1。
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点按图 M2-1(a) 确定；a 方向从单元节点 1 指向节点 2，b 方向与 a 方向正交并位于节点 1、2、4 构成的平面内。在二维平面和轴对称分析中使用该选项时，单元节点必须按逆时针编号。
EQ.1.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由空间点和单元中心的全局位置确定，该方向为 a 方向；仅适用于实体单元。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过将材料轴绕单元法向旋转角度 BETA 来确定；BETA 从单元平面内由向量 v 与单元法向叉乘定义的直线开始计量。实体单元的平面为由连接关系前四个节点定义的内表面与后四个节点定义的外表面之间的中面。
EQ.4.0：圆柱坐标系中的局部正交各向异性，材料轴由向量 v 和原点 P 定义的中心线轴确定；仅适用于实体单元。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID（*DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES、*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM 或 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 中的 CID）。适用于 971 R3 及之后版本。

english:
Material axes option (see MAT_OPTIONTROPIC_ELASTIC for a more complete description):
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by
element nodes 1, 2, and 4, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES, and then rotated about the shell element normal by the angle MANGL.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes about the element normal by an angle,
BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by	the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COOR_DINATE_VECTOR). Available with the R3 release of Version 971 and later.
zh:
材料轴选项（更完整说明参见 MAT_OPTIONTROPIC_ELASTIC）：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点 1、2 和 4 确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 相同，然后绕壳单元法向按角度 MANGL 旋转。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过将材料轴绕单元法向旋转角度 BETA 来确定；BETA 从单元平面内由向量 v 与单元法向叉乘定义的直线开始计量。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID（*DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES、*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM 或 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 中的 CID）。适用于 971 R3 及之后版本。

english:
Hardening parameter for in-plane shear plasticity (0.0 <= BETA <=	1.0).
EQ.0.0: Pure kinematic hardening
EQ.1.0: Pure isotropic hardening	0.0<BETA<1.0: mixed hardening.
zh:
面内剪切塑性的硬化参数（0.0 <= BETA <= 1.0）。
EQ.0.0：纯运动硬化。
EQ.1.0：纯各向同性硬化。
0.0 < BETA < 1.0：混合硬化。

english:
Maximum effective strain for element layer failure. A value of unity
would equal 100% strain.
GT.0.0: fails when effective strain calculated assuming material is volume preserving exceeds EFS.
LT.0.0: fails when effective strain calculated from the full strain tensor exceeds |EFS|.
zh:
单元层失效的最大有效应变。值为 1 表示 100% 应变。
GT.0.0：当假定材料体积保持不变计算得到的有效应变超过 EFS 时失效。
LT.0.0：当由完整应变张量计算得到的有效应变超过 |EFS| 时失效。

english:
Material angle in degrees for AOPT = 0 (shells only) and 3.
MANGLE may be overridden on the element card, see
*ELEMENT_SHELL_BETA and *ELEMENT_SOLID_ORTHO.
zh:
AOPT = 0（仅壳）和 AOPT = 3 时的材料角，单位为度。
MANGLE 可在单元卡片上被覆盖，参见 *ELEMENT_SHELL_BETA 和 *ELEMENT_SOLID_ORTHO。

english:
Percentage of layers which must fail until crashfront is initiated. E.g.
|PFL|=80.0, then 80 % of layers must fail until strengths are reduced
in neighboring elements. Default: all layers must fail. A single layer
fails if 1 in-plane IP fails (PFL>0) or if 4 in-plane IPs fail (PFL<0).
zh:
触发 crashfront 之前必须失效的层百分比。例如 |PFL|=80.0 表示必须有 80% 的层失效后，相邻单元中的强度才会降低。
默认：所有层都必须失效。单层失效条件为 1 个面内积分点失效（PFL>0），或 4 个面内积分点失效（PFL<0）。

english:
Flag for evaluation and post-processing of Puck's inter-fiber-failure
criterion (IFF, see Puck, Kopp and Knops [2002]).
EQ.0.0: no evaluation of Puck's IFF-criterion.
EQ.1.0: Puck's IFF-criterion will be evaluated.
zh:
用于评估和后处理 Puck 纤维间失效准则（IFF，见 Puck、Kopp 和 Knops [2002]）的标志。
EQ.0.0：不评估 Puck 的 IFF 准则。
EQ.1.0：评估 Puck 的 IFF 准则。

english:
Type of fiber model:
EQ.1:	Holzapfel-Gasser-Ogden [6]
EQ.2:	Freed-Doehring [2].
zh:
纤维模型类型：
EQ.1：Holzapfel-Gasser-Ogden [6]。
EQ.2：Freed-Doehring [2]。

english: Ogden constants, with i = 1,…,8.
zh: Ogden 常数，其中 i = 1,…,8。

english: Ogden moduli, with i = 1,…,8.
zh: Ogden 模量，其中 i = 1,…,8。

english:
*DEFINE_VECTOR IDs to define a specific coordinate system. VECID1 and VECID2 give the x- and y-direction respectively.
The z-vector is a cross product of VECID1 and VECID2. If this latter is not
orthogonal to VECID1, its direction will be corrected with a cross-	product of z- and x-vectors. The vectors are stored as isoparametric.
zh:
用于定义特定坐标系的 *DEFINE_VECTOR ID。VECID1 和 VECID2 分别给出 x 和 y 方向。
z 向量为 VECID1 与 VECID2 的叉乘。如果后者不与 VECID1 正交，其方向将通过 z 向量与 x 向量的叉乘进行修正。向量以等参位置存储。

english:
Coupling IDs for one or more ALE fluid-structure-interaction (FSI)
*CONSTRAINED_LAGRANGE_IN_SOLID_ID cards. These couplings are deleted during the 2nd, CV computational phase.
zh:
一个或多个 ALE 流固耦合（FSI）*CONSTRAINED_LAGRANGE_IN_SOLID_ID 卡片的耦合 ID。
这些耦合会在第二个控制体积计算阶段删除。

english:
Sound speed of the fluid.
GT.0: real constant sound speed.
LT.0: |C| is the load curve ID,which defines the frequency dependent complex sound speed.See *FREQUENCY_DOMAIN_ACOUSTIC_SOUND_SPEED.
zh:
流体中的声速。
GT.0：实常数声速。
LT.0：|C| 为载荷曲线 ID，用于定义频率相关的复数声速。参见 *FREQUENCY_DOMAIN_ACOUSTIC_SOUND_SPEED。

english:
Damping flag:
EQ.0: use modal damping coefficient ζ,defined by DAMPF, or LCDAM, or Rayleigh damping defined by DMPMAS and DMPSTF in this card.
EQ.1: use damping defined by *DAMPING_PART_MASS and *DAMPING_PART_STIFFNESS.
zh:
阻尼标志：
EQ.0：使用由 DAMPF 或 LCDAM 定义的模态阻尼系数 ζ，或使用本卡片中由 DMPMAS 和 DMPSTF 定义的 Rayleigh 阻尼。
EQ.1：使用 *DAMPING_PART_MASS 和 *DAMPING_PART_STIFFNESS 定义的阻尼。

english:
Applicable degrees-of-freedom for excitation input(ignored if VAD=1).
EQ. 1: x-translational degree-of-freedom x-rotational degree-of-freedom (for torque excitation, VAD=8),
EQ. 2: y-translational degree-of-freedom or y-rotational degree-of-freedom (for torque excitation, VAD=8),
EQ. 3: z-translational degree-of-freedom or z-rotational degree-of-freedom (for torque excitation, VAD=8),
EQ. 4: translational movement in direction given by vector VID or rotational movement with axis given by vector VID (for torque excitation, VAD=8).
zh:
激励输入适用的自由度（VAD=1 时忽略）。
EQ.1：x 平移自由度或 x 转动自由度（用于扭矩激励，VAD=8）。
EQ.2：y 平移自由度或 y 转动自由度（用于扭矩激励，VAD=8）。
EQ.3：z 平移自由度或 z 转动自由度（用于扭矩激励，VAD=8）。
EQ.4：沿向量 VID 给定方向的平移运动，或以向量 VID 给定轴的转动运动（用于扭矩激励，VAD=8）。

english:
Load Curve definition flag.
EQ.0: load curves are given as amplitude / phase angle,
EQ.1: load curves are given as real / imaginary components.
zh:
载荷曲线定义标志。
EQ.0：载荷曲线以幅值/相位角给出。
EQ.1：载荷曲线以实部/虚部给出。

english:
Memory flag:
EQ.0: modal superposition will be performed in-core. This is helpful to speed up the simulation.
EQ.1: modal superposition will be performed out-of-core. This is needed for some large scale problems which require huge memory (beyond the memory available).
zh:
内存标志：
EQ.0：模态叠加在内存中执行，有助于加速仿真。
EQ.1：模态叠加在外存中执行；对于需要超出可用内存的大规模问题，此选项是必要的。

english:
Type of NOUT:
EQ.0: part set ID (not implemented),
EQ.1: part ID (not implemented),
EQ.2: segment set ID,
EQ.3: node set ID
EQ.-2: segment set ID which mismatches with acoustic boundary nodes. Mapping of velocity or acceleration to the acoustic boundary nodes is performed.
zh:
NOUT 类型：
EQ.0：部件集合 ID（未实现）。
EQ.1：部件 ID（未实现）。
EQ.2：段集合 ID。
EQ.3：节点集合 ID。
EQ.-2：与声学边界节点不匹配的段集合 ID，将执行速度或加速度到声学边界节点的映射。

english:
Response output type:
EQ.0: velocity,
EQ.1: acceleration.
zh:
响应输出类型：
EQ.0：速度。
EQ.1：加速度。

english:
Type of NID:
EQ.0: node ID,
EQ.1: node set ID,
EQ.2: segment set ID.
zh:
NID 类型：
EQ.0：节点 ID。
EQ.1：节点集合 ID。
EQ.2：段集合 ID。

english:
Flag for displacement, velocity and acceleration results:
EQ.0: absolute values are requested,
EQ.1: relative values are requested (for VAD = 2, 3 and 4 only).
zh:
位移、速度和加速度结果标志：
EQ.0：请求绝对值。
EQ.1：请求相对值（仅适用于 VAD = 2、3 和 4）。

english:
Restart option.
EQ.0: A new run without dumpssd,
EQ.1: Restart with dumpssd.
zh:
重启动选项。
EQ.0：不使用 dumpssd，执行新的运行。
EQ.1：使用 dumpssd 重启动。

english:
Restart option.
EQ.0: A new modal analysis is performed,
EQ.1: Restart with d3eigv,
EQ.2: Restart with "modeshp" binary scratch file.
zh:
重启动选项。
EQ.0：执行新的模态分析。
EQ.1：使用 d3eigv 重启动。
EQ.2：使用 "modeshp" 二进制暂存文件重启动。

english:
Stress used in fatigue analysis:
EQ.0: Von Mises stress,
EQ.1: Maximum principal stress,
EQ.2: Maximum shear stress.
zh:
疲劳分析中使用的应力：
EQ.0：Von Mises 应力。
EQ.1：最大主应力。
EQ.2：最大剪应力。

english:
Excitation input type:
EQ.0: nodal force,
EQ.1: pressure
EQ.2: base velocity,
EQ.3: base acceleration,
EQ.4: base displacement,
EQ.5: enforced velocity by large mass method (see remark 10),
EQ.6: enforced acceleration by large mass method (see remark 10),
EQ.7: enforced displacement by large mass method (see remark 10).
EQ.8: torque.
EQ.9: base angular velocity,
EQ.10: base angular acceleration,
EQ.11: base angular displacement.
EQ.12: enforced velocity (for DIRECT type keyword options only)
EQ.13: enforced acceleration (for DIRECT type keyword options only)
EQ.14: enforced displacement (for DIRECT type keyword options only)
zh:
激励输入类型：
EQ.0：节点力。
EQ.1：压力。
EQ.2：基底速度。
EQ.3：基底加速度。
EQ.4：基底位移。
EQ.5：大质量法强制速度（参见备注 10）。
EQ.6：大质量法强制加速度（参见备注 10）。
EQ.7：大质量法强制位移（参见备注 10）。
EQ.8：扭矩。
EQ.9：基底角速度。
EQ.10：基底角加速度。
EQ.11：基底角位移。
EQ.12：强制速度（仅适用于 DIRECT 类型关键字选项）。
EQ.13：强制加速度（仅适用于 DIRECT 类型关键字选项）。
EQ.14：强制位移（仅适用于 DIRECT 类型关键字选项）。

english:
Symmetric switch
EQ.0:no symetric mapping
EQ.1: yz plane symmetric mapping
EQ.2: zx plane symmetric mapping
EQ.3: zx and yz planes symmetric mapping
EQ.4: user defined symmetric plane mapping
zh:
对称开关：
EQ.0：无对称映射。
EQ.1：yz 平面对称映射。
EQ.2：zx 平面对称映射。
EQ.3：zx 和 yz 平面对称映射。
EQ.4：用户定义对称平面映射。

english: Input a positive sensor ID for AND and negative ID for OR
zh: 输入正的传感器 ID 表示与（AND）逻辑，输入负的传感器 ID 表示或（OR）逻辑。

english:
Flags controlling ON/OFF at each S-ALE mesh face.
EQ 0: OFF
EQ 1 : ON
zh:
控制每个 S-ALE 网格面的开/关标志。
EQ.0：关闭。
EQ.1：开启。

english:
ID for automatically generated part containing visualization elements for base coupling.
If not specified, LS-DYNA will assign a part ID. See Remarks 14 and 15.
zh:
自动生成部件的 ID，该部件包含用于底部耦合可视化的单元。
如果未指定，LS-DYNA 将分配一个部件 ID。参见备注 14 和 15。

english:
ID for automatically generated part containing visualization elements for perpendicular and axial coupling.
If not specified, LS-DYNA will assign a part ID. See Remarks 14 and 15.
zh:
自动生成部件的 ID，该部件包含用于垂直和轴向耦合可视化的单元。
如果未指定，LS-DYNA 将分配一个部件 ID。参见备注 14 和 15。

english:
Mid-point relative Euclidian residual norm min and max tolerance, to be seen as a confidence interval, see Remark for IAUTO = 3.
Only active if RCTOL on *CONTROL_‌IMPLICIT_‌SOLUTION is set.
zh:
中点相对欧氏残差范数的最小和最大容差，可视为置信区间；参见 IAUTO = 3 的备注。
仅当 *CONTROL_IMPLICIT_SOLUTION 中的 RCTOL 被设置时有效。

english:
Mid-point relative maximum residual norm min and max tolerance, to be seen as a confidence interval, see Remark for IAUTO = 3.
Only active if RMTOL on *CONTROL_‌IMPLICIT_‌SOLUTION is set.
zh:
中点相对最大残差范数的最小和最大容差，可视为置信区间；参见 IAUTO = 3 的备注。
仅当 *CONTROL_IMPLICIT_SOLUTION 中的 RMTOL 被设置时有效。

english:
EQ.0: Part set
EQ.1: Part.
zh:
EQ.0：部件集合。
EQ.1：部件。

english:
Number of layers which must fail prior to element deletion.
LT.0.0:	 is the percentage of layers which must fail prior to element deletion.
zh:
单元删除前必须失效的层数。
LT.0.0：其绝对值为单元删除前必须失效的层百分比。

english:
Initial orientation angles of the first, second and third fibers relative
to reference fiber orientation defined by N1-N2, respectively.
zh: 第一、第二和第三根纤维相对于由 N1-N2 定义的参考纤维方向的初始取向角。

english:
Thickness flag for nominal stress calculation
EQ.0:	Use minimum sheet thickness
EQ.1:	Use average sheet thickness
EQ.2	Use maximum sheet thickness
EQ.3:	Use sum of sheet thicknesses.
zh:
名义应力计算的厚度标志：
EQ.0：使用最小板厚。
EQ.1：使用平均板厚。
EQ.2：使用最大板厚。
EQ.3：使用板厚总和。

english:
Young's modulus: LT.0.0:	|"E"| is the Young's modulus. E < 0 invokes uniaxial stress for solid spot welds with the transverse stresses assumed to be zero. See Remark 1.
This is for when the keyword option is unset (<BLANK>) only..
zh:
Young 模量。LT.0.0：|E| 为 Young 模量。E < 0 会对实体点焊调用单轴应力，并假定横向应力为零。参见备注 1。
这仅适用于关键字选项未设置（空白）时。

english:
Use reference geometry to initialize the stress tensor. The reference
geometry is defined by the keyword:*INITIAL_FOAM_REFERENCE_GEOMETRY (see there for more details).
EQ.0.0: off,
EQ.1.0: on.
zh:
使用参考几何初始化应力张量。参考几何由关键字 *INITIAL_FOAM_REFERENCE_GEOMETRY 定义（更多细节见该关键字）。
EQ.0.0：关闭。
EQ.1.0：开启。

english:
Fraction of plastic work converted into heat(supersedes FWORK in *CONTROL_THERMAL_SOLVER if a coupled thermal/structural analysis):
GT.0.0:	constant value is used
LT.0.0:	-BETA gives either a curve ID for strain rate dependence, or a table ID for strain rate and temperature dependence,
or a 3-dimensional table ID for temperature (TABLE_3D), strain rate (TABLE) and plastic strain (CURVE) dependence.
zh:
转换为热的塑性功比例（若为耦合热/结构分析，则覆盖 *CONTROL_THERMAL_SOLVER 中的 FWORK）：
GT.0.0：使用常数值。
LT.0.0：-BETA 给出应变率相关的曲线 ID，或应变率和温度相关的表 ID，或温度（TABLE_3D）、应变率（TABLE）和塑性应变（CURVE）相关的三维表 ID。

english:
Load curve ID or Table ID. The load curve ID defines plastic failure strain as a function of triaxiality.
The table ID defines for each Lode angle a load curve ID giving the plastic failure strain versus triaxiality for that Lode angle.
See Remarks for a description of the combination of LCF, LCG, LCH, and LCI.
zh:
载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID。载荷曲线 ID 定义塑性失效应变随三轴度的变化。
表 ID 为每个 Lode 角定义一条载荷曲线 ID，给出该 Lode 角下塑性失效应变与三轴度的关系。
LCF、LCG、LCH 和 LCI 的组合说明见备注。

english:
Load curve ID defining stress vs. strain hardening behavior from a
uniaxial tension test; must be along the rolling direction. Also see A
modified Johnson-Cook.
zh: 载荷曲线 ID，定义单轴拉伸试验得到的应力-应变硬化行为；试验方向必须沿轧制方向。另见修正 Johnson-Cook。

english:
Load curve ID defining stress scale factors vs. temperature in
Kelvin (Figure M260B-1 bottom), determined from experiments.
Temperatures are stored in history variable #4. Temperature scale
factors are stored in history variable #7. To turn on this variable for
viewing in LS-PrePost, set NEIPS to at least "7" in
*DATABASE_EXTENT_BINARY. It is very useful to know what
levels of temperatures and temperature scale factors in a particular
simulation. Once d3plot files are opened in LS-PrePost, individual
element time history can be plotted via menu option Post → History,
or a color contour of the entire part can be viewed with the menu
option Post → FriComp → Misc. Also see A modified Johnson-Cook..
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，定义应力比例因子随开尔文温度的变化（图 M260B-1 底部），由实验确定。温度存储在历史变量 #4 中，温度比例因子存储在历史变量 #7 中。
若要在 LS-PrePost 中查看该变量，在 *DATABASE_EXTENT_BINARY 中将 NEIPS 至少设为 7。了解特定仿真中的温度水平和温度比例因子非常有用。打开 d3plot 文件后，可通过 Post → History 绘制单个单元时间历史，或通过 Post → FriComp → Misc 查看整个部件的云图。另见修正 Johnson-Cook。

english:
Load curve ID defining stress scale factors vs. strain rates (Figure
M260B-1 middle); determined from experiments. Strain rates are
stored in history variable #5. Strain rate scale factors are stored in
history variable #6. To turn on the variables for viewing in LSPrePost,
set NEIPS to at least "6" in *DATABASE_EXTENT_BINARY.
It is very useful to know what levels of strain rates, and strain
rate scale factors in a particular simulation. Once d3plot files are
opened in LS-PrePost, individual element time history can be plotted
via menu option Post → History, or a color contour of the entire part
can be viewed with the menu option Post → FriComp → Misc. Also
see A modified Johnson-Cook.
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，定义应力比例因子随应变率的变化（图 M260B-1 中部），由实验确定。应变率存储在历史变量 #5 中，应变率比例因子存储在历史变量 #6 中。
若要在 LS-PrePost 中查看这些变量，在 *DATABASE_EXTENT_BINARY 中将 NEIPS 至少设为 6。了解特定仿真中的应变率水平和应变率比例因子非常有用。打开 d3plot 文件后，可通过 Post → History 绘制单个单元时间历史，或通过 Post → FriComp → Misc 查看整个部件的云图。另见修正 Johnson-Cook。

english:
Load curve ID defining a fracture limit curve. Leave this field
empty if parameters A, B0, GAMMA, C, N are defined. However, if
this field is defined, parameters A, B0, GAMMA, C, N will be
ignored even if they are defined.
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，用于定义断裂极限曲线。如果定义了参数 A、B0、GAMMA、C、N，则留空该字段。
但如果定义了该字段，即使参数 A、B0、GAMMA、C、N 也被定义，它们仍将被忽略。

english:
This variable can be used to speed up the simulation while
equalizing the strain rate effect, useful especially in cases where the
pulling speed or punch speed is slow. For example, if the pulling
speed is at 15 mm/s but running the simulation at this speed will
take a long time, the pulling speed can be increased to 500 mm/s
while "SCALE" can be set to 0.03, giving the same results as those
from 15 mm/s, but with the benefit of greatly reduced computational
time, see examples and Figures in *MAT_260A for details.
Furthermore, the increased absolute value (within a reasonable
range) of mass scaling -1.0*dt2ms frequently used in forming
simulation does not affect the strain rates, as shown in the examples
and Figures in *MAT_260A.
zh:
该变量可在保持应变率效应等效的同时加快仿真，特别适用于拉伸速度或冲头速度较慢的情况。例如，如果拉伸速度为 15 mm/s，但按该速度运行仿真耗时很长，可将拉伸速度提高到 500 mm/s，同时将 SCALE 设为 0.03，从而得到与 15 mm/s 相同的结果，并显著减少计算时间。详情参见 *MAT_260A 中的示例和图。
此外，成形仿真中常用的质量缩放 -1.0*dt2ms 的绝对值在合理范围内增大时，不会影响应变率，如 *MAT_260A 示例和图所示。

english:
Material parameters for strain softening effect due to temperature.
TINI is the initial temperature. See A modified Johnson-Cook for
other parameters' definitions..
zh:
温度引起的应变软化效应材料参数。
TINI 为初始温度。其他参数定义参见修正 Johnson-Cook。

english:
Failure flag.
EQ.0.0: Not active. No erosion.
EQ.X > 0.0: Active and element will erode if wt and wc is equal to 1 in
X percent of the integration points. If X=0.60, 60% of all integration
points must fail before erosion..
zh:
失效标志。
EQ.0.0：不激活，不侵蚀。
EQ.X > 0.0：激活；若 X 百分比积分点中的 wt 和 wc 等于 1，则单元侵蚀。例如 X=0.60 表示所有积分点中 60% 必须失效后才侵蚀。

english:
Strain rate flag.
EQ.1.0: Strain rate dependent
EQ.0.0: No strain rate dependency.
zh:
应变率标志。
EQ.1.0：应变率相关。
EQ.0.0：无应变率相关性。

english:
Flag for damage type.
EQ.0.0: Linear damage formulation (Default)
EQ.1.0: Bi-linear damage formulation
EQ.2.0: Exponential damage formulation
EQ.3.0: No damage The best results are obtained with the bi-linear formulation.
zh:
损伤类型标志。
EQ.0.0：线性损伤公式（默认）。
EQ.1.0：双线性损伤公式。
EQ.2.0：指数损伤公式。
EQ.3.0：无损伤。
通常双线性公式可获得最佳结果。

english:
Use reference geometry to initialize the stress tensor.  The reference geometry is defined by the keyword:
*INITIAL_FOAM_REFERENCE_GEOMETRY.EQ.0.0:	off
EQ.1.0:	on
zh:
使用参考几何初始化应力张量。参考几何由关键字 *INITIAL_FOAM_REFERENCE_GEOMETRY 定义。
EQ.0.0：关闭。
EQ.1.0：开启。

english:
Number or percentage of failed integration points prior to element deletion (default value is 1).
GT.0.0:	Number of integration points which must fail before element is deleted.
LT.0.0:	Applies only to shells. |NUMFIP| is the percentage of layers which must fail before element fails.
For shell formulations with 4 integration points per layer, the layer is considered failed if any of the integration points in the layer fails
zh:
单元删除前失效积分点的数量或百分比（默认值为 1）。
GT.0.0：单元删除前必须失效的积分点数量。
LT.0.0：单元删除前必须失效的积分点百分比。

english:
Choice of variable as driving quantity for damage, called "history value" in the following.
EQ.0.0: Equivalent plastic strain rate is the driving quantity for
the damage if IFLG1 = 0. Alternatively if IFLG1 = 1,
components of the plastic strain rate tensor are driving quantities for damage (see remarks).
GT.0.0: The rate of the additional history variable HISn is the
driving quantity for damage. IFLG1 should be set to 0.
LT.0.0: *DEFINE_FUNCTION IDs defining the damage driving
quantities as a function of the components of the plastic strain rate tensor, IFLG1 should be set to 1.
zh:
作为损伤驱动量的变量选择，以下称为“历史值”。
EQ.0.0：若 IFLG1 = 0，等效塑性应变率为损伤驱动量；若 IFLG1 = 1，则塑性应变率张量分量为损伤驱动量（见备注）。
GT.0.0：附加历史变量 HISn 的变化率为损伤驱动量，IFLG1 应设为 0。
LT.0.0：*DEFINE_FUNCTION ID，用于将损伤驱动量定义为塑性应变率张量分量的函数，IFLG1 应设为 1。

english: Components of vector  for AOPT = 2.
zh: AOPT = 2 时向量的分量。

english:
Mass density. This should be set to the rest density of the fluid.
The actual mass of the structure will be calculated from the parent surfaces sampled with the *DEFINE_SPH_MESH_SURFACE keyword.
zh:
质量密度。应设置为流体的静止密度。
结构的实际质量将根据使用 *DEFINE_SPH_MESH_SURFACE 关键字采样的父表面计算。

english:
Relationship between the two cyclic boundary condition surfaces:EQ.0: none assumed (default)
EQ.1: The first surface is rotated about an axis to match the second surface.
EQ.2: The faces of the first surface are translated in a given direction to obtain the corresponding faces on the second surface.
zh:
两个循环边界条件表面之间的关系：
EQ.0：不假定任何关系（默认）。
EQ.1：第一个表面绕某轴旋转后与第二个表面匹配。
EQ.2：第一个表面的面沿给定方向平移，以得到第二个表面上的对应面。

english:
Interval distance. This field is designed to deal with beam elements having a wide variation in lengths.
Coupling points are generated at an interval of length equal to XINT.
Hence the number of coupling points in a beam element is no longer a fixed number (NCOUP),
but rather variable, depending on the length of the beam element.
This field can be used together with NCOUP.
In that case, in each element, we will take the larger number of coupling points from these two options.
zh:
间隔距离。该字段用于处理长度变化范围很大的梁单元。
耦合点按等于 XINT 的长度间隔生成。
因此梁单元中的耦合点数量不再是固定的 NCOUP，而是随梁单元长度变化。
该字段可与 NCOUP 一起使用；在这种情况下，每个单元采用这两个选项给出的较大耦合点数量。

english: Part set ID.
zh: 部件集合 ID。

english:
c20 when the current flows in the charge direction:
GE.0.0:constant value.
LT.0.0:absolute value is a define function or table ID.
zh:
电流沿充电方向流动时的 c20：
GE.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：绝对值为 define function 或表 ID。

english:
c20 when the current flows in the discharge direction:
GE.0.0:constant value.
LT.0.0:absolute value is a define function or table ID.
zh:
电流沿放电方向流动时的 c20：
GE.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：绝对值为 define function 或表 ID。

english:
r20 when the current flows in the charge direction:
GE.0.0:constant value.
LT.0.0:absolute value is a define function or table ID.
zh:
电流沿充电方向流动时的 r20：
GE.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：绝对值为 define function 或表 ID。

english:
r20 when the current flows in the discharge direction:
GE.0.0:constant value.
LT.0.0:absolute value is a define function or table ID.
zh:
电流沿放电方向流动时的 r20：
GE.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：绝对值为 define function 或表 ID。

english:
r30 when the current flows in the charge direction:
GE.0.0:constant value.
LT.0.0:absolute value is a define function or table ID.
zh:
电流沿充电方向流动时的 r30：
GE.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：绝对值为 define function 或表 ID。

english:
Type of input boundary values in BEM analysis.
EQ.0: boundary velocity will be processed in BEM analysis.
EQ.1: boundary acceleration will be processed in BEM analysis.
EQ.2: pressure is prescribed and the real and imaginary parts are given by LC1 and LC2.
EQ.3: normal velocity is prescribed and the real and imaginary parts are given by LC1 and LC2.
EQ.4: impedance is prescribed and the real and imaginary parts are given by LC1 and LC2.
EQ.-n: normal velocity (only real part) is prescribed, through load
curve n. An amplitude versus. frequency load curve (with curve ID n) needs to be defined.
zh:
BEM 分析中输入边界值的类型：
EQ.0：在 BEM 分析中处理边界速度。
EQ.1：在 BEM 分析中处理边界加速度。
EQ.2：指定压力，其实部和虚部由 LC1 和 LC2 给出。
EQ.3：指定法向速度，其实部和虚部由 LC1 和 LC2 给出。
EQ.4：指定阻抗，其实部和虚部由 LC1 和 LC2 给出。
EQ.-n：通过载荷曲线 n 指定法向速度（仅实部）。需要定义一条幅值-频率载荷曲线，其曲线 ID 为 n。

english:
Flag for writing out weighted SPL file Press_dBA with different weighting options.
EQ.0: No writing out Press_dBA.
EQ.1: write out Press_dBA and use A-weighting.
EQ.2: write out Press_dBA and use B-weighting.
EQ.3: write out Press_dBA and use C-weighting.
EQ.4: write out Press_dBA and use D-weighting.
zh:
写出带不同计权选项的加权 SPL 文件 Press_dBA 的标志：
EQ.0：不写出 Press_dBA。
EQ.1：写出 Press_dBA 并使用 A 计权。
EQ.2：写出 Press_dBA 并使用 B 计权。
EQ.3：写出 Press_dBA 并使用 C 计权。
EQ.4：写出 Press_dBA 并使用 D 计权。

english:
Time interval between writing velocity or acceleration, and pressure at boundary
elements in the binary file, to be proceeded at the end of LS-DYNA simulation.
zh: 在 LS-DYNA 仿真结束时，将速度或加速度以及边界单元压力写入二进制文件的时间间隔。

english:
FFT windows (Default=0).
EQ.0: Rectangular window
EQ.1: Hanning window
EQ.2: Hamming window
EQ.3: Blackman window
EQ.4: Raised cosine window
EQ.5: Exponential window.
zh:
FFT 窗函数（默认=0）：
EQ.0：矩形窗。
EQ.1：Hanning 窗。
EQ.2：Hamming 窗。
EQ.3：Blackman 窗。
EQ.4：升余弦窗。
EQ.5：指数窗。

english:
Free edge and multi-connection constraints option (default = 0).
EQ.0: free edge and multi-connection constraints not considered.
EQ.1: free edge and multi-connection constraints considered.
EQ.2: only free edge constraints are considered.
EQ.3: only multi-connection constraints are considered.
zh:
自由边和多连接约束选项（默认=0）：
EQ.0：不考虑自由边和多连接约束。
EQ.1：考虑自由边和多连接约束。
EQ.2：仅考虑自由边约束。
EQ.3：仅考虑多连接约束。

english:
Flag for output files (Default=0).
EQ.0: Press_Pa (magnitude of pressure vs. frequency), Press_dB (sound
pressure level vs. frequency) and bepres (ASCII database file for LSPrepost)
are provided.
EQ.1: Press_Pa_real (real part of the pressure vs. frequency) and
Press_Pa_imag (imaginary part of the pressure vs. frequency) are
included, in addition to Press_Pa, Press_dB and bepres.
EQ.10: files for IPFILE = 0, and fringe files for acoustic pressure.
EQ.11: files for IPFILE = 1, and fringe files for acoustic pressure.
EQ.20: files for IPFILE = 0, and fringe files for sound pressure level.
EQ.21: files for IPFILE = 1, and fringe files for sound pressure level.
EQ.31: files for IPFILE = 1, and fringe files for acoustic pressure(real part).
EQ.41: files for IPFILE = 1, and fringe files for acoustic pressure(imaginary part).
zh:
输出文件标志（默认=0）。
EQ.0：提供 Press_Pa（压力幅值随频率）、Press_dB（声压级随频率）和 bepres（供 LS-PrePost 使用的 ASCII 数据库文件）。
EQ.1：除 Press_Pa、Press_dB 和 bepres 外，还包含 Press_Pa_real（压力实部随频率）和 Press_Pa_imag（压力虚部随频率）。
EQ.10：IPFILE=0 的文件，以及声压 fringe 文件。
EQ.11：IPFILE=1 的文件，以及声压 fringe 文件。
EQ.20：IPFILE=0 的文件，以及声压级 fringe 文件。
EQ.21：IPFILE=1 的文件，以及声压级 fringe 文件。
EQ.31：IPFILE=1 的文件，以及声压实部 fringe 文件。
EQ.41：IPFILE=1 的文件，以及声压虚部 fringe 文件。

单位转换标志：
EQ.0：不进行单位转换。
EQ.1：使用 MKS 单位，无需转换。
EQ.2：使用 lbfxs2/in、inch、s、lbf、psi 等单位，在 BEM 声学计算中转换为 MKS。
EQ.3：使用 kg、mm、ms、kN、GPa 等单位，在 BEM 声学计算中转换为 MKS。
EQ.4：使用 ton、mm、s、N、MPa 等单位，在 BEM 声学计算中转换为 MKS。

english:
Method used in acoustic analysis (Default =0)
EQ.0: Rayleigh method (very fast)
EQ.1: Kirchhoff method coupled to FEM for acoustics
(*MAT_ACOUSTIC) (see Remark 4)
EQ.2: Variational Indirect BEM
EQ.3: Collocation BEM
EQ.4: Collocation BEM with Burton-Miller formulation for exterior
problems (no irregular frequency phenomenon).
zh:
声学分析中使用的方法（默认=0）：
EQ.0：Rayleigh 方法（很快）。
EQ.1：与声学 FEM（*MAT_ACOUSTIC）耦合的 Kirchhoff 方法（参见备注 4）。
EQ.2：变分间接 BEM。
EQ.3：配点 BEM。
EQ.4：带 Burton-Miller 公式的配点 BEM，用于外部问题（无不规则频率现象）。

english:
Number of Domain Decomposition, used for memory saving.
For large problems, the boundary mesh is decomposed into NDD
domains for less memory allocation.
This option is only used if METHOD>=2..
zh:
域分解数量，用于节省内存。
对于大型问题，边界网格会被分解为 NDD 个域，以减少内存分配。
该选项仅在 METHOD>=2 时使用。

english:
Preconditioner update option.
EQ.0: updated at every frequency.
EQ.N: updated for every N frequencies.
zh:
预条件器更新选项：
EQ.0：每个频率都更新。
EQ.N：每 N 个频率更新一次。

english:
Location where normal velocity or acceleration is taken (default = 0).
EQ.0: elements or segments.
EQ.1: nodes.
zh:
法向速度或加速度的取值位置（默认=0）：
EQ.0：单元或段。
EQ.1：节点。

english:
NORM should be set such that the normal vectors point away from the fluid.
EQ.0: normal vectors are not inverted (default).
EQ.1: normal vectors are inverted.
zh:
应设置 NORM 使法向量背离流体。
EQ.0：不反转法向量（默认）。
EQ.1：反转法向量。

english:
Reference pressure to be used to output pressure in dB, in file Press_dB. If
Ref_Pres=0, Press_dB file will not be generated. A file called Press_Pa is
generated and contains the pressure at output nodes.
zh:
用于在 Press_dB 文件中以 dB 输出压力的参考压力。若 Ref_Pres=0，则不生成 Press_dB 文件。
将生成名为 Press_Pa 的文件，其中包含输出节点处的压力。

english:
This flag is used to save an LS-DYNA analysis if the binary output file in the (bem=filename) option has not been changed(default = 0).
EQ.0: LS-DYNA time domain analysis is processed and generates a new binary file.
EQ.1: LS-DYNA time domain analysis is not processed.The binary files from previous run are used. The files include the binary output file filename, and the binary file bin_velfreq, which saves the boundary velocity from FFT.
EQ.2: LS-DYNA restarts from d3dump file by using "R="command line parameter. This is useful when the last run was interrupted by sense switches such as "sw1".
EQ.3: LS-DYNA reads in user provided velocity history saved in an ASCII file, bevel.
EQ.-3:	LS-DYNA reads in user provided velocity spectrum saved in an ASCII file, bevelf
EQ.4: run acoustic computation on a boundary element mesh with velocity information given with a denser finite element mesh in last run. This option requires both "bem = filename" and "lbem = filename2" in the command line, where filename2 is the name of the binary file generated in the last run with denser mesh.
EQ.5: LS-DYNA time domain analysis is not processed. The binary file filename from previous run is used. An FFT is performed to get the new frequency domain boundary velocity and the results are saved in bin_velfreq.
zh:
如果 (bem=filename) 选项中的二进制输出文件未改变，该标志用于节省 LS-DYNA 分析时间（默认=0）。
EQ.0：执行 LS-DYNA 时域分析并生成新的二进制文件。
EQ.1：不执行 LS-DYNA 时域分析，使用前一次运行的二进制文件，包括二进制输出文件 filename 和保存 FFT 边界速度的 bin_velfreq。
EQ.2：使用命令行参数 R= 从 d3dump 文件重启动 LS-DYNA；适用于上次运行被 sw1 等 sense switch 中断的情况。
EQ.3：LS-DYNA 读入用户提供的 ASCII 文件 bevel 中保存的速度历史。
EQ.-3：LS-DYNA 读入用户提供的 ASCII 文件 bevelf 中保存的速度频谱。
EQ.4：使用上次运行中更密有限元网格给出的速度信息，在边界单元网格上执行声学计算。该选项要求命令行同时包含 bem=filename 和 lbem=filename2，其中 filename2 为上次更密网格运行生成的二进制文件名。
EQ.5：不执行 LS-DYNA 时域分析，使用前一次运行的二进制文件 filename；执行 FFT 得到新的频域边界速度，并将结果保存到 bin_velfreq。

english:
Boundary element type:
EQ.0: part Set ID
EQ.1: part ID
EQ.2: segment set ID.
zh:
边界单元类型：
EQ.0：部件集合 ID。
EQ.1：部件 ID。
EQ.2：段集合 ID。

EQ.0：不请求时域结果。
EQ.1：请求时域结果。
EQ.2：请求时域结果（Press_Pa_t 给出压力实值随时间的变化）。

english:
Output exterior field point type.
EQ.0: node ID.
EQ.1: Node set ID.
EQ.2: Segment set ID.
zh:
外部场点输出类型：
EQ.0：节点 ID。
EQ.1：节点集合 ID。
EQ.2：段集合 ID。

english:
Output interior field point type.
EQ.0: node ID.
EQ.1: Node set ID.
EQ.2: Segment set ID.
zh:
内部场点输出类型：
EQ.0：节点 ID。
EQ.1：节点集合 ID。
EQ.2：段集合 ID。

english:
Flag for writing out nodal or elemental velocity data.
EQ.0: No writing out velocity data.
EQ.1: write out time domain velocity data (in x, y and z directions).
EQ.2: write out frequency domain velocity data (in normal direction).
zh:
写出节点或单元速度数据的标志：
EQ.0：不写出速度数据。
EQ.1：写出时域速度数据（x、y、z 方向）。
EQ.2：写出频域速度数据（法向）。

english: Define only if FLAG2=0: Fracture parameters in the Johnson-Cook fracture criterion.
zh: 仅当 FLAG2=0 时定义：Johnson-Cook 断裂准则中的断裂参数。

english: Part Set ID.
zh: 部件集合 ID。

english:
Flag indicating if this surface blocks the view between any other 2 surfaces.
EQ.0: no blocking (default)
EQ.1: blocking.
zh:
指示该表面是否阻挡任意两个其他表面之间视线的标志。
EQ.0：不阻挡（默认）。
EQ.1：阻挡。

english:
Number of integration points for viewfactor calculation.
EQ.0: LS-DYNA determines the number of integration points based on the segment size and separation distance
1 <= NINT <= 10: User specified number.
zh:
用于计算视角因子的积分点数量。
EQ.0：LS-DYNA 根据段尺寸和间隔距离确定积分点数。
1 <= NINT：使用指定的积分点数量。

english: sid
zh: SID 标识。

english:
EQ.0 partset
EQ .1 part
EQ.2 segmentset
zh:
EQ.0：部件集合。
EQ.1：部件。
EQ.2：段集合。

english:
Surfaces closer than CLOSE are tied. If CLOSE is left as 0.0, it is
defaulted to one percent of the mesh characteristic length scale. Nodes
that are above or below the surface will be tied if they are close enough to the surface
zh:
距离小于 CLOSE 的表面将被 tied。如果 CLOSE 保持为 0.0，默认取网格特征长度尺度的 1%。
位于表面上方或下方的节点，只要足够接近表面，也会被 tied。

english:
Automatic Constraint Scan flag
EQ.1:	scan the assembled stiffness matrix looking for unconstrained, unattached degrees of freedom.
Generate additional constraints as necessary to avoid negative eigenvalues.
EQ.2:	do not add constraints.
zh:
自动约束扫描标志。
EQ.1：扫描已组装刚度矩阵，查找未约束、未连接的自由度，并按需要生成附加约束。

english:
Drilling rotation constraint method for shells (see Remarks below).
EQ.1:	add drilling stiffness (old Version 970 method)
EQ.2:	same as 4 below
EQ.3:	add no drilling stiffness
EQ.4:	add drilling stiffness (improved method) (default).
zh:
壳单元钻转约束方法（参见下方备注）。
EQ.1：添加钻转刚度（旧版 970 方法）。
EQ.2：同下方选项 4。
EQ.3：不添加钻转刚度。
其他选项参见备注。

english:
Matrix assembly package:
EQ.2:	Default.
EQ.3:	Same as 2, but incorporates a non-symmetric linear solver; see Remarks below
zh:
矩阵组装包：
EQ.2：默认。
EQ.3：同 EQ.2，但包含非对称线性求解器；参见下方备注。

english:
Linear solver print flag controls screen and message file output (see Remarks below).
EQ.0:	no printing
EQ.1:	output summary statistics on memory, cpu requirements
EQ.2:	more statistics
EQ.3:	even more statistics and debug checking
During execution, use the interactive command "<ctrl-c>lprint" to toggle this print flag between 0 and 1.
zh:
线性求解器打印标志，控制屏幕和消息文件输出（参见下方备注）。
EQ.0：不打印。
EQ.1：输出内存和 CPU 需求的汇总统计。
EQ.2 及以上：输出更详细信息。

english:
Linear equation solver method (see Remarks below).
EQ.2:	Parallel multi-frontal sparse solver (default)
EQ.22:	iterative, CG with diagonal preconditioner
EQ.23:	iterative, CG with SGS preconditioner
EQ.24:	iterative, CG with SSOR preconditioner
EQ.25:	iterative, CG with modified ILDLTD preconditioner
EQ.26:	iterative, CG with modified ILDLTO preconditioner that requires extra storage
EQ.30 Parallel direct/hybrid solver MUMPS
EQ.90:	User Supplied Linear Equation Solver SMP only:
EQ.6:	BCSLIB-EXT, direct, sparse, double precision
zh:
线性方程求解器方法（参见下方备注）。
EQ.2：并行多前沿稀疏求解器（默认）。
EQ.22：迭代法，带对角预条件的 CG。
EQ.23：迭代法。
其他选项参见备注。

english:
Matrix and right-hand-side dumping.  LS-DYNA has the option of dumping the globally assembled stiffness matrix and right-hand-side vectors files in Harwell-Boeing sparse matrix format.
Such output may be useful for comparing to other linear equation solution packages.
EQ.0:	No dumping
GT.0:	Dump all matrices and right-hand-side vectors every MTXDMP time steps.
Output is written as ASCII text and the involved filenames are of the following form:	K_xxxx_yyy.mtx.rb
This file contains the stiffness matrix at step xxxx, iteration yyy.		M_xxxx_yyy.mtx.rb
This file contains the mass matrix at step xxxx, iteration yyy.  Only for eigenvalue analysis.		W_xxxx_yyy.mtx.rb
This file contains the damping matrix at step xxxx, iteration yyy.  Only for simulations with damping. K_xxxx_yyy_zzz.rhs.rb
This file contains the right hand side at step xxxx, iteration yyy, where yyyis the iteration at which a stiffness matrix is formed; and zzz is the cumulative iteration number for the step.
The values of yyy and zzz don’t always coincide because the stiffness matrix is not necessarily reformed every iteration. Node_Data_xxxx_yyy
This file maps stiffness matrix to nodes and provides nodal coordinates.
LT.0:	Like positive values of MTXDMP but dumped data is binary.
EQ.|9999|:	Simulation is terminated after dumping matrices and right hand side prior to factorization
zh: 矩阵和右端项转储。LS-DYNA 可将全局组装刚度矩阵和右端项向量以 Harwell-Boeing 稀疏矩阵格式转储到文件。

english:
Negative eigenvalue flag.  Selects procedure when negative eigenvalues are detected during stiffness matrix inversion (see Remarks below).
EQ.1:	stop, or retry step if auto step control is active
EQ.2:	print warning message, try to continue (default)
zh:
负特征值标志。选择在刚度矩阵求逆期间检测到负特征值时采用的处理过程（参见下方备注）。
EQ.1：停止，或在自动时间步中重试该步。
其他选项参见备注。

english:
Ordering option (see Remarks below)
EQ.0:	Method set automatically by LS-DYNA
EQ.1:	MMD, Multiple Minimum Degree.
EQ.2:	Metis
EQ.4:	LSGpart.
zh:
排序选项（参见下方备注）。
EQ.0：由 LS-DYNA 自动设置方法。
EQ.1：MMD，多重最小度。
EQ.2：Metis。
EQ.4：LSGpart。

english:
Number of cycles between each refinement.
LT.0: |NCYCRF| is the time interval.
zh:
每次细化之间的循环数。
LT.0：|NCYCRF| 为时间间隔。

english:
Number of cycles between each deletion.
LT.0: |NCYCRM| is the time interval.
zh:
每次删除之间的循环数。
LT.0：|NCYCRM| 为时间间隔。

english:
Node or node set index for the input channel.
GT.0:Nnode index
LT.0:Node set index, within which all nodes share the same input variable, e.g., force, voltage, see Remark 2 below.
zh:
输入通道的节点或节点集合索引。
GT.0：节点索引。
LT.0：节点集合索引，该集合内所有节点共享相同输入变量，例如力、电压等；参见备注。

english:
Adaptive option for hexahedral elements. For tetrahedral and
pentahedral elements, see Remark 1:
EQ.1: Adapt one solid element to one discrete element,
EQ.2: Adapt one solid element to 8 discrete elements,
EQ.3: Adapt one solid element to 27 discrete elements.
zh:
六面体单元的自适应选项。对于四面体和五面体单元，参见备注 1：
EQ.1：将一个实体单元转换为一个离散单元。
EQ.2：将一个实体单元转换为多个离散单元。

english:
Thermal coupling conductivity between SPH part and solid part for ICPL = 3 option.
The default value is set as the average value of the conductivity from SPH part and the conductivity from solid part
zh:
ICPL = 3 选项下 SPH 部件与实体部件之间的热耦合导热系数。
默认值设为两个部件导热系数的平均值。

english:
EQ.0: DES node set
EQ.1: DES node
EQ.2: DES part set
EQ.3: DES part
zh:
EQ.0：DES 节点集合。
EQ.1：DES 节点。
EQ.2：DES 部件集合。
EQ.3：DES 部件。

english:
EQ.0: Slave node set
EQ.1: Slave node
EQ.2: Slave part set
EQ.3: Slave part.
zh:
EQ.0：从节点集合。
EQ.1：从节点。
EQ.2：从部件集合。
EQ.3：从部件。

english:
Scale factor for surface thickness (scales true thickness). This option
applies only to contact with shell elements. True thickness is the	element thickness of the shell elements
zh: 表面厚度比例因子（缩放真实厚度）。该选项仅适用于与壳单元的接触。真实厚度会乘以该比例因子。

english: Slave Set ID
zh: 从集合 ID。

english:
ID type of SID:
EQ.1:	shell element ID
EQ.2:	shell element set ID
EQ.3:	part ID
EQ.4:	part set ID.
zh:
SID 的 ID 类型：
EQ.1：壳单元 ID。
EQ.2：壳单元集合 ID。
EQ.3：部件 ID。
EQ.4：部件集合 ID。

english:
Option for lumping of mass matrix:
EQ.0: row sum
EQ.1: diagonal weighting.
zh:
质量矩阵集中选项：
EQ.0：行和。
EQ.1：对角加权。

english:
Dimension value depending on GTYPE.
GTYPE.EQ.1: length of x edge
GTYPE.EQ.2: Radius of sphere
GTYPE.EQ.3: Radius of cross section
GTYPE.EQ.4: length of x-axes
GTYPE.EQ.5: Radius of hemisphere.
zh:
取决于 GTYPE 的尺寸值：
GTYPE.EQ.1：x 边长度。
GTYPE.EQ.2：球半径。
GTYPE.EQ.3：截面半径。
GTYPE.EQ.4：x 轴长度。

english:
Dimension value depending on GTYPE.
GTYPE.EQ.1: length of y edge
GTYPE.EQ.3: length of cylinder
GTYPE.EQ.4: length of y-axes.
zh:
取决于 GTYPE 的尺寸值：
GTYPE.EQ.1：y 边长度。
GTYPE.EQ.3：圆柱长度。
GTYPE.EQ.4：y 轴长度。

english:
Dimension value depending on GTYPE.
GTYPE.EQ.1: length of z edge
GTYPE.EQ.4: length of z-axes.
zh:
取决于 GTYPE 的尺寸值：
GTYPE.EQ.1：z 边长度。
GTYPE.EQ.4：z 轴长度。

english:
Flag to activate an element coordinate system:
EQ.0: The forces are applied in the global directions.
EQ.1: The forces are applied in a local system attached to the
element. The system is consistent with DIREC = 1 and
CTYPE = 12 in *CONSTRAINED_LAGRANGE_IN_SOLID.
For CTYPE = 11, LOCAL is always 1 and the 𝑥-axis is
aligned with the element normal while the 𝑦-axis passes
through the element center and the first node in the element
connectivity (*ELEMENT_BEAM in 2D or *ELEMENT_SHELL in 3D).
zh:
激活单元坐标系的标志：
EQ.0：力沿全局方向施加。
EQ.1：力沿附着于单元的局部坐标系施加。

english:
Flag to compute Aij and Bij with a user defined routine in the file
dyn21.F called lagpor_getab_userdef. The file is part of the general package usermat..
zh: 使用 dyn21.F 文件中名为 lagpor_getab_userdef 的用户自定义例程计算 Aij 和 Bij 的标志。该文件属于通用 usermat 包。

english:
DES part type:
EQ.0: Part set ID,
EQ.1: Part ID.
zh:
DES 部件类型：
