EQ.0：部件集合 ID。
EQ.1：部件 ID。

english:
SPH part type:
EQ.0: Part set ID,
EQ.1: Part ID
zh:
SPH 部件类型：
EQ.0：部件集合 ID。
EQ.1：部件 ID。

english:
Master part type:
EQ. 0:	Part set ID,
EQ. 1:	Part ID
zh:
主部件类型：
EQ.0：部件集合 ID。
EQ.1：部件 ID。

english:
Slave part type:
EQ. 0:	Part set ID,
EQ. 1:	Part ID
,
zh:
从部件类型：
EQ.0：部件集合 ID。
EQ.1：部件 ID。

english:
In-plane numerical integration rule:
EQ.0: reduced Gauss integration (NIP=PR*PS)
EQ.1: full Gauss integration (NIP=(PR+1)*(PS+1))
zh:
平面内数值积分规则：
EQ.0：减缩 Gauss 积分（NIP=PR*PS）。
EQ.1：全 Gauss 积分（NIP=(PR+1)*(PS+1)）。

english:
c30 when the current flows in the charge direction:
GE.0.0:constant value.
LT.0.0:absolute value is a define function or table ID.
zh:
电流沿充电方向流动时的 c30：
GE.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：绝对值为 define function 或表 ID。

english:
c30 when the current flows in the discharge direction:
GE.0.0:constant value.
LT.0.0:absolute value is a define function or table ID.
zh:
电流沿放电方向流动时的 c30：
GE.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：绝对值为 define function 或表 ID。

english:
r30 when the current flows in the discharge direction:
GE.0.0:constant value.
LT.0.0:absolute value is a define function or table ID.
zh:
电流沿放电方向流动时的 r30：
GE.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：绝对值为 define function 或表 ID。

english:
Use SOC shift:
EQ.0:Don't use the added SOCshift
EQ.1:Use the added SOCshift.
zh:
使用 SOC 偏移：
EQ.0：不使用附加 SOCshift。
EQ.1：使用附加 SOCshift。

english:
GT.0.0: Mass conversion factor from model units to calibration units for Miller's extension
LT.0.0: Use predefined factors to convert model units to published
calibration units of g, cm, μs. Choices for model units are:
EQ.-1.0: g, mm, ms
EQ.-2.0: g, cm, ms
EQ.-3.0: kg, m, s
EQ.-4.0: kg, mm, ms
EQ.-5.0: metric ton, mm, s
EQ.-6.0: lbf-s2/in, in, s
EQ.-7.0: slug, ft, s.
zh:
GT.0.0：Miller 扩展中从模型单位到标定单位的质量转换因子。
LT.0.0：使用预定义因子进行转换。

english:
Load curve ID, which can be the ID of *DEFINE_‌CURVE,
*DEFINE_‌CURVE_‌FUNCTION or *DEFINE_‌FUNCTION, defining the energy deposition rate.
If an energy leak rate is intended, do not specify a negative ordinate in LCID, rather,
use the constant(s) in the equation of state, e.g., set GAMMA0 or/and A to a negative value.
If *DEFINE_‌FUNCTION is used, the input of the defined function is time.
zh: 载荷曲线 ID，可以是 *DEFINE_CURVE、*DEFINE_CURVE_FUNCTION 或 *DEFINE_FUNCTION 的 ID，用于定义能量沉积率。

english: alpha
zh: 参数 alpha。

english: beta
zh: 参数 beta。

english:
Load curve ID, which can be the ID of *DEFINE_‌CURVE,
*DEFINE_‌CURVE_‌FUNCTION or *DEFINE_‌FUNCTION, defining the energy deposition rate.
If an energy leak rate is intended, do not specify a negative ordinate in LCID,
rather, use the constant(s) in the equation of state, e.g., set C4 to a negative value.
If *DEFINE_‌FUNCTION is used, the input of the defined function is time.
zh: 载荷曲线 ID，可以是 *DEFINE_CURVE、*DEFINE_CURVE_FUNCTION 或 *DEFINE_FUNCTION 的 ID，用于定义能量沉积率。

english:
Load curve defining tabulated function .  See equation in Remarks.
The abscissa values of LCC, LCT and LCK must be negative of the volumetric strain in monotonically increasing order, in contrast to the convention in EOS_9.
The definition can extend into the tensile regime.
zh: 定义表格函数的载荷曲线，参见备注中的方程。LCC、LCT 和 LCK 的横坐标值必须为对应变量的负值。

english:
Load curve ID, which can be the ID of *DEFINE_CURVE, *DEFINE_CURVE_FUNCTION or *DEFINE_FUNCTION, defining the energy deposition rate.
If an energy leak rate is intended, do not specify a negative ordinate in LCID, rather, use the constant(s) in the equation of state, e.g., set GAMMA to a negative value.
If *DEFINE_FUNCTION is used, the input of the defined function is time.
zh: 载荷曲线 ID，可以是 *DEFINE_CURVE、*DEFINE_CURVE_FUNCTION 或 *DEFINE_FUNCTION 的 ID，用于定义能量沉积率。

english:
Unloading option (See Volume II, Figure 119.1.):
EQ.0.0: Loading and unloading follow loading curve
EQ.1.0: Loading follows loading curve, unloading follows unloading curve. The unloading curve ID if undefined is taken as the loading curve.
EQ.2.0: Loading follows loading curve, unloading follows unloading stiffness, KT or KR, to the unloading curve.  The loading and unloading curves may only intersect at the origin of the axes.
EQ.3.0: Quadratic unloading from peak displacement value to a permanent offset..
zh:
卸载选项（参见 Volume II，图 119.1）：
EQ.0.0：加载和卸载沿加载曲线。
EQ.1.0：加载沿加载曲线，卸载沿卸载曲线。

english:
Center of mass constraint option, CMO:
EQ.+1: constraints applied in global directions,
EQ.0: no constraints
EQ.-1: constraints applied in local directions (SPC constraint).
zh:
质心约束选项 CMO：
EQ.+1：沿全局方向施加约束。
EQ.0：无约束。
EQ.-1：沿局部方向施加约束（SPC 约束）。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.  0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by element nodes 1, 2, and 4, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES, and then rotated about the shell element normal by the angle BETA.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0:  locally orthotropic material axes determined by offsetting
the material axes by an angle, BETA, from a line determined by taking the cross product of the element.
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COOR_DINATE_VECTOR).
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点 1、2 和 4 确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 相同，然后绕壳单元法向按角度 BETA 旋转。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过从由单元叉乘确定的直线偏移角度 BETA 来确定。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID（*DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES、*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM 或 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 中的 CID）。

english: Pressure coefficient (dependent on unit system)
zh: 压力系数（依赖单位制）。

english: Pressure exponent
zh: 压力指数。

english: Strain coefficient
zh: 应变系数。

english: Dimension of unit cell (length)
zh: 单胞尺寸（长度）。

english: Radius of yarn (length)
zh: 纱线半径（长度）。

english:
Material dependent birth time of airbag reference geometry. Nonzero
RGBRTH overwrites the birth time defined in the *AIRBAG_REFERENCE_GEOMETRY_BIRTH section. RGBRTH also applies to
reference geometry defined by *AIRBAG_SHELL_REFERENCE_GEOMETRY
zh: 材料相关的气囊参考几何出生时间。非零 RGBRTH 会覆盖 *AIRBAG_REFERENCE_GEOMETRY_BIRTH 段中定义的出生时间。RGBRTH 也适用于由 *AIRBAG_SHELL_REFERENCE_GEOMETRY 定义的参考几何。

english:
ID of a load curve of the Forming Limit Diagram (FLD) under linear
strain paths. In the load curve, abscissas represent minor strains
while ordinates represent major strains. Define only when option	NLP is used.
zh: 线性应变路径下成形极限图（FLD）载荷曲线 ID。在该载荷曲线中，横坐标表示次应变，纵坐标表示主应变。仅在使用 NLP 选项时定义。

english:
Load curve defining biaxial stress vs. biaxial strain, see discussion in the
Remarks below for a definition. If not defined this is determined from
LCH00 and the initial R-values to yield a response close to the standard 3-parameter Barlat model.
zh: 定义双轴应力与双轴应变关系的载荷曲线，定义见下方备注。若未定义，则由 LCH00 和初始 R 值确定，以得到接近标准三参数 Barlat 模型的响应。

english:
Load curve defining shear stress vs. shear strain, see discussion in the
Remarks below for a definition. If not defined this is ignored to yield a
response close to the standard 3-parameter Barlat model.
zh: 定义剪切应力与剪切应变关系的载荷曲线，定义见下方备注。若未定义，则忽略该项，以得到接近标准三参数 Barlat 模型的响应。

english:
Load curve defining biaxial R-value vs. biaxial strain, see discussion in the
Remarks below for a definition. Default is a constant R-value of 1.0, a
negative input will result in a constant R-value of –LCRBI.
zh: 定义双轴 R 值与双轴应变关系的载荷曲线，定义见下方备注。默认常数 R 值为 1.0；负输入将产生常数 R 值 -LCRBI。

english:
Load curve defining shear R-value vs. shear strain, see discussion in the
Remarks below for a definition. Default is a constant R-value of 1.0, a
negative input will result in a constant R-value of –LCRSH.
zh: 定义剪切 R 值与剪切应变关系的载荷曲线，定义见下方备注。默认常数 R 值为 1.0；负输入将产生常数 R 值 -LCRSH。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by element nodes 1, 2, and 4, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
and then, for shells only, rotated about	the shell element normal by an angle BETA,
EQ.1.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by a point in space and the global location of the element center, this is the a-direction.
This option is for solid elements only.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR,
EQ.3.0:  locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating
the material axes about the element normal by an angle,
BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by	the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.
EQ.4.0: locally orthotropic in cylindrical coordinate system with
the material axes determined by a vector v, and an originating point, p, which define  the centerline axis. This option is for solid elements only
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is the coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES, _SYSTEM or _VECTOR). Available in R3 version of 971 and later
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点 1、2 和 4 确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 相同；对于壳，还会绕壳单元法向按角度 BETA 旋转。
EQ.1.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由空间点和单元中心的全局位置确定，该方向为 a 方向；仅适用于实体单元。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过将材料轴绕单元法向旋转角度 BETA 来确定；BETA 从单元平面内由向量 v 与单元法向叉乘定义的直线开始计量。
EQ.4.0：圆柱坐标系中的局部正交各向异性，材料轴由向量 v 和原点 p 定义的中心线轴确定；仅适用于实体单元。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID（*DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES、_SYSTEM 或 _VECTOR 中的 CID）。适用于 971 R3 及之后版本。

english: IEOS
zh: IEOS 选项。

失效标志：
EQ.0：无失效。
EQ.1：允许壳和实体单元失效。
LT.0：|IFAIL| 为材料常数数组中 NUMINT 的地址。NUMINT 定义为触发单元删除的失效积分点数量。该选项仅适用于壳和实体单元（v.971 release 5）。

english: IHYPER
zh: IHYPER 选项。

english:
User material type (41-50 inclusive). A number between 41 and 50 has to be chosen.
If MT < 0, subroutine rwumat in dyn21.f is called, where the material parameter reading can be modified
WARNING: If two or more materials in an input deck
share the same MT value, those materials also share values of other variables on Cards 1 and 2 excluding
MID and RO. Those shared values are taken from the first material where the common MT is encountered.
zh:
用户材料类型（41 到 50，含端点）。必须选择 41 到 50 之间的编号。
若 MT < 0，则调用 dyn21.f 中的子程序 rwumat，可在其中修改材料参数读取。
警告：如果输入文件中两个或多个材料共享相同 MT 值，则这些材料也共享卡片 1 和 2 上除 MID 和 RO 外的其他变量值。共享值取自首次遇到该 MT 的材料。

english:
Strain rate averaging option.
EQ.0.0: Strain rate is evaluated using a running average.
LT.0.0: Strain rate is evaluated using average of last 11 time steps.
GT.0.0: Strain rate is averaged over the last DT time units
zh:
应变率平均选项：
EQ.0.0：使用滑动平均评估应变率。
LT.0.0：使用最后 11 个时间步的平均值评估应变率。
GT.0.0：在最后 DT 时间单位内对应变率取平均。

english:
MODEL.EQ.0:	load curve ID defining yield stress as a function of volumetric strain,  (see Figure 0-1).
MODEL.EQ.1:	load curve or table ID.If a load curve ID is specified,
then the load curve defines uniaxial yield stress as a function of equivalent plastic strain.If a table ID is specified,
then each strain rate references a load curve ID that gives uniaxial yield stress as a function of equivalent plastic strain.
zh:
MODEL.EQ.0：载荷曲线 ID，定义屈服应力随体积应变的变化（参见图 0-1）。
MODEL.EQ.1：载荷曲线或表 ID。若指定载荷曲线 ID，则该载荷曲线定义单轴屈服应力随等效塑性应变的变化。若指定表 ID，则每个应变率引用一条载荷曲线 ID，该曲线给出单轴屈服应力随等效塑性应变的变化。
参数 C01。
参数 C02。
参数 C10。
参数 C11。
参数 C20。
参数 C30。

english:
Poisson's ratio (> .49 is recommended, smaller values may not work
and should not be used). If this is set to a negative number, then the
absolute value is used and an extra card is read for Mullins effect.
zh: 泊松比（建议大于 0.49；较小值可能无法工作，不应使用）。若设为负数，则使用其绝对值，并读取一张额外卡片用于 Mullins 效应。

english:
X-reinforcement quantity (for bars running parallel to global x-axis).
COOR: Coordinate location of layer
If AXIS.EQ.1: X-coordinate ,
If AXIS.EQ.2: Y-coordinate,
If AXIS.EQ.3: Z-coordinate
zh:
X 向加筋量（用于平行于全局 x 轴的钢筋）。
COOR：层的坐标位置。
若 AXIS.EQ.1：X 坐标。
若 AXIS.EQ.2：Y 坐标。
若 AXIS.EQ.3：Z 坐标。

english:
Y-reinforcement quantity (for bars running parallel to global y-axis).
RQA: Reinforcement quantity (A).
zh:
Y 向加筋量（用于平行于全局 y 轴的钢筋）。
RQA：加筋量 A。

english:
Z-reinforcement quantity (for bars running parallel to global z-axis).
RQB: Reinforcement quantity (B).
zh:
Z 向加筋量（用于平行于全局 z 轴的钢筋）。
RQB：加筋量 B。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by
element nodes 1, 2, and 4, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES, and then rotated about the shell element normal by the angle MANGLE.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes about the element normal by an angle,
BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by	the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COOR_DINATE_VECTOR). Available with the R3 release of Version 971 and later.
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点 1、2 和 4 确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 相同，然后绕壳单元法向按角度 MANGLE 旋转。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过将材料轴绕单元法向旋转角度 BETA 来确定；BETA 从单元平面内由向量 v 与单元法向叉乘定义的直线开始计量。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID（*DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES、*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM 或 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 中的 CID）。适用于 971 R3 及之后版本。

english:
Failure flag.
LT.0.0: User defined failure subroutine is called to determine failure. This is subroutine named, MATUSR_103, in DYN21.F.
EQ.0.0: Failure is not considered. This option is recommended if failure is not of interest since many calculations will be saved.
GT.0.0: Plastic strain to failure. When the plastic strain reaches this value, the element is deleted from the calculation.
zh:
失效标志：
LT.0.0：调用用户定义失效子程序确定失效，该子程序为 DYN21.F 中的 MATUSR_103。
EQ.0.0：不考虑失效。如果不关心失效，建议使用该选项以节省大量计算。
GT.0.0：失效塑性应变。当塑性应变达到该值时，从计算中删除单元。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by
element nodes 1, 2, and 4, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES, and then rotated about the shell element normal by the angle BETA.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes about the element normal by an angle,
BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by	the cross product of the vector v with the normal to the plane of the element.
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COOR_DINATE_VECTOR). Available with the R3 release of Version 971 and later.
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点 1、2 和 4 确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 相同，然后绕壳单元法向按角度 BETA 旋转。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过将材料轴绕单元平面法向旋转角度 BETA 来确定；BETA 从单元平面内由向量 v 与该法向叉乘定义的直线开始计量。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID（*DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES、*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM 或 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 中的 CID）。适用于 971 R3 及之后版本。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by
element nodes 1, 2, and 4 of an element are identical to the nodes used for the definition of a coordinate system as by *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES, and then rotated about the shell element normal by the angle BETA.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes about the element normal by an angle,
BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by	the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COOR_DINATE_VECTOR). Available with the R3 release of Version 971 and later.
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，单元节点 1、2 和 4 与通过 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 定义坐标系所用节点相同，然后绕壳单元法向按角度 BETA 旋转。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过将材料轴绕单元法向旋转角度 BETA 来确定；BETA 从单元平面内由向量 v 与单元法向叉乘定义的直线开始计量。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID（*DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES、*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM 或 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 中的 CID）。适用于 971 R3 及之后版本。

english:
Unloading option (see Figure 0-1):
EQ.0.0:	loading and unloading follow loading curve
EQ.1.0:	loading follows loading curve, unloading follows unloading curve. The unloading curve ID if undefined is taken as the loading curve.
EQ.2.0:	loading follows loading curve, unloading follows unloading stiffness, KT or KR, to the unloading curve.
The loading and unloading curves may only intersect at the origin of the axes.
EQ.3.0:	quadratic unloading from peak displacement value to a permanent offset.
zh:
卸载选项（参见图 0-1）：
EQ.0.0：加载和卸载均沿加载曲线。
EQ.1.0：加载沿加载曲线，卸载沿卸载曲线；若未定义卸载曲线 ID，则采用加载曲线。
EQ.2.0：加载沿加载曲线，卸载沿卸载刚度 KT 或 KR 到卸载曲线。加载和卸载曲线只能在坐标轴原点相交。
EQ.3.0：从峰值位移到永久偏移的二次卸载。

english:
Rotational stiffness for IUNLD = 2.0.  However, if IFLAG =‌ 2, then KR is the rotational stiffness for unloading along the local r-axis.
If left blank, a value calculated by LS-DYNA will be used
zh:
IUNLD = 2.0 时的转动刚度。但若 IFLAG = 2，则 KR 为沿局部 r 轴卸载的转动刚度。
若留空，将使用 LS-DYNA 计算的值。

english:
Translational stiffness for IUNLD = 2.0.  However, if IFLAG = 2, then it is the translational stiffness for unloading along the local r-axis.
If left blank, a value calculated by LS-DYNA will be used.
zh:
IUNLD = 2.0 时的平移刚度。但若 IFLAG = 2，则它为沿局部 r 轴卸载的平移刚度。
若留空，将使用 LS-DYNA 计算的值。

english:
Load curve ID defining translational force resultant along local r-axis as a function of relative translational displacement during unloading.
The force values defined by this curve must increase monotonically from the most negative displacement to the most positive displacement.
For IUNLD = 1.0, the slope of this curve must equal or exceed the loading curve for stability reasons.  This is not the case for IUNLD = 2.0.
For loading and unloading to follow the same path simply set LCIDTUR = LCIDTR.  For options IUNLD = 0.0 or 3.0 the unloading curve is not required.
For IUNLD = 2.0, if LCIDTUR is left blank or zero, the default is to use the same curve for unloading as for loading.
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，定义卸载过程中沿局部 r 轴的平移合力随相对平移位移的变化。
该曲线定义的力值必须从最负位移到最正位移单调增加。
对于 IUNLD = 1.0，出于稳定性原因，该曲线斜率必须等于或大于加载曲线；IUNLD = 2.0 时不要求如此。
若希望加载和卸载沿相同路径，只需设置 LCIDTUR = LCIDTR。对于 IUNLD = 0.0 或 3.0，不需要卸载曲线。
对于 IUNLD = 2.0，如果 LCIDTUR 留空或为零，默认使用与加载相同的曲线进行卸载。

english:
ID of a load curve defining Forming Limit Diagram (FLD) under
linear strain paths. In the load curve, abscissas represent minor
strains while ordinates represent major strains. Define only when
the option NLP is used. See the example in the remarks section
zh: 线性应变路径下成形极限图（FLD）载荷曲线 ID。在该载荷曲线中，横坐标表示次应变，纵坐标表示主应变。仅在使用 NLP 选项时定义。参见备注中的示例。

english:
Load curve ID, see *DEFINE_CURVE,
LCA<0:Yield stress as a function of the angle off the material axis in degrees.
LCA>0:sigma-aa versus normal strain component aa. For the corotational solid elements, types 0 and 9, engineering strain is expected, but for all other solid element formulations a logarithmic strain is expected.
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE。
LCA<0：屈服应力随偏离材料轴角度（度）的变化。
LCA>0：sigma-aa 随法向应变分量 aa 的变化。对于共旋实体单元类型 0 和 9，期望工程应变；其他实体单元公式期望对数应变。

english:
Load curve ID, see *DEFINE_CURVE,
LCA<0:Damage curve giving ab-stress multiplier as a function of the ab-shear strain component. This curve definition is optional and may be used if damage is desired. See LCS above.
LCA>0:sigma-ab versus shear strain-ab. For the corotational solid elements, types 0 and 9, engineering strain is expected, but for all other solid element formulations a shear strain based on the deformed configuration is used. (default LCAB=LCS).
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE。
LCA<0：损伤曲线，给出 ab 应力乘子随 ab 剪切应变分量的变化。该曲线可选，需要损伤时可使用。参见上方 LCS。
LCA>0：sigma-ab 随 ab 剪切应变的变化。对于共旋实体单元类型 0 和 9，期望工程应变；其他实体单元公式使用基于变形构形的剪切应变（默认 LCAB=LCS）。

english:
Load curve ID, see *DEFINE_CURVE,
LCA<0:Strong axis hardening stress as a function of the volumetric strain.
LCA>0:sigma-bb versus normal strain component bb. For the cor otational solid elements, types 0 and 9, engineering strain is expected, but for all other solid element formulations a logarithmic strain is expected(default: LCB=LCA).
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE。
LCA<0：强轴硬化应力随体积应变的变化。
LCA>0：sigma-bb 随法向应变分量 bb 的变化。对于共旋实体单元类型 0 和 9，期望工程应变；其他实体单元公式期望对数应变（默认：LCB=LCA）。

english:
Load curve ID, see *DEFINE_CURVE,
LCA<0:Damage curve giving bc-shear stress multiplier as a function of the bc-shear strain component. This curve definition is optional and may be used if damage is desired. See LCS above.
LCA>0:sigma-bc versus shear strain-bc. For the corotational solid elements, types 0 and 9, engineering strain is expected, but for all other solid element formulations a shear strain based on the deformed configuration is used. (default LCBC=LCS).
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE。
LCA<0：损伤曲线，给出 bc 剪切应力乘子随 bc 剪切应变分量的变化。该曲线可选，需要损伤时可使用。参见上方 LCS。
LCA>0：sigma-bc 随 bc 剪切应变的变化。对于共旋实体单元类型 0 和 9，期望工程应变；其他实体单元公式使用基于变形构形的剪切应变（默认 LCBC=LCS）。

english:
Load curve ID, see *DEFINE_CURVE,
LCA<0:Weak axis hardening stress as a function of the volumetric strain.
LCA>0:sigma-cc versus normal strain component cc. For the cor otational solid elements, types 0 and 9, engineering strain is expected, but for all other solid element formulations a logarithmic strain is expected(default: LCC=LCA).
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE。
LCA<0：弱轴硬化应力随体积应变的变化。
LCA>0：sigma-cc 随法向应变分量 cc 的变化。对于共旋实体单元类型 0 和 9，期望工程应变；其他实体单元公式期望对数应变（默认：LCC=LCA）。

english:
Load curve ID, see *DEFINE_CURVE,
LCA<0:Damage curve giving ca-shear stress multiplier as a function of the ca-shear strain component. This curve definition is optional and may be used if damage is desired. See LCS above.
LCA>0:sigma-ca versus shear strain-ca. For the corotational solid elements, types 0 and 9, engineering strain is expected, but for all other solid element formulations a shear strain based on the deformed configuration is used. (default LCCA=LCS).
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE。
LCA<0：损伤曲线，给出 ca 剪切应力乘子随 ca 剪切应变分量的变化。该曲线可选，需要损伤时可使用。参见上方 LCS。
LCA>0：sigma-ca 随 ca 剪切应变的变化。对于共旋实体单元类型 0 和 9，期望工程应变；其他实体单元公式使用基于变形构形的剪切应变（默认 LCCA=LCS）。

english:
Load curve ID, see *DEFINE_CURVE,
LCA<0:Damage curve giving shear stress multiplier as function of the shear strain component. This curve definition is optional and may be used if damage is desired. if SHDFLG=0 (the dafault), the damage value multiplies the stress every time step and the stress is updated incrementally. The damage curve should be set to unity until failure begins. After failure the value should drop to 0.999 or 0.99 or any number between zero and one depending on how many steps are needed to zero the stress. Alternatively, if SHDFLG=1.0, the damage value is treated as a factor that scales the shear stress component to the undamaged value.
LCA>0:shear stress versus shear strain. For the corotational solid elements, types 0 and 9, engineering strain is expected, but for all other solid element formulations a shear strain based on the deformed configuration is used. (default LCS=LCA). Each component of shear stress may have its own load curve.
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE。
LCA<0：损伤曲线，给出剪切应力乘子随剪切应变分量的变化。该曲线可选，需要损伤时可使用。若 SHDFLG=0（默认），损伤值每个时间步乘到应力上，并增量更新应力。损伤曲线在失效开始前应设为 1；失效后应下降到 0.999、0.99 或 0 到 1 之间的值，具体取决于需要多少步将应力降为零。或者，当 SHDFLG=1.0 时，损伤值作为将剪切应力分量缩放到未损伤值的因子。
LCA>0：剪切应力随剪切应变的变化。对于共旋实体单元类型 0 和 9，期望工程应变；其他实体单元公式使用基于变形构形的剪切应变（默认 LCS=LCA）。每个剪切应力分量可有自己的载荷曲线。

english:
Flag defining treatment of damage from curves LCS, LCAB, LCBC and LCCA (relevant only when LCA<0)
EQ.0.0: Damage reduces shear stress every time step,
EQ.1.0: Damage=(shear stress)/(undsamged shear stress)
zh:
定义曲线 LCS、LCAB、LCBC 和 LCCA 所给损伤处理方式的标志（仅当 LCA<0 时相关）。
EQ.0.0：损伤每个时间步降低剪切应力。
EQ.1.0：Damage = 剪切应力 / 未损伤剪切应力。

english: Alpha1
zh: 参数 Alpha1。

english: Alpha2
zh: 参数 Alpha2。

english: Alpha3
zh: 参数 Alpha3。

english: Alpha4
zh: 参数 Alpha4。

english: Alpha5
zh: 参数 Alpha5。

english: Alpha6
zh: 参数 Alpha6。

english: Alpha7
zh: 参数 Alpha7。

english: Alpha8
zh: 参数 Alpha8。

english:
Hardening law:
EQ.1.0: Exponential hardening
EQ.2.0: Voce hardening
EQ.3.0: Hansel hardening
EQ.4.0: Gosh hardening
EQ.5.0: Hocket-Sherby hardening
LT.0.0: absolute value defines load curve ID or table ID. If it is a load curve, then yield stress is a function of plastic strain.
If it is a table, then yield stress is a function of either plastic strain and plastic strain rate in case of a 2D table,
or, a function of plastic strain, plastic strain rate, and temperature in case of a 3D table
zh:
硬化律：
EQ.1.0：指数硬化。
EQ.2.0：Voce 硬化。
EQ.3.0：Hansel 硬化。
EQ.4.0：Gosh 硬化。
EQ.5.0：Hocket-Sherby 硬化。
LT.0.0：绝对值定义载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID。若为载荷曲线，则屈服应力为塑性应变的函数。若为表，则屈服应力在 2D 表情况下为塑性应变和塑性应变率的函数，在 3D 表情况下为塑性应变、塑性应变率和温度的函数。

english:
R-value in 00 direction
LT.0.0:	-R00 is load curve ID, defining this value as a function of temperature
zh:
00 方向 R 值。
LT.0.0：-R00 为载荷曲线 ID，定义该值随温度的变化。

english:
R-value in 45 direction
LT.0.0:	-R45 is load curve ID, defining this value as a function of temperature
zh:
45 方向 R 值。
LT.0.0：-R45 为载荷曲线 ID，定义该值随温度的变化。

english:
R-value in 90 direction
LT.0.0:	-R90 is load curve ID, defining this value as a function of temperature.
zh:
90 方向 R 值。
LT.0.0：-R90 为载荷曲线 ID，定义该值随温度的变化。

english:
Yield stress in 00 direction
LT.0.0:	-SIG00 is load curve ID, defining this stress as a function of temperature
zh:
00 方向屈服应力。
LT.0.0：-SIG00 为载荷曲线 ID，定义该应力随温度的变化。

english:
Yield stress in 45 direction
LT.0.0:	-SIG45 is load curve ID, defining this stress as a function of temperature
zh:
45 方向屈服应力。
LT.0.0：-SIG45 为载荷曲线 ID，定义该应力随温度的变化。

english:
Yield stress in 90 direction
LT.0.0:	-SIG90 is load curve ID, defining this stress as a function of temperature
zh:
90 方向屈服应力。
LT.0.0：-SIG90 为载荷曲线 ID，定义该应力随温度的变化。

english:
In the fit, β1 is set to zero, β2 is set to BSTART, β3 is 10 times β2,
β4 is 10 times β3 , and so on. If zero, BSTART = 0.01..
zh: 在拟合中，β1 设为零，β2 设为 BSTART，β3 为 β2 的 10 倍，β4 为 β3 的 10 倍，依此类推。若为零，BSTART = 0.01。

english:
In the fit, βk1 is set to zero, βk2 is set to BSTARTK, βk3 is 10
times βk2, βk4 is 10 times βk3 , and so on. If zero,
BSTARTK = 0.01.
zh: 在拟合中，βk1 设为零，βk2 设为 BSTARTK，βk3 为 βk2 的 10 倍，βk4 为 βk3 的 10 倍，依此类推。若为零，BSTARTK = 0.01。

english:
Elastic constant bulk modulus. If the bulk behavior is
viscoelastic, then this modulus is used in determining the contact
interface stiffness only.
zh: 弹性常数体积模量。若体积行为为黏弹性，则该模量仅用于确定接触界面刚度。

english:
Compressive stress flag (default = 0.0).
EQ.0.0: don't eliminate compressive stresses
EQ.1.0: eliminate compressive stresses.
zh:
压应力标志（默认=0.0）：
EQ.0.0：不消除压应力。
EQ.1.0：消除压应力。

english:
Load curve ID if constants, Gi, and βi are determined via a least
squares fit. This relaxation curve is shown below.
zh: 当常数 Gi 和 βi 通过最小二乘拟合确定时的载荷曲线 ID。该松弛曲线如下所示。

english:
Load curve ID for bulk behavior if constants, Ki, and βki are
determined via a least squares fit. This relaxation curve is shown below..
zh: 当常数 Ki 和 βki 通过最小二乘拟合确定时，体积行为的载荷曲线 ID。该松弛曲线如下所示。

english:
Number of terms in shear fit. If zero the default is 6. Currently,
the maximum number is set to 6..
zh: 剪切拟合中的项数。若为零，默认值为 6。目前最大项数设为 6。

english:
Number of terms desired in bulk fit. If zero the default is 6.
Currently, the maximum number is set to 6.
zh: 体积拟合中期望的项数。若为零，默认值为 6。目前最大项数设为 6。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0:  Locally orthotropic with material axes determined by element nodes as shown in Figure M2-1, and then rotated
about the shell element normal by the angle BETA.	Nodes 1, 2 and 4 of an element are identical to the nodes
used for the definition of a coordinate system as by *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES..
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes about the element normal by an angle,
BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by	the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COOR_DINATE_VECTOR). Available with the R3 release of Version 971 and later.
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点按图 M2-1 确定，然后绕壳单元法向按角度 BETA 旋转。单元节点 1、2 和 4 与通过 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 定义坐标系所用节点相同。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过将材料轴绕单元法向旋转角度 BETA 来确定；BETA 从单元平面内由向量 v 与单元法向叉乘定义的直线开始计量。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID（*DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES、*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM 或 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 中的 CID）。适用于 971 R3 及之后版本。

english:
Isotropic damage flag
EQ. 0: damage is inactivated
EQ. 1: damage is activated.
zh:
各向同性损伤标志：
EQ.0：损伤不激活。
EQ.1：损伤激活。

english:
Damaged plastic strain
EQ. 0: plastic strain is accumulated
EQ. 1: damaged plastic strain is accumulated.
zh:
损伤塑性应变：
EQ.0：累积塑性应变。
EQ.1：累积损伤塑性应变。

english:
Output stress flag
EQ. 0: undamaged stress output
EQ. 1: damaged stress output.
zh:
输出应力标志：
EQ.0：输出未损伤应力。
EQ.1：输出损伤后应力。

english:
Conjugate gradient methods:
EQ.-6: solves the poisson equation for the pressure
EQ.-7: solves the poisson equation for the pressure increment.
zh:
共轭梯度方法：
EQ.-6：求解压力的 Poisson 方程。
EQ.-7：求解压力增量的 Poisson 方程。

english:
Material ID. A unique number or label not exceeding 8 charaters
must be specified. Material ID is referenced in the *PART card and must be unique.
zh: 材料 ID。必须指定唯一编号或不超过 8 个字符的标签。材料 ID 在 *PART 卡片中引用且必须唯一。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by
element nodes 1, 2, and 4, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES, and then rotated about the shell element normal by the angle BETA.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes about the element normal by an angle,
BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by	the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点 1、2 和 4 确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 相同，然后绕壳单元法向按角度 BETA 旋转。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过将材料轴绕单元法向旋转角度 BETA 来确定；BETA 从单元平面内由向量 v 与单元法向叉乘定义的直线开始计量。

english:
Relevant only if TYPEC = 6 or 9.
TYPEC.EQ.6:	FCC is the compressive strength of confined concrete used in Mander equations. Default: unconfined properties are assumed (FCC‌ = FC).
TYPEC.EQ.9:	FCC is the actual compressive strength. If blank, this will be set equal to
the mean compressive strength (fcm in EC2 1-1) as required for serviceability calculations (8MPa greater than FC).
For ultimate load calculations the user may set FCC to a factored characteristic compressive strength. See remarks below
zh:
仅当 TYPEC = 6 或 9 时相关。
TYPEC.EQ.6：FCC 为 Mander 方程中使用的约束混凝土抗压强度。默认假定为无约束属性（FCC = FC）。
TYPEC.EQ.9：FCC 为实际抗压强度。若留空，将设为满足适用性计算所需的平均抗压强度（EC2 1-1 中的 fcm，比 FC 大 8MPa）。
对于极限载荷计算，用户可将 FCC 设为折减后的特征抗压强度。参见下方备注。

english:
Output flag controlling what is written as  plastic strain
EQ.0.0: Curvature
EQ.1.0:  High-tide  plastic strain in reinforcement
zh:
控制作为塑性应变写出内容的输出标志：
EQ.0.0：曲率。
EQ.1.0：钢筋中的 High-tide 塑性应变。

english:
Optional load curve (or table) ID giving the yield stress as a function of plastic strain (and strain rate).
This curve (or table) should be obtained from uniaxial compression tests.
If LCID-C is defined as a curve and LCID-T given as a table, then the rate dependence from the tension table is adopted in compression as well
zh:
可选载荷曲线（或表）ID，给出屈服应力随塑性应变（以及应变率）的变化。
该曲线（或表）应由单轴压缩试验获得。
若 LCID-C 定义为曲线且 LCID-T 给定为表，则压缩中也采用拉伸表中的率相关性。

english:
Load curve or table ID giving the yield stress as a function of plastic strain.
These curves should be obtained from quasi-static and (optionally) dynamic uniaxial tensile tests.
This input is mandatory.  If LCID-T is a table ID, the table values are effective strain rates
, and a curve of yield stress versus plastic strain must be given for each of those strain rates.
If the first value in the table is negative, LS-DYNA assumes that all the table values represent the natural logarithm of effective strain rate.
When the highest effective strain rate is several orders of magnitude greater than the lowest strain rate,
it is recommended that the natural log of strain rate be input in the table.
zh:
载荷曲线或表 ID，给出屈服应力随塑性应变的变化。
这些曲线应由准静态以及可选的动态单轴拉伸试验获得。该输入为必填项。
若 LCID-T 为表 ID，表值为有效应变率，并且必须为每个应变率给出一条屈服应力随塑性应变变化的曲线。
若表中的第一个值为负，LS-DYNA 假定所有表值表示有效应变率的自然对数。
当最高有效应变率比最低应变率高数个数量级时，建议在表中输入应变率的自然对数。

english:
Load curve ID giving the plastic Poisson's ratio as a function of an equivalent plastic strain measure during uniaxial tensile and uniaxial compressive testing.The plastic strain measure on the abscissa is negative for compression and positive for tension.
It is important to cover both tension and compression.  If LCID-P is given, NUEP is ignored
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，给出单轴拉伸和单轴压缩试验中塑性泊松比随等效塑性应变量的变化。
横坐标上的塑性应变量压缩为负、拉伸为正。覆盖拉伸和压缩两侧非常重要。若给出 LCID-P，则忽略 NUEP。

english:
Creep law definition:
EQ.0.0: Garofalo's hyperbolic sine law (default).
EQ.1.0: Norton'sower law.
zh:
蠕变律定义：
EQ.0.0：Garofalo 双曲正弦律（默认）。
EQ.1.0：Norton 幂律。

english:
Axial strain definition for force-strain curves, degradation and FEMA output:
EQ.0.0: true (log) total strain
EQ.1.0: change in length
EQ.2.0: nominal total strain
EQ.3.0: FEMA plastic strain ( = nominal total strain minus elastic strain).
zh:
用于力-应变曲线、退化和 FEMA 输出的轴向应变定义：
EQ.0.0：真实（对数）总应变。
EQ.1.0：长度变化。
EQ.2.0：名义总应变。
EQ.3.0：FEMA 塑性应变（= 名义总应变减弹性应变）。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by
element nodes as shown in Figure M2-1, and then rotated
about the shell element normal by the angle BETA., Nodes 1, 2, and 4 of an element are identical to the nodes
used for the definition of a coordinate system as by *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0:applicable to shell elements only.  This option determines locally orthotropic material axes by offsetting the material axes by an angle to be specified
from a line in the plane of the shell determined by taking the cross product of the vector v defined below with the shell normal vector.
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COOR_DINATE_VECTOR). Available with the R3 release of Version 971 and later.
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由图 M2-1 所示单元节点确定，然后绕壳单元法向按角度 BETA 旋转。单元节点 1、2 和 4 与通过 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 定义坐标系所用节点相同。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：仅适用于壳单元。该选项通过从壳平面内一条直线偏移指定角度来确定局部正交各向异性材料轴，该直线由下方定义的向量 v 与壳法向量叉乘确定。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID（*DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES、*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM 或 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 中的 CID）。适用于 971 R3 及之后版本。

english:
Action when Node 2 passes DMXNX:
EQ.0:	element is deleted
EQ.1:	further displacement is resisted by stiffness STIFF.
zh:
当节点 2 越过 DMXNX 时的动作：
EQ.0：删除单元。
EQ.1：后续位移由刚度 STIFF 抵抗。

english:
Action when Node 2 passes DMXNY:
EQ.0:	element is deleted
EQ.1:	further displacement is resisted by stiffness STIFF.
zh:
当节点 2 越过 DMXNY 时的动作：
EQ.0：删除单元。
EQ.1：后续位移由刚度 STIFF 抵抗。

english:
Action when Node 2 passes DMXPX:
EQ.0:	element is deleted
EQ.1:	further displacement is resisted by stiffness STIFF.
zh:
当节点 2 越过 DMXPX 时的动作：
EQ.0：删除单元。
EQ.1：后续位移由刚度 STIFF 抵抗。

english:
Action when Node 2 passes DMXPY:
EQ.0:	element is deleted
EQ.1:	further displacement is resisted by stiffness STIFF.
zh:
当节点 2 越过 DMXPY 时的动作：
EQ.0：删除单元。
EQ.1：后续位移由刚度 STIFF 抵抗。

english:
Action when Node 2 passes DMXPZ:
EQ.0:	element is deleted
EQ.1:	further displacement is resisted by stiffness STIFF.
zh:
当节点 2 越过 DMXPZ 时的动作：
EQ.0：删除单元。
EQ.1：后续位移由刚度 STIFF 抵抗。

english:
Load curve ID or table ID giving lateral load versus displacement (xaxis
- displacement (length units), y-axis - force). In the table case, each
curve in the table represents lateral load versus displacement at a given
(current) axial load, i.e. the values in the table are axial forces.
zh:
载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID，给出横向载荷与位移的关系（x 轴为位移，长度单位；y 轴为力）。
若使用表，则表中的每条曲线表示给定当前轴向载荷下的横向载荷与位移关系，即表值为轴向力。

english:
Abscissa definition for axial yield force as a function of inelastic deformation/strain curves (LCAT and LCAC on Card 2):
EQ.1:	plastic deformation(change in length)
EQ.2 : nominal plastic strain, that is,
plastic deformation/ initial length.
zh:
轴向屈服力随非弹性变形/应变曲线（卡片 2 上的 LCAT 和 LCAC）变化时的横坐标定义：
EQ.1：塑性变形（长度变化）。
EQ.2：名义塑性应变，即塑性变形 / 初始长度。

english:
SPR head end behaviour flag:
EQ.0.0: Nonlinear.
EQ.1.0: Elastic (Use first two points on load curves).
zh:
SPR 头端行为标志：
EQ.0.0：非线性。
EQ.1.0：弹性（使用载荷曲线前两个点）。

english:
Load curve ID, see *DEFINE_CURVE, giving axial force versus
deformation (head)..
zh: 载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE，给出轴向力与变形（头端）的关系。

english:
Load curve ID, see *DEFINE_CURVE, giving moment versus
rotation (head).
zh: 载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE，给出弯矩与转角（头端）的关系。

english:
Load curve ID, see *DEFINE_CURVE, giving shear force versus
deformation (head).
zh: 载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE，给出剪切力与变形（头端）的关系。

english:
SPR tail end behaviour flag:
EQ.0.0: Nonlinear.
EQ.1.0: Elastic (Use first two points on load curves).
zh:
SPR 尾端行为标志：
EQ.0.0：非线性。
EQ.1.0：弹性（使用载荷曲线前两个点）。

english:
TABLE_3D ID's containing temperature and strain rate dependent stress-strain input curves for the 12
separate tests (LT: 3D Load Tables). LT1-3: Tension 1,2,3 directions
zh: TABLE_3D ID，包含 12 种独立试验的温度和应变率相关应力-应变输入曲线（LT 表示 3D 载荷表）。LT1-LT3：1、2、3 方向拉伸。

english:
TABLE_3D ID's containing temperature and strain rate dependent stress-strain input curves for the 12
separate tests (LT: 3D Load Tables). LT10: 45 degree Off-axis 1-2 plane TensionorCompression.
zh: TABLE_3D ID，包含 12 种独立试验的温度和应变率相关应力-应变输入曲线（LT 表示 3D 载荷表）。LT10：1-2 平面 45 度离轴拉伸或压缩。

english:
TABLE_3D ID's containing temperature and strain rate dependent stress-strain input curves for the 12
separate tests (LT: 3D Load Tables). LT10: 45 degree Off-axis 2-3 plane TensionorCompression.
zh: TABLE_3D ID，包含 12 种独立试验的温度和应变率相关应力-应变输入曲线（LT 表示 3D 载荷表）。LT11：2-3 平面 45 度离轴拉伸或压缩。

english:
TABLE_3D ID's containing temperature and strain rate dependent stress-strain input curves for the 12
separate tests (LT: 3D Load Tables). LT10: 45 degree Off-axis 1-3 plane TensionorCompression.
zh: TABLE_3D ID，包含 12 种独立试验的温度和应变率相关应力-应变输入曲线（LT 表示 3D 载荷表）。LT12：1-3 平面 45 度离轴拉伸或压缩。

english:
TABLE_3D ID's containing temperature and strain rate dependent stress-strain input curves for the 12
separate tests (LT: 3D Load Tables). LT7: Shear 1-2 plane.
zh: TABLE_3D ID，包含 12 种独立试验的温度和应变率相关应力-应变输入曲线（LT 表示 3D 载荷表）。LT7：1-2 平面剪切。

english:
TABLE_3D ID's containing temperature and strain rate dependent stress-strain input curves for the 12
separate tests (LT: 3D Load Tables). LT8: Shear 2-3 plane.
zh: TABLE_3D ID，包含 12 种独立试验的温度和应变率相关应力-应变输入曲线（LT 表示 3D 载荷表）。LT8：2-3 平面剪切。

english:
TABLE_3D ID's containing temperature and strain rate dependent stress-strain input curves for the 12
separate tests (LT: 3D Load Tables). LT9: Shear 1-3 plane.
zh: TABLE_3D ID，包含 12 种独立试验的温度和应变率相关应力-应变输入曲线（LT 表示 3D 载荷表）。LT9：1-3 平面剪切。

english:
Material angle in degrees for AOPT = 3, may be overwritten on the element card, see
*ELEMENT_(T)SHELL_BETA or *ELEMENT_SOLID_ORTHO..
zh: AOPT = 3 时的材料角，单位为度；可在单元卡片上覆盖，参见 *ELEMENT_(T)SHELL_BETA 或 *ELEMENT_SOLID_ORTHO。

english:
Option for fiber failure
EQ.0: only visualization (equivalent fiber stresses)
EQ.1: active (equivalent fiber stresses.
zh:
纤维失效选项：
EQ.0：仅用于可视化（等效纤维应力）。
EQ.1：激活（等效纤维应力）。

english:
Fiber-Volume-Fraction
GT.0: Fiber-Volume-Fraction
LT.0: |FVF| Fiber-Mass-Fraction.
zh:
纤维体积分数：
GT.0：纤维体积分数。
LT.0：|FVF| 为纤维质量分数。

english:
Damage initiation parameter (ductile) shells:
Load curve ID representing plastic strain at onset of damage as function of stress triaxiality.
or Table ID representing plastic strain at onset of damage as function of stress triaxiality and plastic strain rate.
solids: Load curve ID representing plastic strain at onset of damage as function of stress triaxiality.
or Table ID representing plastic strain at onset of damage as function of stress triaxiality and lode angle.
or Table3D ID representing plastic strain at onset of damage as
function of stress triaxiality, lode angle and plastic strain rate..
zh:
损伤起始参数（延性）。
壳：载荷曲线 ID 表示损伤起始塑性应变随应力三轴度的变化；或表 ID 表示其随应力三轴度和塑性应变率的变化。
实体：载荷曲线 ID 表示损伤起始塑性应变随应力三轴度的变化；或表 ID 表示其随应力三轴度和 Lode 角的变化；或 Table3D ID 表示其随应力三轴度、Lode 角和塑性应变率的变化。

english:
Load curve ID or Table ID for defining effective stress versus
effective plastic strain in tension of matrix material (Table to include strain-rate effects, viscoplastic formulation).
zh: 载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID，用于定义基体材料拉伸中的有效应力与有效塑性应变关系（表可包含应变率效应、黏塑性公式）。

english:
Option to define micromechanical material behavior
EQ.0.0: elastic
EQ.1.0: elastic-plastic
zh:
定义微观力学材料行为的选项：
EQ.0.0：弹性。
EQ.1.0：弹塑性。

english:
Number of failed integration points prior to element deletion.
LT.0.0: Only for shells. |NUMINT| is the percentage of
integration points which must exceed the failure criterion before element fails. For shell formulations with 4 integration
points per layer, the layer is considered failed if any of the integration points in the layer fails.
zh:
单元删除前失效积分点的数量。
LT.0.0：仅用于壳。|NUMINT| 为单元失效前必须超过失效准则的积分点百分比。对于每层 4 个积分点的壳公式，只要层内任一积分点失效，该层即视为失效。

english:
Damage evolution parameter
GT.0.0: plastic displacement at failure, 𝑢𝑓	𝑝
LT.0.0: |UPF| is a table ID for 𝑢𝑓 𝑝 as a function of triaxiality and	damage.
zh:
损伤演化参数：
GT.0.0：失效塑性位移 uf^p。
LT.0.0：|UPF| 为表 ID，定义 uf^p 随三轴度和损伤的变化。

english:
Flag for anisotropic stiffness terms initialization (for solid elements only).
EQ.0: C11, C12, … from Cards 1, 2, and 3 are used.
EQ.1: C11, C12, … are initialized by *INITIAL_STRESS_SOLID's	history data.
zh:
各向异性刚度项初始化标志（仅实体单元）。
EQ.0：使用卡片 1、2、3 中的 C11、C12 等。
EQ.1：通过 *INITIAL_STRESS_SOLID 的历史数据初始化 C11、C12 等。

english:
Material axes change flag for brick elements in phase i:
EQ.1: No change, default,
EQ.2: switch material axes a and b,
EQ.3: switch material axes a and c,
EQ.4: switch material axes b and c.
zh:
相 i 中砖单元的材料轴变换标志：
EQ.1：不变（默认）。
EQ.2：交换材料轴 a 和 b。
EQ.3：交换材料轴 a 和 c。
EQ.4：交换材料轴 b 和 c。

english:
Use reference geometry to initialize the stress tensor for the i th phase.
The reference geometry is defined by the keyword: *INITIAL_FOAM_REFERENCE_GEOMETRY (see there for more details).
EQ.0.0: off,
EQ.1.0: on.
zh:
使用参考几何初始化第 i 相的应力张量。参考几何由关键字 *INITIAL_FOAM_REFERENCE_GEOMETRY 定义（更多细节见该关键字）。
EQ.0.0：关闭。
EQ.1.0：开启。

english:
Erosion Flag (see remarks)
EQ.0: Erosion is turned off.
EQ.1: Non-local strain based erosion criterion.
EQ.2: Local strain based erosion criterion.
EQ.3: Use both ERODE = 1 and ERODE = 2 criteria.
zh:
侵蚀标志（参见备注）：
EQ.0：关闭侵蚀。
EQ.1：基于非局部应变的侵蚀准则。
EQ.2：基于局部应变的侵蚀准则。
EQ.3：同时使用 ERODE=1 和 ERODE=2 准则。

english:
The erosion parameter #2 used in ERODE types 2 and 3. The recommended
value is five times SLOC defined in cards 7 and 8.
zh: ERODE 类型 2 和 3 中使用的侵蚀参数 #2。建议值为卡片 7 和 8 中定义的 SLOC 的五倍。

english:
Initiation strain for the anti-locking mechanism. This parameter should be
equal to the saturation strain for the fiber damage mechanism under tensile condition.
zh: 抗锁死机制的起始应变。该参数应等于拉伸条件下纤维损伤机制的饱和应变。

english:
Number of time steps between update of neighbor list for nonlocal smoothing.
EQ.0: Do only one search at the start of the calculation.
zh:
非局部平滑邻居列表更新之间的时间步数。
EQ.0：仅在计算开始时搜索一次。

english:
Saturation strain for the anti-locking mechanism under compressive condition.
The recommended value for this parameter is (ILOCC+0.02).
zh: 压缩条件下抗锁死机制的饱和应变。建议值为 ILOCC + 0.02。

english:
Saturation strain for the anti-locking mechanism under tensile condition.
The recommended value for this parameter is (ILOCT+0.02).
zh: 拉伸条件下抗锁死机制的饱和应变。建议值为 ILOCT + 0.02。

english:
Damage flag:
EQ. 0: No damage (default)
EQ. 1: Damage in tension only (null for compression)
EQ. 2: Damage in tension and compression.
zh:
损伤标志：
EQ.0：无损伤（默认）。
EQ.1：仅拉伸损伤（压缩为空）。
EQ.2：拉伸和压缩损伤。

english:
Failure and erosion flag:
EQ. 0: No failure (default)
EQ. 1: Failure as soon as one failure criterion is reached in all
integration points
EQ. 2: Failure as soon as one failure criterion is reached in at least
one integration point
EQ. 3: Failure as soon as a tension or compression failure criterion
in the a-direction is reached for one integration point
EQ. 4: Failure as soon as a tension or compression failure criterion
in the b-direction is reached for one integration point
EQ. 5: Failure as soon as a tension or compression failure criterion
in the c-direction is reached for one integration point
EQ. 6: Failure as soon as tension or compression failure criteria in
both the a- and b-directions are reached at a single integration
point or at 2 different integration points
EQ. 7: Failure as soon as tension or compression failure criteria in
both the b- and c-directions are reached at a single integration
point or at 2 different integration points
EQ. 8: Failure as soon as tension or compression failure criteria in
both the a- and c-directions are reached at a single integration
point or at 2 different integration points
EQ. 9: Failure as soon as tension or compression failure criteria in
the 3 directions are reached at a single integration point or at
different integration points.
zh:
失效和侵蚀标志：
EQ.0：无失效（默认）。
EQ.1：所有积分点中一旦达到任一失效准则即失效。
EQ.2：至少一个积分点达到任一失效准则即失效。
EQ.3：一个积分点在 a 方向达到拉伸或压缩失效准则即失效。
EQ.4：一个积分点在 b 方向达到拉伸或压缩失效准则即失效。
EQ.5：一个积分点在 c 方向达到拉伸或压缩失效准则即失效。
EQ.6：a、b 两方向的拉伸或压缩失效准则在同一积分点或两个不同积分点达到即失效。
EQ.7：b、c 两方向达到即失效。
EQ.8：a、c 两方向达到即失效。
EQ.9：三个方向在同一积分点或不同积分点达到即失效。

english:
Plastic strain to failure measured in the uniaxial tensile test, this
value is used by the Gurson type failure model only.
zh: 单轴拉伸试验中测得的失效塑性应变；该值仅用于 Gurson 类型失效模型。

english:
Automated input conversion flag.
EQ.0 then the load
curves provided under LCID and LCCID contain Cazacu-Barlat
effective stress as a function of energy conjugate plastic strain. If
EQ.1 then both load curves are given in terms of von
Mises stress versus equivalent plastic strain
zh:
自动输入转换标志。
EQ.0：LCID 和 LCCID 下提供的载荷曲线包含 Cazacu-Barlat 有效应力随能量共轭塑性应变的变化。
EQ.1：两条载荷曲线均以 von Mises 应力与等效塑性应变形式给出。

english:
Damage flag.
EQ.0 the failure model is of the Johnson
Cook type and requires LC1ID and LC2ID as additional input. If
EQ.1 the failure model is of the Gurson type and requires
LC3ID and EPSFG as additional input
zh:
损伤标志。
EQ.0：失效模型为 Johnson-Cook 类型，需要 LC1ID 和 LC2ID 作为附加输入。
EQ.1：失效模型为 Gurson 类型，需要 LC3ID 和 EPSFG 作为附加输入。

english:
Load curve ID giving equivalent plastic strain to failure as a
function of stress triaxiality or a table ID giving plastic strain to
failure as a function of Lode parameter and stress triaxiality (solids)
zh: 载荷曲线 ID，给出失效等效塑性应变随应力三轴度的变化；或表 ID，给出失效塑性应变随 Lode 参数和应力三轴度的变化（实体）。

english:
Load curve ID giving equivalent plastic strain to failure as a
function of equivalent plastic strain rate, the failure strain will be
computed as the product of the values on LC1ID and LC2ID
zh: 载荷曲线 ID，给出失效等效塑性应变随等效塑性应变率的变化；失效应变将按 LC1ID 和 LC2ID 上数值的乘积计算。

english:
Load curve giving the critical void fraction of the Gurson model
as a function of the plastic strain to failure measured in the uniaxial tensile test
zh: 载荷曲线，给出 Gurson 模型临界空洞体积分数随单轴拉伸试验测得失效塑性应变的变化。

english:
Load curve ID giving effective stress in function of plastic strain
obtained from a compression stress, input of this load curve will
activate distortional hardening and is NOT compatible with the use of strain rate effects
zh: 载荷曲线 ID，给出由压缩应力输入得到的有效应力随塑性应变的变化。输入该载荷曲线会激活畸变硬化，且与应变率效应不兼容。

english:
Number of through thickness integration points which must fail
before the element is deleted (inactive for solid elements
zh: 单元删除前必须失效的厚度方向积分点数量（对实体单元不激活）。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by
element nodes 1, 2, and 4, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes defined by	the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COOR_DINATE_VECTOR). Available with the R3 release of Version 971 and later.
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点 1、2 和 4 确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 相同。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，由向量 v 与单元法向叉乘定义。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID（CID）。适用于 971 R3 及之后版本。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by
element nodes 1, 2, and 4, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes defined by the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COOR_DINATE_VECTOR). Available with the R3 release of Version 971 and later.
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点 1、2 和 4 确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 相同。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，由向量 v 与单元法向叉乘定义。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID（CID）。适用于 971 R3 及之后版本。

english: F-flag
zh: F 标志。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by
element nodes 1, 2, and 4, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES.
EQ.2: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3: locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes about the element normal by an angle,
BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by	the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.
LT.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COOR_DINATE_VECTOR). Available with the R3 release of Version 971 and later.
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点 1、2 和 4 确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 相同。
EQ.2：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3：局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过将材料轴绕单元法向旋转角度 BETA 来确定。
LT.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID（CID）。适用于 971 R3 及之后版本。

english:
Material parameter
HR.EQ.2.0:   for determining initial yield stress for Swift exponential hardening. (Default=0.0)
HR.EQ.4.0: b, coefficient for Voce exponential hardening
HR.EQ.5.0:   for determining initial yield stress for Gosh exponential hardening. (Default=0.0)
HR.EQ.6.0: b, coefficient for Hocket-Sherby exponential hardening.
zh:
材料参数：
HR.EQ.2.0：用于确定 Swift 指数硬化初始屈服应力（默认=0.0）。
HR.EQ.4.0：Voce 指数硬化系数 b。
HR.EQ.5.0：用于确定 Gosh 指数硬化初始屈服应力（默认=0.0）。
HR.EQ.6.0：Hocket-Sherby 指数硬化系数 b。

english:
Material parameter:
HR.EQ.1.0:  Tangent modulus,
HR.EQ.2.0:  k, strength coefficient for Swift exponential hardening
HR.EQ.4.0: a, coefficient for Voce exponential hardening
HR.EQ.5.0: k, strength coefficient for Gosh exponential hardening
HR.EQ.6.0: a, coefficient for Hocket-Sherby exponential hardening
HR.EQ.7.0: load curve ID for hardening in 45 degree direction.
zh:
材料参数：
HR.EQ.1.0：切线模量。
HR.EQ.2.0：Swift 指数硬化的强度系数 k。
HR.EQ.4.0：Voce 指数硬化的系数 a。
HR.EQ.5.0：Gosh 指数硬化的强度系数 k。
HR.EQ.6.0：Hocket-Sherby 指数硬化的系数 a。
HR.EQ.7.0：45 度方向硬化的载荷曲线 ID。

english:
Material parameter:
HR.EQ.1.0: Yield stress
HR.EQ.2.0: n, exponent for Swift exponential hardening
HR.EQ.4.0: c, coefficient for Voce exponential hardening
HR.EQ.5.0: n, exponent for Gosh exponential hardening
HR.EQ.6.0: c. coefficient for Hocket-Sherby exponential hardening
HR.EQ.7.0: load curve ID for hardening in 90 degree direction.
.
zh:
材料参数：
HR.EQ.1.0：屈服应力。
HR.EQ.2.0：Swift 指数硬化的指数 n。
HR.EQ.4.0：Voce 指数硬化的系数 c。
HR.EQ.5.0：Gosh 指数硬化的指数 n。
HR.EQ.6.0：Hocket-Sherby 指数硬化的系数 c。
HR.EQ.7.0：90 度方向硬化的载荷曲线 ID。

english:
R00 , Lankford parameter in 0 degree direction
GT.0.0:  Constant value,
LT.0.0:  Load curve or Table ID = (-R00) which defines R value as a function of plastic strain (Curve) or as a function of temperature and plastic strain (Table)
.
zh:
R00，0 度方向 Lankford 参数。
GT.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线或表 ID = (-R00)，定义 R 值随塑性应变（曲线）或温度和塑性应变（表）的变化。

english:
R45, Lankford parameter in 45 degree direction
GT.0.0:  Constant value,
LT.0.0:  Load curve or Table ID = (-R45) which defines R value as a function of plastic strain (Curve) or as a function of temperature and plastic strain (Table).
zh:
R45，45 度方向 Lankford 参数。
GT.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线或表 ID = (-R45)，定义 R 值随塑性应变（曲线）或温度和塑性应变（表）的变化。

english:
R90, Lankford parameter in 90 degree direction
GT.0.0:  Constant value,
LT.0.0:  Load curve or Table ID = (-R90) which defines R value as a function of plastic strain (Curve) or as a function of temperature and plastic strain (Table).
zh:
R90，90 度方向 Lankford 参数。
GT.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线或表 ID = (-R90)，定义 R 值随塑性应变（曲线）或温度和塑性应变（表）的变化。

english:
Load curve or Table ID for austenite hardening.
IF LCID input yield stress versus effective plastic strain. IF TABID.
GT.0: 2D table. Input temperatures as table values and hardening curves as targets
for those temperatures (see *DEFINE_TABLE) IF TABID.
LT.0: 3D table. Input temperatures as main table values and strain rates as values
for the sub tables, and hardening curves as targets for those strain rates.
zh:
奥氏体硬化的载荷曲线或表 ID。
若为 LCID，输入屈服应力与有效塑性应变关系。
若 TABID.GT.0：2D 表，表值为温度，目标为对应温度下的硬化曲线（参见 *DEFINE_TABLE）。
若 TABID.LT.0：3D 表，主表值为温度，子表值为应变率，目标为对应应变率下的硬化曲线。

english:
Youngs' modulus:
GT.0.0:	constant value is used
LT.0.0:	LCID or TABID.  Temperature dependent Young's modulus given by load curve or table ID = -E. When using a table to describe the Young's modulus see Remark 10 for more information..
zh:
Young 模量：
GT.0.0：使用常数值。
LT.0.0：LCID 或 TABID。温度相关 Young 模量由载荷曲线或表 ID = -E 给出。使用表描述 Young 模量时，更多信息见备注 10。

english:
Manual start temperature ferrite, .
GT.0.0:	Same temperature is used for heating and cooling.
LT.0.0:	Curve ID:	Different start temperatures for cooling and heating given by load curve ID= -FS. First ordinate value is used for cooling, last ordinate value for heating..
zh:
铁素体手动起始温度。
GT.0.0：加热和冷却使用相同温度。
LT.0.0：曲线 ID；由载荷曲线 ID = -FS 给出冷却和加热的不同起始温度。第一个纵坐标值用于冷却，最后一个纵坐标值用于加热。

english:
Heat flag as in MAT_244, see there for details.
EQ.0:	Heating is not activated.
EQ.1:	Heating is activated.
EQ.2:	Automatic switching between cooling and heating.
LT.0:	Switch between cooling and heating is defined by a time dependent load curve with id ABS(HEAT).
zh:
加热标志，与 MAT_244 相同，详情见该关键字。
EQ.0：不激活加热。
EQ.1：激活加热。
EQ.2：自动在冷却和加热之间切换。
LT.0：由 ID 为 ABS(HEAT) 的时间相关载荷曲线定义冷却和加热切换。

english:
Latent heat for the decomposition of austenite into ferrite, pearlite and bainite.
GT.0.0:	Constant value
LT.0.0:	Curve ID or Table ID: See remark 11 for more information.
zh:
奥氏体分解为铁素体、珠光体和贝氏体的潜热。
GT.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：曲线 ID 或表 ID；更多信息见备注 11。

english:
Latent heat for the decomposition of austenite into martensite.
GT.0.0:	Constant value
LT.0.0:	Curve ID:	Note that LAT 5 is ignored if a Table ID is used in LAT1.
zh:
奥氏体分解为马氏体的潜热。
GT.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：曲线 ID。注意，如果 LAT1 使用表 ID，则 LAT5 被忽略。

english:
Load curve or Table ID for austenite hardening.
if LCID
input yield stress versus effective plastic strain.
if TABID.GT.0:
2D table. Input temperatures as table values and hardening curves as targets for those temperatures (see *DEFINE_TABLE)
if TABID.LT.0:
3D table. Input temperatures as main table values and strain rates as values for the sub tables, and hardening curves as targets for those strain rates..
zh:
奥氏体硬化的载荷曲线或表 ID。
若为 LCID，输入屈服应力与有效塑性应变关系。
若 TABID.GT.0：2D 表，表值为温度，目标为对应温度下的硬化曲线（参见 *DEFINE_TABLE）。
若 TABID.LT.0：3D 表，主表值为温度，子表值为应变率，目标为对应应变率下的硬化曲线。

english:
Describes the increase of martensite start temperature for cooling due to applied stress.
LT.0:	Load Curve ID describes MSIG as a function of triaxiality (pressure / effective stress).
zh:
描述冷却过程中因施加应力导致的马氏体起始温度升高。
LT.0：载荷曲线 ID 描述 MSIG 随三轴度（压力/有效应力）的变化。

english:
Switch to exclude middle phases from the simulation.
EQ.0:	all phases active (default)
EQ.1:	pearlite and bainite active
EQ.2:	bainite active
EQ.3:	ferrite and pearlite active
EQ.4:	ferrite and bainite active
EQ.5:	no active middle phases (only austenite → martensite)
zh:
从仿真中排除中间相的开关：
EQ.0：所有相激活（默认）。
EQ.1：珠光体和贝氏体激活。
EQ.2：贝氏体激活。
EQ.3：铁素体和珠光体激活。
EQ.4：铁素体和贝氏体激活。
EQ.5：无激活中间相（仅奥氏体 → 马氏体）。

english:
Poisson's ratio:
GT.0.0:	constant value is used
LT.0.0:	LCID or TABID.  Temperature dependent Poisson's ratio given by load curve or table ID = -PR. The table input is described in Remark 10.
zh:
泊松比：
GT.0.0：使用常数值。
LT.0.0：LCID 或 TABID。温度相关泊松比由载荷曲线或表 ID = -PR 给出。表输入说明见备注 10。

english:
Cowper and Symonds strain rate parameter .
STRC.LT.0.0:	load curve id = -STRC
STRC.GT.0.0:	constant value
STRC.EQ.0.0:	strain rate NOT active
zh:
Cowper-Symonds 应变率参数。
STRC.LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID = -STRC。
STRC.GT.0.0：常数值。
STRC.EQ.0.0：不激活应变率效应。

english:
Cowper and Symonds strain rate parameter P.
STRP.LT.0.0:	load curve id = -STRP
STRP.GT.0.0:	constant value
STRP.EQ.0.0:	strain rate NOT active
zh:
Cowper-Symonds 应变率参数 P。
STRP.LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID = -STRP。
STRP.GT.0.0：常数值。
STRP.EQ.0.0：不激活应变率效应。

english:
Table definition for thermal expansion coefficient. See remarks for more information how to input this table.
GT.0:	A table for instantaneous thermal expansion (TREF is ignored).
LT.0:	A table with thermal expansion with reference to TREF.
zh:
热膨胀系数的表定义。如何输入该表的更多信息见备注。
GT.0：瞬时热膨胀表（忽略 TREF）。
LT.0：相对于 TREF 的热膨胀表。

english:
Damage criterion flag D or D^, see Remarks.
EQ.0.0: damage model uses damage plastic strain r.
damage model uses plastic arc length rv
zh:
损伤准则标志 D 或 D^，参见备注。
EQ.0.0：损伤模型使用损伤塑性应变 r。
另一个选项表示损伤模型使用塑性弧长 rv。

english:
Coefficient of thermal expansion:
GT.0.0: constant value is used
LT.0.0: LCID or TABID. Temperature dependent CTE given	by load curve ID = -CTE or a Table ID = -CTE. Use
Table ID to describe temperature dependent CTE for	each phase individually.
zh:
热膨胀系数：
GT.0.0：使用常数值。
LT.0.0：LCID 或 TABID。温度相关 CTE 由载荷曲线 ID = -CTE 或表 ID = -CTE 给出。使用表 ID 可分别描述每个相的温度相关 CTE。

english:
Youngs' modulus:
GT.0.0: constant value is used
LT.0.0: LCID or TABID. Temperature dependent Youngs' modulus given by load curve ID = -E or a Table
ID = -E. Use TABID to describe temperature dependent modulus for each phase individually.
zh:
Young 模量：
GT.0.0：使用常数值。
LT.0.0：LCID 或 TABID。温度相关 Young 模量由载荷曲线 ID = -E 或表 ID = -E 给出。使用 TABID 可分别描述每个相的温度相关模量。

english:
Poisson's modulus:
GT.0.0: constant value is used
LT.0.0: LCID or TABID. Temperature dependent Posson's ratio given by load curve ID = -E or a Table ID = -E.
Use TABID to describe temperature dependent parameter for each phase individually..
zh:
泊松比：
GT.0.0：使用常数值。
LT.0.0：LCID 或 TABID。温度相关泊松比由载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID 给出。使用 TABID 可分别描述每个相的温度相关参数。

english:
Table ID to define end temperatures for the transformations as
function of source phase and target phase. The values in
*DEFINE_TABLE are the phase numbers before transformation
(source phase). The curves referenced by the table specify end
temperature (ordinate) versus phase number after transformation	(abscissa).
zh: 表 ID，用于定义相变结束温度随源相和目标相的变化。*DEFINE_TABLE 中的值为相变前相编号（源相）。该表引用的曲线指定结束温度（纵坐标）随相变后相编号（横坐标）的变化。

english:
Table ID containing transformation induced strains as function of
source phase and target phase.
zh: 表 ID，包含相变诱导应变随源相和目标相的变化。

english:
Flag for transformation induced plasticity (TRIP). Algorithm active
for positive value of PTRIP.
zh: 相变诱导塑性（TRIP）标志。PTRIP 为正值时算法激活。

english:
Table ID to define start temperatures for the transformations as
function of source phase and target phase. The values in
*DEFINE_TABLE are the phase numbers before transformation
(source phase). The curves referenced by the table specify start
temperature (ordinate) versus phase number after transformation	(abscissa).
zh: 表 ID，用于定义相变起始温度随源相和目标相的变化。*DEFINE_TABLE 中的值为相变前相编号（源相）。该表引用的曲线指定起始温度（纵坐标）随相变后相编号（横坐标）的变化。

english:
Material parameters for the option XUE. The parameter k in the
original paper is assumed to be 1.0. For details, refer to Xue, L.,
Wierzbicki, T.'s 2009 paper "Numerical simulation of fracture mode
transition in ductile plates" in the International Journal of Solids and Structures..
zh: XUE 选项的材料参数。原论文中的参数 k 假定为 1.0。详情参见 Xue 和 Wierzbicki 于 2009 年发表的论文。

english:
Flag to control failure of an integration point based on longitudinal (fiber) tensile failure:
EQ.0.0: IP fails if any damage variable reaches 1.0.
EQ.1.0: no failure of IP due to fiber tensile failure (da(i)=1.0).
zh:
基于纵向（纤维）拉伸失效控制积分点失效的标志：
EQ.0.0：任一损伤变量达到 1.0 时积分点失效。
EQ.1.0：不因纤维拉伸失效导致积分点失效（da(i)=1.0）。

english:
Flag to control failure of an integration point based on longitudinal (fiber) compressive failure:
EQ.0.0: IP fails if any damage variable reaches 1.0.
EQ.1.0: no failure of IP due to fiber compressive failure	(dkink(i)=1.0).
zh:
基于纵向（纤维）压缩失效控制积分点失效的标志：
EQ.0.0：任一损伤变量达到 1.0 时积分点失效。
EQ.1.0：不因纤维压缩失效导致积分点失效（dkink(i)=1.0）。

english:
Flag to control failure of an integration point based on transverse (matrix) failure:
EQ.0.0: IP fails if any damage variable reaches 1.0.
EQ.1.0: no failure of IP due to matrix failure (dmat(i)=1.0).
zh:
基于横向（基体）失效控制积分点失效的标志：
EQ.0.0：任一损伤变量达到 1.0 时积分点失效。
EQ.1.0：不因基体失效导致积分点失效（dmat(i)=1.0）。

english:
Fracture toughness for longitudinal (fiber) tensile failure mode.
GT.0.0: The given value will be regularized with the characteristic element length.
LT.0.0: Load curve ID=(-ENA) which defines the fracture
toughness for fiber tensile failure mode as a function of
characteristic element length. No further regularization.
zh:
纵向（纤维）拉伸失效模式的断裂韧性。
GT.0.0：给定值会按特征单元长度正则化。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID=(-ENA)，定义纤维拉伸失效模式断裂韧性随特征单元长度的变化，不再进一步正则化。

english:
Fracture toughness for intralaminar matrix tensile failure.
GT.0.0: The given value will be regularized with the characteristic element length.
LT.0.0: Load curve ID=(-ENB) which defines the fracture
toughness for intralaminar matrix tensile failure as a
function of characteristic element length. No further regularization.
zh:
层内基体拉伸失效的断裂韧性。
GT.0.0：给定值会按特征单元长度正则化。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID=(-ENB)，定义层内基体拉伸失效断裂韧性随特征单元长度的变化，不再进一步正则化。

english:
Fracture toughness for longitudinal (fiber) compressive failure mode.
GT.0.0: The given value will be regularized with the characteristic element length.
LT.0.0: Load curve ID=(-ENKINK) which defines the fracture
toughness for fiber compressive failure mode as a
function of characteristic element length. No further regularization.
zh:
纵向（纤维）压缩失效模式的断裂韧性。
GT.0.0：给定值会按特征单元长度正则化。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID=(-ENKINK)，定义纤维压缩失效模式断裂韧性随特征单元长度的变化，不再进一步正则化。

english:
Fracture toughness for intralaminar matrix longitudinal shear failure.
GT.0.0: The given value will be regularized with the characteristic element length.
LT.0.0: Load curve ID=(-ENL) which defines the fracture
toughness for intralaminar matrix longitudinal shear
failure as a function of characteristic element length. No further regularization.
zh:
层内基体纵向剪切失效的断裂韧性。
GT.0.0：给定值会按特征单元长度正则化。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID=(-ENL)，定义该断裂韧性随特征单元长度的变化，不再进一步正则化。

english:
Fracture toughness for intralaminar matrix transverse shear failure.
GT.0.0: The given value will be regularized with the characteristic element length.
LT.0.0: Load curve ID=(-ENT) which defines the fracture
toughness for intralaminar matrix transverse shear failure
as a function of characteristic element length. No further	regularization.
zh:
层内基体横向剪切失效的断裂韧性。
GT.0.0：给定值会按特征单元长度正则化。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID=(-ENT)，定义该断裂韧性随特征单元长度的变化，不再进一步正则化。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by
element nodes 1, 2, and 4, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES.
and then, for shells only, rotated about the shell element normal by an angle MANGLE
EQ.1.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by a
point in space and the global location of the element center; this is the a-direction.
This option is for solid elements only.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes about the element normal by an angle,
BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by	the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.
EQ.4.0: locally orthotropic in cylindrical coordinate system with
the material axes determined by a vector v, and an originating point, p, which define the centerline axis. This option is for solid elements only
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COOR_DINATE_VECTOR). Available with the R3 release of Version 971 and later.
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点 1、2 和 4 确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 相同；对于壳，还会绕壳单元法向按角度 MANGLE 旋转。
EQ.1.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由空间点和单元中心全局位置确定，该方向为 a 方向；仅适用于实体。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方向量确定。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过绕单元法向旋转角度 BETA 来确定。
EQ.4.0：圆柱坐标系局部正交各向异性，仅实体。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID。

english:
Flag to control failure of an integration point based on longitudinal (fiber) tensile failure:
EQ.0.0: Integration point fails if any damage variable reaches 1.0.
EQ.1.0: No failure of integration point due to fiber tensile failure (da(i)=1.0).
zh:
基于纵向（纤维）拉伸失效控制积分点失效的标志：
EQ.0.0：任一损伤变量达到 1.0 时积分点失效。
EQ.1.0：不因纤维拉伸失效导致积分点失效（da(i)=1.0）。

english:
Flag to control failure of an integration point based on longitudinal (fiber) compressive failure:
EQ.0.0: integration point fails if any damage variable reaches 1.0.
EQ.1.0: no failure of integration point due to fiber compressive failure	(dkink(i)=1.0).
zh:
基于纵向（纤维）压缩失效控制积分点失效的标志：
EQ.0.0：任一损伤变量达到 1.0 时积分点失效。
EQ.1.0：不因纤维压缩失效导致积分点失效（dkink(i)=1.0）。

english:
Flag to control failure of an integration point based on transverse (matrix) failure:
EQ.0.0: integration point fails if any damage variable reaches 1.0.
EQ.1.0: no failure of integration point due to matrix failure (dmat(i)=1.0).
zh:
基于横向（基体）失效控制积分点失效的标志：
EQ.0.0：任一损伤变量达到 1.0 时积分点失效。
EQ.1.0：不因基体失效导致积分点失效（dmat(i)=1.0）。

english:
Flag to control failure of an integration point based on in-plane shear failure:
EQ. 0.0: integration point fails if any damage variable reaches 1.0.
EQ. 1.0: No failure of integration point due to in-plane shear failure, dls(i)=1.0.
zh:
基于面内剪切失效控制积分点失效的标志：
EQ.0.0：任一损伤变量达到 1.0 时积分点失效。
EQ.1.0：不因面内剪切失效导致积分点失效（dls(i)=1.0）。

english:
Fracture toughness for in-plane shear failure mode.
GT.0.0: The given value will be regularized with the characteristic element length.
LT.0.0: Load curve ID=(-GSL)) which defines the fracture
toughness for intralaminar matrix longitudinal shear
failure as a function of characteristic element length. No further regularization.
zh:
面内剪切失效模式的断裂韧性。
GT.0.0：给定值会按特征单元长度正则化。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID=(-GSL)，定义该断裂韧性随特征单元长度的变化，不再进一步正则化。

english:
Fracture toughness for longitudinal (fiber) compressive failure mode.
GT.0.0: The given value will be regularized with the characteristic element length.
LT.0.0: Load curve ID=(-GXC) which defines the fracture
toughness for fiber compressive failure mode as a
function of characteristic element length. No further regularization.
zh:
纵向（纤维）压缩失效模式的断裂韧性。
GT.0.0：给定值会按特征单元长度正则化。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID=(-GXC)，定义该断裂韧性随特征单元长度的变化，不再进一步正则化。

english:
Fracture toughness for longitudinal (fiber) compressive failure mode
to define bi-linear damage evolution..
GT.0.0: The given value will be regularized with the characteristic element length.
LT.0.0: Load curve ID=(-GXCO)) which defines the fracture
toughness for intralaminar matrix longitudinal shear
failure as a function of characteristic element length. No further regularization.
zh:
用于定义双线性损伤演化的纵向（纤维）压缩失效模式断裂韧性。
GT.0.0：给定值会按特征单元长度正则化。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID=(-GXCO)，定义该断裂韧性随特征单元长度的变化，不再进一步正则化。

english:
Fracture toughness for longitudinal (fiber) tensile failure mode.
GT.0.0: The given value will be regularized with the characteristic element length.
LT.0.0: Load curve ID=(-GXT) which defines the fracture
toughness for fiber tensile failure mode as a function of
characteristic element length. No further regularization.
zh:
纵向（纤维）拉伸失效模式的断裂韧性。
GT.0.0：给定值会按特征单元长度正则化。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID=(-GXT)，定义该断裂韧性随特征单元长度的变化，不再进一步正则化。

english:
Fracture toughness for longitudinal (fiber) tensile failure mode to
define bi-linear damage evolution.
GT.0.0: The given value will be regularized with the characteristic element length.
LT.0.0: Load curve ID=(-GXTO)) which defines the fracture
toughness for intralaminar matrix longitudinal shear
failure as a function of characteristic element length. No further regularization.
zh:
用于定义双线性损伤演化的纵向（纤维）拉伸失效模式断裂韧性。
GT.0.0：给定值会按特征单元长度正则化。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID=(-GXTO)，定义该断裂韧性随特征单元长度的变化，不再进一步正则化。

english:
Fracture toughness for transverse compressive failure mode.
GT.0.0: The given value will be regularized with the characteristic element length.
LT.0.0: Load curve ID=(-GYC)) which defines the fracture
toughness for intralaminar matrix tensile failure as a
function of characteristic element length. No further regularization.
zh:
横向压缩失效模式的断裂韧性。
GT.0.0：给定值会按特征单元长度正则化。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID=(-GYC)，定义该断裂韧性随特征单元长度的变化，不再进一步正则化。

english:
Fracture toughness for transverse tensile failure mode.
GT.0.0: The given value will be regularized with the characteristic element length.
LT.0.0: Load curve ID=(-GYT)) which defines the fracture
toughness for intralaminar matrix transverse shear failure
as a function of characteristic element length. No further      regularization.
zh:
横向拉伸失效模式的断裂韧性。
GT.0.0：给定值会按特征单元长度正则化。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID=(-GYT)，定义该断裂韧性随特征单元长度的变化，不再进一步正则化。

english:
ACT = 1 indicates that an active model will be used that acts in the mean
fiber-direction. The active model, like the passive model, will be dispersed by SIGMA and F, or if INIT = 1, with the
*INITIAL_FIELD_SOLID keyword
zh: ACT = 1 表示使用作用于平均纤维方向的主动模型。主动模型与被动模型一样，会由 SIGMA 和 F 离散；若 INIT = 1，则通过 *INITIAL_FIELD_SOLID 关键字离散。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by
element nodes 1, 2, and 4, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDI_NATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes about the element normal by an angle,
BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by	the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COOR_DINATE_VECTOR). Available with the R3 release of Version 971 and later.
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点 1、2 和 4 确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES 相同。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过绕单元法向旋转角度 BETA 来确定。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID。

english:
Fiber dispersion parameter governs the extent to which the fiber dispersion extends to the third dimension. F = 0 and F = 1 apply to 2D splay
with the normal to the membrane being in the beta and the gama directions,
respectively . F = 0.5 applies to 3D splay with transverse isotropy.
Splay will be orthotropic whenever F != 0.5. This parameter is ignored if INIT = 1.
zh: 纤维离散参数，控制纤维离散扩展到第三维的程度。F=0 和 F=1 分别适用于膜法向位于 beta 和 gamma 方向的二维展开；F=0.5 适用于具有横向各向同性的三维展开。F != 0.5 时展开为正交各向异性。INIT=1 时忽略该参数。

english:
INIT = 1 indicates that the anisotropy eigenvalues will be given by
*INITIAL_FIELD_SOLID variables in the global coordinate system
zh: INIT = 1 表示各向异性特征值将由全局坐标系中的 *INITIAL_FIELD_SOLID 变量给出。

english:
ORTH specifies the number (1 or 2) of fibers used. When ORTH = 2
two fiber families are used and arranges symmetrically THETA degrees
from the mean fiber direction and lying in the tissue plane
zh: ORTH 指定使用的纤维数量（1 或 2）。当 ORTH = 2 时，使用两个纤维族，并在组织平面内相对于平均纤维方向按 THETA 度对称布置。

english:
The parameter SIGMA governs the extent of dispersion, such that as
SIGMA goes to zero, the material symmetry reduces to pure transverse
isotropy. Conversely, as SIGMA becomes large, the material symmetry
becomes isotropic in the plane. This parameter is ignored if INIT = 1.
zh: SIGMA 参数控制离散程度；当 SIGMA 趋近于零时，材料对称性退化为纯横向各向同性。相反，当 SIGMA 很大时，材料对称性在平面内变为各向同性。INIT=1 时忽略该参数。

english:
The angle between the mean fiber direction and the fiber families. The
parameter is active only if ORTH = 2 and is particularly important in
vascular tissues (e.g. arteries)
zh: 平均纤维方向与纤维族之间的角度。该参数仅在 ORTH = 2 时激活，在血管组织（如动脉）中特别重要。

english:
Parameter describing which softening algorithm that shall be used.
EQ.1: Strain based Mullins effect from Qi and Boyce, see theory section
below for details
M1 = A (Qi recommends 3.5)
M2 = B (Qi recommends 18.0)
M3 = Z (Qi recommends 0.7)
M4 = vs (between 0 and 1 and less than vss)
M5 = vss (between 0 and 1 and greater than vs)
EQ.2: Energy based Mullins, a modified version of Roxburgh and Ogden model. M1 > 0, M2 > 0 and M3 > 0 must be set. See Theory section for details.
zh:
描述所用软化算法的参数。
EQ.1：Qi 和 Boyce 的基于应变的 Mullins 效应，详情见理论部分；M1=A、M2=B、M3=Z、M4=vs、M5=vss。
EQ.2：基于能量的 Mullins，为 Roxburgh-Ogden 模型的修正版；必须设置 M1>0、M2>0、M3>0。

english:
Option for viscoelastic behavior, see the theory section for details.
EQ.0: No viscoelasticity.
EQ.1: Free energy formulation based on Holzapfel and Ogden.
EQ.2: Formulation based on stiffness ratios from Simo et al.
zh:
黏弹性行为选项，详情见理论部分。
EQ.0：无黏弹性。
EQ.1：基于 Holzapfel 和 Ogden 的自由能公式。
EQ.2：基于 Simo 等人的刚度比公式。

english:
Parameter describing which viscoplastic formulation that should be
used, see the theory section for details.
EQ.0: No viscoplasticity.
EQ.1: 2 parameters standard model, K1 and S1 must be set.
EQ.¦Â: 6 parameters G'Sells model, K1,K¦Â,K¦Ã,S1,S¦Â and S¦Ã must be set.
EQ.3: 4 parameters Strain hardening model, K1,K2,S1,S2 must be set.
zh:
描述所用黏塑性公式的参数，详情见理论部分。
EQ.0：无黏塑性。
EQ.1：2 参数标准模型，必须设置 K1 和 S1。
EQ.2：6 参数 G'Sell 模型，必须设置 K1、K2、K3、S1、S2 和 S3。
EQ.3：4 参数应变硬化模型，必须设置 K1、K2、S1、S2。

english:
Initial yield stress.
EQ.0.0: No plasticity
GT.0.0: Initial yield stress. Hardening is defined seperataly.
LT.0.0: -YLD0 is taken as the load curve ID for the yield stress versus
effective plastic strain.
zh:
初始屈服应力。
EQ.0.0：无塑性。
GT.0.0：初始屈服应力，硬化另行定义。
LT.0.0：-YLD0 作为屈服应力与有效塑性应变曲线的载荷曲线 ID。

english:
Activate sintering
EQ.0.0: Sintering off
EQ.1.0: Sintering on.
zh:
激活烧结：
EQ.0.0：烧结关闭。
EQ.1.0：烧结开启。

english:
Switch between incremental and total stress formulation.
EQ.0: total form: (DEFAULT)
EQ.1: incremental form: (recommended).
zh:
增量应力公式和总应力公式之间的切换。
EQ.0：总量形式（默认）。
EQ.1：增量形式（推荐）。

english:
|LCCHEXP| is Load curve ID to define the coefficient for chemical shrinkage 𝛾(𝛼)
as a function of the state of cure 𝛼. If set, parameters CHEXP1,
CHEXP2 and CHEXP3 are ignored.
zh: |LCCHEXP| 为载荷曲线 ID，用于定义化学收缩系数 γ(α) 随固化状态 α 的变化。若设置该项，则忽略 CHEXP1、CHEXP2 和 CHEXP3。

english:
|LCTHEXP| is Load curve ID or table ID defining the coefficient of
thermal expansion 𝛽(𝛼, 𝑇) as a function of cure 𝛼 and temperature 𝑇.
If referring to a load curve, parameter 𝛽(𝑇) is a function of
temperature 𝑇.
zh: |LCTHEXP| 为载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID，用于定义热膨胀系数 β(α,T) 随固化度 α 和温度 T 的变化。若引用载荷曲线，则参数 β(T) 为温度 T 的函数。

english:
Material axes option (see MAT_OPTION TROPIC_ELASTIC for a
more complete description):
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by
element nodes 1, 2, and 4, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by
vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes for each integration
point determined by rotating the material axes about
the element normal by an angle, Bi (see
*PART_COMPOSITE), from a line in the plane of the
element defined by the cross product of the vector ..
with the element normal.
LT.0.0: the absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID
number (CID on *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES,
*DEFINE_COORDINATE_SYSTEM or *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR).
Available in R3 version of 971 and later.
zh:
材料轴选项（更完整说明参见 MAT_OPTION TROPIC_ELASTIC）：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点 1、2 和 4 确定。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方向量确定。
EQ.3.0：每个积分点的局部正交各向异性材料轴，通过绕单元法向按角度 Bi 旋转确定。
LT.0.0：AOPT 的绝对值为坐标系 ID。

english:
Flag for stress formulation:
EQ.0: total formulation (default)
EQ.1: incremental formulation (recommended).
zh:
应力公式标志：
EQ.0：总量公式（默认）。
EQ.1：增量公式（推荐）。

english:
Load curve ID to define the coefficient for chemical shrinkage
γ(α) as a function of the state of cure α. If set, parameters
CHEXP1, CHEXP2, and CHEXP3 are ignored
zh: 载荷曲线 ID，用于定义化学收缩系数 γ(α) 随固化状态 α 的变化。若设置该项，则忽略 CHEXP1、CHEXP2 和 CHEXP3。

english:
Load curve ID or table ID defining the instantaneous coefficient
of thermal expansion β(α, T) as a function of cure α and
temperature T. If referring to a load curve, parameter β(T) is a
function of temperature T.
zh: 载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID，用于定义瞬时热膨胀系数 β(α,T) 随固化度 α 和温度 T 的变化。若引用载荷曲线，则参数 β(T) 为温度 T 的函数。

english:
Scale factor (unit of length). If negative, the absolute value indicates
a curve with respect to the normal stress.
zh: 比例因子（长度单位）。若为负，其绝对值表示相对于法向应力的曲线。

english:
The initial tensile stiffness (units of stress / length) normal to the
plane of the cohesive element.
zh: 黏聚单元平面法向的初始拉伸刚度（单位：应力/长度）。

english:
The final tensile stiffness (units of stress / length) normal to the
plane of the cohesive element.
zh: 黏聚单元平面法向的最终拉伸刚度（单位：应力/长度）。

english:
The initial stiffness (units of stress / length) tangential to the plane
of the cohesive element.
zh: 黏聚单元平面切向的初始刚度（单位：应力/长度）。

english:
The final stiffness (units of stress / length) tangential to the plane of
the cohesive element.
zh: 黏聚单元平面切向的最终刚度（单位：应力/长度）。

english:
Maximum effective separation distance in normal direction. Beyond
this distance failure occurs.
zh: 法向最大有效分离距离。超过该距离即发生失效。

english:
Maximum effective separation distance in tangential direction.
Beyond this distance failure occurs.
zh: 切向最大有效分离距离。超过该距离即发生失效。

english:
Peak tensile traction in tangential direction. If negative, the absolute
value indicates a curve with respect to the normal traction.
zh: 切向峰值拉伸牵引力。若为负，其绝对值表示相对于法向牵引力的曲线。

english:
Final traction in tangential direction. If negative, the absolute value
indicates a curve with respect to the normal traction.
zh: 切向最终牵引力。若为负，其绝对值表示相对于法向牵引力的曲线。

english:
Flag for crack strain initialization
EQ.0.0: initial crack strain is strain at failure (default),
EQ.1.0: initial crack strain is zero.
zh:
裂纹应变初始化标志：
EQ.0.0：初始裂纹应变为失效应变（默认）。
EQ.1.0：初始裂纹应变为零。

english:
Flag to choose between failure criteria, see Remarks.
EQ.0.0: Rankine maximum stress (default),
EQ.1.0: Mohr-Coulomb,
EQ.2.0: Drucker-Prager.
zh:
失效准则选择标志，参见备注。
EQ.0.0：Rankine 最大应力（默认）。
EQ.1.0：Mohr-Coulomb。
EQ.2.0：Drucker-Prager。

english:
Scale factor for the tensile strength: FTmod = FTSCL * FT.
As soon as the first crack happens in the associated part, tensile strength drops to its original value, FT.
Default value is 1.0, values >1.0 can be helpful to grasp high force peaks in impact events.
zh:
拉伸强度比例因子：FTmod = FTSCL * FT。
一旦关联部件中出现第一条裂纹，拉伸强度降回原始值 FT。默认值为 1.0；大于 1.0 的值有助于捕捉冲击事件中的高力峰值。

english:
Scale factor for stiffness in case of failure, e.g. SFSTI = 0.1 means
that stiffness is reduced to 10% of the stiffness at failure.
zh: 失效时刚度的比例因子，例如 SFSTI=0.1 表示刚度降为失效时刚度的 10%。

english:
Scale factor for stress in case of failure, e.g. SFSTR = 0.1 means that
stress is reduced to 10% of the stress at failure.
zh: 失效时应力的比例因子，例如 SFSTR=0.1 表示应力降为失效时应力的 10%。

english:
Compression modulus along the fiber yarns, reversely calculated
using bending tests when all the other material properties are
determined. See Remark 5.
zh: 沿纤维纱线方向的压缩模量；在其他材料属性确定后，通过弯曲试验反算。参见备注 5。

english:
Stretch ratio at the end of undulation stage during the uniaxial
tension test. Example shown in Figure M293-2. See Remark 5.
zh: 单轴拉伸试验中波纹阶段结束时的拉伸比。示例见图 M293-2。参见备注 5。

english:
Tensile modulus along the fiber yarns, corresponding to the slope
of the curve in Figure M293-2 in the Stable Modulus region from a
uniaxial tension test. See Remark 5.
zh: 沿纤维纱线方向的拉伸模量，对应单轴拉伸试验中图 M293-2 稳定模量区域曲线斜率。参见备注 5。

english:
Initial angle offset between the fiber direction and the element
direction. To reduce simulation error, when building the model,
the elements should be aligned to the same direction as much as possible.
zh: 纤维方向与单元方向之间的初始角度偏移。为降低仿真误差，建模时应尽可能使单元对齐到同一方向。

english:
Type of active model:
EQ.1:	Guccione-Waldman-McCulloch [4]
EQ.2:	Guccione-Waldman-McCulloch [4] and Hunter-Nash-Sands [9]
EQ.3:	Hunter-Nash-Sands	[9]
