S-N fatigue curve ID.
GT.0: S-N fatigue curve ID.
EQ.-1: S-N fatigue curve uses equation N*S**b=a.
EQ.-2: S-N fatigue curve uses equation log(S)=a-b*log(N).
EQ.-3: S-N fatigue curve uses equation S=a*N**b
zh:
S-N 疲劳曲线 ID。
GT.0：S-N 疲劳曲线 ID。
EQ.-1：S-N 曲线使用方程 N*S**b=a。
EQ.-2：S-N 曲线使用方程 log(S)=a-b*log(N)。
EQ.-3：S-N 曲线使用方程 S=a*N**b。

english:
Type of S-N curve.
EQ.0: Semi-log interpolation (default).
EQ.1: Log-Log interpolation.
EQ.2: Linear-Linear interpolation.
zh:
S-N 曲线类型：
EQ.0：半对数插值（默认）。
EQ.1：对数-对数插值。
EQ.2：线性-线性插值。

english:
If LCID > 0
Flag setting algorithm used when stress is lower than the lowest stress on S-N curve.
EQ.0: use the life at the last point on S-N curve.
EQ.1: extrapolation from the last two points on S-N curve.
EQ.2: infinity.
If LCID < 0
Flag setting algorithm used when stress is lower than STHRES.
EQ.0: use the life at STHRES.
EQ.1: Ignored. only applicable for LCID > 0.
EQ.2: infinity.
zh:
若 LCID > 0：当应力低于 S-N 曲线最低应力时所用算法标志。
EQ.0：使用 S-N 曲线最后一点的寿命。
EQ.1：由最后两点外推。
EQ.2：无穷大。
若 LCID < 0：当应力低于 STHRES 时所用算法标志。
EQ.0：使用 STHRES 处寿命。
EQ.1：忽略，仅适用于 LCID > 0。
EQ.2：无穷大。

english:
Stress type of S-N curve.
EQ.0: stress range (default)
EQ.1: stress amplitude.
zh:
S-N 曲线的应力类型：
EQ.0：应力范围（默认）。
EQ.1：应力幅值。

english:
Damage threshold value (critical damage). If a Load curve of critical
history value or fixed value is given by ECRIT, input is ignored.
zh: 损伤阈值（临界损伤）。如果 ECRIT 给出了临界历史值载荷曲线或固定值，则忽略该输入。

english:
Flag for damage behavior.
EQ.0: Damage is accumulated, no coupling to flow stress, no failure.
EQ.1: Damage is accumulated, element failure occurs for D = 1..
zh:
损伤行为标志：
EQ.0：累积损伤，不与流动应力耦合，不失效。
EQ.1：累积损伤，当 D=1 时发生单元失效。

english:
Critical history value (material instability), see below.
LT.0.0: |ECRIT| is load curve ID defining critical history value vs. triaxiality.
EQ.0.0: Fixed value DCRIT defining critical damage is read.
GT.0.0: Fixed value for stress-state independent critical history value.
zh:
临界历史值（材料不稳定），见下方。
LT.0.0：|ECRIT| 为载荷曲线 ID，定义临界历史值随三轴度的变化。
EQ.0.0：读取固定值 DCRIT，用于定义临界损伤。
GT.0.0：与应力状态无关的固定临界历史值。

english:
Exponent for damage-related stress fadeout.
LT.0.0: |FADEXP| is load curve ID defining element-size dependent fading exponent.
GT.0.0: Constant fading exponent.
zh:
损伤相关应力淡出指数。
LT.0.0：|FADEXP| 为载荷曲线 ID，定义单元尺寸相关淡出指数。
GT.0.0：常数淡出指数。

english:
Flag for damage model.
EQ.0: no damage model is used.
EQ.1: GISSMO damage model..
zh:
损伤模型标志：
EQ.0：不使用损伤模型。
EQ.1：GISSMO 损伤模型。

english:
Damage driving quantities
EQ.0.0: Rates of history variables HISn.
EQ.1.0: Specific components of the plastic strain rate tensor, see remarks for details.
EQ.2.0: Predefined functions of plastic strain rate components for
orthotropic damage model, HISn inputs will be ignored, IFLG2 should be set to 1..
zh:
损伤驱动量：
EQ.0.0：历史变量 HISn 的变化率。
EQ.1.0：塑性应变率张量的特定分量，详情见备注。
EQ.2.0：用于正交各向异性损伤模型的预定义塑性应变率分量函数；将忽略 HISn 输入，IFLG2 应设为 1。

english:
Damage strain coordinate system
EQ.0.0: Local element system.
EQ.1.0: Material system, only applicable for non-isotropic material models.Supported models for shell elements: all materials with AOPT feature. Supported models for solid elements: 22, 33, 41-50, 103, 122, 133, 157, 199, 233.
EQ.2.0: Principal strain system (rotating).
EQ.3.0: Principal strain system (fixed when instability/coupling starts)..
zh:
损伤应变坐标系：
EQ.0.0：局部单元坐标系。
EQ.1.0：材料坐标系，仅适用于非各向同性材料模型；壳支持所有带 AOPT 的材料，实体支持 22、33、41-50、103、122、133、157、199、233。
EQ.2.0：主应变坐标系（旋转）。
EQ.3.0：主应变坐标系（不稳定/耦合开始时固定）。

english:
Erosion criteria and damage coupling system
EQ.0.0: Erosion occurs when one of the damage parameters
computer reaches unity, the damage tensor components
are based on the individual damage parameters d1 to d3.
EQ.1.0: Erosion occurs when a single damage parameter D
reaches unity, the damage tensor components are based	on this single damage parameter.
zh:
侵蚀准则和损伤耦合系统：
EQ.0.0：当计算的某个损伤参数达到 1 时发生侵蚀，损伤张量分量基于各个损伤参数 d1 到 d3。
EQ.1.0：当单一损伤参数 D 达到 1 时发生侵蚀，损伤张量分量基于该单一损伤参数。

english:
Load curve ID defining failure history value scaling factor for
LCSDG vs. history value rate. If the first rate value in the curve is
negative, it is assumed that all rate values are given as natural logarithm of the history rate.
GT.0: scale ECRIT, too
LT.0: do not scale ECRIT.
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，定义 LCSDG 的失效历史值比例因子随历史值率的变化。若曲线中的第一个率值为负，则假定所有率值均以历史率自然对数给出。
GT.0：同时缩放 ECRIT。
LT.0：不缩放 ECRIT。

english:
Number of failed integration points prior to element deletion. The default is unity.
LT.0: |NUMFIP| is the percentage of layers which must fail before element fails..
zh:
单元删除前失效积分点数量。默认值为 1。
LT.0：|NUMFIP| 为单元失效前必须失效的层百分比。

english:
Pre-defined damage tensors. If non-zero, damage tensor coefficients D11 to D66 on cards 3 and 4 will be ignored.See remarks for details.
EQ.0:	No pre-defined damage tensor is used.
EQ.1:	Isotropic damage tensor.
EQ.2:	2-parameter isotropic damage tensor for volumetric-deviatoric split.
EQ.3:	Anisotropic damage tensor as in MAT_104 (FLAG = -1).
EQ.4:	3-parameter damage tensor associated with IFLG1=2.
zh:
预定义损伤张量。若非零，将忽略卡片 3 和 4 上的损伤张量系数 D11 到 D66。详情参见备注。
EQ.0：不使用预定义损伤张量。
EQ.1：各向同性损伤张量。
EQ.2：用于体积-偏量分解的 2 参数各向同性损伤张量。
EQ.3：如 MAT_104（FLAG=-1）中的各向异性损伤张量。
EQ.4：与 IFLG1=2 关联的 3 参数损伤张量。

english:
Reference element size, for which an additional output of damage
will be generated. This is necessary to ensure the applicability of
resulting damage quantities when transferred to different mesh sizes.
zh: 参考单元尺寸，将为其生成损伤的附加输出。这对于确保损伤量在转移到不同网格尺寸时仍适用是必要的。

english:
Material axes option, see AOPT on *MAT_002 for a detailed description.
EQ.0.0:	Locally orthotropic with material axes determined by element nodes.For shells only, the material axes are then rotated about the normal vector to the surface of the shell by the angle BETA.
EQ.1.0 : Locally orthotropic with material axes determined by a point, P, in spaceand the global location of the element center.This option is for solid elements only.
EQ.2.0 : Globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below
EQ.3.0 : Locally orthotropic material axes determined by a vector v and the normal vector to the plane of the element.The plane of a solid element is the midsurface between the inner surface and outer surface defined by the first four nodes and the last four nodes of the connectivity of the element, respectively.Thus, for solid elements, AOPT = 3 is only available for hexahedrons.a is determined by taking the cross product of v with the normal vector, b is determined by taking the cross product of the normal vector with a,and c is the normal vector.Then aand b are rotated about c by an angle BETA.BETA may be set in the keyword input for the element or in the input for this keyword.Note that for solids, the material axes may be switched depending on the choice of MACF.The switch may occur before or after applying BETA depending on the value of MACF.
EQ.4.0 : Locally orthotropic in cylindrical coordinate system with the material axes determined by a vector, v,and an originating point, P, defining the centerline axis.This option is for solid elements only.
LT.0.0 : The absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID.
zh:
材料轴选项，详细说明见 *MAT_002 的 AOPT。
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点确定；仅对壳，材料轴随后绕壳面法向按 BETA 旋转。
EQ.1.0：由空间点 P 和单元中心全局位置确定局部正交各向异性材料轴；仅实体。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，由下方向量确定。
EQ.3.0：由向量 v 和单元平面法向确定局部正交各向异性材料轴；实体中仅适用于六面体。
EQ.4.0：圆柱坐标系中的局部正交各向异性；仅实体。
LT.0.0：AOPT 绝对值为坐标系 ID。

english:
Inelasticity law, one of laws listed below must be chosen
LAW.EQ.3: Isotropic hardening plasticity.
LAW.EQ.5: Creep.
LAW.EQ.6: Viscoelasticity
zh:
非弹性定律，必须选择以下定律之一：
LAW.EQ.3：各向同性硬化塑性。
LAW.EQ.5：蠕变。
LAW.EQ.6：黏弹性。

english:
There are 4 possible cases:
1.  If MULO = 0.0, then inviscid fluid is assumed.
2.  If MULO > 0.0, and MUHI = 0.0 or is not defined, then this is the traditional constant dynamic viscosity coefficient μ.
3.  If MULO > 0.0, and MUHI > 0.0, then MULO and MUHI are lower and upper viscosity limit values for a power-law-like variable viscosity model.
4.  If MULO is negative (for example, MULO = -1), then a user input data load curve (with LCID = 1) defining dynamic
viscosity as a function of equivalent strain rate is used.
zh:
共有 4 种可能情况：
1. MULO=0.0 时，假定为无黏流体。
2. MULO>0.0 且 MUHI=0.0 或未定义时，为传统常数动力黏度系数 μ。
3. MULO>0.0 且 MUHI>0.0 时，MULO 和 MUHI 为类幂律可变黏度模型的下限和上限。
4. MULO 为负时，使用用户输入载荷曲线（LCID=1）定义动力黏度随等效应变率的变化。

english:
There are 3 possible cases: (1) If MULO > 0.0, and MUHI = 0.0 or is
not defined, then this is the traditional constant dynamic viscosity coefficientμ. (2) If MULO > 0.0, and MUHI > 0.0, then MULO and
MUHI are lower and upper viscosity limit values. (3) If MULO is negative (for example, MULO = -1), then a user-input data load
curve (with LCID = 1) defining dynamic viscosity as a function of equivalent strain rate is used.
zh:
共有 3 种可能情况：
1. MULO>0.0 且 MUHI=0.0 或未定义时，为传统常数动力黏度系数 μ。
2. MULO>0.0 且 MUHI>0.0 时，MULO 和 MUHI 为黏度下限和上限。
3. MULO 为负时，使用用户输入载荷曲线（LCID=1）定义动力黏度随等效应变率的变化。

english: Shape coefficient.
zh: 形状系数。

english: Intercellular calcium ion concentration
zh: 细胞间钙离子浓度

english: Intercellular calcium ion concentration at half of peak isometric tension.
zh: 半峰等长张力时的细胞间钙离子浓度。

english: Maximum intercellular calcium ion concentration.
zh: 最大细胞间钙离子浓度。

english: Curve ID defining the fiber stress versus fiber stretch relation, default if nonzero.
zh: 定义纤维应力与纤维拉伸关系的载荷曲线 ID，如果非零则为默认值。

english: Coefficients of Anagonye and Wang [1999] porosity equation for the leakage area:
zh: Anagonye 和 Wang [1999] 泄露面积孔隙率方程的系数：

english: Damping coefficient.
zh: 阻尼系数。

english: Optional decay constant for the i'th term.
zh: 第 i 项的可选衰减常数。

english: Optional shear relaxation modulus for the i'th term.
zh: 第 i 项的可选剪切松弛模量。

english: Load curve ID giving the force versus actual change in the gauge length.
zh: 给出拉伸力与标距实际变化关系的载荷曲线 ID。

english: Load curve ID defining shear strength SC31 as a function of strain rate (SC31 is ignored with this option). If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, all the strain rate values are assumed to be given as the natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义剪切强度 SC31 作为应变率函数的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 SC31）。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Material angle in degrees for AOPT = 3, may be overridden on the element card, see *ELEMENT_SHELL_BETA.
zh: AOPT = 3 时的材料角（度），可在单元卡上覆盖，参见 *ELEMENT_SHELL_BETA。

english: Strain at longitudinal compressive strength, a-axis.
zh: a 轴纵向抗压强度下的应变。

english: Strain at longitudinal tensile strength, a-axis.
zh: a 轴纵向抗拉强度下的应变。

english: Strain at transverse compressive strength, b-axis.
zh: b 轴横向抗压强度下的应变。

english: Strain at transverse tensile strength, b-axis.
zh: b 轴横向抗拉强度下的应变。

english:
GT.0.0:	E_b, Young’s modulus - transverse direction
LT.0.0:	Load Curve ID or Table ID = (-EB).See Remark 8.
Load Curve.When - EB is equal to a load curve ID, it is taken as defining the uniaxial elastic stress as a function of strain behavior in the transverse direction.Negative data points correspond to compression and positive values to tension.
Tabular Data.When - EB is equal to a table ID, it defines for each strain rate value a load curve ID giving the uniaxial elastic stress as a function of strain behavior in the transverse direction.
Logarithmically Defined Tables.If the first uniaxial elastic stress as a function of strain curve in the table corresponds to a negative strain rate, LS - DYNA assumes that the natural logarithm of the strain rate value is used for all stress - strain curves.
zh:
GT.0.0：杨氏模量 Eb - 横向
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID = (-EB)。参见备注 8。
载荷曲线：当 -EB 等于载荷曲线 ID 时，它被用于定义横向单轴弹性应力作为应变的函数。负数据点对应于压缩，正值对应于拉伸。
表格数据：当 -EB 等于表 ID 时，它为每个应变率值定义一个载荷曲线 ID，以给出横向单轴弹性应力作为应变函数的行为。
对数定义的表：如果表中的第一个单轴弹性应力-应变曲线对应于负应变率，LS-DYNA 假定对应变率值取自然对数后应用于所有的应力-应变曲线。

english:
E_c, Young’s modulus - normal direction (used only by thick shells and solids).  See Remark 6.
GT.0.0:	E_c, Young’s modulus - normal direction
LT.0.0 : Load Curve ID or Table ID = (-EC) (solids only).See Remark 8.
Load Curve.When - EC is equal to a load curve ID, it is taken as defining the uniaxial elastic stress as a function of strain behavior in the transverse direction.Negative data points correspond to compression and positive values to tension.
Tabular Data.When - EC is equal to a table ID, it defines for each strain rate value a load curve ID giving the uniaxial elastic stress as a function of strain behavior in the transverse direction.
Logarithmically Defined Tables.If the first uniaxial elastic stress as a function of strain curve in the table corresponds to a negative strain rate, LS - DYNA assumes that the natural logarithm of the strain rate value is used for all stress - strain curves.
zh:
E_c，法向杨氏模量（仅用于厚 shell 和 solid 单元）。参见备注 6。
GT.0.0：E_c，法向杨氏模量
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID = (-EC)（仅限 solid 单元）。参见备注 8。
载荷曲线：当 -EC 等于载荷曲线 ID 时，它被用于定义横向单轴弹性应力作为应变的函数。负数据点对应于压缩，正值对应于拉伸。
表格数据：当 -EC 等于表 ID 时，它为每个应变率值定义一个载荷曲线 ID，以给出横向单轴弹性应力作为应变函数的行为。
对数定义的表：如果表中的第一个单轴弹性应力-应变曲线对应于负应变率，LS-DYNA 假定对应变率值取自然对数后应用于所有的应力-应变曲线。

english: Damage initiation transverse shear strain
zh: 损伤初始横向剪切应变

english: Final rupture transverse shear strain
zh: 最终断裂横向剪切应变

english: Maximum effective strain for element layer failure. A value of unity would equal 100% strain.
zh: 单元层失效的最大有效应变。值为 1 相当于 100% 应变。

english:
Failure surface type:
EQ.1.0:smooth failure surface with a quadratic criterion for both the fiber (a) and transverse (b) directions. This option can be used with complete laminates and fabrics,
EQ.0.0:smooth failure surface in the transverse (b) direction with a limiting value in the fiber (a) direction. This model is appropiate for unidirectional (UD) layered composites only (default),
EQ.-1.:faceted failure surface. When the strength values are reached then damage evolves in tension and compression for both the fiber and transverse direction. Shear behavior is also considered. This option can be used with complete laminates and fabrics.
zh:
失效面类型：
EQ.1.0：在纤维（a）和横向（b）上都具有二次准则的光滑失效面。此选项可用于完整的层合板和织物，
EQ.0.0：横向（b）上具有光滑失效面，纤维（a）方向上具有极限值。此模型仅适用于单向（UD）层合复合材料（默认），
EQ.-1.：刻面失效面。当达到强度值时，纤维和横向的拉伸和压缩均会发生损伤演化。同时考虑剪切行为。此选项可用于完整的层合板和织物。

english:
GT.0.0:	G_ab, shear modulus in the ab-direction
LT.0.0:	Load Curve ID or Table ID = (-GAB)
Load Curve.When - GAB is equal to a load curve ID, it is taken as defining the elastic shear stress as a function of she strain behavior in the ab - direction.
Tabular Data.When - GAB is equal to a table ID, it defines for each strain rate value a load curve ID giving the elastic shear stress as a function of shear strain behavior in the ab - direction.
Logarithmically Defined Tables.If the first elastic shear stress as a function of shear strain curve in the table corresponds to a negative strain rate, LS - DYNA assumes that the natural logarithm of the strain rate value is used for all shear stress - shear strain curves.
zh:
GT.0.0：ab 方向的剪切模量 G_ab
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID = (-GAB)
载荷曲线：当 -GAB 等于载荷曲线 ID 时，它被用于定义 ab 方向的弹性剪切应力作为剪应变的函数。
表格数据：当 -GAB 等于表 ID 时，它为每个应变率值定义一个载荷曲线 ID，以给出 ab 方向的弹性剪切应力作为剪应变函数的行为。
对数定义的表：如果表中的第一个弹性剪切应力-剪切应变曲线对应于负应变率，LS-DYNA 假定对应变率值取自然对数后应用于所有的剪切应力-剪切应变曲线。

english: gamma-1, strain limit of the first slightly nonlinear part of the of the shear stress versus shear strain curve.
zh: gamma-1，剪切应力 vs. 剪切应变曲线中第一个轻微非线性部分的应变极限。

english:
GT.0.0:	G_bc, shear modulus in the cb-direction
LT.0.0:	Load Curve ID or Table ID = (-GBC) (solids only)
Load Curve.When - GBC is equal to a load curve ID, it is taken as defining the elastic shear stress as a function of shear strain behavior in the bc - direction.
Tabular Data.When - GBC is equal to a table ID, it defines for each strain rate value a load curve ID giving the elastic shear stress as a function of shear strain behavior in the bc - direction.
Logarithmically Defined Tables.If the first elastic shear stress as a function of shear strain curve in the table corresponds to a negative strain rate, LS - DYNA assumes that the natural logarithm of the strain rate value is used for all shear stress - shear strain curves.
zh:
GT.0.0：bc 方向的剪切模量 G_bc
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID = (-GBC)（仅限 solid 单元）
载荷曲线：当 -GBC 等于载荷曲线 ID 时，它被用于定义 bc 方向的弹性剪切应力作为剪应变的函数。
表格数据：当 -GBC 等于表 ID 时，它为每个应变率值定义一个载荷曲线 ID，以给出 bc 方向的弹性剪切应力作为剪应变函数的行为。
对数定义的表：如果表中的第一个弹性剪切应力-剪切应变曲线对应于负应变率，LS-DYNA 假定对应变率值取自然对数后应用于所有的剪切应力-剪切应变曲线。

english:
GT.0.0:	G_ca, shear modulus in the ca-direction
LT.0.0:	Load Curve ID or Table ID = (-GCA) (solids only)
Load Curve.When - GCA is equal to a load curve ID, it is taken as defining the elastic shear stress as a function of shear strain behavior in the ca - direction.
Tabular Data.When - GCA is equal to a table ID, it defines for each strain rate value a load curve ID giving the elastic shear stress as a function of shear strain behavior in the ca - direction.
Logarithmically Defined Tables.If the first elastic shear stress as a function of shear strain curve in the table corresponds to a negative strain rate, LS - DYNA assumes that the natural logarithm of the strain rate value is used for all shear stress - shear strain curves.
zh:
GT.0.0：ca 方向的剪切模量 G_ca
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID = (-GCA)（仅限 solid 单元）
载荷曲线：当 -GCA 等于载荷曲线 ID 时，它被用于定义 ca 方向的弹性剪切应力作为剪应变的函数。
表格数据：当 -GCA 等于表 ID 时，它为每个应变率值定义一个载荷曲线 ID，以给出 ca 方向的弹性剪切应力作为剪应变函数的行为。
对数定义的表：如果表中的第一个弹性剪切应力-剪切应变曲线对应于负应变率，LS-DYNA 假定对应变率值取自然对数后应用于所有的剪切应力-剪切应变曲线。

english: Strain at shear strength, ab plane.
zh: ab 面剪切强度下的应变。

english: Load curve ID defining E11C vs. strain rate (E11C is ignored with that option) If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, it is assumed that all strain rate values are given as natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义 E11C 与应变率关系的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 E11C）。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Load curve ID defining E11T vs. strain rate (E11T is ignored with that option) If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, it is assumed that all strain rate values are given as natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义 E11T 与应变率关系的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 E11T）。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Load curve ID defining E22C vs. strain rate (E22C is ignored with that option) If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, it is assumed that all strain rate values are given as natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义 E22C 与应变率关系的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 E22C）。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Load curve ID defining E22T vs. strain rate (E22T is ignored with that option) If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, it is assumed that all strain rate values are given as natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义 E22T 与应变率关系的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 E22T）。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Load curve ID defining ERODS as a function of strain rate (ERODS is ignored with this option). The full strain tensor is used to compute the equivalent strain (new option). If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, it is assumed that all strain rate values are given as natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义 ERODS 作为应变率函数的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 ERODS）。使用全应变张量计算等效应变（新选项）。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Load curve ID defining GAMMA1 vs. strain rate (GAMMA1 is ignored with that option). This value is only used for FS = -1. If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, it is assumed that all strain rate values are given as natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义 GAMMA1 与应变率关系的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 GAMMA1）。此值仅用于 FS = -1。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Load curve ID defining GMS vs. strain rate (GMS is ignored with that option) If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, it is assumed that all strain rate values are given as natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义 GMS 与应变率关系的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 GMS）。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Load curve ID defining shear strength SC vs. strain rate (SC is ignored with that option) If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, it is assumed that all strain rate values are given as natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义剪切强度 SC 与应变率关系的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 SC）。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Load curve ID defining TAU1 vs. strain rate (TAU1 is ignored with that option). This value is only used for FS = -1. If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, it is assumed that all strain rate values are given as natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义 TAU1 与应变率关系的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 TAU1）。此值仅用于 FS = -1。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Load curve ID defining longitudinal compressive strength XC vs. strain rate (XC is ignored with that option). If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, it is assumed that all strain rate values are given as natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义纵向抗压强度 XC 与应变率关系的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 XC）。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Load curve ID defining longitudinal tensile strength XT vs. strain rate (XT is ignored with that option) If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, it is assumed that all strain rate values are given as natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义纵向抗拉强度 XT 与应变率关系的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 XT）。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Load curve ID defining transverse compressive strength YC vs. strain rate (YC is ignored with that option) If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, it is assumed that all strain rate values are given as natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义横向抗压强度 YC 与应变率关系的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 YC）。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Load curve ID defining transverse tensile strength YT vs. strain rate (YT is ignored with that option) If the first strain rate value in the curve is negative, it is assumed that all strain rate values are given as natural logarithm of the strain rate.
zh: 定义横向抗拉强度 YT 与应变率关系的载荷曲线 ID（在此选项下忽略 YT）。如果曲线中的第一个应变率值为负，则假定所有应变率值均以应变率 of 自然对数形式给出。

english: Poisson's ratio ba.
zh: 泊松比 ba。

english: Poisson's ratio ca
zh: 泊松比 ca

english: Poisson's ratio cb
zh: 泊松比 cb

english: Shear strength, ab plane.
zh: 剪切强度，ab 面。

english: Factor to determine the minimum stress limit after stress maximum (fiber compression).
zh: 用于确定最大应力后最小应力极限的因子（纤维压缩）。

english: Factor to determine the minimum stress limit after stress maximum (matrix compression).
zh: 用于确定最大应力后最小应力极限的因子（基体压缩）。

english: Factor to determine the minimum stress limit after stress maximum (shear).
zh: 用于确定最大应力后最小应力极限的因子（剪切）。

english: Factor to determine the minimum stress limit after stress maximum (fiber tension).
zh: 用于确定最大应力后最小应力极限的因子（纤维拉伸）。

english: Factor to determine the minimum stress limit after stress maximum (matrix tension).
zh: 用于确定最大应力后最小应力极限的因子（基体拉伸）。

english: Softening reduction factor for strength in the crashfront.
zh: 压溃前沿（crashfront）强度的软化折减因子。

english: tau-1, stress limit of the first slightly nonlinear part of the of the shear stress versus shear strain curve. The values tau-1 and gamma-1 are used to define a curve of shear stress versus shear strain. These values are input if FS, defined below, is set to a value of -1.
zh: tau-1，剪切应力 vs. 剪切应变曲线中第一个轻微非线性部分的应力极限。值 tau-1 和 gamma-1 用于定义剪切应力 vs. 剪切应变的曲线。如果下面定义的 FS 设置为 -1，则输入这些值。

english: Time step for automatic element deletion.
zh: 自动单元删除的时间步。

english: Transverse shear maximum damage, default = 0.90.
zh: 横向剪切最大损伤，默认 = 0.90。

english: Longitudinal compressive strength.
zh: 纵向抗压强度。

english: Longitudinal tensile strength.
zh: 纵向拉伸强度。

english: Transverse compressive strength, b-axis.
zh: 横向压缩强度，b 轴。

english: Transverse tensile strength, b-axis.
zh: 横向拉伸强度，b 轴。

english: Number of force vectors stored for filtering (default = 0). Default is recommended unless oscillatory resultant forces are observed in the time history databases. Even though these welds should not oscillate significantly, this option was added for consistency with the other spot weld options. NF affects the storage since it is necessary to store the resultant forces as history variables. When NF is nonzero, the resultants in the output databases are filtered.
zh: 用于滤波的力向量存储数量（默认值 = 0）。建议使用默认值，除非在时间历史数据库中观察到振荡的合力。尽管这些焊点不应发生显著振荡，但添加该选项是为了与其他点焊选项保持一致。NF 会影响存储，因为需要将合力作为历史变量进行存储。当 NF 非零时，输出数据库中的合力将被过滤。

english:
If a heating process is initiated at t = 0 this
parameters sets the initial amount of austenite in the blank. If heating is
activated at t > 0 during a simulation this value is ignored. Note that,
AUST + FERR + PEAR + BAIN + MART	= 1.0.
zh: 如果加热过程在 t=0 启动，该参数设置坯料中奥氏体的初始含量。如果加热在仿真过程中 t>0 时激活，则忽略该值。注意 AUST + FERR + PEAR + BAIN + MART = 1.0。

english:
Manual start temperature Ferrite
GT.0.0: Same temperature is used for heating and cooling.
LT.0.0: Curve ID: Different start temperatures for cooling and heating given by load curve
ID = -FS. First ordinate value is used for cooling, last ordinate value for heating.
zh:
铁素体手动起始温度。
GT.0.0：加热和冷却使用相同温度。
LT.0.0：曲线 ID；由载荷曲线 ID=-FS 给出冷却和加热的不同起始温度。第一个纵坐标值用于冷却，最后一个纵坐标值用于加热。

english:
Grain growth parameter B. A table of
recommended values of GRA and GRB is included in Remark 7.
zh: 晶粒长大参数 B。备注 7 中包含 GRA 和 GRB 的推荐值表。

english:
Grain growth activation energy (J/mol)
divided by the universal gas constant. Q/R where R = 8.314472 (J/mol K).
zh: 晶粒长大激活能（J/mol）除以通用气体常数，即 Q/R，其中 R = 8.314472 J/(mol K)。

english:
Load Curve ID dependent on plastic strain
that scales the activation energy QR2 and QR3.
QRx = Qx x CEPS23(𝜀pl) / R
zh:
依赖塑性应变的载荷曲线 ID，用于缩放激活能 QR2 和 QR3。
QRx = Qx × CEPS23(εpl) / R。

english:
Load Curve ID which describe the increase
of the martensite start temperature for cooling as a function of plastic strain.
MS* = MS + MSIG x 𝜎eff + LCEPS5(𝜀pl).
zh:
载荷曲线 ID，描述冷却过程中马氏体起始温度随塑性应变的升高。
MS* = MS + MSIG × σeff + LCEPS5(εpl)。

english:
Describes the increase of martensite start temperature for cooling due to applied stress.
LT.0: Load Curve ID describes MSIG as a function of triaxiality (pressure /	effective stress).
MS* = MS + MSIG x SIGMAeff.
zh:
描述冷却过程中因施加应力导致的马氏体起始温度升高。
LT.0：载荷曲线 ID 描述 MSIG 随三轴度（压力/有效应力）的变化。
MS* = MS + MSIG × SIGMAeff。

english:
Failure flag.
LT.0.0: User defined failure subroutine is called to determine failure
EQ.0.0: Failure is not considered. This option is recommended if failure is not of interest since many calculations will be saved.
GT.0.0: Plastic strain to failure. When the plastic strain reach-esthis value, the element is deleted from the calculation.
zh:
失效标志。
LT.0.0：调用用户定义失效子程序确定失效。
EQ.0.0：不考虑失效；若不关心失效，建议使用以节省计算。
GT.0.0：失效塑性应变。当塑性应变达到该值时，从计算中删除单元。

english:
Load curve ID or Table ID. Load curve ID defining effective stress
versus effective plastic strain The table ID defines for each strain
rate value a load curve ID giving the stress versus effective plastic
strain for that rate, See Figure M24-1. The stress versus effective
plastic strain curve for the lowest value of strain rate is used if the
strain rate falls below the minimum value. Likewise, the stress
versus effective plastic strain curve for the highest value of strain
rate is used if the strain rate exceeds the maximum value. NOTE:
The strain rate values defined in the table may be given as the
natural logarithm of the strain rate. If the first stress-strain curve in
the table corresponds to a negative strain rate, LS-DYNA assumes
that the natural logarithm of the strain rate value is used. Since the
tables are internally discretized to equally space the points, natural
logarithms are necessary, for example, if the curves correspond to
rates from 10.e-04 to 10.e+04.
zh: 载荷曲线 ID 或表 ID。载荷曲线定义有效应力与有效塑性应变关系；表 ID 为每个应变率值定义一条载荷曲线，给出该应变率下应力与有效塑性应变关系。若应变率低于最小值或高于最大值，则分别使用最低或最高应变率曲线。表中应变率可用自然对数给出；如果第一条应力-应变曲线对应负应变率，LS-DYNA 假定使用应变率自然对数。

english:
Flag for transverse shear strain distribution (see remarks 3 and 4):
EQ.0: Parabolic,
EQ.1: Constant through thickness
zh:
横向剪切应变分布标志（参见备注 3 和 4）：
EQ.0：抛物线分布。
EQ.1：厚度方向常数。

english:
Ambient Element Type:
EQ.4: pressure inflow
.
zh:
环境单元类型：
EQ.4：压力流入。

english:
Element formulation:
EQ.7:plane strain (x-y plane ; element volume= 1*dx*thick)
EQ.8: : cylindric  (y-axis of symmetry ; element volume= x*dx*thick)
EQ.-8: spherical (element volume = x*x*dx)
zh:
单元公式：
EQ.7：平面应变（x-y 平面；单元体积 = 1*dx*thick）。
EQ.8：圆柱（y 轴对称；单元体积 = x*dx*thick）。
EQ.-8：球形（单元体积 = x*x*dx）。

english:
Ambient Element Type: can be defined for ALEFORM 7 and 11.
EQ.4: pressure inflow
.
zh:
环境单元类型，可为 ALEFORM 7 和 11 定义。
EQ.4：压力流入。

english:
Element formulation:
EQ.13: plane strain (x-y plane)
EQ.14: axisymmetric solid (y-axis of symmetry) - area weighted
zh:
单元公式：
EQ.13：平面应变（x-y 平面）。
EQ.14：轴对称实体（y 轴对称），面积加权。

english:
GT.0.0: Length scale factor to convert dimensions from standard units
If LFAC < 0, then a predefined length factor for specific model units is used:
EQ.-1.0: ft
EQ.-2.0: m
EQ.-3.0: in
EQ.-4.0: mm
EQ.-5.0: cm.
zh:
GT.0.0：用于从标准单位转换尺寸的长度比例因子。
若 LFAC < 0，则使用特定模型单位的预定义长度因子：
EQ.-1.0：ft。
EQ.-2.0：m。
EQ.-3.0：in。
EQ.-4.0：mm。
EQ.-5.0：cm。

english:
Thermal shell formulation
.EQ.0: Default is governed by TSHELL on *CONTROL_SHELL
.EQ.1: Thick thermal shell
.EQ.2: Thin thermal shell
.
zh:
热壳公式：
EQ.0：默认由 *CONTROL_SHELL 上的 TSHELL 控制。
EQ.1：厚热壳。
EQ.2：薄热壳。

english:
Option for domain integration in XFEM:
EQ.0: Phantom element integration
EQ.1: Subdomain integration with triangular local boundary integration (available in 2D only)
zh:
XFEM 中域积分选项：
EQ.0：幻影单元积分。
EQ.1：带三角形局部边界积分的子域积分（仅 2D 可用）。

english:
Option for different failure criteria:
EQ.1: Maximum tensile stress.
EQ.2: Maximum shear stress.
EQ.-1:	effective plastic strain (EPS).
EQ.-2:	crack length dependent EPS.  See Remark 15
EQ.-4: Stress triaxiality based failure plastic strain.
zh:
不同失效准则选项：
EQ.1：最大拉伸应力。
EQ.2：最大剪应力。
EQ.-1：有效塑性应变（EPS）。
EQ.-2：裂纹长度相关 EPS，参见备注 15。
EQ.-4：基于应力三轴度的失效塑性应变。

english:
LS: Length scale for strain regularization (FAILCR = -1 only)
FS1: Final failure plastic strain (FAILCR = -2 only)
zh:
LS：应变正则化长度尺度（仅 FAILCR=-1）。
FS1：最终失效塑性应变（仅 FAILCR=-2）。

english:
PROPCR is interpreted digit-wise:
PROPCR = [IP] = P + 10×I
P determines the crack propagation direction :
P.EQ.0 : first principal strain direction if FAILCR < 0 (default for ductile fracture), first principal stress if FAILCR = 1, or maximum shear stress if FAILCR = 2. P = 0 is the only option for brittle fracture(FAILCR > 0).
P.EQ.2 : center of effective plastic strain
P.EQ.3 : directional center of effective plastic strain
I determines crack initiation :
I.EQ.0 : crack initiates at boundary(default)
I.EQ.3 : crack initiates anywhere
zh:
PROPCR 按位解释：PROPCR=[IP]=P+10×I。
P 确定裂纹扩展方向：P.EQ.0 为第一主应变方向（FAILCR<0 时默认延性断裂）、第一主应力（FAILCR=1）或最大剪应力（FAILCR=2）；脆性断裂仅可用 P=0。P.EQ.2 为有效塑性应变中心，P.EQ.3 为方向性有效塑性应变中心。
I 确定裂纹起始：I.EQ.0 从边界起裂（默认），I.EQ.3 可在任意位置起裂。

english:
Cohesive material ID for EFG fracture analysis (only Mode I crack is
considered and only *MAT_COHESIVE_TH is available).
zh: EFG 断裂分析的黏聚材料 ID（仅考虑 Mode I 裂纹，且仅可使用 *MAT_COHESIVE_TH）。

english:
EQ.1: No branching allowed
EQ.2: Branching is allowed.
zh:
EQ.1：不允许分支。
EQ.2：允许分支。

english:
EQ.0: Moving-least-square approximation (default, recommended)
EQ.1: Maximum Entropy approximation.
zh:
EQ.0：移动最小二乘近似（默认，推荐）。
EQ.1：最大熵近似。

english:
EQ.0: No pressure smoothing (default)
EQ.1: Moving-least squared pressure recovery.
zh:
EQ.0：不进行压力平滑（默认）。
EQ.1：移动最小二乘压力恢复。

english:
Failure strain, recommended as an extra condition for the crack initiation
under slow loading besides the stress-based cohesive law.
zh: 失效应变。建议在慢速加载下，除基于应力的黏聚律外，作为裂纹起始的附加条件。

english:
Option of stabilization:
EQ.1:	Fluid particle approximation(accurate but slow), used with KERNEL = 0 or 1
EQ.2 : Simplified fluid particle approximation(efficient and robust), used with KERNEL = 2
EQ.3 : Momentum consistent SPG(MCSPG) formulation(latest beta or R14 is recommended).MCSPG can be applied for large deformation, tension dominant problems.For coupled thermal mechanical problems, MCSPG is the only option.KERNEL = 1 is recommended for MCSPG.
Default : 1, if KERNEL = 0 or 1
2, if KERNEL = 2
zh:
稳定化选项：
EQ.1：流体粒子近似（准确但慢），与 KERNEL=0 或 1 使用。
EQ.2：简化流体粒子近似（高效且稳健），与 KERNEL=2 使用。
EQ.3：动量一致 SPG（MCSPG）公式（推荐最新 beta 或 R14）。MCSPG 可用于大变形、拉伸主导问题；耦合热-力问题中 MCSPG 是唯一选项，建议 KERNEL=1。
默认：KERNEL=0 或 1 时为 1，KERNEL=2 时为 2。

english:
Interval of time steps to conduct displacement smoothing
Default: 15, if KERNEL = 0
5, if KERNEL = 1
30, if KERNEL = 2
Code will determine according to KERNEL if SMSTEP = 0 from input
zh: 执行位移平滑的时间步间隔。默认：KERNEL=0 时为 15，KERNEL=1 时为 5，KERNEL=2 时为 30。若输入 SMSTEP=0，程序会根据 KERNEL 确定。

english:
Flag for transverse shear strain or stress distribution (see Remarks 4 and 5):
EQ.0.0: Parabolic,
EQ.1.0: Constant through thickness.
zh:
横向剪切应变或应力分布标志（参见备注 4 和 5）：
EQ.0.0：抛物线分布。
EQ.1.0：厚度方向常数。

english:
If SWITID is set, TBIRTH is not active. If SWITID is 0, TBIRTH is
the activation time for the bag with ID = CPMID. All of the time
dependent curves that are used in this bag will be offset by the value of TBIRTH.
zh: 如果设置了 SWITID，则 TBIRTH 不激活。如果 SWITID 为 0，则 TBIRTH 为 ID=CPMID 的气囊激活时间。该气囊中使用的所有时间相关曲线都会按 TBIRTH 偏移。

english:
If TDR is greater than 0 the bag with ID = CPMID will be rigid
starting at first cycle and switch to deformable at time TDR.
zh: 如果 TDR 大于 0，则 ID=CPMID 的气囊从第一个循环开始为刚性，并在时间 TDR 切换为可变形。

english: Mathematic calculation.
zh: 数学计算。

english: sensor ID
zh: 传感器 ID

english:
Vent Coefficient (Default = 0.7)
LT.0: User defined load curve ID. The vent coefficient will be
determined by this pressure-vent_coeff curve.
zh:
排气系数（默认=0.7）。
LT.0：用户定义载荷曲线 ID。排气系数由该压力-排气系数曲线确定。

english:
Vent Coefficient (Default = C23)
LT.0: User defined load curve ID. The vent coefficient will be
determined by this pressure-vent_coeff curve.
zh:
排气系数（默认=C23）。
LT.0：用户定义载荷曲线 ID。排气系数由该压力-排气系数曲线确定。

english: First attribute default value is 0.0.
zh: 第一属性默认值为 0.0。

english: Second attribute default value is 0.0.
zh: 第二属性默认值为 0.0。

english: Third attribute default value is 0.0.
zh: 第三属性默认值为 0.0。

english: Fourth attribute default value is 0.0.
zh: 第四属性默认值为 0.0。

english: First part ID of the set.
zh: 集合中的第一个 part ID。

english: Second part ID of the set.
zh: 集合中的第二个 part ID。

english: Third part ID of the set.
zh: 集合中的第三个 part ID。

english: Fourth part ID of the set.
zh: 集合中的局第四个 part ID。

english: Fifth part ID of the set.
zh: 集合中的第五个 part ID。

english: Sixth part ID of the set.
zh: 集合中的第六个 part ID。

english: Seventh part ID of the set.
zh: 集合中的第七个 part ID。

english: Eighth part ID of the set.
zh: 集合中的第八个 part ID。

english: Part set ID. All part sets should have a unique set ID.
zh: Part set ID。所有 part set 应具有唯一的 set ID。

english:
ALE mesh automatic motion option.
EQ.0:	ALE mesh is fixed in space.
GT.0:	Node group ID.  See *ALE_REFERENCE_SYSTEM_NODE ALE mesh can be moved with PRTYP = 5,
mesh motion follows a coordinate system defined by 3 reference nodes.  See Remark 7
zh:
ALE 网格自动运动选项。
EQ.0：ALE 网格固定在空间中。
GT.0：节点组 ID。参见 *ALE_REFERENCE_SYSTEM_NODE；PRTYP=5 时 ALE 网格可移动，网格运动跟随由 3 个参考节点定义的坐标系。参见备注 7。

english:
NX is the number of ALE elements to be generated in the x-direction.
IDA is the Part ID of the initial air mesh
zh:
NX 为 x 方向要生成的 ALE 单元数量。
IDA 为初始空气网格的部件 ID。

english:
NY is the number of ALE elements to be generated in the y-direction
IDG is the Part ID of the initial air mesh
zh:
NY 为 y 方向要生成的 ALE 单元数量。
IDG 为初始空气网格的部件 ID。

english:
Tank volume from the inflator tank test or inflator canister volume.
LCVEL = 0 and TNKFINP is defined:
TNKVOL is the defined tank.  Inlet gas velocity is estimated by LS-DYNA method (testing).
LCVEL = 0 and TNKFINP is not defined:
TNKVOL is the estimated inflator canister volume inlet gas velocity is estimated automatically by the Lian-Bhalsod-Olovssonmethod.
LCVEL ≠ 0:
This must be left blank
zh:
来自 inflator tank test 的罐体体积或充气器罐体体积。
LCVEL=0 且定义 TNKFINP：TNKVOL 为定义的罐体，入口气体速度由 LS-DYNA 方法估算（测试中）。
LCVEL=0 且未定义 TNKFINP：TNKVOL 为估算的充气器罐体体积，入口气体速度由 Lian-Bhalsod-Olovsson 方法自动估算。
LCVEL≠0：必须留空。

english:
Flag that activates computing the ignition front as a material interface between MMGFR and MMGTO.
This flag will be automatically activated if both IGNI and IGNIVF are undefined (see Remark 2).
EQ.0:	not activated
EQ.1:	activated.
zh:
激活将点火前沿计算为 MMGFR 与 MMGTO 之间材料界面的标志。若 IGNI 和 IGNIVF 均未定义，该标志会自动激活（参见备注 2）。
EQ.0：不激活。
EQ.1：激活。

english:
Constraint type:
EQ.1: No flow through all directions.
EQ.2: No flow through normal direction. (slip condition)
zh:
约束类型：
EQ.1：所有方向均无流动。
EQ.2：法向无流动（滑动条件）。

english:
Type of set ID:
EQ.0: part set ID (PSID).
EQ.1: part ID (PID).
EQ.2: segment set ID (SGSID).
zh:
集合 ID 类型：
EQ.0：部件集合 ID（PSID）。
EQ.1：部件 ID（PID）。
EQ.2：段集合 ID（SGSID）。

english:
Three digit flag to control how to select the elements, how to
prescribe the velocities and how to define the geometrical
parameters of Cards 2 and 3 (including BOXV):
EQ._ _ 0: Geometrical parameters are local to the segments of SEGSET
EQ._ _ 1: Geometrical parameters are natural to SEGSET
segments (see Remark 3 and Figure 4-1)
EQ._ 0 _: Velocities are applied in local coordinate systems
attached to each segment of SEGSET
EQ._ 1 _: Velocities are applied in the global coordinate system
EQ.0 _ _: Select the elements and nodes in the local volume
around each segment of SEGSET
EQ.1 _ _: Select the elements in the global volume formed by
all the segments of SEGSET
EQ.2 _ _: Select the elements and nodes in the global volume
formed by all the segments of SEGSET. Velocities are
applied in the global coordinate system.
zh:
三位标志，用于控制如何选择单元、如何规定速度以及如何定义卡片 2 和 3（含 BOXV）的几何参数：
EQ.__0：几何参数相对于 SEGSET 的各段为局部。
EQ.__1：几何参数相对于 SEGSET 段为自然坐标。
EQ._0_：速度施加在附着于 SEGSET 各段的局部坐标系中。
EQ._1_：速度施加在全局坐标系中。
EQ.0__：选择 SEGSET 每个段周围局部体积中的单元和节点。
EQ.1__：选择由 SEGSET 所有段形成的全局体积中的单元。
EQ.2__：选择该全局体积中的单元和节点，速度施加在全局坐标系中。

english:
Curve ID for the internal energy (see Remark 6):
GT.0: Load curve ID; see *DEFINE_CURVE. See Remark 2.
LT.0: -LCE is the function ID for the internal energy which
depends on 26 arguments: time, number of cycles, and
nodal coordinates of the 8 nodes for the ALE element.
See *DEFINE_FUNCTION. See Remark 5.
zh:
内能曲线 ID（参见备注 6）：
GT.0：载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE 和备注 2。
LT.0：-LCE 为内能函数 ID，该函数依赖 26 个参数：时间、循环数以及 ALE 单元 8 个节点的节点坐标。参见 *DEFINE_FUNCTION 和备注 5。

english:
Curve ID for the relative volume (see Remark 6):
GT.0: Load curve ID; see *DEFINE_CURVE. See Remark 2.
LT.0: -LCRVL is the function ID for the relative volume which
depends on 26 arguments: time, number of cycles, and
nodal coordinates of the 8 nodes for the ALE element.
See *DEFINE_FUNCTION. See Remark 5.
zh:
相对体积曲线 ID（参见备注 6）：
GT.0：载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE 和备注 2。
LT.0：-LCRVL 为相对体积函数 ID，该函数依赖 26 个参数：时间、循环数以及 ALE 单元 8 个节点的节点坐标。参见 *DEFINE_FUNCTION 和备注 5。

english:
Curve ID for the rotational velocity:
GT.0: Load curve ID; see *DEFINE_CURVE.
LT.0: -LCVR is the function ID for the rotational velocity which
depends on 5 arguments: time, number of cycles, and
nodal coordinates. See *DEFINE_FUNCTION. See Remark	5.
zh:
转动速度曲线 ID：
GT.0：载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE。
LT.0：-LCVR 为转动速度函数 ID，依赖 5 个参数：时间、循环数和节点坐标。参见 *DEFINE_FUNCTION 和备注 5。

english:
Curve ID for the translational velocity:
GT.0: Load curve ID; see *DEFINE_CURVE.
LT.0: -LCVT is the function ID for the translational velocity
which depends on 5 arguments: time, number of cycles,
and nodal coordinates. See *DEFINE_FUNCTION. See Remark 5..
zh:
平移速度曲线 ID：
GT.0：载荷曲线 ID，参见 *DEFINE_CURVE。
LT.0：-LCVT 为平移速度函数 ID，依赖 5 个参数：时间、循环数和节点坐标。参见 *DEFINE_FUNCTION 和备注 5。

english:
Number of divisions of an element cut by the surface SURFCT to
compute the volume fractions (see Remark 13 and Figure 4-2).
zh: 被 SURFCT 表面切割的单元分割数，用于计算体积分数（参见备注 13 和图 4-2）。

english:
Segment set ID (see *SET_SEGMENT). A local coordinate system
is created for each segment. See Remark 2.
zh: 段集合 ID（参见 *SET_SEGMENT）。为每个段创建局部坐标系。参见备注 2。

定义用于选择节点和单元的表面标志：
LT.0：-SURFCT 为函数 ID（参见 *DEFINE_FUNCTION），用于带 17 个参数的转动速度。
EQ.0：椭球体。
EQ.1：基于椭圆的圆柱。
EQ.2：基于椭圆的截锥。
EQ.3：滴状几何，-ZD<z<0 为圆锥，0<z<ZU 为半椭球。
EQ.4：盒体，边界为 -XL<x<XL、-YL<y<YL、-ZD<z<ZU。
EQ.5：基于段的圆柱。

english:
Length for the geometry SURFCT in the local 𝑧-direction for z < 0,
except for SURFCT = 2 where z > 0. ZD can be input as a negative or positive value.
zh: 几何 SURFCT 在局部 z 方向、z<0 时的长度；SURFCT=2 时例外，使用 z>0。ZD 可输入为负值或正值。

english:
For RW = -1:
Ignored
For RW > 0:
Angle of rotation in degrees around an axis defined by *DEFINE_‌VECTOR for the 3D to 3D mapping. See Remark 7.
zh:
RW=-1：忽略。
RW>0：3D 到 3D 映射时，绕 *DEFINE_VECTOR 定义轴旋转的角度（度）。参见备注 7。

english:
For RW = -1:
Number of times to write in the mapping file between the times TBEG and TEND. See Remark 5.
For RW > 0:
Rank of the data to be read if, during the previous run, a keyword *ALE_MAPPING with RW=-1 wrote several times in the mapping file.
If there was only one output (most of the cases), NTIM=1. See Remark 5.
zh:
RW=-1：在 TBEG 和 TEND 之间写入映射文件的次数，参见备注 5。
RW>0：若前一次运行中 RW=-1 的 *ALE_MAPPING 向映射文件写入多次，则为要读取数据的序号；若只有一次输出，NTIM=1。

english:
Flag defining if the keyword reads or writes in the mapping:
EQ.-1: write in the mapping file. See Remark 4.
GT.0:	read from the mapping file. |RW| defines the rank of *ALE_MAPPING that wrote in the
mapping file in the previous run if several keywords contributed to the file creation.
If there was only one keyword (most of the cases), RW=1. See Remark 4..
zh:
定义该关键字在映射中读或写的标志：
EQ.-1：写入映射文件，参见备注 4。
GT.0：从映射文件读取。若前一次运行中多个关键字参与创建文件，|RW| 定义写入映射文件的 *ALE_MAPPING 序号；若只有一个关键字，RW=1。

english:
For RW = -1:
Time to start writing in the mapping file (TBEG=ENDTIM by default). See Remark 5.
For RW > 0:
Time to map the data from the mapping file (TBEG=0.0 by default). See Remark 5.
zh:
RW=-1：开始写入映射文件的时间（默认 TBEG=ENDTIM），参见备注 5。
RW>0：从映射文件映射数据的时间（默认 TBEG=0.0），参见备注 5。

english:
For RW = -1:
Time to stop writing in the mapping file. See Remark 5.
For RW > 0:
Ignored.
zh:
RW=-1：停止写入映射文件的时间，参见备注 5。
RW>0：忽略。

english:
Type of “ID” (see Remark 8):
EQ.0:	part set ID.
EQ.1:	part ID.
EQ.2:	element set ID.
zh:
ID 类型（参见备注 8）：
EQ.0：部件集合 ID。
EQ.1：部件 ID。
EQ.2：单元集合 ID。

english:
For RW = -1:
Ignored
For RW > 0:
ID of the symmetric axis defined by *DEFINE_‌VECTOR.
The 3 first parameters in *DEFINE_‌VECTOR defines the location of the origin of the previous run. See Remarks 6 and 7.
zh:
RW=-1：忽略。
RW>0：由 *DEFINE_VECTOR 定义的对称轴 ID。*DEFINE_VECTOR 的前三个参数定义前一次运行原点的位置。参见备注 6 和 7。

english:
Type of volume containing the selected elements for the mapping.
The absolute value of VOLTYP indicates the type of volume and the sign indicates whether the elements to be selected are in or out of the volume.
The volume depends on geometrical lengths in a local coordinate system defined by orthonormal axis called ,  and . See Remarks 9,10,11,12 and 13.
Volume Type
|VOLTYP|.EQ.1:	Trapezoid 3D (See Figure 0-1).
|VOLTYP|.EQ.2:	Elliptic truncated cone (See Figure 0-2).
|VOLTYP|.EQ.3:	Ellipsoid (See Figure 0-3).
In/Out
VOLTYP.LT.0:	elements outside the volume are selected.
VOLTYP.GT.0:	elements inside the volume are selected.
zh:
包含映射所选单元的体积类型。VOLTYP 的绝对值表示体积类型，符号表示选择体积内还是体积外的单元。体积由局部正交坐标系中的几何长度定义。
|VOLTYP|.EQ.1：3D 梯形体。
|VOLTYP|.EQ.2：椭圆截锥。
|VOLTYP|.EQ.3：椭球体。
VOLTYP.LT.0：选择体积外单元。
VOLTYP.GT.0：选择体积内单元。

english:
For RW = -1:
Ignored
For RW > 0:
-position of a point on a plane used by specific mappings (only for 2D plain strain to 3D mappings). See Remark 7.
zh:
RW = -1：忽略。
RW > 0：特定映射所用平面上一点的位置（仅用于 2D 平面应变到 3D 映射）。参见备注 7。

english:
Flag to define which nodes the motion is prescribed for (see Remark 2):
EQ.0:	Nodes connected to at least one ALE element that is at the minimum partially filled by a group of MMSID
EQ.1:	Nodes connected to at least one ALE element that is fully filled by a group of MMSID
EQ.2:	Nodes only connected to ALE elements that are fully filled by a group of MMSID.
zh:
定义对哪些节点规定运动的标志（参见备注 2）：
EQ.0：连接到至少一个由 MMSID 组部分填充的 ALE 单元的节点。
EQ.1：连接到至少一个由 MMSID 组完全填充的 ALE 单元的节点。
EQ.2：仅连接到由 MMSID 组完全填充的 ALE 单元的节点。

english:
Set type of ALESID:
EQ.0:	part set ID (PSID).
EQ.1:	part ID (PID).
zh:
ALESID 的集合类型：
EQ.0：部件集合 ID（PSID）。
EQ.1：部件 ID（PID）。

english:
A Lagrangian segment will couple to fluid on only one side of the segment.The assump tion is segment normal points to f luids to be coupl ed. If that is not the case , set flip to 1.
EQ.0:N o action.
EQ.1:Flip the segment normal so it points to fluids to be coupled.
zh:
Lagrange 段只会在段的一侧与流体耦合。假定段法向指向要耦合的流体；若不是，则将 FLIP 设为 1。
EQ.0：不操作。
EQ.1：翻转段法向，使其指向要耦合的流体。

english:
Set type of LSTRSID:
EQ.0:	part set ID (PSID).
EQ.1:	part ID (PID).
EQ.2:	segment set ID (SGSID).
zh:
LSTRSID 的集合类型：
EQ.0：部件集合 ID（PSID）。
EQ.1：部件 ID（PID）。
EQ.2：段集合 ID（SGSID）。

english:
Which Multi-material(s) to be coupled (Remark 1):
EQ.0:	couple with all multi-material groups,
EQ.-N:	-N is the ID of *SET_MULTI-MATERIAL_GROUP.
zh:
要耦合的多材料组（备注 1）：
EQ.0：与所有多材料组耦合。
EQ.-N：-N 为 *SET_MULTI-MATERIAL_GROUP 的 ID。

english:
Penalty factor. PFAC is a scale factor for scaling the estimated stiffness of the interacting(coupling) system.It is used to compute the coupling forces to be distributed on the Lagrangian and ALE parts.
GT.0:Fraction of estimated critical stiffness.
LT.1:PFAC must be an integer, and PFAC is a load curve ID. The curve defines the coupling pressure on the axis as a function of the penetration along the axis.
zh:
罚因子。PFAC 为缩放相互作用（耦合）系统估计刚度的比例因子，用于计算分配到 Lagrange 和 ALE 部件上的耦合力。
GT.0：估计临界刚度的比例。
LT.1：PFAC 必须为整数，且为载荷曲线 ID；曲线定义轴向耦合压力随轴向穿透的变化。

english:
Default Part ID. The elements generated will be with DPID.
DPID refers to an empty part contains no material and used to
reference the mesh only. This part definition is automatically
generated during the input phase and contains no material and
element formulation information. Please see remark 1.
zh: 默认部件 ID。生成的单元将使用 DPID。DPID 指向一个空部件，该部件不包含材料，仅用于引用网格。该部件定义在输入阶段自动生成，不含材料和单元公式信息。参见备注 1。

english:
NID0 specifies the mesh origin node at the input phase. Later
during the simulation, prescribed motion applied to this node
gives the generated mesh the translational motion.
zh: NID0 在输入阶段指定网格原点节点。仿真过程中施加到该节点的规定运动会赋予生成网格平移运动。

english:
Control Points ID. A unique number must be specified. This ID is to be
referred in the three fields marked up CPIDX, CPIDY, CPIDZ in *ALE_	STRUCTURED_MESH.
zh: 控制点 ID。必须指定唯一编号。该 ID 将在 *ALE_STRUCTURED_MESH 中标记为 CPIDX、CPIDY、CPIDZ 的三个字段中引用。

english:
Ratio for progressive mesh spacing.  Progressively larger or smaller mesh will be generated between the control point that has nonzero ratio specified and the control point following it.  See remark 2.
GT.0.0:	mesh size increases; dl(n+1)=dl_n*(1+ratio)
LT.0.0:	mesh size decreases; dl(n+1)=dl_n/(1-ratio).
zh:
渐进网格间距比例。在指定非零比例的控制点与其后的控制点之间，将生成逐渐变大或变小的网格。参见备注 2。
GT.0.0：网格尺寸增大，dl(n+1)=dl_n*(1+ratio)。
LT.0.0：网格尺寸减小，dl(n+1)=dl_n/(1-ratio)。

english:
The set of ALE multi-material group list IDs which the mesh follows.
Please refer to *SET_MULTI-MATERIAL_GROUP_LIST card for details.
zh: 网格跟随的 ALE 多材料组列表 ID 集合。详情参见 *SET_MULTI-MATERIAL_GROUP_LIST 卡片。

english:
the distance.  Elements farther away than the distance in the direction of the shell normal vectors (depending on the value of IOUTIN) are deleted/kept.
Please note, only elements on one side will be deleted.
To delete the elements on both sides, repeat the card with the IOUTIN value reversed.
zh: 距离。沿壳法向方向（取决于 IOUTIN）距离超过该值的单元会被删除/保留。注意只会删除一侧的单元；若要删除两侧单元，请反向设置 IOUTIN 并重复该卡片。

english:
Flag to select which elements to trim, that is, "outside" or "inside" the specified object defined with the OPTION and En.
For PARTSET and SEGSET options, "outside" is defined as the region to which the segment normal points.
EQ.0:	outside (default)
EQ.1:	inside.
zh:
选择修剪哪些单元的标志，即由 OPTION 和 En 定义的指定对象“外部”或“内部”。对于 PARTSET 和 SEGSET 选项，“外部”定义为段法向指向的区域。
EQ.0：外部（默认）。
EQ.1：内部。

english:
To trim or un-trim, that is, to delete the picked elements or keep them.
EQ.0:	trim (default)
EQ.1:	keep.
zh:
修剪或取消修剪，即删除所选单元或保留它们。
EQ.0：修剪（默认）。
EQ.1：保留。

english:
There are six available options. They are trim by: PARTSET, SEGSET, PLANE,
CYLINDER, BOXCOR, BOXCPT and SPHERE.  See the table below for more details.
zh: 可用修剪选项包括：PARTSET、SEGSET、PLANE、CYLINDER、BOXCOR、BOXCPT 和 SPHERE。更多细节见下表。

english:
Geometry types. They are: PARTSET, PART, SEGSET, PLANE, CYLINDER, BOXCOR, BOXCPT and SPHERE.
See the table below for more details.
zh: 几何类型，包括 PARTSET、PART、SEGSET、PLANE、CYLINDER、BOXCOR、BOXCPT 和 SPHERE。更多细节见下表。

english:
Number of sampling points.  In case an element is partially filled, in each direction, 2 * NSAMPLE + 1 points are generated.
These (2*"NSAMPLE" +1)^3 points, each representing a volume, are used to determine if its volume is in or out.
zh: 采样点数量。若单元被部分填充，每个方向生成 2*NSAMPLE+1 个点。这些 (2*NSAMPLE+1)^3 个点各代表一个体积，用于判断其体积在内部还是外部。

english:
ID of *DEFINE_VECTOR card.  This flag is used to assign initial velocity to material filling the domain.
Field 2 to 5 (XT, YT, ZT) of the *DEFINE_VECTOR card are used to define the initial translational velocities.  Please refer to Example 1 below for usage.
zh: *DEFINE_VECTOR 卡片 ID。该标志用于为填充域的材料指定初始速度。*DEFINE_VECTOR 卡片的字段 2 到 5（XT、YT、ZT）用于定义初始平移速度。用法参见下方示例 1。

english:
This is the AMMG-SID before the switch. The AMMG-SID
corresponds to the SID defined on a *SET_MULTI-MATERIAL_GROUP_LIST (SMMGL) card.
This SID refers to one or more AMMGs.
zh: 切换前的 AMMG-SID。AMMG-SID 对应 *SET_MULTI-MATERIAL_GROUP_LIST（SMMGL）卡片上定义的 SID。该 SID 引用一个或多个 AMMG。

english:
ID of a *DEFINE_FUNCTION function. This function determines
the material fraction to be switched.
zh: *DEFINE_FUNCTION 函数 ID。该函数确定要切换的材料分数。

english:
ID of *SEGMENT_SET that is used to pass geometric properties to
the function specified by IDFUNC. This field is optional.
The segment center positions and normal vectors are computed.
For each ALE element, this data is passed to the function
IDFUNC for the segment the closest to the element center.
zh: *SEGMENT_SET 的 ID，用于将几何属性传递给 IDFUNC 指定的函数。该字段可选。会计算段中心位置和法向量；对于每个 ALE 单元，该数据会传递给离该单元中心最近段的函数 IDFUNC。

english:
The ID of a *SOLID_SET specifying which elements are affected
by this particular instance of the *ALE_SWITCH_MMG keyword.
This field is optional. If undefined, *ALE_SWITCH_MMG affects
all ALE elements. The element centers are computed and can be
used as variables in the function IDFUNC.
zh: *SOLID_SET 的 ID，指定受此 *ALE_SWITCH_MMG 关键字实例影响的单元。该字段可选。若未定义，*ALE_SWITCH_MMG 影响所有 ALE 单元。会计算单元中心，并可作为 IDFUNC 函数中的变量。

english:
Number of cycles between each update of the segment centers
and normal vectors (if a segment set is defined). For each update,
a bucket sort is applied to find the closest segment to each ALE
element. If the segment nodes are fully constrained, the segment
centers and normal vectors are computed only one time.
zh: 段中心和法向量的更新循环间隔（若定义了段集合）。每次更新时使用 bucket sort 查找离每个 ALE 单元最近的段。若段节点完全约束，则段中心和法向量只计算一次。

english:
Number of cycles between each update of the ALE element
centers. For each update, a bucket sort is applied to find the
closest segment to each ALE element. If the element nodes does
not move (as with AFAC = -1 in *CONTROL_ALE) the element
centers are computed exactly once.
zh: ALE 单元中心的更新循环间隔。每次更新时使用 bucket sort 查找离每个 ALE 单元最近的段。若单元节点不移动（如 *CONTROL_ALE 中 AFAC=-1），单元中心只计算一次。

english:
This is the AMMG-SID after the switch. The AMMG-SID
corresponds to the SID defined on a *SET_MULTI-MATERIAL_GROUP_LIST (SMMGL) card.
This SID refers to one or more AMMGs.
zh: 切换后的 AMMG-SID。AMMG-SID 对应 *SET_MULTI-MATERIAL_GROUP_LIST（SMMGL）卡片上定义的 SID。该 SID 引用一个或多个 AMMG。

english:
Coupling IDs for one or more ALE fluid-structure-interaction (FSI)
*CONSTRAINED_LAGRANGE_IN_SOLID_ID cards. These couplings are deleted during the 2nd, CV computational phase
zh:
一个或多个 ALE 流固耦合（FSI）*CONSTRAINED_LAGRANGE_IN_SOLID_ID 卡片的耦合 ID。
这些耦合会在第二个控制体积计算阶段删除。

english:
Set ID type for the above SETID (following the conventions in
*AIRBAG_HYBRID card).
EQ.0: SID is a segment set ID (SGSID).
NE.0: SID is a part set ID (PSID).
zh:
上方 SETID 的集合 ID 类型（遵循 *AIRBAG_HYBRID 卡片约定）。
EQ.0：SID 为段集合 ID（SGSID）。
NE.0：SID 为部件集合 ID（PSID）。

english:
An ID defines a corresponding *AIRBAG_HYBRID_ID card for use in
an ALE-method-switching-to-CV-method simulation. The simulation
starts with ALE computational method, then switches to a CV (or UP)
method at some given time.
EQ.0: (or blank) The code will construct an equivalent
*AIRBAG_HYBRID_ID card automatically internally, (default).
The 3rd optional line is then a required input.
NE.0: An ID points to a corresponding *AIRBAG_HYBRID_ID
card which must be defined for use after the switch. If UPID is
defined, do not define the 3rd optional card.
zh:
该 ID 定义对应的 *AIRBAG_HYBRID_ID 卡片，用于 ALE 方法切换到 CV 方法的仿真。仿真以 ALE 计算方法开始，然后在给定时间切换到 CV（或 UP）方法。
EQ.0 或空白：程序内部自动构造等效 *AIRBAG_HYBRID_ID 卡片（默认），此时第三个可选行成为必填输入。
NE.0：ID 指向切换后使用的对应 *AIRBAG_HYBRID_ID 卡片；若定义 UPID，不要定义第三个可选卡片。

english:
Type of "ID" (see remark 1):
EQ.0: part set ID.
EQ.1: part ID.
EQ.2: segment set ID.
zh:
ID 类型（参见备注 1）：
EQ.0：部件集合 ID。
EQ.1：部件 ID。
EQ.2：段集合 ID。

english:
Birth time to write or read the mapping file. If a mapping file is
written, the next run reading this file will begin at time BIRTH if this parameter for this next run is not larger.
zh: 写入或读取映射文件的出生时间。若写入映射文件，下一次读取该文件的运行将在时间 BIRTH 开始，前提是下一次运行的该参数不更大。

english:
Death time to write or read the mapping file. If a mapping file is
written, the next run will stop to read this file at time DEATH if this parameter for this next run is not smaller.
zh: 写入或读取映射文件的终止时间。若写入映射文件，下一次运行将在时间 DEATH 停止读取该文件，前提是下一次运行的该参数不更小。

english:
Time interval between outputs in the mapping file. This parameter
is only used to write in the mapping file
zh: 映射文件输出之间的时间间隔。该参数仅用于写入映射文件。

english:
Flag to initialize all the ALE domain of the next run:
EQ.0: No initialization
EQ.1: Initialization. *INITIAL_ALE_MAPPING will have to be in
the input deck of the next run to read the data from the
mapping file. The initial time of the next run will be BIRTH
zh:
初始化下一次运行中所有 ALE 域的标志：
EQ.0：不初始化。
EQ.1：初始化。下一次运行的输入文件中必须包含 *INITIAL_ALE_MAPPING，以便从映射文件读取数据。下一次运行的初始时间为 BIRTH。

english:
Type of volume containing the selected elements for the mapping.
The absolute value of IVOLTYPE indicates the type of volume and
the sign indicates whether the data is being read of written. Volume Type
|IVOLTYP|.EQ.1: Spherical surface with thickness (THICK).
|IVOLTYP|.EQ.2: Box.
|IVOLTYP|.EQ.3: Cylindrical surface with thickness (THICK)
|IVOLTYP|.EQ.4: All the elements defined by ID. Read/Write
IVOLTYP.LT.0: data from the mapping file are read for the elements of this volume.
IVOLTYP.GT.0: data from the elements of this volume are written in the mapping file.
zh:
包含映射所选单元的体积类型。IVOLTYPE 的绝对值表示体积类型，符号表示读取还是写入数据。
|IVOLTYP|.EQ.1：带厚度 THICK 的球面。
|IVOLTYP|.EQ.2：盒体。
|IVOLTYP|.EQ.3：带厚度 THICK 的圆柱面。
|IVOLTYP|.EQ.4：由 ID 定义的所有单元。
IVOLTYP.LT.0：从映射文件读取该体积中单元的数据。
IVOLTYP.GT.0：将该体积中单元的数据写入映射文件。

english:
Type of "ID" (see remark 1):
EQ.0: part set ID.
EQ.1: part ID.
EQ.2: shell set ID.
EQ.3: solid set ID.
zh:
ID 类型（参见备注 1）：
EQ.0：部件集合 ID。
EQ.1：部件 ID。
EQ.2：壳集合 ID。
EQ.3：实体集合 ID。

english:
Coupling type:
EQ.1: node set with force feedback
EQ.2: node set for multiscale spotwelds.
zh:
耦合类型：
EQ.1：带力反馈的节点集合。
EQ.2：用于多尺度点焊的节点集合。

english:
Flag for heat input enforcement option (see Remark 4)
EQ.0: no additional scaling of heat source
EQ.1: account for inclination angle a of heat source by energy
input rate multiplier q3(a) = cos(a)
EQ.2: scale the nodal fluxes by a multiplier q4(t) such that the
resulting heat input equals the user input Q(t) =Qb*q1(t)
EQ.3: apply option 1 and 2.
zh:
热输入强制选项标志（参见备注 4）：
EQ.0：不对热源额外缩放。
EQ.1：通过能量输入率乘子 q3(a)=cos(a) 考虑热源倾角 a。
EQ.2：用乘子 q4(t) 缩放节点热流，使结果热输入等于用户输入 Q(t)=Qb*q1(t)。
EQ.3：同时应用选项 1 和 2。

english:
Flag for updating boundary segments exposed to the
environment as solid elements (defined in PSEROD) erode; see Remark 5.
EQ.0: no propagation onto new segments
EQ.1: propagation onto new segments.
zh:
随着 PSEROD 中定义的实体单元侵蚀，更新暴露于环境的边界段的标志；参见备注 5。
EQ.0：不传播到新段。
EQ.1：传播到新段。

english:
Geometry description for energy rate density distribution (see Remark 3):
EQ.1: double elliptic with constant density
EQ.2: double elliptic with Gaussian distribution
EQ.3: user defined function.
zh:
能量率密度分布的几何描述（参见备注 3）：
EQ.1：常密度双椭圆。
EQ.2：Gaussian 分布双椭圆。
EQ.3：用户定义函数。

english:
Load curve ID for flux energy input rate multiplier q2(a) as a. The value of the angle α range from 0° (segment normal and heat source point in the same direction) to 180° (segment normal and heat source point in opposite directions).
function of inclination angle a, see Remark 4
EQ.0: use constant multiplier value q2(a) = 1.0.
zh:
热流能量输入率乘子 q2(a) 随倾角 a 变化的载荷曲线 ID，参见备注 4。角度 α 范围为 0°（段法向与热源指向相同）到 180°（方向相反）。
EQ.0：使用常数乘子 q2(a)=1.0。

english:
Load curve defining the rotation (angle in degrees) of weld source
around the trajectory as function of time. See Remark 2.
zh: 载荷曲线，定义焊接热源绕轨迹的旋转角（度）随时间的变化。参见备注 2。

english:
Load curve ID for flux energy input rate multiplier q1(t) as a
function of time, see Remark 4.
EQ.0: use constant multiplier value q1(t) = 1.0.
zh:
热流能量输入率乘子 q1(t) 随时间变化的载荷曲线 ID，参见备注 4。
EQ.0：使用常数乘子 q1(t)=1.0。

english:
For a thick thermal shell, the flux will be applied to the surface
identified by LOC. See field THSHEL on the *CONTROL_SHELL keyword.
EQ.-1: lower surface of thermal shell element
EQ.0: middle surface of thermal shell element
EQ.1: upper surface of thermal shell element.
zh:
对于厚热壳，热流将施加到 LOC 标识的表面。参见 *CONTROL_SHELL 关键字中的 THSHEL 字段。
EQ.-1：热壳单元下表面。
EQ.0：热壳单元中面。
EQ.1：热壳单元上表面。

english:
Node set defining the path of the weld source. The source travels
along the path at speed SPD1. The nodes are traversed according
to their ordering in the node set. See Remark 1.
zh: 定义焊接热源路径的节点集合。热源以速度 SPD1 沿该路径移动，节点按节点集合中的顺序遍历。参见备注 1。

english:
Node or segment set containing information for the weld source aiming direction:
GT.0: NSID2 together with SPD2 define a curve in the same
way that NSID1 and SPD1 define a curve. Aiming direction
is taken to be the vector pointing from the current
position along NSID2 (for example your hand holding
the torch) to the current position on NSID1 (the weld source).
EQ.0: beam aiming direction is (TX, TY, TZ) input on Card 5.
zh:
包含焊接热源瞄准方向信息的节点或段集合：
GT.0：NSID2 与 SPD2 以 NSID1 和 SPD1 相同方式定义曲线。瞄准方向取为从 NSID2 当前位置指向 NSID1 当前位置的向量。
EQ.0：束瞄准方向为卡片 5 输入的 (TX, TY, TZ)。

english:
Defines if SPD1 and SPD2 are relative or absolute speeds in
coupled simulations
EQ.0: absolute speeds
EQ.1: relative speeds with respect to underlying structure.
zh:
定义耦合仿真中 SPD1 和 SPD2 是相对速度还是绝对速度：
EQ.0：绝对速度。
EQ.1：相对于底层结构的相对速度。

english:
Speed of the heat source on the weld trajectory
GT.0.0: constant speed
LT.0.0: |SPD1| is a load curve ID defining weld speed as a function of time.
zh:
热源在焊接轨迹上的速度：
GT.0.0：常数速度。
LT.0.0：|SPD1| 为载荷曲线 ID，定义焊接速度随时间的变化。

english:
Speed of reference point in NSID2 (ignored unless NSID2 > 0)
GT.0: constant speed
LT.0: |SPD2| is a load curve ID defining weld speed as a
function of time.
zh:
NSID2 中参考点速度（除非 NSID2>0，否则忽略）：
GT.0：常数速度。
LT.0：|SPD2| 为载荷曲线 ID，定义焊接速度随时间的变化。

english:
Segment set ID containing segments that are potentially heated
by surface heat source (flux)..
zh: 包含可能被表面热源（热流）加热的段的段集合 ID。

english:
Node set ID, see *SET_NODE.
LT.0.0:|NSID| is the id of *SET_SEGMENT
zh:
节点集合 ID，参见 *SET_NODE。
LT.0.0：|NSID| 为 *SET_SEGMENT 的 ID。

english:
Contact blockage effect,
EQ.0: When all segments in SEGID are subject to the pressure
defined by LCID and CMULT;
EQ.-1: When only elements in SEGID not involved in contact are
subject to the pressure defined by LCID and CMULT
zh:
接触遮挡效应：
EQ.0：SEGID 中所有段均承受由 LCID 和 CMULT 定义的压力。
EQ.-1：仅 SEGID 中未参与接触的单元承受由 LCID 和 CMULT 定义的压力。

english:
Type of pre-crack:
EQ.1: straight line
zh:
预裂纹类型：
EQ.1：直线。

english:
Optional load curve allowing more flexible and efficient use of SET_BOX option. Instead of performing box-check at every time
step, discrete box-check times could be given as x-values of LCBCHK. LCBCHKs y-values specify corresponding death times.
For example, a curve with points (20, 30) and (50, 70) will result in two box checks. The first will occur at 20, and the prescribed motion
will be active from 20 to 30. The second will occur at 50, and the prescribed motion will be active from 50 to 70. A y-value of  0
means the prescribed motion will stay active until next box-check. For example, an additional 3 rd point of (90, 0) will lead to another
box-check at 90, and the prescribed motion will be active from 90 until the end of the simulation..
zh: 可选载荷曲线，使 SET_BOX 选项更灵活高效。无需每个时间步检查盒体，可将离散盒体检查时间作为 LCBCHK 的 x 值给出，y 值指定对应死亡时间。例如点 (20,30) 和 (50,70) 会产生两次盒体检查，规定运动分别在 20-30 和 50-70 激活。y=0 表示规定运动保持激活直到下一次盒体检查。

english:
Time offset flag for the SET_BOX option:
EQ.1: the time value of the load curve, LCID, will be offset by the
time when the node enters the box,
EQ.0: no time offset is applied to LCID
zh:
SET_BOX 选项的时间偏移标志：
EQ.1：载荷曲线 LCID 的时间值将按节点进入盒体的时间偏移。
EQ.0：不对 LCID 施加时间偏移。

english:
x-coordinate of tail of a normal vector originating on the wall
(tail) and terminating in the body (head); that is, the vector points
from the non-reflecting boundary plane to the body.
zh: 法向向量尾端的 x 坐标；该向量起于壁面（尾端）并终止于物体（头端），即从非反射边界平面指向物体。

english:
Geometric description of the moving volume:
EQ.1:	cylindrical volume
EQ.2:	rectangular prism volume.
zh:
移动体积的几何描述：
EQ.1：圆柱体积。
EQ.2：矩形棱柱体积。

english:
Load curve ID for temperature as a function of time
EQ.0:	temperature is a constant defined by the value TMULT.
zh:
温度随时间变化的载荷曲线 ID。
EQ.0：温度为由 TMULT 值定义的常数。

english:
Node set defining the path of the moving volume.  The moving volume travels along the path at speed SPD1.
The nodes are traversed according to their order in the node set.  See Remark 1.
zh: 定义移动体积路径的节点集合。移动体积以速度 SPD1 沿路径移动，节点按节点集合顺序遍历。参见备注 1。

english:
Node or segment set that specifies the orientation of the moving volume's center axis.
GT.0:	NSID2 together with SPD2 define a curve in the same way that NSID1 and SPD1 define a curve.
Orientation of the moving volume's center axis is defined as a vector pointing from the current position on NSID2 to the current position on NSID1.
EQ.0:	The moving volume's center axis is oriented as  input on Card?4.
LT.0:	 specifies a segment set.  The moving volume's center axis is aligned with normals to segments in this set.
To ensure that the axis orientation can be unambiguously determined at each point of the nodal path,
LS-DYNA requires that each pair of consecutive nodes in NSID1 must both be in at least one segment of.
When the center of the moving volume is.
on a node that is part of more than one segment in |NSID2|, the direction is determined by averaging the adjacent segment normals.
zh:
指定移动体积中心轴取向的节点或段集合。
GT.0：NSID2 与 SPD2 以 NSID1 和 SPD1 相同方式定义曲线；中心轴取向为从 NSID2 当前点指向 NSID1 当前点的向量。
EQ.0：中心轴取向按卡片 4 输入。
LT.0：指定段集合，中心轴与该集合中段法向对齐。若中心位于 |NSID2| 中多个段共享节点处，方向由相邻段法向平均确定。

english:
PID type:
EQ.1:	part ID.
EQ.2: part set ID.
zh:
PID 类型：
EQ.1：部件 ID。
EQ.2：部件集合 ID。

english:
Defines if SPD1 and SPD2 are relative or absolute speeds in thermo-mechanical coupled analysis.
EQ.0:	absolute speeds
EQ.1:	relative speeds with respect to underlying structures.
zh:
定义热-力耦合分析中 SPD1 和 SPD2 是相对速度还是绝对速度：
EQ.0：绝对速度。
EQ.1：相对于底层结构的相对速度。

english:
Speed of the moving volume on the trajectory:
GT.0.0:	Constant speed
LT.0.0:	 is a load curve ID defining the speed as a function of time.
zh:
移动体积在轨迹上的速度：
GT.0.0：常数速度。
LT.0.0：载荷曲线 ID，定义速度随时间的变化。

english:
Speed of reference point in NSID2 (ignored unless NSID2 > 0)
GT.0:	constant speed
LT.0:	 |SPD2| is a load curve ID defining the speed as a function of time..
zh:
NSID2 中参考点速度（除非 NSID2>0，否则忽略）：
GT.0：常数速度。
LT.0：|SPD2| 为载荷曲线 ID，定义速度随时间的变化。

english:
Flag for heat input enforcement option.  If set, the nodal heat input is scaled
such that the resulting heat inputs equals the user input as given by Q and LCID.
zh: 热输入强制选项标志。若设置，节点热输入会被缩放，使得到的热输入等于 Q 和 LCID 给出的用户输入。

english:
Geometry description for energy rate density distribution (see Remark 4):
EQ.1: Goldak-type heat source
EQ.2: double ellipsoidal heat source with constant density
EQ.3: double conical heat source with constant density
EQ.4: frustum-shaped heat source with constant density.
EQ.5: user-defined function
zh:
能量率密度分布的几何描述（参见备注 4）：
EQ.1：Goldak 型热源。
EQ.2：常密度双椭球热源。
EQ.3：常密度双圆锥热源。
EQ.4：常密度截台形热源。
EQ.5：用户定义函数。

english:
ID of second node set or segment setcontaining information for the weld source aiming direction (see Remark 2)
GT.0:	SID2 refers to a sorted node set, the order of which defines the direction of the trajectory. The heat source is aimed from current position in SID2to current position in the weld trajectory.
EQ.0:	beam aiming direction is (tx, ty, tz) input on optional card4.
LT.0: 	|SID2| is a segment set. The heat source is aiming in normal direction to segments in the set.
zh:
第二节点集合或段集合 ID，包含焊接热源瞄准方向信息（参见备注 2）。
GT.0：SID2 引用排序节点集合，其顺序定义轨迹方向，热源从 SID2 当前位置瞄准焊接轨迹当前位置。
EQ.0：束瞄准方向为可选卡片 4 输入的 (tx,ty,tz)。
LT.0：|SID2| 为段集合，热源沿该集合段法向瞄准。

english:
Curve multiplier for weld energy input rate [energy/time]
LT.0:	take absolute value and accurate integration of heat using integration cells with edge length DISC
zh:
焊接能量输入率的曲线乘子 [能量/时间]。
LT.0：取绝对值，并使用边长为 DISC 的积分单元进行精确热积分。

english:
Defines if VEL1 and VEL2 are relative or absolute velocities in coupled simulations
EQ.0:	absolute velocities
EQ.1:	relative velocities with respect to underlying structure.
zh:
定义耦合仿真中 VEL1 和 VEL2 是相对速度还是绝对速度：
EQ.0：绝对速度。
EQ.1：相对于底层结构的相对速度。

english:
Applicable degrees-of-freedom:
EQ.101:  x-velocity,
EQ.102:  y-velocity,
EQ.103:  z-velocity,
EQ.104:  density,
EQ.105:  pressure ,
EQ.106:  temperature,
EQ.201:  x, y & z-velocity,
EQ.202: x & y-velocity,
EQ.203:  x & z-velocity,
EQ.204:  y & z-velocity.
.
zh:
适用自由度：
EQ.101：x 速度。
EQ.102：y 速度。
EQ.103：z 速度。
EQ.104：密度。
EQ.105：压力。
EQ.106：温度。
EQ.201：x、y、z 速度。
EQ.202：x、y 速度。
EQ.203：x、z 速度。
EQ.204：y、z 速度。

english:
Set the stability limiter option (See CESE theory manual):
EQ.0: limiter format 1 : Re-weighting
EQ.1: limiter format 2 : Relaxing.
zh:
设置稳定性 limiter 选项（参见 CESE 理论手册）：
EQ.0：limiter 格式 1：重加权。
EQ.1：limiter 格式 2：松弛。

english:
Mesh motion selector:
EQ.1: mesh moves using an implicit ball-vertex spring method.
EQ.9: the IDW scheme is used to move the mesh.
zh:
网格运动选择器：
EQ.1：网格使用隐式 ball-vertex 弹簧方法移动。
EQ.9：使用 IDW 方案移动网格。

english:
Sets the framework of the CESE solver:   EQ.0: Fixed Eulerian
EQ. 100: Moving Mesh FSI
EQ. 200: Immersed boundary FSI.
zh:
设置 CESE 求解器框架：
EQ.0：固定 Euler。
EQ.100：移动网格 FSI。
EQ.200：浸入边界 FSI。

english:
Choose the frame of reference:
EQ.0: Usual non-moving reference frame (default)
EQ.1000: Non-inertial rotating reference frame.
zh:
选择参考系：
EQ.0：通常的非运动参考系（默认）。
EQ.1000：非惯性旋转参考系。

english:
Set the geometric dimension:
EQ.0:   2D or 3D, it will be decided by the mesh & and the given boundary conditions.
EQ.2:   two dimension (2D) problem
EQ.3:   three dimension (3D) problem
EQ.101  2D axis-symmetric
.
zh:
设置几何维度：
EQ.0：2D 或 3D，由网格和给定边界条件决定。
EQ.2：二维问题。
EQ.3：三维问题。
EQ.101：2D 轴对称。

english:
Set the time step option:
EQ.0: Fixed time step size ( DTINT, i.e., given initial time step size)
NE.0: the time step size will be calculated based on the given CFL-number and the flow solution at the previous time step.
zh:
设置时间步选项：
EQ.0：固定时间步长（DTINT，即给定初始时间步长）。
NE.0：基于给定 CFL 数和上一时间步流动解计算时间步长。

english:
Determines if the output file should be dumped
EQ.0: No output file is generated.
EQ.1: The output file is generated.
zh:
确定是否输出文件。
EQ.0：不生成输出文件。
EQ.1：生成输出文件。

english:
Determines if the output file should be dumped
EQ.0: No output file is generated.
EQ.1: The output file giving the average fluxes is generated.
zh:
决定是否写出输出文件。
EQ.0：不生成输出文件。
EQ.1：生成给出平均通量的输出文件。

english:
Determines if the output file should be dumped.
EQ.0: No output file is generated.
EQ.1: The output file giving the pressure forces is generated.
zh:
决定是否写出输出文件。
EQ.0：不生成输出文件。
EQ.1：生成给出压力力的输出文件。

english:
Point Set type:
EQ.0: Fixed points.
EQ.1: Tracer points using prescribed velocity.
EQ.2: Tracer points using fluid velocity.
zh:
点集类型：
EQ.0：固定点。
EQ.1：使用规定速度的示踪点。
EQ.2：使用流体速度的示踪点。

english:
Determines if the output file should be dumped
EQ.0: No output file is generated.
EQ : 1 The output file giving the drag forces is generated.
zh:
决定是否写出输出文件。
EQ.0：不生成输出文件。
EQ.1：生成给出阻力的输出文件。

english:
Velocity display mode:
EQ.0: Relative velocity, only the non-rotating components of the velocity are output.
EQ.1: Absolute velocity is output.
zh:
速度显示模式：
EQ.0：相对速度，仅输出速度中的非旋转分量。
EQ.1：输出绝对速度。

english:
Type of 0D calculation:
EQ.1: Isochoric
EQ.2: Isobaric
zh:
0D 计算类型：
EQ.1：等容。
EQ.2：等压。

english:
Selector:
EQ.0: AMPL and YCUT values for all chemical species are required.
EQ.1: One CSP Parameter Card should be provided, and it will be used for all species.
zh:
选择项：
EQ.0：需要为所有化学组分提供 AMPL 和 YCUT 值。
EQ.1：只需提供一张 CSP 参数卡，并将其用于所有组分。

english:
Load curve or table ID for p-damping force as a function of rate of
p-distance per unit timeand optionally r - distance(if table) between the
origins of CIDAand CIDB.See * DEFINE_CURVE or *DEFINE_TABLE.
EQ.0: Damping is not considered.
zh:
p 向阻尼力的载荷曲线或表 ID；该阻尼力可作为单位时间 p 距离变化率的函数，也可在使用表时同时作为 CIDA 与 CIDB 原点之间 r 距离的函数。参见 *DEFINE_CURVE 或 *DEFINE_TABLE。
EQ.0：不考虑阻尼。

english:
Load curve or table ID for r-damping force as a function of rate of
r-distance per unit timeand optionally r - distance(if table) between the
origins of CIDAand CIDB.See * DEFINE_CURVE or *DEFINE_TABLE.
EQ.0: Damping is not considered.
zh:
r 向阻尼力的载荷曲线或表 ID；该阻尼力可作为单位时间 r 距离变化率的函数，也可在使用表时同时作为 CIDA 与 CIDB 原点之间 r 距离的函数。参见 *DEFINE_CURVE 或 *DEFINE_TABLE。
EQ.0：不考虑阻尼。

english:
Fluid-Structure coupling method. CTYPEs(1, and 2) are not supported in MPP.
EQ.1:	Constrained acceleration.
EQ.2:	Constrained acceleration and velocity (default, see Remark 3).
EQ.3:	Constrained acceleration and velocity, normal direction only.
EQ.4:	Penalty coupling for shell  and solid elements (without erosion).
NOTE:	For RIGID Lagrangian Structure PARTS a penalty coupling method (CTYPE = 4) must be used.
EQ.5:	Penalty coupling allowing erosion in the Lagrangian entities.
EQ.6:	Penalty coupling designed for airbag modeling which
automatically controls the DIREC parameter internally.
It is equivalent to setting {CTYPE = 4; DIREC = 1} for unfolded region;
and {CTYPE = 4; DIREC = 2} for folded region.
For both cases: {ILEAK = 2; FRCMIN = 0.3}.
EQ.11:	Coupling designed to couple Lagrangian porous shell to ALE material.
When this option is used, THKF, the 7th column parameter of optional Card 4a
and the first 2 parameters of optional Card 4b must be defined.
See *LOAD_‌BODY_‌POROUS and Remark 13 below.
EQ.12:	Coupling designed to couple Lagrangian porous solid to ALE material.
When this option is used, Ai & Bi parameters of optional Card 4b must be defined (Card 4a must be defined but can be blank).
See *LOAD_‌BODY_‌POROUS and Remark 14 below.
zh:
流固耦合方法。CTYPE 为 1 和 2 时不支持 MPP。
EQ.1：约束加速度。
EQ.2：约束加速度和速度（默认，见备注 3）。
EQ.3：仅法向约束加速度和速度。
EQ.4：壳单元和实体单元的罚函数耦合（不允许侵蚀）。
注意：对于刚性拉格朗日结构 PART，必须使用罚函数耦合方法（CTYPE = 4）。
EQ.5：允许拉格朗日实体侵蚀的罚函数耦合。
EQ.6：为空气囊建模设计的罚函数耦合，会在内部自动控制 DIREC 参数。对展开区域等效于 {CTYPE = 4; DIREC = 1}，对折叠区域等效于 {CTYPE = 4; DIREC = 2}。两种情况下均为 {ILEAK = 2; FRCMIN = 0.3}。
EQ.11：用于将拉格朗日多孔壳耦合到 ALE 材料。使用该选项时，必须定义 THKF、可选卡 4a 第 7 列参数以及可选卡 4b 的前 2 个参数。参见 *LOAD_BODY_POROUS 和下方备注 13。
EQ.12：用于将拉格朗日多孔实体耦合到 ALE 材料。使用该选项时，必须定义可选卡 4b 的 Ai 和 Bi 参数（卡 4a 必须定义，但可留空）。参见 *LOAD_BODY_POROUS 和下方备注 14。

english:
Degree of freedom in the local coordinate system;
EQ.1:displacement along global x-direction.
EQ.2:displacement along global y-direction.
EQ.3:displacement along global z-direction.
EQ.4: global rotation about global x-axis.
EQ.5: global rotation about global y-axis.
EQ.6: global rotation about global z-axis.
EQ.7:	Nodal electric voltage of piezoelectric material; see *MAT_ADD_PZELECTRIC.
The voltage of the 1st node can only be defined as a linear combination of the voltage of other nodes, meaning all DOFs must be 7 for such an application.
zh:
局部坐标系中的自由度；
EQ.1：沿全局 x 方向的位移。
EQ.2：沿全局 y 方向的位移。
EQ.3：沿全局 z 方向的位移。
EQ.4：绕全局 x 轴的全局转动。
EQ.5：绕全局 y 轴的全局转动。
EQ.6：绕全局 z 轴的全局转动。
EQ.7：压电材料的节点电压；参见 *MAT_ADD_PZELECTRIC。对于这种应用，第 1 个节点的电压只能定义为其他节点电压的线性组合，这意味着所有自由度都必须为 7。

english:
Direction in three-dimensional space to be constrained
EQ.1: x direction
EQ.2: y direction
EQ.3: z direction.
zh:
要约束的三维空间方向。
EQ.1：x 方向。
EQ.2：y 方向。
EQ.3：z 方向。

english:
Motion flag.
EQ.0:	Relative motion is unconstrained.
EQ.1:	The displacement of the insert relative to the die is imposed.
EQ.2:	The velocity of the insert relative to the die is imposed.
EQ.3:	The acceleration of the insert relative to the die is imposed..
zh:
运动标志。
EQ.0：相对运动不受约束。
EQ.1：规定嵌件相对于模具的位移。
EQ.2：规定嵌件相对于模具的速度。
EQ.3：规定嵌件相对于模具的加速度。

english:
Degrees-of-dreedom. The list of dependent degrees-of-freedom consists of a number with up to six digits, with each digit representing a degree of dreedom. For example, the value 1356 indicates that degrees of freedom 1,3,5, and 6 are constrolled by the constrainet. The default is 123456. Digit:degree of freedom ID's:
EQ:1 x
EQ:2 Y
EQ:3:z
EQ:4:rotation about x axis
EQ:5:rotation about y axis
EQ:6:rotation about z axis
zh:
自由度。相关自由度列表由最多六位数字组成，每一位表示一个自由度。例如，值 1356 表示自由度 1、3、5 和 6 由该约束控制。默认值为 123456。数字对应自由度 ID：
EQ.1：x 平移。
EQ.2：y 平移。
EQ.3：z 平移。
EQ.4：绕 x 轴转动。
EQ.5：绕 y 轴转动。
EQ.6：绕 z 轴转动。

english:
Area equilibration threshold. The equilibration test is skipped when the accumulated area of the coupling
matrix is less than the area of the structural face. This normally occurs with partial coverage.
zh: 面积平衡阈值。当耦合矩阵的累计面积小于结构面的面积时，跳过平衡检查。这通常发生在部分覆盖的情况下。

english:
3-digit number, as "XYY", where "X" and "YY" define the options for the recovery techniques and the error estimators, respectively.
For X:
EQ.0: superconvergent patch recovery (SPR) (default);
EQ.1: the least square fit of the stress to the nodes (Global L2);
EQ.2: error density SPR;
EQ.3: self-weighted SPR
For YY:
EQ.00: energy norm (default)
EQ.01: Cauchy sigma_x
EQ.02: sigma_y
EQ.03: sigma_z
EQ.04: tau_xy
EQ.05: tau_yz
EQ.06: tau_zx
EQ.07: effective plastic strain, eps_ep
EQ.08: pressure
EQ.09: von Mises
EQ.10: principal deviator stress s11
EQ.11: S22
EQ.12: S33
EQ.13: Tresca
EQ.14: principal stress sigma_11
EQ.15: sigma_22
EQ.16: sigma_33
EQ.20: user subroutine "uadpval" to extract the numerical solutions for recovery, and "uadpnorm" to provide an error estimator
zh:
三位数字，格式为 "XYY"，其中 X 和 YY 分别定义恢复技术和误差估计器选项。
对于 X：
EQ.0：超收敛片恢复（SPR，默认）。
EQ.1：将应力最小二乘拟合到节点（全局 L2）。
EQ.2：误差密度 SPR。
EQ.3：自加权 SPR。
对于 YY：
EQ.00：能量范数（默认）。
EQ.01：Cauchy sigma_x。
EQ.02：sigma_y。
EQ.03：sigma_z。
EQ.04：tau_xy。
EQ.05：tau_yz。
EQ.06：tau_zx。
EQ.07：等效塑性应变 eps_ep。
EQ.08：压力。
EQ.09：von Mises。
EQ.10：主偏应力 s11。
EQ.11：S22。
EQ.12：S33。
EQ.13：Tresca。
EQ.14：主应力 sigma_11。
EQ.15：sigma_22。
EQ.16：sigma_33。
EQ.20：用户子程序 "uadpval" 用于提取恢复所需数值解，"uadpnorm" 用于提供误差估计器。

english:
Flag that is either 0 or 1. If set to 1 then a d3plot state will be output
just before and after an adaptive step even though it may not be
requested. The reason for wanting to do this is to allow the LS-PrePost particle trace algorithm to work in the case of adaptivity.
zh: 取 0 或 1 的标志。若设为 1，即使未请求，也会在自适应步之前和之后各输出一个 d3plot 状态。这样做是为了在存在自适应的情况下，使 LS-PrePost 粒子轨迹算法能够工作。

english:
Flag to align the dynamics of plain strain and axisymmetric
beams in 2D FSI ALE models to their shell counterparts in 3D FSI ALE models:
EQ.0.0: Off (default)
EQ.1.0: On
zh:
在 2D FSI ALE 模型中，使平面应变和轴对称梁的动力学行为与 3D FSI ALE 模型中的壳单元对应行为一致的标志：
EQ.0.0：关闭（默认）。
EQ.1.0：开启。

english:
A flag for turning ON/OFF mass scaling for ALE parts.  The global mass scaling control (parameter DT2MS under *CONTROL_ TIMESTEP card) must be ON.  If the run dt is lower than the mass scaling dt, then IMASCL has the following effects:
EQ.0: (Default) No mass scaling for ALE parts.  Print out maximum 20 warnings.
EQ.1: No mass scaling for ALE parts.  Stop the run.
EQ.2: Do mass scaling for ALE parts (the result may not be correct due to this scaling)
zh:
用于开启/关闭 ALE 部件质量缩放的标志。全局质量缩放控制（*CONTROL_TIMESTEP 卡中的参数 DT2MS）必须开启。若运行时间步低于质量缩放时间步，IMASCL 的作用如下：
EQ.0：（默认）ALE 部件不进行质量缩放，最多打印 20 条警告。
EQ.1：ALE 部件不进行质量缩放，并停止计算。
EQ.2：对 ALE 部件进行质量缩放（由于该缩放，结果可能不正确）。

english:
Optimize the MPP communications in the penalty coupling
(*CONSTRAINED_LAGRANGE_IN_SOLID, CTYPE = 4) and
group ALE parts together for the element processing.
EQ.0: Off (default)
EQ.1: On.
zh:
优化罚函数耦合（*CONSTRAINED_LAGRANGE_IN_SOLID，CTYPE = 4）中的 MPP 通信，并将 ALE 部件分组以进行单元处理。
EQ.0：关闭（默认）。
EQ.1：开启。

english:
Maximum of pressure difference between neighboring ALE
elements under which the stresses are zeroed out:
EQ.0: Off (default)
GT.0: On
zh:
相邻 ALE 单元之间的最大压力差；当压力差低于该值时，将应力清零：
EQ.0：关闭（默认）。
GT.0：开启。

english:
Flag for assuming edge shape for shells when measuring penetration.
This is available for segment based contact (see SOFT on *CONTACT)
EQ.0: Shell edges are assumed round (default),
EQ.1: Shell edges are assumed square and are flush with the nodes.
zh:
测量穿透量时假定壳边形状的标志。该选项适用于基于段的接触（见 *CONTACT 中的 SOFT）。
EQ.0：壳边假定为圆形（默认）。
EQ.1：壳边假定为方形，并与节点齐平。

english:
Tied constraint offset contact update option.
EQ.0: Update velocities and displacements from accelerations
EQ.1: Update velocities and acclelerations from displacements. This
option is recommended only when there are large angle changes
where the default does not maintain a constant offset to a small
tolerance. This latter option is not as stable as the default and may
require additional damping for stability. See *CONTROL_BULK_VISCOSITY and *DAMPING_PART_STIFFNESS.
zh:
绑定约束偏置接触更新选项。
EQ.0：由加速度更新速度和位移。
EQ.1：由位移更新速度和加速度。仅建议在角度变化很大、默认方法无法以小容差保持恒定偏置时使用。后一选项不如默认选项稳定，可能需要附加阻尼以保证稳定性。参见 *CONTROL_BULK_VISCOSITY 和 *DAMPING_PART_STIFFNESS。

english:
EQ.0: disable checking and only output warning messages (Default)
EQ.1: enable error checking. If it detects any problem, the code
will error terminate the job, or try to fix the problem. Activated checks include:
1.  Airbag integrity (see Remark 2)
2.  Chamber integrity: this step applies the airbag in	tegrity check to the chamber.
3.  Inconsistent orientation between the shell reference geometry and FEM shell connectivity
zh:
EQ.0：禁用检查，仅输出警告信息（默认）。
EQ.1：启用错误检查。若检测到问题，程序将错误终止作业，或尝试修复问题。启用的检查包括：
1. 气囊完整性（见备注 2）。
2. 腔室完整性：该步骤将气囊完整性检查应用到腔室。
3. 壳参考几何与 FEM 壳连接关系之间的方向不一致。

english:
Control CPM output database to d3plot
EQ.11: full CPM database in version 3 format (default)
EQ.21: full CPM database in version 4 format
EQ.22: CPM coordinates only in version 4 format
EQ.23: CPM summary only in version 4 format
zh:
控制 CPM 输出数据库写入 d3plot。
EQ.11：版本 3 格式的完整 CPM 数据库（默认）。
EQ.21：版本 4 格式的完整 CPM 数据库。
EQ.22：版本 4 格式中仅输出 CPM 坐标。
EQ.23：版本 4 格式中仅输出 CPM 摘要。

english:
Time step size estimation:
EQ.0: not consider CPM (default)
EQ.1: use 1 micro-second as CPM time step size. This provides a better time step size if the model is made by rigid body
zh:
时间步长估计：
EQ.0：不考虑 CPM（默认）。
EQ.1：使用 1 微秒作为 CPM 时间步长。如果模型由刚体组成，该选项可提供更合适的时间步长。

english:
center of rectangle.
EQ.0 0,0,0 of global coordinate system or 0.0.0 of local coordinate system if cid is defined
EQ.1  center via absolute coordinates define xcent, ycent and zcent
zh:
矩形中心。
EQ.0：全局坐标系的 0,0,0；若定义了 cid，则为局部坐标系的 0,0,0。
EQ.1：通过绝对坐标 xcent、ycent 和 zcent 定义中心。

english:
EQ.1: Rectangle shape.
Find the smallest possible untrimmed rectangle depending on the requested element length and edge size in z and y, create quad elements with the same edge length and afterwards trim the elements at the requested edge size in z and y (like *ELEMENT_BALNKING). In order to make sure that the last row of elements does not have a smaller element lenght (bad time step size) after trimming than the requested eleng the last two wlement rows will be optimized and then the element size can be even larger;
.EQ.2: import blank outline as IGES-Curve.
Import an iges file of the desired blank shape as a curve. Find the smallest possible untrimmed rectangle depending on the requested element lenght and the blank outline, create quad elements with the same edge elength and afterwards trim the elements at the blank outline ( like *ELEMENT_BLANKING). In order to make sure that the last row of elements geoes not have a smaller wlement lenght (bad time step size) after trimming than the requested eleng the last two wlement rows will be optimized and then the element size can be even larger
zh:
EQ.1：矩形形状。根据请求的单元长度以及 z、y 方向边界尺寸寻找尽可能小的未裁剪矩形，创建具有相同边长的四边形单元，然后按 z、y 方向请求的边界尺寸裁剪单元（类似 *ELEMENT_BLANKING）。为确保裁剪后最后一排单元不会小于请求的单元长度（避免不良时间步），会优化最后两排单元，因此单元尺寸可能变得更大。
EQ.2：将坯料轮廓作为 IGES 曲线导入。以曲线形式导入所需坯料形状的 iges 文件。根据请求的单元长度和坯料轮廓寻找尽可能小的未裁剪矩形，创建具有相同边长的四边形单元，然后按坯料轮廓裁剪单元（类似 *ELEMENT_BLANKING）。为确保裁剪后最后一排单元不会小于请求的单元长度（避免不良时间步），会优化最后两排单元，因此单元尺寸可能变得更大。

english:
principale plane in which flat blank will be generated if blank outline as iges curve are not flat then projection to principal plane.
