1: xy-plane of local or global coord system
2: xz-plane of local or global coord system
3: zy-plane of local or global coord system
zh:
生成平面坯料时所在的主平面；如果作为 IGES 曲线的坯料轮廓并不平坦，则投影到该主平面。
1：局部或全局坐标系的 xy 平面。
2：局部或全局坐标系的 xz 平面。
3：局部或全局坐标系的 zy 平面。

english:
Specify whether the blank will move along its normal direction. If its moves along the normal of blank, then this flag also specifies the direction the normal is pointing with respect to the tool.
EQ.0: Move the blank’s nodes along the blank’s normal.The normal to the surface of the blank is pointing towards the tool.
EQ.1 : Move the blank’s nodes along the blank’s normal.The normal to the surface of the blank is pointing away from the tool.
EQ.2 : Move the blank nodes along the tool's normal direction.This case is useful for contact between a guide pinand blank.
zh:
指定坯料是否沿其法向移动。如果沿坯料法向移动，该标志还指定该法向相对于工具的指向。
EQ.0：沿坯料法向移动坯料节点；坯料表面法向指向工具。
EQ.1：沿坯料法向移动坯料节点；坯料表面法向背离工具。
EQ.2：沿工具法向方向移动坯料节点。该情况适用于导向销与坯料之间的接触。

english:
A flag to indicate the location of the scrap piece.
EQ.0:	automatically determined.  The trim steel defined will be responsible to trim as well as to push (have contact with) the scrap piece.
EQ.1:	automatically determined, however, the trim steel in definition will only be used to trim out the scrap, not to push (have contact with) the scrap piece.
EQ.-1:	user specified by defining SEEDX, SEEDY, and SEEDZ.
zh:
指示废料片位置的标志。
EQ.0：自动确定。定义的修边钢既负责修边，也负责推动（与）废料片接触。
EQ.1：自动确定，但定义中的修边钢仅用于切出废料，不用于推动（接触）废料片。
EQ.-1：由用户通过定义 SEEDX、SEEDY 和 SEEDZ 指定。

english:
Load curve ID governing the trim steel kinematics, as defined by *DEFINE_CURVE.
GT.0:	velocity-controlled kinematics
LT.0:	displacement-controlled kinematics
An example input deck is provided below.
zh:
控制修边钢运动学的载荷曲线 ID，按 *DEFINE_CURVE 定义。
GT.0：速度控制运动学。
LT.0：位移控制运动学。
下方提供了一个输入文件示例。

english:
Type of forming process (Detailed descriptions can be found in the Remark section)
EQ. 1: 3-piece air-draw
EQ. 2: 3-piece Toggle-draw
EQ. 3: 4-piece draw
EQ. 4: Springback
EQ. 5: Trimming
zh:
成形工艺类型（详细说明见备注部分）。
EQ.1：三件式空气拉深。
EQ.2：三件式 toggle 拉深。
EQ.3：四件式拉深。
EQ.4：回弹。
EQ.5：修边。

english:
Strain tensors.4
EQ.1: included in tipping/translation.
zh:
应变张量。
EQ.1：包含在翻转/平移中。

english:
Type of PID (see remark 1):
EQ.0:  part set ID (PSID).
EQ.1:  part ID (PID)
zh:
PID 类型（见备注 1）：
EQ.0：部件集 ID（PSID）。
EQ.1：部件 ID（PID）。

english:
Unfolding algorithm selection flag:
EQ.0: nonlinear unfolding.
EQ.1: linear unfolding.
EQ.2: a new method of initial unfolding followed by nonlinear iterations (recommended).
zh:
展开算法选择标志：
EQ.0：非线性展开。
EQ.1：线性展开。
EQ.2：先采用新的初始展开方法，再进行非线性迭代（推荐）。

english:
Restart option:
EQ.0: Initial run.
EQ.1: Restart using d3eigv family files created in last run.
EQ.2: Adding extra modes into last FRF results.
zh:
重启动选项：
EQ.0：初始运行。
EQ.1：使用上一次运行中创建的 d3eigv 系列文件重启动。
EQ.2：向上一次 FRF 结果中添加额外模态。

english:
Consistent mass matrix flag
EQ.0: Use the standard lumped mass formulation (DEFAULT)
EQ.1: Use the consistent mass matrix
zh:
一致质量矩阵标志。
EQ.0：使用标准集中质量格式（默认）。
EQ.1：使用一致质量矩阵。

english:
Vector ID for the axis of rotation
EQ.0 Axis of rotation if the global z-axis(default)
zh:
旋转轴的向量 ID。
EQ.0：旋转轴为全局 z 轴（默认）。

english:
Format for processing eigenmodes:
If NEIG = 0
if IRESVEC > 0:
read from Eigen_Vectors when NEIG = 0:
LT.0:	file is in binary format.
GT.0:	file is in ASCII format.
Note that if IRSEVEC > 0 and NEIG = 0, IFORMAT = 0 is not allowed.
If NEIG > 0:
EQ.0:	do not dump the computed eigenmodes.
LT.0:	dump the computed eigenmodes in binary format.
GT.0:	dump the computed eignemodes in ASCII format.
zh:
处理特征模态的格式：
若 NEIG = 0 且 IRESVEC > 0，则从 Eigen_Vectors 读取：
LT.0：文件为二进制格式。
GT.0：文件为 ASCII 格式。
注意，若 IRESVEC > 0 且 NEIG = 0，则不允许 IFORMAT = 0。
若 NEIG > 0：
EQ.0：不转储计算得到的特征模态。
LT.0：以二进制格式转储计算得到的特征模态。
GT.0：以 ASCII 格式转储计算得到的特征模态。

english:
Residual vector control flag:
EQ.0:	do not compute residual vectors.
GT.0:	compute residual vectors.
zh:
残余向量控制标志：
EQ.0：不计算残余向量。
GT.0：计算残余向量。

english:
Number of eigenmodes to compute for the purpose of orthogonalizing the computed load:
EQ.0:	read the eigenmodes from the file Eigen_‌Vectors which is the file used to for dumping eignevectors; see EVDUMP on *CONTROL_‌IMPLICIT_‌EIGENVALUE.
GT.0:	compute NEIG eigenmodes.
zh:
为正交化已计算载荷而计算的特征模态数量：
EQ.0：从 Eigen_Vectors 文件读取特征模态；该文件用于转储特征向量，见 *CONTROL_IMPLICIT_EIGENVALUE 中的 EVDUMP。
GT.0：计算 NEIG 个特征模态。

english:
The sum of these available options (in any combination that makes sense):
1: Turn on GROUPABLE for all non-tied contacts
2: Turn on GROUPABLE for all tied contacts
4: Turn off GROUPABLE for all non-tied contacts
8: Turn off GROUPABLE for all tied contacts.
zh:
这些可用选项的求和（可按有意义的任意组合使用）：
1：对所有非绑定接触开启 GROUPABLE。
2：对所有绑定接触开启 GROUPABLE。
4：对所有非绑定接触关闭 GROUPABLE。
8：对所有绑定接触关闭 GROUPABLE。

english:
EQ. 0: Part ID to be distributed to all processors
1: Part Set ID to be distributed to all processors
10: Part ID to be lumped into one processor
11: Part Set ID to be lumped into one processor.
EQ.20: Part ID to be lumped into one processor with MPP load balanced
EQ.21: Part Set ID to be lumped into one processor with MPP load balanced
zh:
EQ.0：分配到所有处理器的部件 ID。
1：分配到所有处理器的部件集 ID。
10：集中到一个处理器的部件 ID。
11：集中到一个处理器的部件集 ID。
EQ.20：带 MPP 负载均衡并集中到一个处理器的部件 ID。
EQ.21：带 MPP 负载均衡并集中到一个处理器的部件集 ID。

english:
Hardware specific cost profile.
1: Fujitsu PrimePower
2: Intel IA 64, AMD Opteron
3: Intel Xeon 64
4: General profile
zh:
硬件相关的成本剖面。
1：Fujitsu PrimePower。
2：Intel IA 64、AMD Opteron。
3：Intel Xeon 64。
4：通用剖面。

english:
1: database in ls-prepost format to file decomp_parts.lsprepost.
2: database in animator format to file decomp_parts.ses
EQ.3:	database in LS-PrePost format with d3plot state number.
This allows lsprepost to show the matching d3plot with the decomposition for
*CONTROL_MPP_DECOMPOSITION_REDECOMPOSITION decomp_parts.lsprepost_s######
zh:
1：以 LS-PrePost 格式将数据库写入文件 decomp_parts.lsprepost。
2：以 animator 格式将数据库写入文件 decomp_parts.ses。
EQ.3：以带 d3plot 状态编号的 LS-PrePost 格式写出数据库。这样 lsprepost 可显示与 *CONTROL_MPP_DECOMPOSITION_REDECOMPOSITION 的分解相匹配的 d3plot：decomp_parts.lsprepost_s######。

english:
Output DEM density data to d3plot database..
EQ.0: (default) no output.
EQ.1: output data.
zh:
将 DEM 密度数据输出到 d3plot 数据库。
EQ.0：（默认）不输出。
EQ.1：输出数据。

english:
Flag to output contact sliding energy densities to d3plot for Mortar contact.
If set to 1, a nodal scalar field is output giving the minimum sliding energy density for each node in any sliding interface.
See also NENG on *DATABASE_EXTENT_INTFOR
zh: Mortar 接触中，将接触滑移能量密度输出到 d3plot 的标志。若设为 1，将输出一个节点标量场，给出任意滑移界面中每个节点的最小滑移能量密度。另见 *DATABASE_EXTENT_INTFOR 中的 NENG。

english:
Flag to invoke output of *SET_BEAM data:
EQ.0:	no output (default)
EQ.1:	information written to file. See Remark 1.
zh:
调用 *SET_BEAM 数据输出的标志：
EQ.0：不输出（默认）。
EQ.1：信息写入文件。见备注 1。

english:
Flag to invoke output of *SET_NODE data:
EQ.0:	no output (default)
EQ.1:	information written to file. See Remark 1.
zh:
调用 *SET_NODE 数据输出的标志：
EQ.0：不输出（默认）。
EQ.1：信息写入文件。见备注 1。

english:
Flag to invoke output of *SET_SOLID data:
EQ.0:	no output (default).
EQ.1:	information written to file. See Remark 1.
zh:
调用 *SET_SOLID 数据输出的标志：
EQ.0：不输出（默认）。
EQ.1：信息写入文件。见备注 1。

english:
Flag to invoke output of *SET_SHELL data:
EQ.0:	no output (default)
EQ.1:	information written to file. See Remark 1.
zh:
调用 *SET_SHELL 数据输出的标志：
EQ.0：不输出（默认）。
EQ.1：信息写入文件。见备注 1。

english:
Flag to output contact penetration to sleout (binout format only) and d3plot for Mortar contact.
In sleout the maximum absolute and/or relative penetration per interface is output, in magnutide only.
In d3plot a nodal vector field is output for absolute and/or relative penetration, respectively,
each giving the maximum penetration (magnitude and direction) for all nodes in any sliding interface.
See also NPEN on *DATABASE_EXTENT_INTFOR.
EQ.0:	Do not output.
GE.1 : Output absolute penetration.
GE.2 : Output relative penetration.
zh:
Mortar 接触中，将接触穿透输出到 sleout（仅 binout 格式）和 d3plot 的标志。在 sleout 中，按界面输出最大绝对和/或相对穿透量，仅输出幅值。在 d3plot 中，分别为绝对和/或相对穿透输出节点向量场，给出任意滑移界面中所有节点的最大穿透（幅值和方向）。另见 *DATABASE_EXTENT_INTFOR 中的 NPEN。
EQ.0：不输出。
GE.1：输出绝对穿透。
GE.2：输出相对穿透。

english:
Message to messag file when materials 216, 217, and 218 change phase..
EQ.0: (default) no message.
EQ.1: The time and element ID are written..
zh:
当材料 216、217 和 218 发生相变时，向 messag 文件写入消息。
EQ.0：（默认）不写消息。
EQ.1：写入时间和单元 ID。

english:
converts all constraints on MAT_RIGID (see CMO, CON1, CON2)
to corresponding BOUNDARY_PRESCRIBED_MOTION_RIGID with a zero curve,
which allows the reaction force associated with this constraint to be monitored in bndout
zh: 将 MAT_RIGID 上的所有约束（见 CMO、CON1、CON2）转换为对应的 BOUNDARY_PRESCRIBED_MOTION_RIGID，并使用零曲线，从而允许在 bndout 中监测与该约束相关的反力。

english:
Flag to turn off the printing of pore air analysis status message,
including the analysis time, the node with the highest pressure change.
EQ. 0 Status messages are printed, the default value.
EQ. 1 Status messages are not printed
zh:
关闭孔隙空气分析状态消息打印的标志，状态消息包括分析时间和压力变化最大的节点。
EQ.0：打印状态消息，默认值。
EQ.1：不打印状态消息。

english:
Refinement criterion (a negative CRITRF reverses the conditions below):
EQ.0: static refinement (as if only the 1st card is defined),
EQ.1: Pressure (if pressure > VALRF),
EQ.2: Relative Volume (if V/Vo < VALRF) ,
EQ.3: Volume Fraction (if Volume fraction > VALRF),
EQ.5: User defined criterion. The fortran routine alerfn_criteria5 in the
file dynrfn_user.f should be used to develop the criterion. The file is
part of the general package usermat.
zh:
细化准则（负的 CRITRF 会反转以下条件）：
EQ.0：静态细化（如同只定义第 1 张卡）。
EQ.1：压力（若 pressure > VALRF）。
EQ.2：相对体积（若 V/Vo < VALRF）。
EQ.3：体积分数（若体积分数 > VALRF）。
EQ.5：用户定义准则。应使用文件 dynrfn_user.f 中的 Fortran 例程 alerfn_criteria5 开发该准则。该文件是通用包 usermat 的一部分。

english:
Maximum number of child clusters to remove (see Remark 9):
LT.0: for the whole run,
GT.0: every NCYCRM cycles.
zh:
可移除的子簇最大数量（见备注 9）：
LT.0：针对整个运行。
GT.0：每 NCYCRM 个循环。

english:
Set type:
EQ.0: ALE Part Set,
EQ.1: ALE Part,
EQ.2: Lagrangian Part Set coupled to ALE (see Remarks 1 and 2),
EQ.3: Lagrangian Part coupled to ALE (see Remarks 1 and 2),
EQ.4: Lagrangian Shell Set coupled to ALE (see Remarks 1 and 2),
EQ.5: ALE Solid Set.
zh:
集合类型：
EQ.0：ALE 部件集。
EQ.1：ALE 部件。
EQ.2：与 ALE 耦合的拉格朗日部件集（见备注 1 和 2）。
EQ.3：与 ALE 耦合的拉格朗日部件（见备注 1 和 2）。
EQ.4：与 ALE 耦合的拉格朗日壳集（见备注 1 和 2）。
EQ.5：ALE 实体集。

english:
Refinement criterion(a negative CRITRF reverses the conditions below):
EQ.0: static refinement (as if only the 1st card is defined),
EQ.1: Pressure (if pressure > VALRF),
EQ.2: Relative Volume (if V/Vo < VALRF) ,
EQ.3: Volume Fraction (if Volume fraction > VALRF),
EQ.5: User defined criterion. The fortran routine al2rfn_criteria5 in the
file dynrfn_user.f should be used to develop the criterion. The file is
part of the general package usermat.
zh:
细化准则（负的 CRITRF 会反转以下条件）：
EQ.0：静态细化（如同只定义第 1 张卡）。
EQ.1：压力（若 pressure > VALRF）。
EQ.2：相对体积（若 V/Vo < VALRF）。
EQ.3：体积分数（若体积分数 > VALRF）。
EQ.5：用户定义准则。应使用文件 dynrfn_user.f 中的 Fortran 例程 al2rfn_criteria5 开发该准则。该文件是通用包 usermat 的一部分。

english:
Maximum number of child clusters to remove (see Remark 5):
LT.0: for the whole run,
GT.0: every NCYCRM cycles.
zh:
可移除的子簇最大数量（见备注 5）：
LT.0：针对整个运行。
GT.0：每 NCYCRM 个循环。

english:
Total number of ALE elements to refine (see Remark 5):
GT.0: The number is given by |NTOTRF| * 4 ** (NLVL-1) (see Remark 2)
EQ.0: NTOTRF = number of shell elements / 100.
zh:
要细化的 ALE 单元总数（见备注 5）：
GT.0：该数量为 |NTOTRF| * 4 ** (NLVL-1)（见备注 2）。
EQ.0：NTOTRF = 壳单元数量 / 100。

english:
Set type:
EQ.0: ALE Part Set,
EQ.1: ALE Part,
EQ.2: Lagrangian Part Set coupled to ALE (see Remarks 1 and 2),
EQ.3: Lagrangian Part coupled to ALE (see Remarks 1 and 2),
EQ.4: Lagrangian Shell Set coupled to ALE (see Remarks 1 and 2),
EQ.5: ALE shell Set.
zh:
集合类型：
EQ.0：ALE 部件集。
EQ.1：ALE 部件。
EQ.2：与 ALE 耦合的拉格朗日部件集（见备注 1 和 2）。
EQ.3：与 ALE 耦合的拉格朗日部件（见备注 1 和 2）。
EQ.4：与 ALE 耦合的拉格朗日壳集（见备注 1 和 2）。
EQ.5：ALE 壳集。

english:
Refinement criterion(a negative CRITRF reverses the conditions below):
EQ.0: static refinement (as if only the 1st card is defined),
EQ.1: Pressure (if pressure > VALRF),
EQ.2: undefined,
EQ.3: Von Mises criterion
EQ.4: Criterion similar to adpopt=4 in *CONTROL_ADAPTIVE	(VALRF=adptol),
EQ.5: User defined criterion. The fortran routine al2rfn_criteria5 in the
file dynrfn_user.f should be used to develop the criterion. The file is
part of the general package usermat.
zh:
细化准则（负的 CRITRF 会反转以下条件）：
EQ.0：静态细化（如同只定义第 1 张卡）。
EQ.1：压力（若 pressure > VALRF）。
EQ.2：未定义。
EQ.3：von Mises 准则。
EQ.4：类似 *CONTROL_ADAPTIVE 中 adpopt=4 的准则（VALRF = adptol）。
EQ.5：用户定义准则。应使用文件 dynrfn_user.f 中的 Fortran 例程 al2rfn_criteria5 开发该准则。该文件是通用包 usermat 的一部分。

english:
Deletion criterion(a negative CRITRM reverses the conditions below):
EQ.0: no deletion (as if only the 1st and 2nd card are defined),
EQ.1: Pressure (if pressure < VALRM),
EQ.2: undefined
EQ.3:Von Mises criterion
EQ.4: Criterion similar to adpopt=4 in *CONTROL_ADAPTIVE(VALRF=adptol),
EQ.5: User defined criterion. The fortran routine alermv_criteria5 in
the file dynrfn_user.f should be used to develop the criterion. The file is
part of the general package usermat.
zh:
删除准则（负的 CRITRM 会反转以下条件）：
EQ.0：不删除（如同只定义第 1 和第 2 张卡）。
EQ.1：压力（若 pressure < VALRM）。
EQ.2：未定义。
EQ.3：von Mises 准则。
EQ.4：类似 *CONTROL_ADAPTIVE 中 adpopt=4 的准则（VALRF = adptol）。
EQ.5：用户定义准则。应使用文件 dynrfn_user.f 中的 Fortran 例程 alermv_criteria5 开发该准则。该文件是通用包 usermat 的一部分。

english:
Total number of elements to refine (see Remark 2):
GT.0: The number is given by |NTOTRF| * 4 ** (NLVL-1)
EQ.0: NTOTRF = number of shell elements / 100.
zh:
要细化的单元总数（见备注 2）：
GT.0：该数量为 |NTOTRF| * 4 ** (NLVL-1)。
EQ.0：NTOTRF = 壳单元数量 / 100。

english:
Set type:
EQ.0: Part Set,
EQ.1: Part,
EQ.2: Shell Set.
zh:
集合类型：
EQ.0：部件集。
EQ.1：部件。
EQ.2：壳集。

english:
Refinement criterion(a negative CRITRF reverses the conditions below):
EQ.0: static refinement (as if only the 1st card is defined),
EQ.1: Pressure (if pressure > VALRF),
EQ.2: undefined,
EQ.3: Von Mises criterion
EQ.5: User defined criterion. The fortran routine al2rfn_criteria5 in the
file dynrfn_user.f should be used to develop the criterion. The file is
part of the general package usermat.
zh:
细化准则（负的 CRITRF 会反转以下条件）：
EQ.0：静态细化（如同只定义第 1 张卡）。
EQ.1：压力（若 pressure > VALRF）。
EQ.2：未定义。
EQ.3：von Mises 准则。
EQ.5：用户定义准则。应使用文件 dynrfn_user.f 中的 Fortran 例程 al2rfn_criteria5 开发该准则。该文件是通用包 usermat 的一部分。

english:
Criterion for removal of refinement(a negative CRITRM reverses the conditions below):
EQ.0: no deletion (as if only the 1st and 2nd card are defined),
EQ.1: Pressure (if pressure < VALRM),
EQ.2: undefined
EQ.3:Von Mises criterion
EQ.5: User defined criterion. The fortran routine alermv_criteria5 in
the file dynrfn_user.f should be used to develop the criterion. The file is
part of the general package usermat.
zh:
移除细化的准则（负的 CRITRM 会反转以下条件）：
EQ.0：不删除（如同只定义第 1 和第 2 张卡）。
EQ.1：压力（若 pressure < VALRM）。
EQ.2：未定义。
EQ.3：von Mises 准则。
EQ.5：用户定义准则。应使用文件 dynrfn_user.f 中的 Fortran 例程 alermv_criteria5 开发该准则。该文件是通用包 usermat 的一部分。

english:
Total number of elements to refine.  See Remark 2.
GT.0:	number of elements to refine
EQ.0:	NTOTRF = number of solid elements in IBOX
EQ.-1:	add clusters of 8 solids for the refinement during the run.
zh:
要细化的单元总数。见备注 2。
GT.0：要细化的单元数量。
EQ.0：NTOTRF = IBOX 中的实体单元数量。
EQ.-1：在运行过程中添加由 8 个实体组成的簇以进行细化。

english:
Set type:
EQ.0: Part Set,
EQ.1: Part,
EQ.2: Solid Set.
zh:
集合类型：
EQ.0：部件集。
EQ.1：部件。
EQ.2：实体集。

english:
Drilling rotation constraint method. Options to choose how drilling kinematics are determined.
EQ.0:	Generalized drilling strain rate at shell element nodes involving drill rotation at the specific node plus
the translational velocities of two adjacent nodes.See more details in Erhart and Borrvall[2013].
EQ.1 : Direct use of the spin tensor(e.g.see section 21 in the LS - DYNA Theory Manual) with respect to the shell
element normal direction, numerically integrated at element level.A similar approach is described in Kanok - Nukulchai[1979].
zh:
钻转动约束方法。用于选择钻转运动学的确定方式。
EQ.0：壳单元节点处的广义钻应变率，包含特定节点的钻转动以及两个相邻节点的平动速度。更多细节见 Erhart 和 Borrvall [2013]。
EQ.1：直接使用相对于壳单元法向的自旋张量（例如见 LS-DYNA 理论手册第 21 节），并在单元层面进行数值积分。Kanok-Nukulchai [1979] 描述了类似方法。

english:
Flag for behavior in case of unwanted interpolation/extrapolation of
initial stresses from *INITIAL_STRESS_SHELL.
EQ.0: Only warning is written, calculation continues (default).
EQ.1: Error exit, calculation stops.
zh:
当从 *INITIAL_STRESS_SHELL 对初始应力进行不期望的插值/外推时的行为标志。
EQ.0：仅写出警告，计算继续（默认）。
EQ.1：错误退出，计算停止。

english:
Flag to keep the contact segments of failed shell elements in the
calculation. The contact segments of the failed shells remain active
until a node shared by the segments has no active shells attached. Only
then are the segments deleted..
EQ.0: Inactive
EQ.1: Active.
zh:
在计算中保留失效壳单元接触段的标志。失效壳的接触段保持激活，直到与这些段共享的某个节点不再连接任何激活壳单元，之后才删除这些段。
EQ.0：不激活。
EQ.1：激活。

english:
Flag to check for highly distorted under-integrated shell elements, print a
message, and delete the element or terminate. Generally, this flag is not
needed for one point elements that do not use the warping stiffness. A
distorted element is one where a negative Jacobian exist within the
domain of the shell, not just at integration points. The checks are made
away from the CPU requirements for one point elements. If nonzero,
NFAIL1 can be changed in a restart.
EQ.1: print message and delete element.
EQ.2: print message, write D3DUMP file, and terminate
GT.2: print message and delete element. When NFAIL1 elements
are deleted then write D3DUMP file and terminate. These NFAIL1
failed elements also include all shell elements that failed for other
reasons than distortion. Before the D3DUMP file is written, NFAIL1
is doubled, so the run can immediately be continued if desired.
zh:
检查高度畸变的欠积分壳单元、打印消息并删除单元或终止计算的标志。一般而言，对于不使用翘曲刚度的单点单元不需要该标志。畸变单元是指在壳域内存在负雅可比的单元，而不仅是在积分点处存在。检查在远离积分点的位置进行。若非零，NFAIL1 可在重启动中更改。
EQ.1：打印消息并删除单元。
EQ.2：打印消息，写入 D3DUMP 文件并终止。
GT.2：打印消息并删除单元。当删除 NFAIL1 个单元后，写入 D3DUMP 文件并终止。这些 NFAIL1 失效单元也包括所有因畸变以外原因失效的壳单元。在写入 D3DUMP 文件之前，NFAIL1 会加倍，因此若需要可立即继续运行。

english:
Flag to check for highly distorted fully-integrated shell elements, print a
message and delete the element or terminate. Generally, this flag is
recommended. A distorted element is one where a negative Jacobian
exist within the domain of the shell, not just at integration points. The
checks are made away from the integration points to enable the bad
elements to be deleted before an instability leading to an error
termination occurs. If nonzero, NFAIL1 can be changed in a restart.
EQ.1: print message and delete element.
EQ.2: print message, write D3DUMP file, and terminate
GT.2: print message and delete element. When NFAIL4 elements
are deleted then write D3DUMP file and terminate. These NFAIL4
failed elements also include all shell elements that failed for other
reasons than distortion. Before the D3DUMP file is written,
NFAIL4 is doubled, so the run can immediately be continued if
desired.
zh:
检查高度畸变的全积分壳单元、打印消息并删除单元或终止计算的标志。通常建议使用该标志。畸变单元是指在壳域内存在负雅可比的单元，而不仅是在积分点处存在。检查在远离积分点的位置进行，以便在导致错误终止的不稳定性发生前删除不良单元。若非零，NFAIL1 可在重启动中更改。
EQ.1：打印消息并删除单元。
EQ.2：打印消息，写入 D3DUMP 文件并终止。
GT.2：打印消息并删除单元。当删除 NFAIL4 个单元后，写入 D3DUMP 文件并终止。这些 NFAIL4 失效单元也包括所有因畸变以外原因失效的壳单元。在写入 D3DUMP 文件之前，NFAIL4 会加倍，因此若需要可立即继续运行。

english:
Avoid copying of material history variables to temporary buffers for constitutive evaluations.
EQ.0:	Not active
EQ.1:	Active
zh:
避免将材料历史变量复制到用于本构计算的临时缓冲区。
EQ.0：不激活。
EQ.1：激活。

english:
Flag to control output of dynain file at the end of every stage
EQ.0:	write dynain file
EQ.1:	do not write dynain file .
zh:
控制每个阶段结束时 dynain 文件输出的标志。
EQ.0：写出 dynain 文件。
EQ.1：不写出 dynain 文件。

english:
Treatment of “Real Time” on *DEFINE_‌CONSTRUCTION_‌STAGES (see Remark 9):
EQ.0:	Real Time is ignored.
EQ.1:	Time in output files (d3plot, d3thdt, binout…) is converted to Real Time
zh:
*DEFINE_CONSTRUCTION_STAGES 上 “Real Time” 的处理方式（见备注 9）：
EQ.0：忽略 Real Time。
EQ.1：输出文件（d3plot、d3thdt、binout 等）中的时间转换为 Real Time。

english:
Contact algorithm type.
EQ.0: two way contact; both surfaces change temperature due to contact.
EQ.1: one way contact; master surface does not change
temperature due to contact. Slave surface does change temperature
zh:
接触算法类型。
EQ.0：双向接触；两个表面都会因接触而改变温度。
EQ.1：单向接触；主面不会因接触而改变温度，从面会改变温度。

english:
Thermal boundary condition flag:
EQ.0: thermal boundary conditions are on when parts are in contact.t
EQ.1: thermal boundary conditions are off when parts are in contact.
zh:
热边界条件标志：
EQ.0：部件接触时热边界条件开启。
EQ.1：部件接触时热边界条件关闭。

english:
Formula that defines the contact heat conductance as a function of
temperature and pressure. See the manual
This is equivalent to defining the keyword *USER_INTERFACE_CONDUCTIVITY. The user subroutine usrhcon will be called for this contact interface to define the contact heat transfer coefficient
zh: 定义接触热导纳随温度和压力变化的公式。参见手册。该设置等效于定义关键字 *USER_INTERFACE_CONDUCTIVITY。对于该接触界面，将调用用户子程序 usrhcon 来定义接触换热系数。

english:
Fraction, .. , of sliding friction energy partitioned to the slave
surface. Energy partitioned to the master surface is (1 . .. ).EQ.0: Default set to 0.5: The sliding friction energy is
partitioned 50% - 50% to the slave and master surfaces in contact.
zh:
分配到从面的滑动摩擦能量比例。分配到主面的能量为 1 减去该比例。
EQ.0：默认设为 0.5；滑动摩擦能量在接触的从面和主面之间按 50% - 50% 分配。

english:
Heat transfer conductance for closed gaps. Use this heat transfer
conductance for gaps in the range.
zh: 闭合间隙的换热导纳。对处于指定范围内的间隙使用该换热导纳。

english:
Flag for offsetting thermal contact surfaces for thick thermal shells:
EQ.0: no offset; if thickness is not included in the contact, the
heat will be transferred between the mid-surfaces of the
corresponding contact segments (shells).
EQ.1: offsets are applied so that contact heat transfer is always
between the outer surfaces of the contact segments (shells).
zh:
厚热壳热接触表面偏置标志：
EQ.0：不偏置；如果接触中未包含厚度，则热量将在相应接触段（壳）的中面之间传递。
EQ.1：应用偏置，使接触热传递始终发生在接触段（壳）的外表面之间。

english:
Load curve number for dynamic coefficient of friction as a
function of temperature. The load curve value multiplies the coefficient value FD.
zh: 动摩擦系数随温度变化的载荷曲线编号。载荷曲线值乘以系数 FD。

english:
Load curve number for static coefficient of friction as a function of
temperature. The load curve value multiplies the coefficient value FS
zh: 静摩擦系数随温度变化的载荷曲线编号。载荷曲线值乘以系数 FS。

english:
Load curve ID for h. This parameter can refer to a curve ID (see
*DEFINE_CURVE) or a function ID (see *DEFINE_FUNCTION).
When LCH is a curve ID (and a function ID) it is interpreted as follows:
GT.0: the heat transfer coefficient is defined as a function of
time, 𝑡, by a curve consisting of (𝑡, ℎ(𝑡)) data pairs.
LT.0: the heat transfer coefficient is defined as a function of
temperature, 𝑇, by a curve consisting of (𝑇, ℎ(𝑇)) data pairs
zh:
h 的载荷曲线 ID。该参数可引用曲线 ID（见 *DEFINE_CURVE）或函数 ID（见 *DEFINE_FUNCTION）。
当 LCH 为曲线 ID（以及函数 ID）时，解释如下：
GT.0：换热系数由一条由 (t, h(t)) 数据对组成的曲线定义为时间 t 的函数。
LT.0：换热系数由一条由 (T, h(T)) 数据对组成的曲线定义为温度 T 的函数。

english:
Minimum gap, 𝑙min; use the heat transfer conductance defined
(H0) for gap thicknesses less than this value.
LT.0.0: -LMIN is a load curve ID defining 𝑙min as a function of time.
zh:
最小间隙 lmin；当间隙厚度小于该值时，使用定义的换热导纳 H0。
LT.0.0：-LMIN 是一个载荷曲线 ID，用于定义 lmin 随时间的变化。

english:
Thermal problem type (see Remark 1 for determining the type of problem):
EQ.0: linear problem
EQ.1: nonlinear problem with material properties evaluated at
the temperature of the gauss point
EQ.2: nonlinear problem with material properties evaluated at
the average temperature of the element.
zh:
热问题类型（问题类型的确定见备注 1）：
EQ.0：线性问题。
EQ.1：非线性问题，材料属性在 Gauss 点温度处求值。
EQ.2：非线性问题，材料属性在单元平均温度处求值。

english:
Thermal analysis solver type (see *CONTROL_THERMAL_SOLVER).
For SMP only:
EQ.1: using solver 11 (enter -1 to use the old ACTCOL solver)
EQ.2: nonsymmetric direct solver
EQ.3: diagonal scaled conjugate gradient iterative (default)
EQ.4: incomplete choleski conjugate gradient iterativeEQ.5: nonsymmetric diagonal scaled bi-conjugate gradient
For SMP or MPP:
EQ.11: direct solver
EQ.12: diagonal scaling (default for MPP) conjugate gradient iterative
EQ.13: symmetric Gauss-Siedel conjugate gradient iterative
EQ.14: SSOR conjugate gradient iterative
EQ.15: ILDLT0 (incomplete factorization) conjugate gradient iterative
EQ.16: modified ILDLT0 (incomplete factorization) conjugate gradient iterative
For Conjugate Heat transfer problems in SMP or MPP:
EQ.17: GMRES solver.
zh:
热分析求解器类型（见 *CONTROL_THERMAL_SOLVER）。
仅 SMP：
EQ.1：使用求解器 11（输入 -1 可使用旧 ACTCOL 求解器）。
EQ.2：非对称直接求解器。
EQ.3：对角缩放共轭梯度迭代（默认）。
EQ.4：不完全 Cholesky 共轭梯度迭代。
EQ.5：非对称对角缩放双共轭梯度。
SMP 或 MPP：
EQ.11：直接求解器。
EQ.12：对角缩放共轭梯度迭代（MPP 默认）。
EQ.13：对称 Gauss-Seidel 共轭梯度迭代。
EQ.14：SSOR 共轭梯度迭代。
EQ.15：ILDLT0（不完全分解）共轭梯度迭代。
EQ.16：修正 ILDLT0（不完全分解）共轭梯度迭代。
对于 SMP 或 MPP 中的共轭传热问题：
EQ.17：GMRES 求解器。

english:
Thermal shell option:
EQ.0: no temperature gradient is considered through the shell
thickness.
EQ.1: a temperature gradient is calculated through the shell	thickness.
zh:
热壳选项：
EQ.0：不考虑沿壳厚度方向的温度梯度。
EQ.1：计算沿壳厚度方向的温度梯度。

english:
Thermal Speedup Factor. This factor multiplies all thermal
parameters with units of time in the denominator (such as
thermal conductivity and convection heat transfer coefficients). It
is used to artificially scale the problem in time. For example, if
the velocity of the stamping punch is artificially increased by
1000, then set TSF = 1000 to scale the thermal parameters.
zh: 热加速因子。该因子乘到所有以时间为分母单位的热参数上（例如热导率和对流换热系数）。用于在时间上人为缩放问题。例如，如果冲压冲头速度人为提高 1000 倍，则设置 TSF = 1000 来缩放热参数。

english:
Absolute convergence tolerance.  For SOLVER >11.
EQ.0.0:use default value 1.e-10.
zh:
绝对收敛容差。适用于 SOLVER > 11。
EQ.0.0：使用默认值 1.e-10。

english:
Maximum number of iterations.  For SOLVER >11.
EQ.0:use default value 500.
zh:
最大迭代次数。适用于 SOLVER > 11。
EQ.0：使用默认值 500。

english:
Output message level  (For SOLVER > 10)
EQ.0:no output (default),
EQ.1:summary information,
EQ.2:detailed information, use only for debugging.
zh:
输出消息级别（适用于 SOLVER > 10）。
EQ.0：不输出（默认）。
EQ.1：摘要信息。
EQ.2：详细信息，仅用于调试。

english:
Matrix Dumping for SOLVER > 11
EQ.0:	No Dumping
GT.0:	Dump using ASCII format every MXDMP time steps.
LT.0:	Dump using binary format every |MXDMP| time steps.
zh:
SOLVER > 11 时的矩阵转储。
EQ.0：不转储。
GT.0：每 MXDMP 个时间步以 ASCII 格式转储。
LT.0：每 |MXDMP| 个时间步以二进制格式转储。

english:
Relaxation parameter omega for SOLVER 14 and 16.
EQ.0.0:use default value 1.0 for Solver 14, use default value 0.0 for Solver 16..
zh:
SOLVER 14 和 16 的松弛参数 omega。
EQ.0.0：Solver 14 使用默认值 1.0，Solver 16 使用默认值 0.0。

english:
Relative convergence tolerance.  Replaces CGTOL for SOLVER >11.
EQ.0.0:use default value 1.e-06.
zh:
相对收敛容差。对于 SOLVER > 11，该参数替代 CGTOL。
EQ.0.0：使用默认值 1.e-06。

english:
Length unit.
m: meter
mm: millimeter
cm: centimeter
mil: mile
in: inch
ft: foot
yd: yard
zh:
长度单位。
m：米。
mm：毫米。
cm：厘米。
mil：英里。
in：英寸。
ft：英尺。
yd：码。

english:
Mass unit.
kg: kilogram
g: gram
oz: ounce
lb: pound
ton: ton
ntrc_ton
zh:
质量单位。
kg：千克。
g：克。
oz：盎司。
lb：磅。
ton：吨。
ntrc_ton。

english:
Temperature unit.
k: kelvin
c: celsius
f: fahrenheit
r: rankine
zh:
温度单位。
k：开尔文。
c：摄氏度。
f：华氏度。
r：兰氏度。

english:
Time unit.
sec: second
min: minute
hr: hour
ms: msec, millisec
micro_s: microsec.
zh:
时间单位。
sec：秒。
min：分钟。
hr：小时。
ms：毫秒。
micro_s：微秒。

english:
ALE element set ID.
If the model is 1D (*SECTION_ALE1D), the set should be *SET_BEAM
If the model is 2D (*SECTION_ALE2D), the set should be *SET_SHELL
If the model is 3D (*SECTION_SOLID), the set should be *SET_SOLID.
zh:
ALE 单元集 ID。
若模型为 1D（*SECTION_ALE1D），该集合应为 *SET_BEAM。
若模型为 2D（*SECTION_ALE2D），该集合应为 *SET_SHELL。
若模型为 3D（*SECTION_SOLID），该集合应为 *SET_SOLID。

english: *DEFINE_FUNCTION ID;
zh: *DEFINE_FUNCTION 的函数 ID。

english:
Part set ID for filtering.  If no set is specified, all parts are included.  For each element integration point in the d3plot file,
24 words of memory are required in LS-DYNA for the single pass filtering, and more for the two pass filtering.
Specifying PSET is recommended to minimize the memory requirements.  See Remark 7.
zh: 用于滤波的部件集 ID。若未指定集合，则包含所有部件。对于 d3plot 文件中的每个单元积分点，单遍滤波在 LS-DYNA 中需要 24 个字的内存，双遍滤波需要更多内存。建议指定 PSET 以最小化内存需求。见备注 7。

english:
Flag for filtering options.  See Remark 7.
EQ.0:	No filtering (default).
EQ.1:	Single pass, forward Butterworth filtering.
EQ.2:	Two pass filtering over the specified time window. Backward Butterworth filtering is applied to the forward Butterworth results that have been stored.
This option improves the phase accuracy significantly at the expense of memory
zh:
滤波选项标志。见备注 7。
EQ.0：不滤波（默认）。
EQ.1：单遍前向 Butterworth 滤波。
EQ.2：在指定时间窗口上进行双遍滤波。对已存储的前向 Butterworth 结果应用反向 Butterworth 滤波。该选项会显著提高相位精度，但会增加内存消耗。

english:
The width of the window W in units of time for storing the single, forward filtering required for the TYPE = 2 filter option.
Increasing the width of the window will increase the memory required for the analysis.
A window that is too narrow will reduce the amplitude of the filtered result significantly, and values below 15 are not recommended for that reason.
In general, the results for the TYPE = 2 option are sensitive to the width of the window and experimentation is required.  See Remark 7.
zh: 窗口宽度 W，单位为时间；用于存储 TYPE = 2 滤波选项所需的单次前向滤波数据。增大窗口宽度会增加分析所需内存。窗口过窄会显著降低滤波结果幅值，因此不建议使用低于 15 的值。通常 TYPE = 2 选项的结果对窗口宽度敏感，需要试验确定。见备注 7。

english:
Output interval in time steps (a time step is a cycle). For the D3DRFL
file a positive number 'n' will cause plot dumps to be written at every
n'th convergence check interval specified on the *CONTROL_DYNAMIC_RELAXATION card.
zh: 以时间步为单位的输出间隔（一个时间步为一个循环）。对于 D3DRFL 文件，正数 n 会使绘图输出在 *CONTROL_DYNAMIC_RELAXATION 卡指定的每第 n 个收敛检查间隔写出一次。

english:
Time interval between output states in time domain fatigue analysis (see *FATIGUE_OPTION)
EQ.0.0:	only fatigue results at the end of the analysis are output
zh:
时域疲劳分析中输出状态之间的时间间隔（见 *FATIGUE_OPTION）。
EQ.0.0：仅输出分析结束时的疲劳结果。

english:
Output option for cubic higher order solid elements EQ.1: output full connectivity,
EQ.2: full connectivity and data at all integration points.
zh:
三次高阶实体单元的输出选项。
EQ.1：输出完整连接关系。
EQ.2：输出完整连接关系以及所有积分点数据。

english:
Number of shell integration points written to the LS-DYNA database, see also *INTEGRATION_SHELL. If the default value of 3 is used then results are output for the outermost (top) and innermost (bottom) integration points together with results for the neutral axis. If MAXINT is set to 3 and the element has 1 integration point then all three results will be the same. If a value other than 3 is used then the results for the first MAXINT integration points in the element will be output. NOTE: If the element has an even number of integration points and MAXINT is not set to 3 then you will not get mid-surface results. (See Remarks in user's manual).If MAXINT is set to a negative
number, MAXINT integration points are output for each in plane
integration point location and no averaging is used. This can greatly
increase the size of the binary databases d3plot, d3thdt, and d3part
zh: 写入 LS-DYNA 数据库的壳积分点数量，另见 *INTEGRATION_SHELL。若使用默认值 3，则输出最外侧（上表面）和最内侧（下表面）积分点结果，以及中性轴结果。若 MAXINT 设为 3 且单元只有 1 个积分点，则三个结果相同。若使用非 3 值，则输出单元中前 MAXINT 个积分点的结果。注意：若单元具有偶数个积分点且 MAXINT 未设为 3，则不会得到中面结果（见用户手册备注）。若 MAXINT 设为负数，则对每个面内积分点位置输出 MAXINT 个积分点，且不进行平均。这会显著增大二进制数据库 d3plot、d3thdt 和 d3part 的大小。

english:
Output option for quadratic higher order solid elements EQ.1: output full connectivity,
EQ.2: full connectivity and data at all integration points.
zh:
二次高阶实体单元的输出选项。
EQ.1：输出完整连接关系。
EQ.2：输出完整连接关系以及所有积分点数据。

english:
Number of shell integration points written to the binary database, see
also *INTEGRATION_SHELL. If the default value of 3 is used then
results are output for the outermost (top) and innermost (bottom)
integration points together with results for the neutral axis. If MAXINT
is set to 3 and the element has 1 integration point then all three results
will be the same. If a value other than 3 is used then results for the first
MAXINT integration points in the element will be output. Note: If the
element has an even number of integration points and MAXINT is not
set to 3 then you will not get mid-surface results. See Remarks below.
If MAXINT is set to a negative number, MAXINT integration points are
output for each in plane integration point location and no averaging is
used. This can greatly increase the size of the binary databases
D3PLOT, D3THDT, and D3PART.
zh: 写入二进制数据库的壳积分点数量，另见 *INTEGRATION_SHELL。若使用默认值 3，则输出最外侧（上表面）和最内侧（下表面）积分点结果，以及中性轴结果。若 MAXINT 设为 3 且单元只有 1 个积分点，则三个结果相同。若使用非 3 值，则输出单元中前 MAXINT 个积分点的结果。注意：若单元具有偶数个积分点且 MAXINT 未设为 3，则不会得到中面结果。见下方备注。若 MAXINT 设为负数，则对每个面内积分点位置输出 MAXINT 个积分点，且不进行平均。这会显著增大二进制数据库 D3PLOT、D3THDT 和 D3PART 的大小。

english:
Number of additional integration point history variables written to the
binary database for solid elements. The integration point data is written
in the same order that it is stored in memory-each material model has its
own history variables that are stored. For user defined materials it is
important to store the history data that is needed for plotting before the
data which is not of interest.
zh: 写入实体单元二进制数据库的附加积分点历史变量数量。积分点数据按其在内存中的存储顺序写入；每个材料模型都有自己的历史变量并进行存储。对于用户自定义材料，重要的是将绘图所需的历史数据存放在不感兴趣的数据之前。

english:
Number of additional integration point history variables written to the
binary database for both shell and thick shell elements for each
integration point, see NEIPH above.
zh: 针对每个积分点写入壳和厚壳单元二进制数据库的额外积分点历史变量数量，参见上方的 NEIPH。

english:
Number of solid element integration points written to the LS-DYNA
database. The default value is 1. For solids with multiple integration
points NINTSLD may be set to 8. Currently, no other values for
NINTSLD are allowed. For solids with multiple integration points, an
average value is output if NINTSLD is set to 1.
zh: 写入 LS-DYNA 数据库的实体单元积分点数量。默认值为 1。对于具有多个积分点的实体，NINTSLD 可设为 8。目前不允许 NINTSLD 使用其他值。对于具有多个积分点的实体，若 NINTSLD 设为 1，则输出平均值。

english:
Set to 1 to dump strain tensors for solid, shell and thick shell elements
for plotting by LS-PREPOST and ASCII file ELOUT. For shell and
thick shell elements two tensors are written, one at the innermost and
one at the outermost integration point. For solid elements a single strain
tensor is written.
zh: 设为 1 时，转储实体、壳和厚壳单元的应变张量，用于 LS-PrePost 绘图和 ASCII 文件 ELOUT。对于壳和厚壳单元，会写出两个张量，分别位于最内侧和最外侧积分点。对于实体单元，只写出一个应变张量。

english:
Every interface force state for the  intfor  database is written to a separate file:
EQ.0: more than one interface force state can be on each intfor file,
EQ.1: one interface force output state only on each intfor file..
zh:
intfor 数据库中每个界面力状态是否写入单独文件：
EQ.0：每个 intfor 文件可包含多个界面力状态。
EQ.1：每个 intfor 文件只包含一个界面力输出状态。

english:
Database extent:
EQ.1: output translational mass for deformable nodes identified by	SETID (default),
EQ.2: output translational mass and rotary inertias for the deformable	nodes identified by the SETID.
EQ.3: output translational mass for deformable and rigid nodes identified by SETID (default),
EQ.4: output translational mass and rotary inertias for the deformable	and rigid nodes identified by the SETID.
zh:
数据库范围：
EQ.1：输出 SETID 标识的可变形节点的平动质量（默认）。
EQ.2：输出 SETID 标识的可变形节点的平动质量和转动惯量。
EQ.3：输出 SETID 标识的可变形和刚性节点的平动质量（默认）。
EQ.4：输出 SETID 标识的可变形和刚性节点的平动质量和转动惯量。

english:
Rigid body data:
EQ.0: no output for rigid bodies,
EQ.1: output rigid body mass and inertia.
zh:
刚体数据：
EQ.0：不输出刚体数据。
EQ.1：输出刚体质量和惯量。

english:
Optional set ID.
EQ.0: mass output for all nodes,
LT.0: no output,
GT.0: set ID identifying nodes whose mass will be output.
zh:
可选集合 ID。
EQ.0：输出所有节点的质量。
LT.0：不输出。
GT.0：标识要输出质量的节点集合 ID。

english:
Type of the output file:
EQ. 0:	ASCII database file named “rveout”.
EQ. 1 : LS - DYNA binary database.
zh:
输出文件类型：
EQ.0：名为 “rveout” 的 ASCII 数据库文件。
EQ.1：LS-DYNA 二进制数据库。

english:
Element ID that controls the tracer motion (see Remarks 1 and 2)
GT.0: Data are output for ELEM
LT.0: Data are not output for ELEM.
zh:
控制示踪点运动的单元 ID（见备注 1 和 2）。
GT.0：输出 ELEM 的数据。
LT.0：不输出 ELEM 的数据。

english:
Flag to define how the tracer moves (see Remark 1):
EQ.0: the tracer does not move with ELEM
EQ.1: the tracer velocity is interpolated from ELEM nodal velocities
EQ.2: the tracer position is interpolated from ELEM nodal positions.
zh:
定义示踪点如何运动的标志（见备注 1）：
EQ.0：示踪点不随 ELEM 运动。
EQ.1：示踪点速度由 ELEM 节点速度插值得到。
EQ.2：示踪点位置由 ELEM 节点位置插值得到。

english:
ELEM type:
EQ.1: solid
EQ.2: beam
EQ.3: shell
EQ.4: tshell
zh:
ELEM 类型：
EQ.1：实体。
EQ.2：梁。
EQ.3：壳。
EQ.4：厚壳。

english:
SET type:
EQ.0: part
EQ.1: solid
EQ.2: beam
EQ.3: shell
EQ.4: tshell .
zh:
SET 类型：
EQ.0：部件。
EQ.1：实体。
EQ.2：梁。
EQ.3：壳。
EQ.4：厚壳。

english:
Data to be output to the trcrgal_binout file instead of the variable located at VARLOC.  The interpretation of VAREPL is enumerated in the following list:
EQ.1:	-acceleration
EQ.2:	- acceleration
EQ.3:	- acceleration
EQ.4:	nodal temperature
EQ.5:	density
EQ.6:	compression ratio
EQ.7:	pressure.
zh:
输出到 trcrgal_binout 文件、用于替代 VARLOC 位置变量的数据。VAREPL 的含义如下：
EQ.1：-加速度。
EQ.2：-加速度。
EQ.3：-加速度。
EQ.4：节点温度。
EQ.5：密度。
EQ.6：压缩比。
EQ.7：压力。

english:
Variable location in trcrgal_binout to be replaced with the variable specified in the VAREPL field:
EQ.4:	-velocity
EQ.5:	-velocity
EQ.6:	-velocity
EQ.7:	-stress
EQ.8:	-stress
EQ.9:	-stress
EQ.10:	-stress
EQ.11:	-stress
EQ.12:	-stress
EQ.13:	plastic strain
EQ.14:	nodal mass
EQ.15:	undefined
GE.16 and LE.30:	other auxiliary variables
zh:
trcrgal_binout 中要被 VAREPL 字段指定变量替换的变量位置：
EQ.4：-速度。
EQ.5：-速度。
EQ.6：-速度。
EQ.7：-应力。
EQ.8：-应力。
EQ.9：-应力。
EQ.10：-应力。
EQ.11：-应力。
EQ.12：-应力。
EQ.13：塑性应变。
EQ.14：节点质量。
EQ.15：未定义。
GE.16 且 LE.30：其他辅助变量。

english:
Type of set (See Remark 2):
EQ.0:	solid set
EQ.1:	segment set
EQ.2:	node set
zh:
集合类型（见备注 2）：
EQ.0：实体集。
EQ.1：段集。
EQ.2：节点集。

english:
Data to be output to the trcrgen_binout file.  The interpretation of VALTYPE1 and VALTYPE2 is enumerated in the following list:
EQ.1:	-stress
EQ.2:	-stress
EQ.3:	-stress
EQ.4:	-stress
EQ.5:	-stress
EQ.6:	-stress
EQ.7:	plastic strain
EQ.8:	internal energy
EQ.9:	bulk viscosity
EQ.10:	relative volume
GE.11 and LE.19:	other auxiliary variables
EQ.20:	pressure
EQ.21:	density
EQ.22:	material volume
EQ.23:	compression ratio
EQ.24:	element volume fraction.
EQ.25:	nodal volume fraction
EQ.26:	-position
EQ.27:	-position
EQ.28:	-position
EQ.29:	-velocity
EQ.30:	-velocity
EQ.31:	-velocity
EQ.31:	velocity
EQ.33:	-acceleration
EQ.34:	- acceleration
EQ.35:	- acceleration
EQ.36:	acceleration
EQ.37:	nodal mass
EQ.38:	nodal temperature.
zh:
输出到 trcrgen_binout 文件的数据。VALTYPE1 和 VALTYPE2 的含义如下：
EQ.1：-应力。
EQ.2：-应力。
EQ.3：-应力。
EQ.4：-应力。
EQ.5：-应力。
EQ.6：-应力。
EQ.7：塑性应变。
EQ.8：内能。
EQ.9：体积黏性。
EQ.10：相对体积。
GE.11 且 LE.19：其他辅助变量。
EQ.20：压力。
EQ.21：密度。
EQ.22：材料体积。
EQ.23：压缩比。
EQ.24：单元体积分数。
EQ.25：节点体积分数。
EQ.26：-位置。
EQ.27：-位置。
EQ.28：-位置。
EQ.29：-速度。
EQ.30：-速度。
EQ.31：-速度。
EQ.31：速度。
EQ.33：-加速度。
EQ.34：-加速度。
EQ.35：-加速度。
EQ.36：加速度。
EQ.37：节点质量。
EQ.38：节点温度。

english:
Variable location in trcrgen_binout to be replaced with the variable specified in the VALTYPE2 field:
EQ.4:	-velocity
EQ.5:	-velocity
EQ.6:	-velocity
EQ.7:	-stress
EQ.8:	-stress
EQ.9:	-stress
EQ.10:	-stress
EQ.11:	-stress
EQ.12:	-stress
EQ.13:	plastic strain
EQ.14:	density
EQ.15:	relative volume
zh:
trcrgen_binout 中要被 VALTYPE2 字段指定变量替换的变量位置：
EQ.4：-速度。
EQ.5：-速度。
EQ.6：-速度。
EQ.7：-应力。
EQ.8：-应力。
EQ.9：-应力。
EQ.10：-应力。
EQ.11：-应力。
EQ.12：-应力。
EQ.13：塑性应变。
EQ.14：密度。
EQ.15：相对体积。

english:
Element ID of the interpolation solid. This needs to coincide with a
proper definition of a 8-noded solid element (*ELEMENT_SHELL)
using interpolation nodes (*CONSTRAINED_NODE_INTERPOLATION).
zh: 插值实体的单元 ID。它需要与使用插值节点（*CONSTRAINED_NODE_INTERPOLATION）的 8 节点实体单元（*ELEMENT_SHELL）的正确定义一致。

english:
Element ID of the interpolation solid. This needs to coincide with a
proper definition of a 8-noded solid element (*ELEMENT_SOLID)
using interpolation nodes (*CONSTRAINED_NODE_INTERPOLATION).
zh: 插值实体的单元 ID。它需要与使用插值节点（*CONSTRAINED_NODE_INTERPOLATION）的 8 节点实体单元（*ELEMENT_SOLID）的正确定义一致。

english:
Activation time for lancing operation. This variable needs to be
defined for both instant and progressive lancing types (see Remarks).
zh: 切口操作的激活时间。对于瞬时切口和渐进切口类型，都需要定义该变量（见备注）。

english:
Set IREFINE = 1 to refine elements along lancing route until no
adapted nodes exist in the neighborhood. This feature result in a
more robust lancing in the form of improved lancing boundary.
Available starting in Revision 107708..
zh: 设置 IREFINE = 1 时，沿切口路径细化单元，直到邻域中不再存在已自适应节点。该功能通过改善切口边界，使切口更稳健。从版本 107708 起可用。

english:
A progressive lancing operation is evenly divided into NTIMES
segments between AT and ENDT; within each segment lancing is
done instantly. Do not define for instant lancing.
zh: 渐进切口操作在 AT 和 ENDT 之间均匀划分为 NTIMES 个区段；每个区段内切口瞬时完成。瞬时切口不要定义该参数。

english:
Minimum element characteristic length to be refined to, to be
supported in the future. Currently, no refinement will be made..
zh: 要细化到的最小单元特征长度，计划未来支持。目前不会进行细化。

english: Optional load curve ID to scale the added mass at time = 0. The curve defines the scale factor as a function versus time and must start at unity at t=0. Applies to deformable bodies only.
zh: 可选载荷曲线 ID，用于在 time = 0 时缩放附加质量。该曲线定义比例因子随时间的变化，并且必须在 t=0 时从 1 开始。仅适用于可变形体。

english: Optional flag for mass-weighted distribution. EQ.0: distributed by area (shell) / volume (solid). EQ.1: distributed by mass weighted area x density x thickness (shell) / volume x density (solid).
zh:
质量加权分布的可选标志。
EQ.0：按面积（壳）/体积（实体）分布。
EQ.1：按质量加权的面积 x 密度 x 厚度（壳）/体积 x 密度（实体）分布。

english:
Shell formulation to be used.
FORM = 0 : Shear deformable shell theory with rotational DOFs.
FORM = 1 : Shear deformable shell theory without rotational DOFs.
FORM = 2 : Thin shell theory without rotational DOFs.
FORM = 4 : Combination of FORM = 0 and FORM = 1.
zh:
要使用的壳公式。
FORM = 0：带转动自由度的剪切可变形壳理论。
FORM = 1：无转动自由度的剪切可变形壳理论。
FORM = 2：无转动自由度的薄壳理论。
FORM = 4：FORM = 0 和 FORM = 1 的组合。

english:
Option for lumping of mass matrix.
IMASS = 0 : Row sum.
IMASS = 1 : Diagonal weighting.
zh:
质量矩阵集中化选项。
IMASS = 0：行和。
IMASS = 1：对角加权。

english:
In-plane numerical integration rule.
INT = 0 : Uniformly reduced Gauss integration, NIP = PR  PS. Note
that the number of integration points may change from element
to element depending on local element degree.
INT = 1 : Full Gauss integration, NIP = (PR + 1)  (PS + 1). Note that
the number of integration points may change from element to
element depending on local element degree.
zh:
面内数值积分规则。
INT = 0：均匀减缩 Gauss 积分，NIP = PR x PS。注意积分点数量可随局部单元阶次在单元之间变化。
INT = 1：全 Gauss 积分，NIP = (PR + 1) x (PS + 1)。注意积分点数量可随局部单元阶次在单元之间变化。

english:
Number of trimming loops
NL = 0 : No trimming loops (i.e., untrimmed U-spline).
NL > 0 : Trimmed U-spline with NL trimming loops.
zh:
裁剪环数量。
NL = 0：无裁剪环（即未裁剪的 U-spline）。
NL > 0：具有 NL 个裁剪环的裁剪 U-spline。

english:
The Bezier element shape
SHPE = 0 : Quadrilateral Bezier element.
SHPE = 1 : Triangular Bezier element.
zh:
Bezier 单元形状。
SHPE = 0：四边形 Bezier 单元。
SHPE = 1：三角形 Bezier 单元。

english:
Flag for weighting factors of the control points.
WFL = 0 : All weights at the control points are set to 1 and no optional	cards D are allowed.
WFL != 0 : The weights at the control points are de ned in optional cards
D which must be de ned after cards C..
zh:
控制点权重因子标志。
WFL = 0：所有控制点权重设为 1，且不允许可选卡 D。
WFL != 0：控制点权重在可选卡 D 中定义；这些卡必须定义在卡 C 之后。

english:
Shell formulation to be used:
EQ.0: Hughes-Liu with rotational DOFs
EQ.1: Hughes-Liu without rotational DOFs
EQ.2: Kirchhoff-Theory without rotational DOFs
EQ.3: Kirchhoff-Theory with rotational DOFs
EQ.4: combination of FORM=0 and FORM=1
zh:
要使用的壳公式：
EQ.0：带转动自由度的 Hughes-Liu。
EQ.1：无转动自由度的 Hughes-Liu。
EQ.2：无转动自由度的 Kirchhoff 理论。
EQ.3：带转动自由度的 Kirchhoff 理论。
EQ.4：FORM=0 和 FORM=1 的组合。

english:
Option for lumping of mass matrix:
EQ.0: row sum.
EQ.1: diagonal weighting.
zh:
质量矩阵集中选项：
EQ.0：行和。
EQ.1：对角加权。

english:
Flag for weighting factors of the control points
EQ.0: all weights at the control points are set to 1.0 (B-spline basis) and no optional cards e are allowed.
NE.0: the weights at the control points are defined in optional cards E which must be defined after cards D.
zh:
控制点权重因子标志。
EQ.0：所有控制点权重设为 1.0（B-spline 基），且不允许可选卡 e。
NE.0：控制点权重在可选卡 E 中定义；这些卡必须定义在卡 D 之后。

english:
Boundary Prescribed type:
EQ.1:Short (Scalar Potential set to 0.)
EQ.2:Prescribed Resistance (Robin B.C).
EQ.3:Prescribed Scalar Potential (Dirichlet B.C)
EQ.4:Prescribed Current Density (Neumann B.C).
zh:
规定边界类型：
EQ.1：短路（标量势设为 0）。
EQ.2：规定电阻（Robin 边界条件）。
EQ.3：规定标量势（Dirichlet 边界条件）。
EQ.4：规定电流密度（Neumann 边界条件）。

english:
Set type:
EQ.1:Segment Set.
EQ.2: Node Set.
EQ.3: Fluid part. See *ICFD_PART.
zh:
集合类型：
EQ.1：段集。
EQ.2：节点集。
EQ.3：流体部件。见 *ICFD_PART。

english:
Type of current measured:
EQ.1: Volume current
EQ.2: Surface current (not available yet_
EQ.3: Magnetic field flow (B field times Area)
zh:
测量的电流类型：
EQ.1：体电流。
EQ.2：面电流（尚不可用）。
EQ.3：磁场通量（B 场乘以面积）。

english:
Type of set:
EQ.1: Segment set
EQ.2: Node set (not available yet)
zh:
集合类型：
EQ.1：段集。
EQ.2：节点集（尚不可用）。

english:
Type of EM contact.
EQ.1: Face to face.
zh:
EM 接触类型。
EQ.1：面对面。

english:
Movement type of subdomain:
EQ.0: Static subdomain (Default).
EQ.1: Domain translates in the three directions by the velocities given by LCIDX,LCIDY,LCIDZ.
EQ.2: Domain follows the displacements of the node ID given by NID.
zh:
子域运动类型：
EQ.0：静态子域（默认）。
EQ.1：域按 LCIDX、LCIDY、LCIDZ 给出的速度在三个方向平移。
EQ.2：域跟随 NID 给出的节点 ID 的位移。

english:
Subdomain definition type:
EQ.1: Defined by box
EQ.2: Defined by cylinder.
EQ.3: Defined by sphere.
.
zh:
子域定义类型：
EQ.1：由盒定义。
EQ.2：由圆柱定义。
EQ.3：由球定义。

english:
EM dimension type:
EQ.0:3D solve.
EQ.1:2D planar with 4-zero thickness shell elements.
EQ.3:2D axisymmetric (Y axis only) with zero thickness elements.
zh:
EM 维度类型：
EQ.0：3D 求解。
EQ.1：使用 4 个零厚度壳单元的 2D 平面求解。
EQ.3：使用零厚度单元的 2D 轴对称（仅 Y 轴）求解。

english:
Electromagnetism solver selector:
EQ.-1:Turns the EM solver off after reading the EM keywords.
EQ.1:eddy current solver.
EQ.2:induced heating solver.
EQ.3:resistive heating solver.
EQ.11:Electrophysiology monodomain.
EQ.12:Electrophysiology bidomain.
EQ.13:Electrophysiology monodmain coupled with bidomain.
zh:
电磁求解器选择：
EQ.-1：读取 EM 关键字后关闭 EM 求解器。
EQ.1：涡流求解器。
EQ.2：感应加热求解器。
EQ.3：电阻加热求解器。
EQ.11：电生理单域模型。
EQ.12：电生理双域模型。
EQ.13：与双域耦合的电生理单域模型。

english:
Coupling to the solid mechanics solver. When turned on, the EM solver will transfer the Lorentz forces to the solid mechanics solver.
EQ.0:Coupling on.Volumic Lorentz forces are transferred
EQ.1:Coupling off.
EQ.2:	Coupling on. Surface magnetic forces are transferred. More accurate representation of EM forces in cases involving magnets or non-linear ferromagnets. See *EM_SOLVER_FEMBEM_MONOLITHIC.
EQ.3:	Coupling on.Surface magnetic forces are transferred on magnets and ferromagnets while volumic Lorentz forces are transferred to regular conductors
zh:
与固体力学求解器的耦合。开启时，EM 求解器会将 Lorentz 力传递给固体力学求解器。
EQ.0：耦合开启，传递体 Lorentz 力。
EQ.1：耦合关闭。
EQ.2：耦合开启，传递面磁力。在涉及磁体或非线性铁磁体的情况下，可更准确表示 EM 力。见 *EM_SOLVER_FEMBEM_MONOLITHIC。
EQ.3：耦合开启；对磁体和铁磁体传递面磁力，同时对常规导体传递体 Lorentz 力。

english:
Coupling to the thermal solver. When turned on, the EM solver will transfer the Joule heating terms to the solid mechanics thermal solver.
EQ.0:Coupling on.
EQ.1:Coupling off.
zh:
与热求解器的耦合。开启时，EM 求解器会将 Joule 热项传递给固体力学热求解器。
EQ.0：耦合开启。
EQ.1：耦合关闭。

english:
Erosion search:
EQ.0: Off. This means that the EM solver will ignore eroded elements and still consider them part of the EM problem.
EQ.1: On. The EM solver will look for potential elements that are eroded and remove them from the EM solve by updating its matrix system.
zh:
侵蚀搜索：
EQ.0：关闭。这意味着 EM 求解器将忽略已侵蚀单元，仍将其视为 EM 问题的一部分。
EQ.1：开启。EM 求解器会查找可能已侵蚀的单元，并通过更新矩阵系统将其从 EM 求解中移除。

english:
In addition to NCYLBEM, this triggers an automatic recomputation of the BEM matrices based on an error calculation of the conductors' relative displacements.
EQ.0:Autorecomputation off.
EQ.1:Autorecomputation on.
zh:
除 NCYLBEM 外，该参数还会基于导体相对位移的误差计算，触发 BEM 矩阵自动重新计算。
EQ.0：关闭自动重新计算。
EQ.1：开启自动重新计算。

english:
In addition to NCYLFEM, this triggers an automatic recomputation of the FEM matrices based on an error calculation of the conductors' relative deformation and electrical conductivity changes.
EQ.0:Autorecomputation off.
EQ.1:Autorecomputation on.
zh:
除 NCYLFEM 外，该参数还会基于导体相对变形和电导率变化的误差计算，触发 FEM 矩阵自动重新计算。
EQ.0：关闭自动重新计算。
EQ.1：开启自动重新计算。

english:
Determines if BEM matrices are recomputed each time the EM solver is turned back on:
EQ.0 : BEM matrices are recomputed
EQ.1 : BEM matrices are not recomputed
zh:
确定每次重新开启 EM 求解器时是否重新计算 BEM 矩阵：
EQ.0：重新计算 BEM 矩阵。
EQ.1：不重新计算 BEM 矩阵。

english:
Determines if FEM matrices are recomputed each time the EM solver is turned back on:
EQ.0: FEM matrices are recomputed
EQ.1: FEM matrices are not recomputed
zh:
确定每次重新开启 EM 求解器时是否重新计算 FEM 矩阵：
EQ.0：重新计算 FEM 矩阵。
EQ.1：不重新计算 FEM 矩阵。

english:
Time Step type
EQ.1 : constant time step given in DTCONST
EQ.2 : time step as a function of time given by a load curve specified in LCID
EQ.3 : Automatic time step computation, depending on the solver type. This time step is then multiplied by FACTOR
zh:
时间步类型。
EQ.1：由 DTCONST 给出的常量时间步。
EQ.2：由 LCID 指定的载荷曲线给出随时间变化的时间步。
EQ.3：根据求解器类型自动计算时间步，并将该时间步乘以 FACTOR。

english:
Method to compute the magnetic field:
EQ.1: Direct method (every contribution is computed by the Biot Savart Law and summed up : very slow).
EQ.2: Multipole method (approximation of the direct method using the multipole expansion).
EQ.3: Multicenter method (approximation of the direct method using a weighted subset of points only in order to compute the magnetic field).
zh:
计算磁场的方法：
EQ.1：直接法（每个贡献都按 Biot-Savart 定律计算后求和，非常慢）。
EQ.2：多极法（使用多极展开对直接法进行近似）。
EQ.3：多中心法（仅使用加权点子集对直接法进行近似，以计算磁场）。

english:
The value of the step size is equal to the maximum value between /n 1/|B| (evaluated at the starting point of the field line) and the value
H given by the user. In case of an integrator with adaptive stepsize,
it is the initial value of the stepsize.
zh: 步长值等于 1/|B|（在场线起点处求值）与用户给定 H 值之间的最大值。对于自适应步长积分器，该值为初始步长。

english:
Type of numerical integrator used to compute the field lines:
EQ.1: RK4 (Runge Kutta 4).
EQ.2: DOP853 (Dormand Prince 8(5,3)).
zh:
用于计算场线的数值积分器类型：
EQ.1：RK4（四阶 Runge-Kutta）。
EQ.2：DOP853（Dormand-Prince 8(5,3)）。

english:
Point Set ID associated to the field line set (See *EM_POINT_SET).
The coordinates given by the different points will be the starting points of the field lines.
zh: 与场线集合关联的点集 ID（见 *EM_POINT_SET）。不同点给出的坐标将作为场线的起点。

english:
Defines the type of EOS:
EQ.1: Permeability defined by a B function of H curve (B= uH).
EQ.2: Permeability defined by a H function of B curve (H= B/u).
zh:
定义 EOS 类型：
EQ.1：由 B 随 H 变化曲线定义磁导率（B = uH）。
EQ.2：由 H 随 B 变化曲线定义磁导率（H = B/u）。

english:
Only used is a Table ID or a Table 2D ID is given in LCID.
EQ.0: Gives load curve ID function of temperature. Load curves give conductivity function of material's density.
EQ.1: Gives load curve ID function of material's density. Load curves give conductivity function of temperature.
zh:
仅当 LCID 中给出表 ID 或二维表 ID 时使用。
EQ.0：给出温度函数形式的载荷曲线 ID；载荷曲线给出电导率随材料密度变化的函数。
EQ.1：给出材料密度函数形式的载荷曲线 ID；载荷曲线给出电导率随温度变化的函数。

english:
Field defined by:
EQ.1:Load curves.
EQ.2: define function (FTYPE = 3 only). If a define function is used, the following parameters are accepted : x, y, z,time, emdt, pot, curr, sigma.
zh:
场定义方式：
EQ.1：载荷曲线。
EQ.2：define function（仅 FTYPE = 3）。若使用 define function，可接受以下参数：x、y、z、time、emdt、pot、curr、sigma。

english:
Field type:
EQ.1: Magnetic field.
EQ.2: Electric field.
EQ.3: charge density (resistive heating solver only).
zh:
场类型：
EQ.1：磁场。
EQ.2：电场。
EQ.3：电荷密度（仅电阻加热求解器）。

english:
Used for the application: composite Tshell battery, with *EM_RANDLES_TSHELL.Selects which layers of the underlying EM mesh is included in the isopotential:
EQ.0: Default. No specific treatment.
EQ.1: Current Collector Positive.
EQ.2: Positive Electrode.
EQ.3: Separator.
EQ.4: Negative Electrode.
EQ.5: Current Collector Negative.
The layers functions are defined in *EM_MAT_001.
zh:
用于 composite Tshell battery 应用，配合 *EM_RANDLES_TSHELL。选择底层 EM 网格中哪些层包含在等势体中：
EQ.0：默认，无特殊处理。
EQ.1：正极集流体。
EQ.2：正极。
EQ.3：隔膜。
EQ.4：负极。
EQ.5：负极集流体。
层函数在 *EM_MAT_001 中定义。

english:
Set type:
EQ.1:Segment Set.
EQ.2:Node Set.
EQ.3:Fluid surface part. See *ICFD_PART.
zh:
集合类型：
EQ.1：段集。
EQ.2：节点集。
EQ.3：流体表面部件。见 *ICFD_PART。

english:
Connection type:
EQ.1:Short Circuit.
EQ.2:Resistance.
EQ.3:Voltage Source.
EQ.4:Current Source.
EQ.5:Meshless Randles circuit (used to represent a cell by one lumped Randles circuit)
EQ.6:R, L, C circuit
zh:
连接类型：
EQ.1：短路。
EQ.2：电阻。
EQ.3：电压源。
EQ.4：电流源。
EQ.5：无网格 Randles 电路（用于用一个集总 Randles 电路表示电芯）。
EQ.6：R、L、C 电路。

english:
Load curve ID defining the value of the resistance,voltage,or current function of time and depending on CONTYPE.
If not defined,VAL will be used.
zh: 载荷曲线 ID，用于定义电阻、电压或电流的值随时间变化，并取决于 CONTYPE。若未定义，则使用 VAL。

english:
Set type:
EQ.1:Segment Set.
zh:
集合类型：
EQ.1：段集。

english:
defines the electromagnetism type of the material:
EQ.0: Air or vacuum
EQ.1: Insulator material: these materials have the same electromagnetism behavior as EQ.0
EQ.2: Conductor carrying a source. In these conductors, the eddy current problem is solved, which gives the actual current density. Typically, this would correspond to the coil.
EQ.3: Fluid conductor. In that case, MID refers to the ID given in * ICFD_PART.
EQ.4: Conductor not connected to any current or voltage source, where the Eddy current problem is solved. Typically, this would correspond to the workpiece.
zh:
定义材料的电磁类型：
EQ.0：空气或真空。
EQ.1：绝缘材料；这些材料的电磁行为与 EQ.0 相同。
EQ.2：带有源的导体。在这些导体中求解涡流问题，从而得到实际电流密度。通常对应线圈。
EQ.3：流体导体。在这种情况下，MID 指 *ICFD_PART 中给出的 ID。
EQ.4：未连接到任何电流或电压源的导体，在其中求解涡流问题。通常对应工件。

english:
Used for the application: composite Tshell battery, with **EM_RANDLES_TSHELL.Defines the function of the layer associated to MID:
EQ.0:	Default. Conductor which is not part of a battery cell
EQ.1:Current Collector Positive
EQ.2: Positive Electrode
EQ.3:Separator
EQ.4:Negative Electrode
EQ.5:Current Collector Negative
zh:
用于 composite Tshell battery 应用，配合 *EM_RANDLES_TSHELL。定义与 MID 关联层的功能：
EQ.0：默认，不属于电池单元的导体。
EQ.1：正极集流体。
EQ.2：正极。
EQ.3：隔膜。
EQ.4：负极。
EQ.5：负极集流体。

english:
Electromagnetism type of the material:
EQ.0: Air or vacuum
EQ.1: Insulator material: these materials have the same electromagnetism behavior asM TYPE=0
EQ.2: Conductor carrying a source. In these conductors, the eddy current problem is solved, which gives the actual current density. Typically, this would correspond to the coil.
EQ.4: Conductor not connected to any current or voltage source, where the Eddy current problem is solved. Typically, this would correspond to the workpiece
.
zh:
材料的电磁类型：
EQ.0：空气或真空。
EQ.1：绝缘材料；这些材料的电磁行为与 MTYPE = 0 相同。
EQ.2：带有源的导体。在这些导体中求解涡流问题，从而得到实际电流密度。通常对应线圈。
EQ.4：未连接到任何电流或电压源的导体，在其中求解涡流问题。通常对应工件。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by element nodes
EQ.1.0:locally orthotropic with material axes determined by a point in space and the global location of the element center this is the a-direction.
EQ.2.0:globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0:locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes about the element normal by an angle,BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by the cross product of the vector v with the element normal. The plane of a solid element is the midsurface between the inner surface and outer surface defined by the first four nodes and the last four nodes of the connectivity of the element, respectively.
EQ.4.0:locally orthotropic in cylindrical coordinate system with the material axes determined by a vector v, and an originating point, P, which define the centerline axis. This option is for solid elements only.
EQ.5.0:globally defined reference frame with (a,b,c)=(X0,Y0,Z0).
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点确定。
EQ.1.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由空间中的一点和单元中心的全局位置确定；该方向为 a 方向。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，由平面内一条线开始、绕单元法向旋转角度 BETA 得到；该线由向量 v 与单元法向的叉积定义。实体单元的平面为由连接关系中前四个节点定义的内表面和后四个节点定义的外表面之间的中面。
EQ.4.0：圆柱坐标系中的局部正交各向异性，材料轴由向量 v 和原点 P 确定，两者定义中心线轴。该选项仅适用于实体单元。
EQ.5.0：全局定义的参考系，(a,b,c) = (X0,Y0,Z0)。

english:
Death time for the material. After DEATHT, the material will no longer be considered a conductor and will be removed from the EM solve.
If a negative value is entered, a *DEFINE_FUNCTION will be expected. The following parameters are allowed:
(vx, vy, vz, temp, vol, mass, Ex, Ey, Ez, Bx, By, Bz, Fx, Fy, Fz, JHrate, time). Fx, Fy, and Fz refer to the components of the Lorentz force vector.
A negative value returned by the *DEFINE_‌FUNCTION corresponds to a ‘dead’ or inactive element. Once an element has been removed from the EM solve, it cannot return.
zh: 材料的终止时间（死亡时间）。在 DEATHT 之后，该材料将不再被视为导体，并将从 EM 求解中移除。如果输入负值，则预期需要一个 *DEFINE_FUNCTION。允许使用以下参数：(vx, vy, vz, temp, vol, mass, Ex, Ey, Ez, Bx, By, Bz, Fx, Fy, Fz, JHrate, time)。Fx, Fy, 和 Fz 是指洛伦兹力向量的分量。由 *DEFINE_FUNCTION 返回的负值对应于“死亡”或非激活状态的单元。一旦单元从 EM 求解中移除，它就不能恢复。

english:
Defines the electromagnetism type of the material:
EQ.0: Air or vacuum
EQ.1: Insulator material: these materials have the same electromagnetism behavior as EQ.0
EQ.2: Conductor carrying a source. In these conductors, the eddy current problem is solved, which gives the actual current density. Typically, this would correspond to the coil.
EQ.4: Conductor not connected to any current or voltage source, where the Eddy current problem is solved. Typically, this would correspond to the workpiece
.
zh:
定义材料的电磁类型：
EQ.0：空气或真空。
EQ.1：绝缘材料；这些材料的电磁行为与 EQ.0 相同。
EQ.2：带有源的导体。在这些导体中求解涡流问题，从而得到实际电流密度。通常对应线圈。
EQ.4：未连接到任何电流或电压源的导体，在其中求解涡流问题。通常对应工件。

english:
Material axes option:
EQ.0.0:locally orthotropic with material axes determined by element nodes as shown in part (a) the figure in *MAT_002.The a-direction is from node 1 to node 2 of the element.The b-direction is orthogonal to the adirection and is in the plane formed by nodes 1, 2,and 4.
EQ.1.0: locally orthotropic with material axes determined by a point in space and the global location of the element center; this is the a-direction.
EQ.2.0: globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR.
EQ.3.0: locally orthotropic material axes determined by rotating the material axes about the element normal by an angle, BETA, from a line in the plane of the element defined by the cross product of the vector v with the element normal.The plane of a solid element is the midsurface between the inner surface and outer surface defined by the first four nodes and the last four nodes of the connectivity of the element, respectively.
EQ.4.0: locally orthotropic in cylindrical coordinate system with the material axes determined by a vector v, and an originating point, P, which define the centerline axis.This option is for solid elements only.
EQ.5.0: globally defined reference frame with(a,b,c)=(X0,Y0,Z0).
zh:
材料轴选项：
EQ.0.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由单元节点确定，如 *MAT_002 图 (a) 所示。a 方向为从单元节点 1 指向节点 2；b 方向与 a 方向正交，并位于节点 1、2 和 4 构成的平面内。
EQ.1.0：局部正交各向异性，材料轴由空间中的一点和单元中心的全局位置确定；该方向为 a 方向。
EQ.2.0：全局正交各向异性，材料轴由下方定义的向量确定，与 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR 相同。
EQ.3.0：局部正交各向异性材料轴，由平面内一条线开始、绕单元法向旋转角度 BETA 得到；该线由向量 v 与单元法向的叉积定义。实体单元的平面为由连接关系中前四个节点定义的内表面和后四个节点定义的外表面之间的中面。
EQ.4.0：圆柱坐标系中的局部正交各向异性，材料轴由向量 v 和原点 P 确定，两者定义中心线轴。该选项仅适用于实体单元。
EQ.5.0：全局定义的参考系，(a,b,c) = (X0,Y0,Z0)。

english:
Defines the electromagnetism type of the material:
EQ.0:Air or vacuum
EQ.1: Insulator material:these materials have the same electromagnetism behavior as MTYPE = 0
EQ.5:Material associated to *EM_RANDLES_BATMAC.
zh:
定义材料的电磁类型：
EQ.0：空气或真空。
EQ.1：绝缘材料；这些材料的电磁行为与 MTYPE = 0 相同。
EQ.5：与 *EM_RANDLES_BATMAC 关联的材料。

english:
Level of matrix assembly output to the messag file:
EQ.0: No output
EQ.1: Basic assembly steps
EQ.2: Basic assembly steps+percentage completed+final statistics
EQ.3: Basic assembly steps+percentage completed+statistics at each percentage of completion
zh:
messag 文件中矩阵组装输出级别：
EQ.0：不输出。
EQ.1：基本组装步骤。
EQ.2：基本组装步骤 + 完成百分比 + 最终统计。
EQ.3：基本组装步骤 + 完成百分比 + 每个完成百分比处的统计。

english:
Level of matrix assembly output to the screen:
EQ.0: No output
EQ.1: Basic assembly steps
EQ.2: Basic assembly steps+percentage completed+final statistics
EQ.3: Basic assembly steps+percentage completed+statistics at each percentage of completion
zh:
屏幕上矩阵组装输出级别：
EQ.0：不输出。
EQ.1：基本组装步骤。
EQ.2：基本组装步骤 + 完成百分比 + 最终统计。
EQ.3：基本组装步骤 + 完成百分比 + 每个完成百分比处的统计。

english:
Controls the output of information about the memory used by the EM solve to the messag file:
EQ. 0 : no memory information written.
EQ .1  memory information written
zh:
控制将 EM 求解所用内存信息输出到 messag 文件：
EQ.0：不写入内存信息。
EQ.1：写入内存信息。

english:
Controls the output of the mesh data to the d3hsp file
EQ.0: No mesh output
EQ.1: Mesh info is written to the d3hsp file
zh:
控制网格数据输出到 d3hsp 文件。
EQ.0：不输出网格。
EQ.1：将网格信息写入 d3hsp 文件。

english:
Level of solver output to the messag file:
EQ.0: No output
EQ.1: Global information at each FEM iteration
EQ.2: Detailed information at each FEM iteration
zh:
messag 文件中的求解器输出级别：
EQ.0：不输出。
EQ.1：每次 FEM 迭代输出全局信息。
EQ.2：每次 FEM 迭代输出详细信息。

english:
Level of solver output on the screen:
EQ.0: No output
EQ.1: Global information at each FEM iteration
EQ.2: Detailed information at each FEM iteration
zh:
屏幕上的求解器输出级别：
EQ.0：不输出。
EQ.1：每次 FEM 迭代输出全局信息。
EQ.2：每次 FEM 迭代输出详细信息。

english:
Controls the output of information about the time spent in the different parts of the EM solver to the messag file
EQ. 0 : no timing information written.
EQ. 1 : timing information written
zh:
控制将 EM 求解器各部分耗时信息输出到 messag 文件。
EQ.0：不写入计时信息。
EQ.1：写入计时信息。

english: MID
zh: 材料 ID（MID）。

english:
Position flag:
EQ.0:The solver determines if the point is inside or outside of the conductors.
EQ.1: Point outside of the conductors during the entire simulation.The solver does not check; hence a gain in computation time.
zh:
位置标志：
EQ.0：求解器判断该点位于导体内部还是外部。
EQ.1：整个仿真过程中该点位于导体外部。求解器不进行检查，因此可节省计算时间。

english:
Point Set type:
EQ.0: Fixed points.
EQ.1: Tracer points using prescribed velocity.
zh:
点集类型：
EQ.0：固定点。
EQ.1：使用规定速度的示踪点。

english:
Type of Randles Cell
EQ.-1:User defined equivalent circuit model
EQ.0:0-order Randles Cell.
EQ.1:1-order Randles Cell.
EQ.2:2-order Randles Cell
EQ.3:3-order Randles Cell.
zh:
Randles 电池类型。
EQ.-1：用户定义等效电路模型。
EQ.0：0 阶 Randles 电池。
EQ.1：1 阶 Randles 电池。
EQ.2：2 阶 Randles 电池。
EQ.3：3 阶 Randles 电池。

english:
Equilibrium voltage (OCV):
GE.0.0: constant value
LT.0.0: |SOCTOU| is a load curve ID defining equilibrium voltage(OCV) as a function of the state of charge (SOC).
zh:
平衡电压（OCV）：
GE.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：|SOCTOU| 为载荷曲线 ID，用于定义平衡电压（OCV）随荷电状态（SOC）的变化。

english:
Works the same way as RDLAREA in *EM_RANDLES_SOLID or in *EM_RANDLES_TSHELL:
EQ.1:The heat source in FUNCTID is per unit area.
EQ.2:Default. The heat source in FUNCTID is for the whole cell(the whole cell is shorted).
EQ.3:The heat source returned by FUNCTID is taken as is in each Randles circuit.
zh:
与 *EM_RANDLES_SOLID 或 *EM_RANDLES_TSHELL 中的 RDLAREA 作用方式相同：
EQ.1：FUNCTID 中的热源为单位面积热源。
EQ.2：默认。FUNCTID 中的热源针对整个电芯（整个电芯短路）。
EQ.3：FUNCTID 返回的热源在每个 Randles 电路中按原值使用。

english:
Randle Area:
EQ.0:	Default.The parameters are not scaled by area factors.
EQ.1:	The parameters are per unit area and will be scaled in each Randle circuit by a factor depending on the local area of the circuit.
EQ.2:	The parameters are defined for the whole cell and will be scaled in each Randle circuit by a factor depending on the local area of the circuit and the global area of the cell.
zh:
Randles 面积：
EQ.0：默认。参数不按面积因子缩放。
EQ.1：参数为单位面积值，并将在每个 Randles 电路中按取决于该电路局部面积的因子缩放。
EQ.2：参数针对整个电芯定义，并将在每个 Randles 电路中按取决于该电路局部面积和电芯全局面积的因子缩放。

english:
Type of Randles Cell
EQ.1:	Only option available for now.
zh:
Randles 电池类型。
EQ.1：目前唯一可用选项。

english:
Type of Randles Cell
EQ.0:0-order Randles Cell.
EQ.1:1-order Randles Cell.
EQ.2: 2-order Randles Cell.
EQ.3: 3-order Randles Cell.
zh:
Randles 电池类型。
EQ.0：0 阶 Randles 电池。
EQ.1：1 阶 Randles 电池。
EQ.2：2 阶 Randles 电池。
EQ.3：3 阶 Randles 电池。

english:
Temperature Unit :
EQ.0: The temperature is in Celsius
EQ.1: The Temperature is in Kelvin.
zh:
温度单位：
EQ.0：温度单位为摄氏度。
EQ.1：温度单位为开尔文。

english:
Works the same way as RDLAREA in *EM_RANDLES_SOLID or in *EM_RANDLES_TSHELL:
EQ.1:The resistance in FUNCTID is per unit area.
EQ.2:Default. The resistance in FUNCTID is for the whole cell(the whole cell is shorted), and then a factor based on areaLocal/areaGlobal is applied.
EQ.3:The resistance in FUNCTID is taken as is in each Randles circuit.
zh:
与 *EM_RANDLES_SOLID 或 *EM_RANDLES_TSHELL 中的 RDLAREA 作用方式相同：
EQ.1：FUNCTID 中的电阻为单位面积电阻。
EQ.2：默认。FUNCTID 中的电阻针对整个电芯（整个电芯短路），然后应用基于 areaLocal/areaGlobal 的因子。
EQ.3：FUNCTID 中的电阻在每个 Randles 电路中按原值使用。

english:
Randle Area:
EQ.1:The parameters are per unit area and will be scaled in each Randle circuit by a factor depending on the local area of the circuit.
EQ.2:Default. The parameters are defined for the whole cell and will be scaled in each Randle circuit by a factor depending on the local area of the circuit and the global area of the cell.
EQ.3:The parameters are not scaled by area factors.
zh:
Randles 面积：
EQ.1：参数按单位面积给出，并将在每个 Randles 电路中按局部电路面积因子缩放。
EQ.2：默认。参数针对整个电池定义，并在每个 Randles 电路中按局部电路面积和电池全局面积因子缩放。
EQ.3：参数不按面积因子缩放。

english:
Type of Randles Cell
EQ.-1:User defined equivalent circuit model
EQ.0:0-order Randles Cell.
EQ.1:1-order Randles Cell.
EQ.2: 2-order Randles Cell.
EQ.3: 3-order Randles Cell.
zh:
Randles 电池类型。
EQ.-1：用户定义等效电路模型。
EQ.0：0 阶 Randles 电池。
EQ.1：1 阶 Randles 电池。
EQ.2：2 阶 Randles 电池。
EQ.3：3 阶 Randles 电池。

english:
Temperature Unit:
EQ.0:The temperature is in Celsius
EQ.1:The Temperature is in Kelvin.
zh:
温度单位：
EQ.0：温度单位为摄氏度。
EQ.1：温度单位为开尔文。

english:
Type of Randles Cell
EQ.-1:User defined equivalent circuit model.
EQ.0:0-order Randles Cell.
EQ.1:1-order Randles Cell.
EQ.2:2-order Randles Cell.
EQ.3:3-order Randles Cell.
zh:
Randles 电池类型。
EQ.-1：用户定义等效电路模型。
EQ.0：0 阶 Randles 电池。
EQ.1：1 阶 Randles 电池。
EQ.2：2 阶 Randles 电池。
EQ.3：3 阶 Randles 电池。

english:
Equilibrium voltage (OCV):
GE.0.0:constant value.
LT.0.0:|SOCTOU| is a load curve ID defining equilibrium voltage(OCV) as a function of the state of charge(SOC).
zh:
平衡电压（OCV）：
GE.0.0：常数值。
LT.0.0：|SOCTOU| 为载荷曲线 ID，用于定义平衡电压（OCV）随荷电状态（SOC）的变化。

english:
Preconditioner type for PCG or GMRES iterative solves:
EQ 0: no preconditioner
EQ 1: Diagonal line
EQ 2: diagonal block
EQ.3: broad diagonal including all neighbor faces
EQ.4: LLT factorization. The LLT factorization option only works in Serial for now
zh:
PCG 或 GMRES 迭代求解的预条件器类型：
EQ.0：无预条件器。
EQ.1：对角线。
EQ.2：对角块。
EQ.3：包含所有相邻面的宽对角。
EQ.4：LLT 分解。LLT 分解选项目前仅支持串行。

english:
Solver type:
EQ 1: Direct solve - the matrices will then be dense.
EQ 2: Pre-Conditioned Gradient method (PCG) - this allows to have block matrices with low rank blocks and thus to reduce the memory.
EQ 3 : GMRES method - this allows to have block matrices with low rank blocks and thus to reduce the memory. The GMRES option only works in Serial for now.
Note: the GMRES capability is not fully implemented yet, so we advise to use either the PCG method or the direct solve for now
zh:
求解器类型：
EQ.1：直接求解，此时矩阵为稠密矩阵。
EQ.2：预条件梯度法（PCG），允许使用带低秩块的块矩阵，从而降低内存。
EQ.3：GMRES 方法，允许使用带低秩块的块矩阵，从而降低内存。GMRES 选项目前仅支持串行。
注意：GMRES 能力尚未完全实现，因此目前建议使用 PCG 方法或直接求解。

english:
This is used only for iterative solvers (PCG or GMRES).
EQ.-1 : starts from 0 as initial solution of the linear system.
EQ.1: starts from previous solution normalized by the rhs change. Note: using USELAST=1 can save many iterations in the further solves if the vector solution of the present solve is assumed to be nearly parallel to the vector solution of the previous solve, like it usually happens in time domain eddy-current problems
zh:
仅用于迭代求解器（PCG 或 GMRES）。
EQ.-1：以 0 作为线性系统的初始解。
EQ.1：以上一解按右端项变化归一化后作为初始解。注意：若认为当前求解的解向量与上一求解的解向量近似平行（如时域涡流问题中通常发生的情况），使用 USELAST=1 可在后续求解中节省许多迭代。

english:
Preconditioner type for PCG.
EQ.0: no preconditioner
EQ.1: Diagonal line
zh:
PCG 的预条件器类型。
EQ.0：无预条件器。
EQ.1：对角线。

english:
Solver type:
EQ.1: Direct solve
EQ.2: Conditioned Gradient Method (PCG)
zh:
求解器类型：
EQ.1：直接求解。
EQ.2：预条件梯度法（PCG）。

english:
This is used only for iterative solvers (PCG).
EQ.-1 : starts from 0 as initial solution of the linear system.
EQ.1: starts from previous solution normalized by the rhs change.
zh:
仅用于迭代求解器（PCG）。
EQ.-1：以 0 作为线性系统的初始解。
EQ.1：以上一解按右端项变化归一化后作为初始解。

english:
Force Convergence :
EQ.0: The code stops with an error if no convergence
EQ.1: The code continues to the next time step even if the RELTOL convergence criteria has not been reached.
zh:
强制收敛：
EQ.0：若不收敛，程序以错误停止。
EQ.1：即使未达到 RELTOL 收敛准则，程序仍继续到下一时间步。

english:
Part ID, Part Set ID, or Element (solid, shell, beam, thick shell) Set ID.
EQ.0: Fatigue analysis is performed on the whole structure
zh:
部件 ID、部件集 ID，或单元（实体、壳、梁、厚壳）集 ID。
EQ.0：对整个结构执行疲劳分析。

english:
Type of PID:
EQ.0: Part (default)
EQ.1: Part set
EQ.2: SET_SOLID
EQ.3: SET_BEAM
EQ.4: SET_SHELL
EQ.5: SET_TSHELL
zh:
PID 类型：
EQ.0：部件（默认）。
EQ.1：部件集。
EQ.2：SET_SOLID。
EQ.3：SET_BEAM。
EQ.4：SET_SHELL。
EQ.5：SET_TSHELL。

english:
Treatment of elements failed due to fatigue:
EQ.0:	keep the elements in the model.
EQ.1:	delete the elements from the model
zh:
因疲劳而失效的单元的处理方式：
EQ.0：将单元保留在模型中。
EQ.1：从模型中删除单元。

english:
Exposure time of current load step
EQ.0.0:	set to TEND-TSTART (default).
zh:
当前载荷步的暴露时间。
EQ.0.0：设为 TEND - TSTART（默认）。

english:
Mean stress correction method:
EQ.0: Goodman equation
EQ.1: Soderberg equation
EQ.2: Gerber equation
EQ.3: Goodman tension only
EQ.4: Gerber tension only
EQ.11: Morrow equation
EQ.12: Smith-Watson-Topper equation
zh:
平均应力修正方法：
EQ.0：Goodman 方程。
EQ.1：Soderberg 方程。
EQ.2：Gerber 方程。
EQ.3：仅拉伸 Goodman。
EQ.4：仅拉伸 Gerber。
EQ.11：Morrow 方程。
EQ.12：Smith-Watson-Topper 方程。

english:
Ultimate tensile strength to be used in the Goodman equation
(METHOD = 0, 3) or the Gerber equation (METHOD = 2, 4), or
yield strength to be used in the Soderberg equation (METHOD = 1)
zh: Goodman 方程（METHOD = 0, 3）或 Gerber 方程（METHOD = 2, 4）使用的极限抗拉强度，或 Soderberg 方程（METHOD = 1）使用的屈服强度。

english:
Multiaxial fatigue analysis criterion:
EQ.0: fatigue analysis using equivalent stress or strain index (defined by INDEX in *FATIGUE)
EQ.1: fatigue analysis on multiple planes
EQ.2: fatigue analysis on critical plane which is determined	by the highest 1st principal stress or strain
zh:
多轴疲劳分析准则：
EQ.0：使用等效应力或应变指标进行疲劳分析（由 *FATIGUE 中的 INDEX 定义）。
EQ.1：在多个平面上进行疲劳分析。
EQ.2：在由最高第一主应力或主应变确定的临界平面上进行疲劳分析。

english:
Flag for acceleration unit conversion:
EQ.0: use [length unit]/[time unit]2 as unit of acceleration.
EQ.1: use g as unit for acceleration, and SI units (Newton, kg, meter, second, etc.) elsewhere.
EQ.2: use g as unit for acceleration, and Engineering units (lbf,lbf*second2/inch, inch, second, etc.) elsewhere.
EQ.3: use g as unit for acceleration, and units (kN, kg, mm, ms, GPa, etc.) elsewhere.
EQ4:use g as unit for acceleration, and units (Newton, ton, mm, second, MPa, etc.) elsewhere.
EQ.-1: use g as unit for acceleration and provide the multiplier for converting g to [length unit]/[time unit]2.
zh:
加速度单位转换标志：
EQ.0：使用 [长度单位]/[时间单位]^2 作为加速度单位。
EQ.1：加速度使用 g，其他位置使用 SI 单位（Newton、kg、meter、second 等）。
EQ.2：加速度使用 g，其他位置使用工程单位（lbf、lbf*second^2/inch、inch、second 等）。
EQ.3：加速度使用 g，其他位置使用 kN、kg、mm、ms、GPa 等单位。
EQ.4：加速度使用 g，其他位置使用 Newton、ton、mm、second、MPa 等单位。
EQ.-1：加速度使用 g，并提供将 g 转换为 [长度单位]/[时间单位]^2 的乘子。

english:
Flag for output files(default=0):
EQ.0: Press_Pa(magnitude of pressure vs.frequency),Press_dB(sound pressure level vs.frequency) are provided.
EQ.1: Press_Pa_real(real part of pressure vs.frequency) and Press_Pa_imag(imaginary part of pressure vs.frequency) are provided,in addition to Press_Pa, Press_dB.
zh:
输出文件标志（默认 = 0）：
EQ.0：提供 Press_Pa（压力幅值随频率）和 Press_dB（声压级随频率）。
EQ.1：除 Press_Pa、Press_dB 外，还提供 Press_Pa_real（压力实部随频率）和 Press_Pa_imag（压力虚部随频率）。

english:
Set type:
EQ.0: Node, see *NODE.
EQ.1: Node set, see *SET_NODE.
zh:
集合类型：
EQ.0：节点，见 *NODE。
EQ.1：节点集，见 *SET_NODE。

english:
Norm direction of the plate.
EQ.1: x-direction
EQ.2: y-direction
EQ.3: z-direction
zh:
平板的法向方向。
EQ.1：x 方向。
EQ.2：y 方向。
EQ.3：z 方向。

english:
Flag for defining the center point for the sphere.
EQ.1: mass center of the original structure.
EQ.2: geometry center of the original structure.
EQ.3: defined by (x, y, z)..
zh:
定义球体中心点的标志。
EQ.1：原始结构的质心。
EQ.2：原始结构的几何中心。
EQ.3：由 (x, y, z) 定义。

english:
Parameter to define how coarse or dense the created sphere mesh is. It is a
number between 3 and 39, where "3" gives you 24 elements while "39"
gives you 8664 elements.
zh: 定义生成球面网格疏密程度的参数。该值介于 3 到 39 之间，其中 3 生成 24 个单元，39 生成 8664 个单元。

english:
Type of incident sound wave:
EQ.1: plane wave.
EQ.2: spherical wave.
zh:
入射声波类型：
EQ.1：平面波。
EQ.2：球面波。

english:
Applicable degrees-of-freedom for excitation input (ignored if VAD1 = 4):
EQ.0: translational movement in direction given by vector VID1,
EQ.1: x-translational degree-of-freedom,or x-rotational degree-of-freedom (for torque excitation, VAD1 = 8)
EQ.2: y-translational degree-of-freedom,or y-rotational degree-of-freedom (for torque excitation, VAD1 = 8),
EQ.3: z-translational degree-of-freedom,or z-rotational degree-of-freedom (for torque excitation, VAD1 = 8).
zh:
激励输入适用的自由度（若 VAD1 = 4 则忽略）：
EQ.0：沿向量 VID1 给定方向的平动。
EQ.1：x 平动自由度，或 x 转动自由度（对于扭矩激励，VAD1 = 8）。
EQ.2：y 平动自由度，或 y 转动自由度（对于扭矩激励，VAD1 = 8）。
EQ.3：z 平动自由度，或 z 转动自由度（对于扭矩激励，VAD1 = 8）。

english:
Applicable degrees-of-freedom for response output:
EQ.0: direction given by vector VID2,
EQ.1: x-translational degree-of-freedom,
EQ.2: y-translational degree-of-freedom,
EQ.3: z-translational degree-of-freedom,
EQ.4: x-rotational degree-of-freedom,
EQ.5: y-rotational degree-of-freedom,
EQ.6: z-rotational degree-of-freedom,
EQ.7: x, y and z-translational degrees-of-freedom,
EQ.8: x, y and z-rotational degrees-of-freedom.
zh:
响应输出适用的自由度：
EQ.0：向量 VID2 给定的方向。
EQ.1：x 平动自由度。
EQ.2：y 平动自由度。
EQ.3：z 平动自由度。
EQ.4：x 转动自由度。
EQ.5：y 转动自由度。
EQ.6：z 转动自由度。
EQ.7：x、y 和 z 平动自由度。
EQ.8：x、y 和 z 转动自由度。

english:
Frequency spacing option for FRF output:
EQ.0: linear,
EQ.1: logarithmic,
EQ.2: biased.
zh:
FRF 输出的频率间隔选项：
EQ.0：线性。
EQ.1：对数。
EQ.2：偏置。

english:
Type of load curve defining modal damping coefficient:
EQ.0: Abscissa value defines frequency,
EQ.1: Abscissa value defines mode number.
zh:
定义模态阻尼系数的载荷曲线类型
EQ.0: 横坐标值定义频率，
EQ.1: 横坐标值定义模态数。

english:
Type of N1:
EQ.0: node ID,
EQ.1: node set ID,
EQ.2: segment set ID.
When VAD1, the excitation type, is set to 1, which is acceleration,this field is ignored.
zh:
N1 类型：
EQ.0：节点 ID。
EQ.1：节点集 ID。
EQ.2：段集 ID。
当激励类型 VAD1 设为 1（加速度）时，忽略该字段。

english:
Type of N2:
EQ.0: node ID,
EQ.1: node set ID,
EQ.2: segment set ID.
zh:
N2 类型：
EQ.0：节点 ID。
EQ.1：节点集 ID。
EQ.2：段集 ID。

english:
Output option:
EQ.0: write amplitude and phase angle pairs,
EQ.1: write real and imaginary pairs.
zh:
输出选项：
EQ.0：写出幅值和相角成对数据。
EQ.1：写出实部和虚部成对数据。

english:
FLAG for displacement, velocity and acceleration results:
EQ.0: absolute values are requested,
EQ.1: relative values are requested (for VAD1=0,1,2 only).
zh:
位移、速度和加速度结果标志：
EQ.0：请求绝对值。
EQ.1：请求相对值（仅适用于 VAD1 = 0、1、2）。

english:
Restart option:
EQ.0: initial run,
EQ.1: restart with d3eigv family files,
EQ.2: restart with dumpfrf,
EQ.3: restart with d3eigv family files and dumpfrf.
zh:
重启动选项：
EQ.0：初始运行。
EQ.1：使用 d3eigv 系列文件重启动。
EQ.2：使用 dumpfrf 重启动。
EQ.3：使用 d3eigv 系列文件和 dumpfrf 重启动。

english:
Excitation input type:
EQ.0: base velocity,
EQ.1: base acceleration,
EQ.2: base displacement,
EQ.3: nodal force,
EQ.4: pressure.
EQ.5: enforced velocity by large mass method.
EQ.6: enforced acceleration by large mass method,
EQ.7: enforced displacement by large mass method.
EQ.8: torque.
EQ.9: base angular velocity,
EQ.10: base angular acceleration,
EQ.11: base angular displacement
zh:
激励输入类型：
EQ.0：基底速度。
EQ.1：基底加速度。
EQ.2：基底位移。
EQ.3：节点力。
EQ.4：压力。
EQ.5：大质量法施加强制速度。
EQ.6：大质量法施加强制加速度。
EQ.7：大质量法施加强制位移。
EQ.8：扭矩。
EQ.9：基底角速度。
EQ.10：基底角加速度。
EQ.11：基底角位移。

english:
Response output type:
EQ.0: velocity,
EQ.1: acceleration,
EQ.2: displacement,
EQ.3: nodal force.
zh:
响应输出类型：
EQ.0：速度。
EQ.1：加速度。
EQ.2：位移。
EQ.3：节点力。

english:
Flag for including initial damage ratio.
EQ.0: no initial damage ratio,
GT.0: read existing d3ftg files to get initial damage ratio. When INFTG > 1, it means that the initial damage ratio comes from multiple loading cases (correspondingly, multiple binary databases, defined by Card 7). The value of INFTG should be<=10.
zh:
是否包含初始损伤比的标志。
EQ.0：无初始损伤比。
GT.0：读取已有 d3ftg 文件以获得初始损伤比。当 INFTG > 1 时，表示初始损伤比来自多个载荷工况（对应多个由卡 7 定义的二进制数据库）。INFTG 的值应 <= 10。

english:
S-N fatigue curve ID for the current Part or Part Set.
GT. 0: S-N fatigue curve ID
EQ. -1: S-N fatigue curve uses equation N*S**b = a
EQ. -2: S-N fatigue curve uses equation log(S) = a-b*log(N)
zh:
当前部件或部件集的 S-N 疲劳曲线 ID。
GT.0：S-N 疲劳曲线 ID。
EQ.-1：S-N 疲劳曲线使用方程 N*S**b = a。
EQ.-2：S-N 疲劳曲线使用方程 log(S) = a - b*log(N)。

english:
Type of LCID.
EQ. 0: Semi-log interpolation (default)
EQ. 1: Log-Log interpolation
zh:
LCID 类型。
EQ.0：半对数插值（默认）。
EQ.1：双对数插值。

english:
Method for random fatigue analysis (for option _FATIGUE).
EQ.0:no fatigue analysis,
EQ.1:Steinberg's three-band method,
EQ.2:Dirlik method,
EQ.3:Narrow band method,
EQ.4:Wirsching method,
EQ.5:Chaudhury and Dover method,
EQ.6:Tunna method,
EQ.7:Hancock method.
zh:
随机疲劳分析方法（用于 _FATIGUE 选项）。
EQ.0：不进行疲劳分析。
EQ.1：Steinberg 三带法。
EQ.2：Dirlik 方法。
EQ.3：窄带法。
EQ.4：Wirsching 方法。
EQ.5：Chaudhury 和 Dover 方法。
EQ.6：Tunna 方法。
EQ.7：Hancock 方法。

english:
Field specifying the number of S-N curves to be defined.
GE.0: Number of S-N curves defined by card 8. Card 8 is repeated "NFTG" number of times, one for each S-N fatigue curve definition. The default value is 1.
EQ.-999: S-N curves are defined through *MAT_ADD_FATIGUE.
If the option FATIGUE is not used, ignore this parameter.
zh:
指定要定义的 S-N 曲线数量的字段。
GE.0：由卡 8 定义的 S-N 曲线数量。卡 8 重复 NFTG 次，每次对应一条 S-N 疲劳曲线定义。默认值为 1。
EQ.-999：S-N 曲线通过 *MAT_ADD_FATIGUE 定义。
若未使用 FATIGUE 选项，则忽略该参数。

english:
Type of PID.
EQ. 0: Part (default)
EQ. 1: Part Set
EQ. 2: SET_SOLID
EQ. 3: SET_BEAM
EQ. 4: SET_SHELL
EQ. 5: SET_TSHELL
zh:
PID 类型。
EQ.0：部件（默认）。
EQ.1：部件集。
EQ.2：SET_SOLID。
EQ.3：SET_BEAM。
EQ.4：SET_SHELL。
EQ.5：SET_TSHELL。

english:
If LCID > 0 Flag setting algorithm used when stress is lower than the lowest stress on S-N curve (if LCID > 0), or lower than STHRES (if LCID < 0).
EQ.0: use the life at the last point on S-N curve.
EQ.1: extrapolation from the last two points on S-N curve (only applicable if LCID > 0).
EQ.2: infinity.
If LCID < 0 Flag setting algorithm used when stress is lower STHRES
EQ.0: use the life at STHRES.
EQ.1: Ingnored. only applicable for LCID > 0.
EQ.2: infinity.
zh:
若 LCID > 0：当应力低于 S-N 曲线最低应力时使用的算法标志。
EQ.0：使用 S-N 曲线最后一点处的寿命。
EQ.1：由 S-N 曲线最后两点外推（仅适用于 LCID > 0）。
EQ.2：无穷大。
若 LCID < 0：当应力低于 STHRES 时使用的算法标志。
EQ.0：使用 STHRES 处的寿命。
EQ.1：忽略，仅适用于 LCID > 0。
EQ.2：无穷大。

english:
Stress type of S-N curve in fatigue analysis.
EQ.0:von-mises stress
EQ.1:maximum principal stress (not implemented)
EQ.2:maximum shear stress (not implemented)
EQ.-n:The nth stress component.
zh:
疲劳分析中 S-N 曲线的应力类型。
EQ.0：von Mises 应力。
EQ.1：最大主应力（未实现）。
EQ.2：最大剪应力（未实现）。
EQ.-n：第 n 个应力分量。

english:
Stress scale factor to accommodate different ordinates in S-N curve.
EQ.1:used if the ordinate in S-N curve is stress range (default)
EQ.2:used if the ordinate in S-N curve is stress amplitude
zh:
应力比例因子，用于适配 S-N 曲线中不同的纵坐标。
EQ.1：当 S-N 曲线纵坐标为应力范围时使用（默认）。
EQ.2：当 S-N 曲线纵坐标为应力幅值时使用。

english:
Applicable degrees-of-freedom for excitation input:
EQ. 1: x-translational degree-of-freedom,
EQ. 2: y-translational degree-of-freedom,
EQ. 3: z-translational degree-of-freedom,
EQ. 4: translational movement in direction given by vector VID.
zh:
激励输入适用的自由度：
EQ.1：x 平动自由度。
EQ.2：y 平动自由度。
EQ.3：z 平动自由度。
EQ.4：沿向量 VID 给定方向的平动。

english:
Frequency interpolation option
EQ.0: Logarithmic interpolation,
EQ.1: Semi-logarithmic interpolation.
EQ.2: Linear interpolation.
zh:
频率插值选项：
EQ.0：对数插值。
EQ.1：半对数插值。
EQ.2：线性插值。

english:
Set type for LNID:
EQ.1: Node, see *NODE,
EQ.2: Node set, see *SET_NODE,
EQ.3: Segment set, see *SET_SEGMENT,
EQ.4: Part, see *PART,
EQ.5: Part set, see *SET_PART.
zh:
LNID 的集合类型：
EQ.1：节点，见 *NODE。
EQ.2：节点集，见 *SET_NODE。
EQ.3：段集，见 *SET_SEGMENT。
EQ.4：部件，见 *PART。
EQ.5：部件集，见 *SET_PART。

english:
Material type
EQ.1:	Elastic
EQ.2:	Elasto-plastic.
zh:
材料类型。
EQ.1：弹性。
EQ.2：弹塑性。

english:
Mount type
EQ.1:	Hull Mounted System
EQ.2:	Deck Mounted System
EQ.3:	Shell Plating Mounted System.
zh:
安装类型。
EQ.1：船体安装系统。
EQ.2：甲板安装系统。
EQ.3：壳板安装系统。

english:
Movement type
EQ.1:	Vertical
EQ.2:	Athwartship
EQ.3:	Fore and Aft.
zh:
运动类型。
EQ.1：垂向。
EQ.2：横向。
EQ.3：纵向。

english:
Ship type
EQ.1:	Submarine
EQ.2:	Surface ship.
zh:
舰船类型。
EQ.1：潜艇。
EQ.2：水面舰船。

english:
