english: Damping coefficient (0.05 < recommended value < 0.50; default is 0.10).

zh:
泊松比或粘性系数。如果指定的值在 0 到 0.5 之间（不包含两端），即此处定义的数值被视为泊松比。如果为零，则假定为不可压缩的橡胶状行为，并在内部使用默认值 0.495。如果需要 0.0 的泊松比，请为 PR 输入一个很小的值，例如 0.001。当使用完全积分实体单元且指定了非零泊松比时，将假定为泡沫材料，且由于可压缩性而不使用选择性还原积分。即使 PR 接近 0.500 也是如此。如果定义了除零以外的任何其他值，则 BETA 取为给定数值的绝对值，并假定为几乎不可压缩的橡胶状行为。根据该方程产生增量更新的平均粘性应力：BETA 参数不适用于高度可压缩的泡沫材料。控制由失效面围成的体积的材料失效参数。
LE.0.0：忽略失效准则；
GT.0.0：对失效准则使用实际 K 值。

english: The tensile Poisson's ratio for shells (optional).  If PRTEN is zero, PR/BETA will serve as the Poisson's ratio for both tension and compression in shells.  If PRTEN is nonzero, PR/BETA will serve only as the compressive Poisson's ratio for shells.
zh: shell 的拉伸泊松比（可选）。如果 PRTEN 为零，PR/BETA 将作为 shell 拉伸和压缩的泊松比。如果 PRTEN 非零，PR/BETA 将仅作为 shell 的压缩泊松比。

english:
Use reference geometry to initialize the stress tensor.  The reference geometry is defined by the keyword:*INITIAL_FOAM_REFERENCE_ GEOMETRY (see there for more details).
EQ.0.0:  off,
EQ.1.0:  on.
zh:
使用参考几何初始化应力张量。参考几何由关键字 *INITIAL_FOAM_REFERENCE_GEOMETRY 定义（有关更多详细信息，请参见该关键字）。
EQ.0.0：关闭，
EQ.1.0：开启。

english:
Strain rate type if a table is defined:
EQ.0.0: true strain rate,
EQ.1.0: engineering strain rate.
zh:
若定义了表，则为应变率类型：
EQ.0.0: 真应变率，
EQ.1.0: 工程应变率。

english: Tolerance in stability check.
zh: 稳定性检查中的容差。

english:
Parameter that controls how the rate effects are treated. Applicable to the table definition.
EQ.-1.-: rate effects are considered for loading either in tension or compression, but not for unloading,
EQ.0.0: rate effects are considered for compressive loading only,
EQ.1.0: rate effects are treated identically in tension and compression.
zh:
控制如何处理率效应的参数。适用于表定义。
EQ.-1.0: 在拉伸或压缩加载中考虑率效应，但在卸载时不考虑，
EQ.0.0: 仅在压缩加载中考虑率效应，
EQ.1.0: 在拉伸和压缩中同样处理率效应。

调用粘弹性公式的标志。粘弹性公式不适用于 shell 单元，对于 shell 将被忽略。
EQ.0.0：纯弹性；
EQ.1.0：粘弹性公式（仅限实体）。

english: Time step size for mass scaling, Delta t.
zh: 质量缩放的时间步长 Delta t。

english: Effective plastic strain in weld material at failure.  The plastic strain must exceed the rupture strain (RS) at each integration point before deletion occurs.  See Card 3.
zh: 失效时焊缝材料中的等效塑性应变。在发生删除之前，每个积分点处的塑性应变必须超过断裂应变（RS）。参见 Card 3。

english: Effective plastic strain in weld material at failure.  The plastic strain must exceed the rupture strain (RS) at each integration point before deletion occurs.  See Card 3
zh: 焊缝材料失效时的有效塑性应变。在删除单元之前，每个积分点处的塑性应变必须超过断裂应变（RS）。参见 Card 3

english: Plastic hardening modulus, Eh.
zh: 塑性硬化模量，Eh。

english:
Torsional moment resultant Mrrf at failure.
If zero, failure due to this component is not considered.
zh:
失效时的扭矩合力 Mrrf。
如果为零，则不考虑由于该分量引起的失效。

english:
Moment resultant MssF at failure.
If zero, failure due to this component is not considered.
zh:
失效时的弯矩合力 MssF。
如果为零，则不考虑由于该分量引起的失效。

english:
Moment resultant MttF at failure.
If zero, failure due to this component is not considered.
zh:
失效时的弯矩合力 MttF。
如果为零，则不考虑由于该分量引起的失效。

english:
Axial force resultant Nrrf or maximum axial stress at failure depending on the value of OPT (see below).
If zero, failure due to this component is not considered.
zh:
取决于 OPT 值（见下文）的失效时的轴向合力 Nrrf 或最大轴向应力。
如果为零，则不考虑由于该分量引起的失效。

english:
Force resultant Nrsf or maximum shear stress Tf at failure depending on the value of OPT (see below).
If zero, failure due to this component is not considered.
zh:
取决于 OPT 值（见下文）的失效时的剪切合力 Nrsf 或最大剪应力 Tf。
如果为零，则不考虑由于该分量引起的失效。

english:
Force resultant NrtF at failure.
If zero, failure due to this component is not considered.
zh:
失效时的合力 NrtF。
如果为零，则不考虑由于该分量引起的失效。

english: Maximum axial stress  rr F at failure. If zero, failure due to this component is not considered.
zh: 失效时的最大轴向应力 rr F。如果为零，则不考虑由于该分量引起的失效。

english: Maximum shear stress  F at failure. If zero, failure due to this component is not considered.
zh: 失效时的最大剪应力 F。如果为零，则不考虑由于该分量引起的失效。

english: Failure time if nonzero. If zero this option is ignored.
zh: 失效时间（若非零）。若为零，则忽略此选项。

english: Coefficient of thermal expansion in a-direction at temperature Ti.
zh: 温度 Ti 下 a 方向的线膨胀系数。

english: Coefficient of thermal expansion in b-direction at temperature Ti.
zh: 温度 Ti 下 b 方向的线膨胀系数。

english: Coefficient of thermal expansion in c-direction at temperature Ti.
zh: 温度 Ti 下 c 方向的线膨胀系数。

english:
Material axes option (see MAT_OPTIONTROPIC_ELASTIC, particularly the Material Directions section, for details):
EQ.0.0:	Locally orthotropic with material axes determined by element nodes 1, 2,and 4, as with* DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES.For shells only, the material axes are then rotated about the normal vector to the surface of the shell by the angle BETA.
EQ.1.0 : Locally orthotropic with material axes determined by a point, P, in spaceand the global location of the element center; this is the a - direction.This option is for solid elements only.
EQ.2.0:	Globally orthotropic with material axes determined by vectors defined below, as with* DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR
EQ.3.0 : Locally orthotropic material axes determined by a vector v and the normal vector to the plane of the element.The plane of a solid element is the midsurface between the inner surface and outer surface defined by the first four nodes and the last four nodes of the connectivity of the element, respectively.Thus, for solid elements, AOPT = 3 is only available for hexahedrons.a is determined by taking the cross product of v with the normal vector, b is determined by taking the cross product of the normal vector with a,and c is the normal vector.Then aand b are rotated about c by an angle BETA.BETA may be set in the keyword input for the element or in the input for this keyword.Note that for solids, the material axes may be switched depending on the choice of MACF.The switch may occur before or after applying BETA depending on the value of MACF.
EQ.4.0 : Locally orthotropic in a cylindrical coordinate system with the material axes determined by a vector v,and an originating point, P, which define the centerline axis.This option is for solid elements only.
LT.0.0 : The absolute value of AOPT is a coordinate system ID number(CID on * DEFINE_COORDINATE_OPTION).
zh:
材料轴选项（详见 MAT_OPTIONTROPIC_ELASTIC 材料方向说明）：
EQ.0.0：局部正交，材料轴由单元节点 1、2、4 确定（同 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_NODES）；对于 shell，材料轴绕面法线旋转角度 BETA。
EQ.1.0：局部正交，材料轴由空间点 P 与单元中心全局位置确定（a 方向），仅适用于实体单元。
EQ.2.0：全局正交，材料轴由下方向量定义（同 *DEFINE_COORDINATE_VECTOR）。
EQ.3.0：局部正交，材料轴由向量 v 与单元法向量确定；实体单元的面为前四节点和后四节点定义的内外表面的中面，因此 AOPT = 3 仅适用于六面体实体单元。a 由 v 与法向量的叉积得到，b 由法向量与 a 的叉积得到，c 为法向量；之后 a 和 b 绕 c 旋转 BETA 角。BETA 可在单元关键字或本关键字输入中设置。注意对于实体单元，材料轴可能因 MACF 选择而发生交换，且交换可在 BETA 旋转前后发生，取决于 MACF 值。
EQ.4.0：局部正交，采用柱坐标系，材料轴由向量 v 和原点 P 确定轴线，仅适用于实体单元。
LT.0.0：AOPT 绝对值为坐标系 ID（*DEFINE_COORDINATE_OPTION 中的 CID）。

english: Material angle in degrees for AOPT = 3, may be overridden on the element card, see *ELEMENT_SHELL_BETA or *ELEMENT_SOLID_ORTHO.
zh: AOPT = 3 时的材料角（度），可在单元 card 上覆盖，参见 *ELEMENT_SHELL_BETA 或 *ELEMENT_SOLID_ORTHO。

english: Young's modulus in a-direction at temperature Ti.
zh: 温度 Ti 下 a 方向的杨氏模量。

english: Young's modulus in b-direction at temperature Ti.
zh: 温度 Ti 下 b 方向的杨氏模量。

english: Young's modulus in c-direction at temperature Ti.
zh: 温度 Ti 下 c 方向的杨氏模量。

english: Shear modulus ab at temperature Ti.
zh: 温度 Ti 下的剪切模量 ab。

english: Shear modulus bc at temperature Ti.
zh: 温度 Ti 下的剪切模量 bc。

english: Shear modulus ca at temperature Ti.
zh: 温度 Ti 下的剪切模量 ca。

english:
Material axes change flag for solid elements:
EQ.1 : No change, default
EQ.2 : Switch material axes a and b after BETA rotation
EQ.3 : Switch material axes a and c after BETA rotation
EQ.4 : Switch material axes b and c after BETA rotation
EQ. - 4 : Switch material axes b and c before BETA rotation
EQ. - 3 : Switch material axes a and c before BETA rotation
EQ. - 2 : Switch material axes a and b before BETA rotation
Figure Error!Reference source not found.indicates when LS - DYNA applies MACF during the process to obtain the final material axes.If BETA on * ELEMENT_SOLID_{OPTION} is defined, then that BETA is used for the rotation for all AOPT options.Otherwise, if AOPT = 3, the BETA input on Card 3 rotates the axes.For all other values of AOPT, the material axes will be switched as specified by MACF, but no BETA rotation will be performed.
zh:
实体单元材料轴交换标志：
EQ.1：不交换（默认）
EQ.2：BETA 旋转后交换材料轴 a 和 b
EQ.3：BETA 旋转后交换材料轴 a 和 c
EQ.4：BETA 旋转后交换材料轴 b 和 c
EQ.-4：BETA 旋转前交换材料轴 b 和 c
EQ.-3：BETA 旋转前交换材料轴 a 和 c
EQ.-2：BETA 旋转前交换材料轴 a 和 b
若 *ELEMENT_SOLID_{OPTION} 上定义了 BETA，则该 BETA 用于所有 AOPT 选项的旋转；否则，若 AOPT = 3，Card 3 上的 BETA 旋转轴；其他 AOPT 值时，材料轴按 MACF 交换但不执行 BETA 旋转。

english: Poisson's ratio ba at temperature Ti.
zh: 温度 Ti 下的泊松比 ba。

english: Poisson's ratio ca at temperature Ti.
zh: 温度 Ti 下的泊松比 ca。

english: Poisson's ratio cb at temperature Ti.
zh: 温度 Ti 下的泊松比 cb。

english:
Use reference geometry to initialize the stress tensor, see *INITIAL_FOAM_REFERENCE_ GEOMETRY. Only for 8-noded solid elements with one point integration.
EQ.0.0: off (default),
EQ.1.0: on.
zh:
使用参考几何形状初始化应力张量，参见 *INITIAL_FOAM_REFERENCE_GEOMETRY。仅适用于单点积分的 8 节点实体单元。
EQ.0.0: 关闭（默认），
EQ.1.0: 开启。

english: i'th temperature.
zh: 第 i 个温度。

english:
Boundary layer mesh generation strategy:
A default boundary layer mesh thickness based on the surface mesh size will be chosen.BLTH and BLFE are not needed.
EQ.1:Constant element size using BLFE and NELTH.
EQ.2: Repartition following a quadratic polynomial and using BLFE, NELTH and BLTH.
EQ.3: Repartition following a growth scale factor.
zh:
边界层网格生成策略：
将基于表面网格尺寸选择默认边界层网格厚度，不需要 BLTH 和 BLFE。
EQ.1：使用 BLFE 和 NELTH 的常数单元尺寸。
EQ.2：使用 BLFE、NELTH 和 BLTH 按二次多项式重新分布。
EQ.3：按增长比例因子重新分布。

english:
Flag to control treatment of duplicate parameter definitions:
EQ.1: issue a warning and ignore the new definition (default)
EQ.2: issue a warning and accept the new definition
EQ.3: issue an error and ignore (terminates at end of input)
EQ.4: accept silently
EQ.5: ignore silently
.
zh:
控制重复参数定义处理方式的标志：
EQ.1：发出警告并忽略新定义（默认）。
EQ.2：发出警告并接受新定义。
EQ.3：发出错误并忽略（输入结束时终止）。
EQ.4：静默接受。
EQ.5：静默忽略。

english: Get or set the Heading for the part
zh: 获取或设置部件的标题。

english: First mode for damping, (1 <= MSTART <= NMFB) .
zh: 阻尼的第一个模态（1 <= MSTART <= NMFB）。

english:
Type of perturbation
EQ.1: Harmonic Field
EQ.2: Fade out all perturbations at this node set
EQ.3: Read perturbations from a file
EQ.4: Spectral field
EQ.8:	Random value from uniform distribution.
zh:
扰动类型：
EQ.1：谐波场。
EQ.2：在该节点集合处淡出所有扰动。
EQ.3：从文件读取扰动。
EQ.4：谱场。
EQ.8：均匀分布随机值。

english:
Type of the RVE boundary condition:
EQ. 0: Periodic Displacement Boundary Condition (PDBC).
EQ. 1: Linear Displacement Boundary Condition (LDBC).
zh:
RVE 边界条件类型：
EQ.0：周期位移边界条件（PDBC）。
EQ.1：线性位移边界条件（LDBC）。

english:
Dimension of the RVE.
EQ.2: 2D geometry.
EQ.3: 3D geometry.
zh:
RVE 维度：
EQ.2：2D 几何。
EQ.3：3D 几何。

english:
Type of the given RVE mesh:
EQ. 0: The mesh is non-matching for PDBC.
EQ. 1: The mesh is PDBC-matching. This variable is effective only when the user chooses to impose PDBC by setting BC=0.
When the mesh is PDBC-matching, the nodal distributions on the RVEs opposite sides match well with each other.
For instance, let us consider two opposite surfaces (surface A, and surface B) that are both perpendicular to the X-axis,
for any FEM node on surface A, if we draw a straight line that is parallel to the X-axis, then the intersection
point of this line with surface B must also be an FEM node. For such PDBC-matching meshes, an efficient
direct nearest neighbor search algorithm can be used for the PDBC imposition, so a PDBC-matching mesh is preferred if
users would like to impose the periodic displacement boundary condition for RVE analysis. However, it is not always straightforward
to create PDBC-matching meshes for RVE models if very complex material micro-structures exist. In this case,
IMATCH=0 can be chosen to impose PDBC on a non-matching mesh by employing a projection-based constraint imposition method.
zh:
给定 RVE 网格类型：
EQ.0：PDBC 非匹配网格。
EQ.1：PDBC 匹配网格。该变量仅在 BC=0 施加 PDBC 时有效。PDBC 匹配网格中，RVE 对侧节点分布良好匹配，可使用高效最近邻搜索；复杂微结构难以生成匹配网格时，可用 IMATCH=0 通过基于投影的约束施加方法在非匹配网格上施加 PDBC。

english:
Type of input:
EQ.0: RVE boundary conditions are fully defined by two factors: (1) the parameter "BC" of this input card,
and (2) the mesh information in the file [MESHFILE]. When running an RVE simulation, LS-DYNA automatically
creates a file named "rve_[MESHFILE].k",
which contains all the necessary information (e.g., control nodes, displacement constraints, etc.) for boundary condition enforcement.
EQ.1: Users provide a file named  rve_[MESHFILE].k  to define the boundary condition keywords
(e.g. *CONSTRAINED_MULTIPLE_GLOBAL, *BOUNDARY_SPC_NODE, *BOUNDARY_MOTION_NODE, etc.) and control nodes for
enforcing RVE boundary conditions. Note that, it is usually non-trivial to manually define all the keywords for RVE boundary conditions.
If the file "rve_[MESHFILE].k" is not given when running RVE simulations, then the option INPT=1 will be ignored, and
LS-DYNA will create "rve_[MESHFILE].k" based on the parameter "BC" of this input card and the mesh information in the file [MESHFILE].
zh:
输入类型：
EQ.0：RVE 边界条件由本输入卡片参数 BC 和文件 [MESHFILE] 中的网格信息完全定义。运行 RVE 仿真时，LS-DYNA 会自动创建 rve_[MESHFILE].k，其中包含施加边界条件所需的信息。
EQ.1：用户提供 rve_[MESHFILE].k 文件，用于定义 RVE 边界条件关键字和控制节点。若运行时未给出该文件，则忽略 INPT=1，并根据本卡片 BC 和 [MESHFILE] 网格信息创建该文件。

english:
ID of the loading curve. To perform RVE analysis, a loading curve defined by the keyword *DEFINE_CURVE
is required to specify the loading history. There are two columns in the loading curve, where the first column
is adopted as a scaling factor for the user-defined macroscopic deformation measure (H11, H22,   H13, which are defined in CARD3 of this *RVE_ANALYSIS_FEM keyword),
and the second column provides the corresponding scaling factor for the loading time (1.0 in the second column denotes the end of the loading).
zh: 载荷曲线 ID。执行 RVE 分析需要由 *DEFINE_CURVE 定义的载荷曲线来指定加载历史。该曲线两列中，第一列作为用户定义宏观变形量的比例因子，第二列给出加载时间比例因子（第二列为 1.0 表示加载结束）。

english: Sensor IBirth time of this sensor.
zh: 该传感器的 IBirth 时间。

english: Death time of this sensor.
zh: 该传感器的失效时刻。

english: Time interval between updates. If negative, -DTUPD is the curve defining update interval as a function of time.
zh: 更新之间的时间间隔。若为负，-DTUPD是定义更新间隔关于时间的函数的曲线。

english: Switch ID can be referred directly by *SENSOR_CONTROL to control the status of entities like CONTACT and AIRBAG, or can be referred to by *SENSOR_SWITCH_CALC-LOGIC for logic computation.
zh: 开关 ID，可直接由 *SENSOR_CONTROL 引用以控制接触（CONTACT）和气囊（AIRBAG）等实体的状态，也可由 *SENSOR_SWITCH_CALC-LOGIC 引用进行逻辑计算。

english: First nodal attribute default value is 0.0.
zh: 第一节点属性默认值为 0.0。

english: Second nodal attribute default value is 0.0.
zh: 第二节点属性默认值为 0.0。

english: Third nodal attribute default value is 0.0.
zh: 第三节点属性默认值为 0.0。

english: Fourth nodal attribute default value is 0.0.
zh: 第四节点属性默认值为 0.0。

在双尺度协同仿真中指定跨不同尺度的耦合类型。该标志仅应包含在 *INCLUDE_COSIM 引用的输入文件中提供耦合信息的节点集中；
EQ.1: 绑定接触耦合
EQ.2: 实体嵌入 shell 浸入式耦合。

english: First node ID of the set.
zh: 集合的第一个节点 ID。

english: Second node ID of the set.
zh: 该集合的第二个节点 ID。

english: Third node ID of the set.
zh: 该集合的第三个节点 ID。

english: Fourth node ID of the set.
zh: 集合的第四个节点 ID。

english: Fifth node ID of the set.
zh: 集合的第五个节点 ID。

english: Sixth node ID of the set.
zh: 该集合的第六个节点 ID。

english: Seventh node ID of the set.
zh: 该集合的第七个节点 ID。

english: Eighth node ID of the set.
zh: 集合的第八个节点 ID。

english: Node set ID. All node sets should have a unique set ID.
zh: 节点集 ID。所有节点集应具有唯一的 set ID。

zh: 附加标题行。
